67c6f967.title: COSS Solutions Manager
67c6f967.company: Centre for Open Societal Systems - COSS
67c6f967.description:
**Job Description: COSS Solutions Manager** 




**Organisation:** 
 COSS (Centre for Open Societal Systems), IIIT\-Bangalore
 



**Reports to:** 
 GTM Lead
 



**Location:** 
 Bengaluru (hybrid) \| travel for conferences and country engagement as pipeline develops
 



  





**The opportunity** 




  





 COSS manages a portfolio of open\-source Digital Public Goods used across agriculture, education, and capacity building — deployed at national scale in government systems across multiple countries. We are now building the global go\-to\-market engine to take this to new markets. Getting a government to adopt a DPG is not a simple sale. It involves a long technical evaluation — ministries want to understand exactly how the platform works, how it would fit their existing systems, what a deployment would look like end\-to\-end, and who would implement it. They ask hard questions, and they need to see it working before they commit.
 



 The Solutions Manager exists to answer those questions. This is an individual contributor role at the technical heart of the GTM function — part pre\-sales engineer, part product translator, part implementation strategist. You will own the demonstration environment, build the storyboards that make the technology legible to governments, support country engagement with technical depth, and give SI partners what they need to implement confidently. You will be the person in the room — or on the call — when the conversation gets technical.
 



**What you'll do** 




  





**Solutioning and pre\-sales support** 



* Lead solutioning conversations with government counterparts and donors: understand their context, map it to platform capabilities, and articulate what a real deployment would require
* Support regional GTM leads on active country conversations — join calls, respond to technical questions, and help structure the path from interest to commitment
* Prepare country\-specific solution architectures: what gets deployed, in what sequence, using which components, and how it integrates with existing government systems
* Contribute to donor funding proposals: technical sections, capability matrices, and implementation approach documentation
* Conduct hardware sizing and cost assessment to enable the solutioning for the adopters



  





**Demonstrations and sandbox management** 



* Own and maintain live demonstration environments across the COSS DPG portfolio — up to date, stable, and ready to show at short notice
* Run live product demonstrations for government audiences, ministry officials, and donor representatives — including remote and in\-country sessions
* Customise demo flows for specific country contexts: adjust language, use case framing, and data to reflect the audience's own system and priorities
* Prepare demo scripts and walkthroughs that regional GTM leads can use independently when needed



**Technical content and lifecycle storyboards** 



* Build and maintain a library of lifecycle storyboards: visual, end\-to\-end representations of how each platform gets set up, configured, and used across a real government deployment
* Translate technical platform documentation into accessible formats for government and donor audiences — explainers, capability summaries, integration overviews
* Develop reusable technical assets that feed into GTM collateral: architecture diagrams, deployment checklists, integration FAQs
* Keep technical content current as platforms evolve — coordinate with the product and engineering side to track changes



**Partner technical enablement** 



* Support the onboarding of new implementation partners: walk through platform architecture, share technical documentation, and clarify integration requirements
* Run technical orientation sessions for SI partners entering a new country or platform — ensuring they can begin implementations independently
* Be a reference point for partners with technical questions during active engagements
* Feed implementation learnings back to the GTM team: what partners struggle with, where documentation is thin, and what would make deployments faster



**What we're looking for** 




**Must have** 



* 5\+ years of experience in a technical role with a meaningful implementation or pre\-sales dimension — enterprise software, development sector platforms, or government systems
* Ability to understand platform architecture and explain it clearly to a non\-technical government audience without oversimplifying
* Hands\-on experience setting up and running software demonstrations — including customising demo environments and presenting live to decision\-makers
* Comfort with technical documentation: able to read an API spec, write a capability summary, and produce a clear architecture overview
* Experience working on or alongside large\-scale digital implementations — ideally in a government, public sector, or international development context
* Strong verbal and technical communication and presence in meetings — able to handle technical Q\&A from senior ministry officials without losing the room



  





**Good to have** 



* Familiarity with the DPG or DPI ecosystem (MOSIP, DHIS2, DIGIT, Sunbird, OpenG2P, beckn or similar open\-source platforms)
* Experience with government\-facing organisations or B2G contexts
* Prior exposure to education technology, agricultural systems, or capacity building platforms
* Background in implementation consulting, system integration, or solution architecture



  





**Why join** 




 The DPG ecosystem has a real gap between platforms that work at scale and governments that know how to evaluate and adopt them. This role is the bridge. You will work across multiple platforms, multiple countries, and multiple stages of a government's decision process — translating complex technology into real adoption. It is technically substantive, externally facing, and directly tied to outcomes that matter.
 



**How we'll measure success (first 12 months)** 



* Demo environment maintained and active: stable, current, and used in live government demonstrations across at least two pipeline countries
* Country solutioning coverage: technical inputs delivered for every active pipeline opportunity at evaluation stage — no conversation stalls for lack of a technical answer
* Lifecycle storyboard library built: end\-to\-end storyboards complete for each platform in the active GTM portfolio and in use in government conversations
* Partner technical enablement running: SI partners oriented and independently capable of beginning implementations without hand\-holding
* Due diligence quality: government and donor technical queries answered accurately and on time, with clear documentation that travels beyond the initial respons

3c1e1924.title: Solutions Engineer - ANZ
3c1e1924.description:
**About Airwallex**
 Airwallex is the only unified payments and financial platform for global businesses. Powered by our unique combination of proprietary infrastructure and software, we empower over 200,000 businesses worldwide – including Brex, Rippling, Navan, Qantas, SHEIN and many more – with fully integrated solutions to manage everything from business accounts, payments, spend management and treasury, to embedded finance at a global scale.
   

  

 Proudly founded in Melbourne, we have a team of over 2,200 of the brightest and most innovative people in tech across 26 offices around the globe. Valued at US$8 billion and backed by world\-leading investors including T. Rowe Price, Visa, Mastercard, Robinhood Ventures, Sequoia, Salesforce Ventures, DST Global, and Lone Pine Capital, Airwallex is leading the charge in building the global payments and financial platform of the future. If you’re ready to do the most ambitious work of your career, join us.
   

  

**Attributes We Value**
 We hire successful builders with founder\-like energy who want real impact, accelerated learning, and true ownership. You bring strong role\-related expertise and sharp thinking, and you’re motivated by our mission and operating principles. You move fast with good judgment, dig deep with curiosity, and make decisions from first principles, balancing speed and rigor.
   

  

 You're humble and collaborative; turn zero‑to‑one ideas into real products, and you “get stuff done” end\-to\-end. You use AI to work smarter and solve problems faster. Here, you’ll tackle complex, high‑visibility problems with exceptional teammates and grow your career as we build the future of global banking. If that sounds like you, let’s build what’s next.
   

  

 The role
   

  

 As a Solutions Engineer, you will support Embedded Finance, Payment Acceptance \& wider opportunities across the ANZ organisation. This role partners closely with commercial teams to provide technical pre\-sales support across complex payments and integration led deals. You will help qualify customer requirements, shape solution design, manage technical stakeholder conversations, and improve execution through the sales cycle.
   

  

 This is a role for someone who combines strong technical judgment with customer empathy, clear communication, and commercial awareness. The role is intended to improve technical coverage, increase deal velocity, and create more consistency in how complex opportunities are qualified and progressed.
   

  

 What you’ll be doing
   

  

* Support Embedded Finance and Payment Acceptance opportunities across frontbook and backbook merchants and the ANZ organisation, including but not limited to complex API and integration opportunities.
* Lead technical discovery and qualification with prospective customers.
* Translate customer requirements into solution designs and product mapping.
* Run customer workshops, demos, and architecture discussions.
* Validate technical use cases, integrations, and implementation approaches.
* Support RFP responses, security reviews, and technical objection handling.
* Coordinate internally with Commercial, Product, Engineering, Compliance, and Implementation teams to move deals forward.
* Create reusable solution assets, playbooks, and standard patterns that improve leverage across repeatable deal types.
* Help customers and internal stakeholders understand trade offs, implementation considerations, and the best path to value.


 What you’ll need
   

  

* Minimum of 4 years experience in solution engineering, solutions consulting, sales engineering, implementation, or a similar customer facing technical role across financial services
* Strong understanding of APIs, technical integrations, and solution design in financial services, payments, SaaS, or platform environments.
* Ability to run effective discovery, understand business and technical requirements, and turn them into clear recommended solutions.
* Strong communication skills and confidence working with commercial teams, product teams, and customer stakeholders.
* Ability to explain technical concepts clearly to both technical and non\-technical audiences.
* Strong problem\-solving skills, sound technical judgment, and a practical approach to trade\-offs.
* A builder mindset and willingness to help create repeatable processes, assets, and standard patterns that scale.
* Experience in payments, embedded finance, marketplaces, platforms, or complex financial infrastructure is highly valued.


 Why join us
   

  

 At Airwallex, you’ll have the opportunity to work on complex, high impact problems with exceptional teammates across global fintech. This role sits close to customers, product, and commercial teams, and is a chance to shape how we scale repeatable solutioning across Embedded Finance and Payment Acceptance.
   

  

**Applicant Safety Policy: Fraud and Third\-Party Recruiters**
*To protect you from recruitment scams, please be aware that Airwallex will not ask for bank details, sensitive ID numbers (i.e. passport), or any form of payment during the application or interview process. All official communication will come from an @* 
*airwallex.com* 
*email address. Please apply only through* 
*careers.airwallex.com* 
*or our official LinkedIn page.*
*Airwallex does not accept unsolicited resumes from search firms/recruiters. Airwallex will not pay any fees to search firms/recruiters if a candidate is submitted by a search firm/recruiter unless an agreement has been entered into with respect to specific open position(s). Search firms/recruiters submitting resumes to Airwallex on an unsolicited basis shall be deemed to accept this condition, regardless of any other provision to the contrary.*
**Equal opportunity**
 Airwallex is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We value diversity and anyone seeking employment at Airwallex is considered based on merit, qualifications, competence and talent. We don’t regard color, religion, race, national origin, sexual orientation, ancestry, citizenship, sex, marital or family status, disability, gender, or any other legally protected status when making our hiring decisions. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know.

591a8ee0.title: Solutions Architect
591a8ee0.description:
FEQ427R107
   

  

 As a Solutions Architect, you will shape the future of the Data \& AI landscape by working with the most sophisticated data engineering and data science teams in the world. You will be a technical advisor internally to the sales team, and work with the product team as an advocate of your customers in the field. You will help our customers to achieve tangible data\-driven outcomes through the use of our Databricks Lakehouse Platform, helping data teams complete projects and integrate our platform into their enterprise Ecosystem. You'll grow as a leader in your field, while finding solutions to our customers' biggest challenges in big data, analytics, data engineering and data science problems
   

  

 Reporting to the Field Engineering Manager, you will collaborate with our most strategic prospects and customers, work directly with product and engineering to drive the Databricks roadmap forward, and work with the broader customer\-facing team to develop architectures and solutions using our platform. You will guide customers through the competitive landscape, best practices, and implementation, and develop technical champions along the way.
   

  

 This is a Hybrid role, based in Mumbai.
   

  

**The Impact You Will Have**
* You will partner with the sales team and provide technical leadership to help customers understand how Databricks can help solve their business problems.
* You will work directly with the sales team to develop your book of business, define account strategies, and execute those strategies to help your customers and prospects solve their business problems with Databricks.
* Consult on Big Data architectures, implement proof of concepts for strategic projects, spanning data engineering, data science and machine learning, and SQL analysis workflows. As well as validating integrations with cloud services, home grown tools, and other 3rd party applications
* Collaborate with your fellow Solutions Architects, using your skills to support each other and our users
* Become an expert in, promote, and recruit contributors for Databricks inspired open\-source projects (Spark, Delta Lake, and MLflow) across the developer community.


**What We Look For**
* 8\+ years in a data engineering, data science, technical architecture, or similar pre\-sales/consulting role
* 8\+ years of experience with Big Data technologies, including Apache Spark™, AI, Data Science, Data Engineering, Hadoop, Cassandra, and others
* Strong consulting / customer facing experience , working with external clients across a variety of industry markets
* Coding experience in Python, R, Java, Apache Spark™ or Scala
* Experience building distributed data systems
* Have built solutions with public cloud providers such as AWS, Azure, or GCP
* Available to travel to customers in your region
* Nice to have: Databricks Certification


**About Databricks**
 Databricks is the data and AI company. More than 10,000 organizations worldwide — including Comcast, Condé Nast, Grammarly, and over 50% of the Fortune 500 — rely on the Databricks Data Intelligence Platform to unify and democratize data, analytics and AI. Databricks is headquartered in San Francisco, with offices around the globe and was founded by the original creators of Lakehouse, Apache Spark™, Delta Lake and MLflow. To learn more, follow Databricks on Twitter, LinkedIn and Facebook.
   

  

**Benefits**
 At Databricks, we strive to provide comprehensive benefits and perks that meet the needs of all of our employees. For specific details on the benefits offered in your region click here.
   

  

**Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion**
 At Databricks, we are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive culture where everyone can excel. We take great care to ensure that our hiring practices are inclusive and meet equal employment opportunity standards. Individuals looking for employment at Databricks are considered without regard to age, color, disability, ethnicity, family or marital status, gender identity or expression, language, national origin, physical and mental ability, political affiliation, race, religion, sexual orientation, socio\-economic status, veteran status, and other protected characteristics.
   

  

**Compliance**
**If access to export\-controlled technology or source code is required for performance of job duties, it is within Employer's discretion whether to apply for a U.S. government license for such positions, and Employer may decline to proceed with an applicant on this basis alone.**

c472259d.title: Lead Demo Engineer / Presales Solutions Consulting
c472259d.description:
Here at Appian, our values of
 **Intensity** 
 and
 **Excellence** 
 define who we are. We set high standards and live up to them, ensuring that everything we do is done with care and quality. We approach every challenge with ambition and commitment, holding ourselves and each other accountable to achieve the best results. When you join Appian, you’ll be part of a passionate team dedicated to accomplishing hard things, together.
 



  
 


**Lead Demo Engineer** 

  
 



 Here at Appian, our core values of Excellence and Intensity define who we are. In short, this means we constantly seek to understand the best for our customers, we go beyond completion in our work, we strive for excellence with intensity, and we embrace candid communication. These values guide our actions and shape our culture every day. When you join Appian, you'll be part of a passionate team that's dedicated to accomplishing hard things.
 



  
 




 SC 2\.0 is the engine powering our vision
 
 . Appian's Sales Solutions Consulting team is in the midst of an exciting transformation \-\- redefining what it means to be a trusted advisor in today's fast\-paced, mission\-driven environment. Our SCs don't just demo features \-\- they tell stories, co\-create with customers, and help shape strategy with technical credibility and business insight.
 
 Read More About SC 2\.0 Here
 




 You can listen to our Global SSC leader, Gregg Aldana discuss SC 2\.0
 
 here
 
 .
 



 The SPEAR Team (Strategic Presales Execution and Readiness) is the operational engine behind Appian's global Presales organization \-\- the team that builds the tools, assets, governance, and infrastructure that let Solutions Consultants do their best work. As Lead Demo Engineer on SPEAR, you are not on the sidelines of SC 2\.0 \-\- you are leading one of the teams that makes it possible at scale.
 



  
 



**The Role** 




 Are you a seasoned Appian developer with a passion for crafting impactful technology solutions and mentoring others? As the Lead Demo Engineer for Appian's SPEAR Team in Chennai, you'll take on a dual role: leading the day\-to\-day operations of the Chennai Demo Engineers and serving as a senior individual contributor yourself. You'll play a critical part in scaling Appian's global Presales organization by managing team workflows, providing technical guidance, and personally delivering the highest\-quality demo assets that fuel hundreds of sales engagements each year.
 



  
 



 In this role, you'll act as both a manager and a technical lead. You'll oversee the daily activities of the team, monitor progress, ensure work is completed on time and to a high standard, and serve as a key resource for technical guidance when Demo Engineers run into challenges. You'll also continue to do the work yourself \-\- de\-branding prospect demos, modernizing aging assets with the latest Appian capabilities, contributing to DemoHub (Appian's centralized demo catalog and governance system), and producing polished clickable demos, walkthrough videos, and scripts. By fostering a collaborative and supportive environment, you'll empower your team to excel while ensuring alignment with global SPEAR priorities and deadlines.
 



  
 



 You will report directly to the US\-based Area Vice President of Solutions Consulting, who leads the SPEAR Team. This reporting structure gives you a direct line into the strategy and priorities of Appian's global Presales organization, and positions you as the on\-site Chennai leader and primary liaison between the Chennai team and stakeholders worldwide.
 



  
 



 This role combines leadership, deep technical expertise, and strategic oversight, offering you the chance to make a significant impact both as a contributor and as a mentor. If you thrive in a fast\-paced, collaborative environment and are ready to elevate the capabilities of your team while showcasing the power of Appian's platform, this role is for you.
 



  
 



**What you'll be doing...** 



* Team Leadership: Manage and mentor a team of Demo Engineers in Chennai, ensuring smooth day\-to\-day operations, clear priorities, and alignment with global Presales strategy.
* Technical Oversight: Provide senior technical guidance on capturing, refining, and expanding product demos, ensuring all outputs are reusable, impactful, and aligned with current Appian capabilities and industry trends.
* Operational Excellence: Own the cataloging and ingestion of product demos into DemoHub, maintaining high standards of quality, consistency, and discoverability across hundreds of assets per year.
* Senior Technical Contribution: Personally de\-brand prospect\-specific demos, enhance them with advanced new Appian features, and prepare them for broader organizational use \-\- setting the technical bar for the team's work.
* DemoHub Application Development: Lead and contribute to ongoing development and maintenance of the DemoHub Appian application itself \-\- the platform that stores, governs, and surfaces demo content to the global SC team. This includes building new features, fixing bugs, and improving usability.
* Clickable Demo Production: Oversee and personally contribute to the recording, editing, and continuous updating of interactive clickable demos in a commercial third\-party demo platform, ensuring our self\-service and accelerated demo experiences stay accurate, on\-brand, and current.
* Demo Artifact Creation: Produce and oversee production of supporting artifacts including walkthrough videos, demo scripts, talk tracks, and quick\-reference guides that help SCs adopt and adapt assets quickly.
* Cross\-functional Collaboration: Act as the primary liaison between the Chennai team and global stakeholders, including the US\-based SPEAR Team and Presales leadership, ensuring seamless communication, project execution, and knowledge transfer across time zones.
* Continuous Improvement: Develop and implement processes that improve the efficiency, quality, and throughput of demo ingestion, refinement, and maintenance workflows.
* Mentorship: Provide technical mentorship to Demo Engineers, fostering skill development, career growth, and a strong engineering culture within the team.
* Additional SPEAR Initiatives: Lead or contribute to other Presales enablement and readiness initiatives as the SPEAR Team's portfolio evolves.



  
 



**Who you are...** 



* Strong, senior\-level experience with Appian or a similar low\-code application development platform, including design, development, and debugging of complex applications.
* Proven ability to manage and mentor technical teams, with demonstrated leadership and people management skills.
* Excellent technical and programming skills, with concrete examples of delivering polished, impactful work that others have used as a benchmark.
* Highly organized, with a track record of managing multiple projects and priorities in a high\-volume, dynamic environment.
* Skilled in cross\-functional collaboration, with solid verbal, written, presentation, and interpersonal communication abilities \-\- including the ability to communicate clearly across global teams and time zones.
* Familiarity with interactive demo platforms (Storylane, Reprise, Navattic, Walnut, or similar) is a strong plus.
* Familiarity with video recording and editing tools for producing walkthrough content is a plus.
* Self\-motivated, driven individual with a proactive approach to problem\-solving and a strong sense of urgency.
* B.S. or M.S. in Engineering, Computer Science, or related fields, or equivalent work experience.



  
 



  
 



  
 




**Tools and Resources** 




* Training and Development: During onboarding, we focus on equipping new hires with the skills and knowledge for success through department\-specific training. Continuous learning is a central focus at Appian, with dedicated mentorship and the First\-Friend program being widely utilized resources for new hires.
* Growth Opportunities: Appian provides a diverse array of growth and development opportunities, including our leadership program tailored for new and aspiring managers, a comprehensive library of specialized department training through Appian University, skills based training, and tuition reimbursement for those aiming to advance their education. This commitment ensures that employees have access to a holistic range of development opportunities.
* Community: We’ll immerse you into our community rooted in respect starting on day one. Appian fosters inclusivity through our 8 employee\-led affinity groups. These groups help employees build stronger internal and external networks by planning social, educational, and outreach activities to connect with Appianites and larger initiatives throughout the company.



**Benefits**




 Appian offers a comprehensive benefits package designed to support your health, wellbeing, and financial future. Benefits may include health coverage, Employee Assistance Program (EAP) with free mental health support, life and disability insurance, an Employee Stock Purchase Program (ESPP), a retirement/pension plan, wellness dollars, tuition reimbursement, family\-forming benefits and more. Benefits vary by country—please ask your Talent Acquisition contact for details specific to the location you are applying to.
 




**About Appian** 





 Appian provides AI automation for mission\-critical work. We automate complex processes in large enterprises and governments. Our platform is known for its unique reliability and scale. We’ve been automating processes for more than 25 years and understand enterprise operations like no one else. For more information, visit appian.com. \[Nasdaq: APPN]
 



 Follow Appian: LinkedIn, Youtube, Instagram, Facebook
 



*Appian is an equal opportunity employer that strives to attract and retain the best talent. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to any characteristic protected by applicable federal, state, or local law.* 




*Appian provides reasonable accommodations to applicants in accordance with all applicable laws. If you need a reasonable accommodation for any part of the employment process, please contact us by email at ReasonableAccommodations@appian.com. Please note that only inquiries concerning a request for reasonable accommodation will be responded to from this email address.* 




*Appian's Applicant \& Candidate Privacy Notice*

a80f4825.title: Pre Sales - IT techno-commercial Pre-Sales professional
a80f4825.description:
**Purpose of the Role** 




 The Pre\-Sales Consultant acts as a strategic bridge between sales, delivery, and solution teams, translating customer business needs into tailored solutions and driving technology evaluations and serve as the key technical advisor and advocate for Impiger’s services and solutions.
 



 As the technical face of the sales team, the Pre\-Sales Consultant should be articulate, quick\-thinking, and adept at engaging with C\-level executives and decision\-makers. They must possess a deep understanding of technology landscapes, competitive differentiators, and enterprise solutioning while effectively leading a pre\-sales team to ensure successful business outcomes.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




**Solutioning \& Customer Engagement** 




 • Lead and drive solution discovery, scoping, and proposal creation for large\-scale enterprise opportunities.
 



 • Understand customer business requirements, identify pain points, and propose tailored solutions that
 



 align with their strategic vision.
 



 • Provide technical leadership in the pre\-sales process, ensuring the best\-fit solution architecture is
 



 proposed.
 



 • Develop and present compelling solution demonstrations, Proof\-of\-Concepts (PoCs), and business cases
 



 that showcase Impiger’s competitive edge.
 



 • Act as a trusted advisor to customers, guiding them through the technical decision\-making process.
 



  





**Team Leadership \& Coaching** 




 • Manage, mentor, and coach a team of pre\-sales consultants, fostering professional development and
 



 technical expertise.
 



 • Define pre\-sales best practices, ensuring consistency in solution presentations and technical assessments.
 



 • Drive knowledge\-sharing sessions, including market trends, competitor analysis, and evolving
 



 technology stacks.
 



  





**Collaboration \& Cross\-Functional Engagement** 




 • Work closely with the sales team, delivery teams, and product management to design and refine solutions
 



 based on evolving customer needs.
 



 • Engage with partners, system integrators, and third\-party vendors to enhance Impiger’s solution
 



 offerings.
 



 • Own and Lead to strategic RFP and tender responses, ensuring winning proposals through clear value
 



 articulation.
 



  





**Market Intelligence \& Industry Trends** 




 • Stay ahead of emerging technologies, industry trends, and competitor movements to position Impiger’s
 



 offerings effectively.
 



 • Participate in industry conferences, trade shows, and customer forums to strengthen Impiger’s market
 



 presence.
 



  





**Operational Excellence \& Reporting** 




 • Ensure pre\-sales KPIs are met, including deal win rates, proposal quality, and response time.
 



 • Maintain detailed documentation on client interactions, solution architectures, and lessons learned.
 



 • Standardize pre\-sales processes to optimize efficiency and alignment with sales and delivery teams.
 



**Skills \& Requirements** 




 • 7 to 10 years of experience in pre\-sales, solution architecture, or technical consulting in the IT industry.
 



 • Proven experience leading and managing a pre\-sales team, including coaching and performance
 



 management.
 



 • Strong expertise in Web, Mobile, and Cloud solutions, with experience in large enterprise solutioning.
 



 • Exceptional communication and presentation skills, with the ability to influence stakeholders at all levels.
 



 • Experience in handling large\-scale RFPs, tender processes, and high\-value sales cycles.
 



 • Deep understanding of B2B and enterprise sales methodologies, particularly in BFSI, Manufacturing, or
 



 Education sectors.
 



 • Self\-motivated leader with a strategic mindset and a passion for technology\-driven solutions.
 



 • Experience in the BFSI and Healthcare domains is good to have.
 



**Preferred (Not Essential)** 




 • Prior experience working in large enterprises or consulting organizations.
 



 • Familiarity with AI/ML, IoT, or emerging technologies in enterprise solutions.

2990bde4.title: Partner Solutions Engineer
2990bde4.description:
**About Us**
 Automation Anywhere is the leader in Agentic Process Automation (APA), transforming how work gets done with AI\-powered automation. Its APA system, built on the industry’s first Process Reasoning Engine (PRE) and specialized AI agents, combines process discovery, RPA, end\-to\-end orchestration, document processing, and analytics—all delivered with enterprise\-grade security and governance. Guided by its vision to fuel the future of work, Automation Anywhere helps organizations worldwide boost productivity, accelerate growth, and unleash human potential.
   

  

 Location : Bangalore , Mumbai , Delhi
   

  

 Experience \- 10 \+ Years
   

  

**Our Opportunity**
 Automation Anywhere is redefining how enterprises work through Agentic Process Automation (APA) — AI\-native agents that automate complex, end\-to\-end business processes. Our partner ecosystem is central to how we reach and serve global enterprises, and we are looking for a Partner Solutions Engineer to be the technical cornerstone of that motion.
   

  

 In this role, you will work directly alongside our Global System Integrator (GSI) and regional SI/VAR partners to win strategic deals at the intersection of ITSM and Agentic Automation. You are not a back\-office resource — you are the most senior AA technical voice in the room on partner\-led opportunities, guiding both the partner and the customer to a successful technical close.
   

  

**You Will Make an Impact By**
**Owning Technical Success In Partner\-Led Deals**
* Lead technical strategy and execution on high\-priority ITSM and APA opportunities sourced and co\-sold through GSI and regional SI/VAR partners — from discovery and architecture through POC and close.
* Serve as the definitive Automation Anywhere technical authority in partner\-led customer engagements, ensuring solutions are designed for business impact, not just technical correctness.
* Co\-develop tailored solution architectures that integrate Automation Anywhere's APA platform with other platforms, demonstrating clear ROI and measurable outcomes for enterprise customers.


**Driving Deal Strategy**
* Position AA's agentic automation capabilities including AI agents, LLM\-powered workflows, and intelligent document processing within transformation narratives that resonate with both business and IT stakeholders.
* Design and lead compelling POCs and technical workshops that accelerate partner deal cycles and validate AA as the platform of choice.
* Provide competitive technical advocacy in deals, equipping partners with the differentiated positioning needed to win against competitors.


**Elevating Partner Technical Capability**
* Coach and mentor partner SEs on deal strategy, solution design, and demo best practices. Raise the quality of the partner\-led technical motion without taking the wheel away from them.
* Build and contribute to partner\-ready solution assets: reference architectures, use case playbooks, integration blueprints, and battlecards.
* Serve as the escalation point for complex technical challenges that exceed partner SE capacity, ensuring no deal is lost due to technical gaps.


**Operating As a Strategic Voice**
* Engage C\-suite and senior IT leadership at customer organizations, articulating the strategic value of an AI\-native automation platform within enterprise ITSM and service delivery transformation.
* Represent Automation Anywhere at partner events, QBRs, and industry forums, reinforcing Automation Anywhere's thought leadership in Agentic Automation and ITSM.
* Channel partner and market intelligence: competitive signals, technology gaps, emerging use cases and back into AA's product, alliance, and go\-to\-market teams.


**Architecting Scalable Partner Solutions**
* Design reusable solution frameworks and integration patterns that enable GSI and regional SI partners to replicate AA value across their customer portfolios — multiplying deal impact beyond direct engagement.
* Stay at the forefront of agentic AI, LLM orchestration, RAG, and MCP standards, translating emerging capabilities into concrete partner\-ready solutions.


**You Will Be a Great Fit If You Have**
* 10\+ years of overall professional experience, with 5\+ years in pre\-sales, solutions engineering, or solution consulting roles at an enterprise software or SaaS company.
* Hands\-on experience with ITSM platforms including integration patterns, workflow design, and the broader technology landscape.
* Demonstrated experience working within a partner or channel motion: co\-selling alongside GSIs, regional SIs, VARs, or system integrators, and understanding how to win through partners rather than independently.
* Proven expertise with enterprise automation platforms \- Automation Anywhere, UiPath, Blue Prism, or equivalent including the ability to build and demonstrate production\-quality automations and agentic workflows.
* Fluency in the broader enterprise application ecosystem: SAP, Salesforce, Oracle, ServiceNow, Workday, and their integration within automation architectures.
* Working knowledge of agentic AI concepts: LLMs, RAG, prompt engineering, AI agent frameworks, and how they apply to enterprise automation use cases.
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field; advanced degrees and platform certifications (AA, UiPath, ServiceNow) are a plus.
* Ability to travel up to 40% to partner and customer sites


**You Excel in These Key Competencies**
* Partner\-first mindset: you make partners look good in front of their customers, building trust that drives long\-term co\-sell relationships.
* Equally fluent with C\-suite executives and hands\-on technical architects: You can shift register in the same meeting without losing credibility in either direction.
* Deep ITSM domain fluency that lets you speak the language of IT operations, service delivery, and enterprise IT transformation without relying on scripted demos.
* Strong influencing skills without direct authority: You advance deals and elevate partner SEs through expertise, coaching, and earned trust.
* Comfortable operating in ambiguity: This is a role that requires building structure and playbooks, not just following them.
* Exceptional verbal, written, and presentation skills: with the presence to lead executive workshops and the clarity to write solution architectures partners can execute independently.


**Ready to Revolutionize Work? Join Us.**
 This is an opportunity to shape how Automation Anywhere wins through its partner ecosystem — not just on individual deals, but at scale. You will be the technical face of AA for some of the most important partnerships in the company, working on the most strategic ITSM and APA opportunities in the market. Join us and define what it means to win with partners.
   

  

 Job Segment: Pre\-Sales, Partner Solutions, ITSM Automation, Agentic Process Automation, GSI, Enterprise SaaS, AI Agents
   

  

 All unsolicited resumes submitted to any @automationanywhere.com email address, whether submitted by an individual or by an agency, will not be eligible for an agency fee.

4b0879c0.title: System Engineer & Presales for Incubation
4b0879c0.description:
**Responsibilities**
 Conceptualize and generate design of system level electrical/electronics schemes for EO, Acoustics and sensors for new products/ prototype development.
   

  

 Perform system engineering and integration activities for new product development and prototype requirement.
   

  

 Conduct detail engineering of system/units and selection of elements, sub assembly based on safety, maintainability, ruggedization level and other relevant environment, EMI/EMC and electrical standards
   

  

 Carry out selection of Sensors (Electro\-Optics, Gyros, INS, etc.), Motors, drives, components, sub assemblies for the the project requirement.
   

  

 Create unit/system level test plan and carrying testing of prototype units
   

  

 Support to Production centers \& QC department for execution of Prototype development.
   

  

 Execute design \& integration activities during within Factory premises and field trials.
   

  

 Understanding of Environmental MIL Standards such as JSS 55555/MIL STD 810, EMI\-EMC standards such as MIL STD 461E/F and MIL STD 464, STANAG standards, and Power standards such as MIL STD\-1275\.

fb94efe9.title: Solution Engineer - Mining
fb94efe9.description:
**Location:** 
 Bengaluru 
 



**Experience:** 
 3\+ Years
 



**Qualification:** 
 B.Tech / M.Tech in Mining Engineering
   





 Aereo is India’s leading drone and geospatial technology company, building cutting\-edge solutions across mining, infrastructure, urban planning, utilities, and industrial operations.
 



 We combine drones, GIS, AI, remote sensing, cloud platforms, and advanced analytics to help enterprises make faster, smarter, and data\-driven decisions at scale.
 



 Our mining solutions enable organizations to digitize and optimize mine planning, production monitoring, surveying, compliance, operational analytics, and field workflows through next\-generation technology platforms.
 



  





**About the Role:** 




  





 We are looking for a highly driven
 **Solutions Engineer – Mining** 
 to join our Solution Engineering team and help build practical, scalable, and technology\-driven solutions for the mining industry.
 



 This role is ideal for someone who understands mining operations on the ground and is excited about solving real\-world mining challenges using digital technologies such as GIS, drone data, analytics, automation, AI, and cloud\-based platforms.
 



 You will work closely with clients, domain experts, product teams, developers, operations teams, and business stakeholders to translate mining workflows and operational challenges into impactful digital solutions.
 



  





**What you'll do** 




  




* Work with the Solution Engineering team to conceptualize, develop, test, and improve digital mining solutions and workflows
* Understand mining operations, production workflows, field challenges, and client requirements across different mining environments
* Translate operational mining problems into structured workflows, technical requirements, and scalable solution approaches
* Support solution development for use cases related to:
* Mine planning \& scheduling
* Production monitoring
* Drilling \& blasting
* Surveying \& volumetric analysis
* Safety \& compliance
* Operational analytics \& reporting
* Collaborate with Product, Engineering, GIS, Data, and Operations teams to support solution implementation and delivery
* Participate in client discussions, technical workshops, requirement gathering sessions, demos, and pilot programs
* Support field deployments, testing, validation, implementation, and user acceptance activities
* Prepare technical documentation, workflow notes, presentations, reports, and methodology documents
* Contribute to product feedback, feature enhancement discussions, and release validation activities
* Support consulting\-style engagements, industry research, market analysis, and solution benchmarking
* Travel to client sites across India and internationally when required



**What we're looking for** 




  




* B.Tech / M.Tech in Mining Engineering
* 2–3 years of experience in mining operations, mine planning, field execution, technical consulting, digital mining, or solution engineering roles
* Strong understanding of mining workflows, mine operations, production processes, drilling \& blasting, safety practices, and statutory requirements
* Ability to break down complex operational problems into structured and practical solution approaches
* Strong analytical thinking and problem\-solving capabilities
* Excellent communication, presentation, and documentation skills
* Comfortable interacting with clients, stakeholders, and cross\-functional teams
* Ability to work in fast\-paced, execution\-oriented environments
* High ownership, curiosity, and willingness to learn emerging technologies
* Willingness to travel based on project requirements



  





**Good to have** 




  




* Exposure to mine planning and mining software such as:
* Surpac
* Datamine
* Vulcan
* MineSched
* AutoCAD / Civil 3D
* Familiarity with GIS tools such as QGIS or ArcGIS
* Understanding of drone surveying, photogrammetry, remote sensing, DEM/DTM generation, orthomosaics, point clouds, and 3D datasets
* Exposure to digital mining platforms, dashboards, analytics, automation, or AI/ML\-driven workflows
* Experience supporting client\-facing engagements, technical demos, pre\-sales discussions, or consulting projects
* Knowledge of mining compliance workflows and regulatory reporting requirements



  





**Who will thrive in this role** 




  





 Someone who:
 



  




* Understands mining operations beyond theory
* Enjoys solving real operational problems
* Can communicate effectively with both clients and technical teams
* Thinks structurally and analytically
* Is excited about the future of digital mining and industrial technology
* Wants to work at the intersection of mining, GIS, AI, drones, analytics, and product innovation

909c5585.title: Solutions Engineer
909c5585.description:
**Why you'll love Cisco**
 We change the World, you will become passionate about your employer and the brand you represent. Everything is converging on the Internet, making networked connections more meaningful than ever before in our lives. Our employees' ground breaking ideas impact everything. Here, that means we take creative ideas from the drawing board to dynamic solutions that have real world impact. You'll be part a team that cares about its customers, enjoys having fun, and you'll take part in changing the lives of those in our local communities. Come prepared to be encouraged and inspired.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
 As a Solutions Engineer you will orchestrate involvement of all technical activities and resources, holding accountabilities for all opportunities within assigned account(s) and provide architectural perspective across the Cisco product portfolio, including software and services.
   

  

* Technical sales professional serving as a Technology/Product/Solution consultant.
* Technical orchestrator for an array of Cisco resources, primary responsibility for ensuring successful completion of each pitstop from a technical perspective in the lifecycle selling motion.
* Provides technical information and design/implementation guidance in concert with Cisco Architecture Seller team(s).
* Collaborates with the Account Manager on the customer account plan(s), jointly ensuring customer success.
* Work with internal teams to orchestrate right solutions against customer requirements with competitive positioning
* Educate customer on Cisco differentiation and establish technical leadership of Cisco as a brand.
* Field role that serves as a Technology expert across solutions preferably within a multi\-domain architecture approach.
* Build relationship with Engineering Teams, field teams, architecture team, Business Units (BUs), Partners and customers.


**Who You’ll Work With**
 The India Strategic Enterprise Segment is a truly vibrant sales organization that covers the diverse set of accounts in the Enterprise Space. This position will be based out of Mumbai and will focus on a specific set of Enterprise accounts.
   

  

 As part of the Enterprise System Engineering Team, you will be designing, architecting and empowering the strategy for the next generation of communications and application delivery for India’s leading businesses. You'll collaborate as part of a disruptive Sales engineering team. We offer exhilarating, inspiring, global, high impact, and uniquely broad opportunities for your growth.
   

  

**Minimum Qualifications**
* Bachelor of Engineering degree or equivalent
* Excellent written, oral communication, listening skills.
* Min 12\-15 years of presales experience in a technical capacity.
* Cisco products and technologies knowledge about one or more areas like Enterprise Networking, Security, Data centre or Collaboration.
* Understand the broad aspects of end to end architecture and have knowledge of one or more technology areas
* Should be confident in articulating in a customer conversation
* Technical knowledge in the Networking Solutions/SDN Architecture/Network Security /Datacentre Networking technologies.
* Strong whiteboarding/presentation skills.


**Desired Qualifications**
* Experience working with the Enterprise customers in similar roles.
* Technical certifications in any of the areas like Cloud/Security


 Why Cisco?
   

  

 At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.
   

  

 Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere.
   

  

 We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.

dedb6403.title: Solution Architect - Application Engineering
dedb6403.description:
As a
 **Solution Architect – Application Engineering** 
 at EPAM, you will play a dual role as a technology leader and client partner. You will lead solution strategy, oversee architecture governance, and manage large\-scale managed services engagements. You will directly interact with CXO\-level stakeholders to define transformation roadmaps while guiding and mentoring teams of architects and engineers to deliver excellence.
 



  
 



**Responsibilities** 



* Define and own the solution strategy for large\-scale digital transformation and managed services programs
* Drive multi\-year technology roadmaps, modern platform architectures, and operating models
* Ensure solutions are scalable, resilient, cost\-efficient, and aligned with business objectives
* Architect and oversee large\-scale managed services engagements, including application management, cloud operations, and platform engineering
* Define SLAs, governance models, performance monitoring, and continuous improvement frameworks
* Ensure operational excellence through automation, AI/GenAI, and DevOps\-driven practices
* Stay hands\-on with architecture, proof\-of\-concepts, and technology exploration
* Lead technical due diligence, solution assessments, and modernization strategies
* Advocate for innovation, including cloud\-native, microservices, event\-driven architectures, and AI/GenAI\-enabled solutions
* Act as a trusted advisor to CIOs, CTOs, and other CXO\-level executives
* Bridge business strategy with technology execution, presenting clear roadmaps and business cases
* Lead pre\-sales, RFP/RFI responses, and executive\-level presentations to secure new business opportunities
* Lead a community of solution architects, principal engineers, and delivery leads across multiple geographies
* Foster a culture of technical excellence, knowledge sharing, and continuous learning
* Mentor senior architects on architecture best practices, client engagement, and managed services solutioning







**Requirements** 



* 22\-30 years of overall experience
* 15\+ years of experience in software engineering, enterprise architecture, and solution design
* Proven track record in leading large\-scale managed services programs (multi\-year, multi\-million\-dollar engagements)
* Deep knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP), enterprise integration, and platform modernization
* Hands\-on experience with at least one programming language (Java, .NET, JavaScript/TypeScript, or Python)
* Strong expertise in service delivery models, SLAs/KPIs, and governance frameworks
* Experience with AI/GenAI integration in managed services (automation, predictive analytics, conversational AI, knowledge management)
* Demonstrated ability to interact with and influence CXO\-level executives
* Proven experience in IT consulting or global delivery organizations
* Excellent leadership, communication, and presentation skills







**Nice to have** 



* Experience with AIOps, MLOps, and intelligent automation
* Knowledge of GenAI orchestration frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex, Azure OpenAI, AWS Bedrock)
* Strong business acumen to participate in contract negotiations, service pricing, and P\&L discussions
* Thought leadership (public speaking, whitepapers, or blogs in architecture and AI/GenAI)

c431343f.description:

You will lead the architecture design on a variety of complex project in a highly collaborative, fast\-paced environment. You will be working closely with business users, business analysts solution architects team to build technology solutions.
   

  

 You will be responsible for making solution\-level decisions after evaluating business needs and analyzing enterprise specifics to determine how technological solutions can support and impact overall business goals and outcomes.

f4f530f0.title: Solution Architect
f4f530f0.description:
**Project Role :** 
 Solution Architect
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Translate client requirements into differentiated, deliverable solutions using in\-depth knowledge of a technology, function, or platform. Collaborate with the Sales Pursuit and Delivery Teams to develop a winnable and deliverable solution that underpins the client value proposition and business case.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 Solution Architecture
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 NA
   

  

**Minimum 12 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 As a Solution Architect, a typical day involves interpreting and transforming client needs into unique and actionable solutions that align with business objectives. This role requires close collaboration with sales and delivery teams to craft strategies that not only meet client expectations but also support the overall value proposition and business rationale. The day is often filled with discussions, planning sessions, and coordination efforts to ensure that proposed solutions are both feasible and competitive in the marketplace, fostering strong partnerships and driving project success.
   

  

 Roles \& Responsibilities:
   

  

* Expected to be an SME, collaborate and manage the team to perform.
* Responsible for team decisions.
* Engage with multiple teams and contribute on key decisions.
* Expected to provide solutions to problems that apply across multiple teams.
* Lead the alignment of technical strategies with business goals to ensure cohesive solution delivery.
* Facilitate communication between stakeholders to maintain clarity and consensus throughout project phases.
* Mentor junior team members to support their professional growth and enhance team capabilities.


 Professional \& Technical Skills:
   

  

* Must To Have Skills: Proficiency in Solution Architecture.
* Strong expertise in designing scalable and maintainable technology solutions that address complex business challenges.
* Ability to analyze and integrate diverse technology platforms to create cohesive architectures.
* Experience in collaborating with cross\-functional teams to develop comprehensive solution frameworks.
* Skilled in evaluating emerging technologies and recommending their adoption to improve solution effectiveness.
* Excellent problem\-solving skills with a focus on delivering innovative and practical solutions.


 Additional Information:
   

  

* The candidate should have minimum 12 years of experience in Solution Architecture.
* This position is based at our Bengaluru office.
* A 15 years full time education is required.


 Solution Architect responsible for designing end\-to\-end solutions, translating business requirements into scalable technical solutions, creating resource and cost models, driving solution approvals, collaborating with delivery teams, and ensuring adherence to architecture standards and best practices. Key skills include stakeholder management, solution design, delivery architecture, problem\-solving, influencing, and cross\-functional collaboration.
   

  

* Design end\-to\-end technology solutions aligned with business requirements.
* Lead solution architecture, estimation, and resource planning activities.
* Define the solution approach, assumptions, risks, and dependencies.
* Collaborate with delivery, engineering, and business stakeholders.
* Ensure solutions adhere to enterprise architecture standards and best practices.
* Support deal shaping, solution reviews, and governance activities.
* Mentor teams and provide architectural guidance across programs.
* Experience in cloud, application modernization, integrations, APIs, and enterprise platforms is preferred., 15 years full time education

e2967ca0.title: Solution Architect - Java
e2967ca0.description:
We are seeking a highly experienced, hands\-on and technically versatile
 **Solution Architect** 
 to drive the design and implementation of scalable, secure and resilient cloud\-native solutions. This role is pivotal in shaping the architecture of a major enterprise commerce platform, with a strong preference for Microsoft Azure but open to candidates with production\-grade experience in AWS or GCP.
 



  
 



**Responsibilities** 



* Architect and lead the development of cloud\-native systems using microservices and event\-driven paradigms
* Design and implement solutions leveraging Kubernetes (preferably AKS) and service mesh technologies like Istio
* Define and enforce architectural standards, patterns and best practices across engineering teams
* Drive performance optimization initiatives by leading fine\-tuning efforts through end\-to\-end performance testing, ensuring system scalability, responsiveness and reliability across complex, distributed architectures
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to ensure alignment between business goals and technical solutions
* Communicate complex technical concepts clearly and effectively to both technical and non\-technical stakeholders
* Create and maintain architectural diagrams and documentation using industry\-standard tools (e.g., Miro, Gliffy, Draw.io)
* Guide teams through cloud adoption, modernization and optimization initiatives
* Stay current with emerging technologies and evaluate their applicability to business needs
* Provide deeper subject matter expertise on SDLC topics during the initial discovery phase, identify potential AI use cases, design them and assist team members to build, deploy and embed AI use cases to generate productivity gains
* Identify and design potential AI use cases (agents/skills) using Copilot correctly into the Cordant ecosystem while showing productivity gains
* Support the design, configuration and adoption of AI\-enabled workflows across all identified bottlenecks/stages of PDLC/SDLC for the participating Cordant teams







**Requirements** 



* 15\-20 years of experience in software engineering with 10\+ years in architecture and a strong preference for hands\-on coding
* Proven experience with at least one major cloud provider (Azure, AWS or GCP) in production environments
* Deep expertise in Kubernetes and container orchestration
* Hands\-on experience with NFR, architecture governance and documentation, plus system design and architectural design trade\-offs
* Knowledge of CosmosDB, PostgreSQL and Redis, as well as Oracle
* Proficiency in messaging and eventing technologies including Kafka and EventHub
* Strong understanding of cloud networking, IAM and security, plus infrastructure as code (Terraform, ARM, Bicep)
* Experience with DevOps practices and CI/CD pipelines
* Demonstrated ability to lead architectural discussions and influence technical direction
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills
* Proficiency in diagramming tools to convey architectural concepts effectively







**Nice to have** 



* Experience with hybrid or multi\-cloud environments
* Familiarity with FinOps, observability and cloud governance
* Background in supporting production workloads with high availability and disaster recovery considerations
* Skills in Hybris e\-commerce
* Showcase of Istio or other service mesh experience
* Competency in GitHub Actions

3c7c0bec.title: Software Architect I
3c7c0bec.description:
**Role Description**
 Job Title: offshore Full Stack \+ AI Architect
   

  

**Job Summary**
 We are seeking a highly experienced offshore Full Stack \+ AI Architect to lead the design and implementation of scalable, cloud\-native applications integrated with advanced AI/ML capabilities. This role will be responsible for defining end\-to\-end architecture across frontend, backend, data, and AI layers, while working closely with stakeholders at the client location.
   

  

 The ideal candidate will combine strong expertise in full stack application architecture with hands\-on experience in AI/ML, generative AI, and cloud platforms, driving innovation and business value through intelligent solutions.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

 Define and drive end\-to\-end solution architecture across UI, backend services, data layers, and AI/ML components.
   

  

 Act as the primary onsite technical architect, engaging with client stakeholders to understand business needs and translate them into scalable architectures.
   

  

 Design and implement full stack solutions using modern frameworks (frontend, backend, APIs, microservices).
   

  

 Architect and integrate AI/ML/GenAI solutions (e.g., predictive models, NLP, copilots) into enterprise applications.
   

  

 Design cloud\-native and event\-driven architectures ensuring scalability, resilience, and performance.
   

  

 Define and enforce architecture standards, reusable frameworks, and best practices across the program.
   

  

 Lead API strategy, integrations, and data pipelines with internal and external systems.
   

  

 Drive DevSecOps, CI/CD, and automation practices, ensuring high\-quality and secure delivery.
   

  

 Collaborate with cross\-functional teams (product, UX, engineering, QA) to ensure seamless solution delivery.
   

  

 Provide technical leadership, mentorship, and guidance to engineering teams.
   

  

 Evaluate emerging technologies and recommend innovations aligned with business objectives.
   

  

**Required Qualifications \& Experience**
 10\+ years of experience in software engineering, with 3\-5\+ years in architect roles.
   

  

 Strong experience in full stack development (frontend frameworks, backend services, APIs).
   

  

 Proven experience in designing and implementing AI/ML or GenAI\-based solutions.
   

  

 Strong expertise in cloud platforms (AWS / Azure / GCP) and cloud\-native architectures.
   

  

 Deep understanding of microservices, APIs, event\-driven architecture, and distributed systems.
   

  

 Experience working in onsite\-offshore delivery models.
   

  

 Strong knowledge of DevOps, CI/CD pipelines, and automation frameworks.
   

  

 Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
   

  

**Preferred Skills**
 Experience in Healthcare domain is highly desirable.
   

  

 Exposure to LLM frameworks, MLOps, and AI lifecycle management.
   

  

 Familiarity with data engineering tools, data lakes, and real\-time processing frameworks.
   

  

 Experience with security, compliance, and governance models in enterprise environments.
   

  

 Certifications in cloud or AI/ML domains are a plus.
   

  

**Skills**
 fullstack,full stack development,ai/ml,cloud\-native architecture,event\-driven architecture,

 SBS
 
 is a global financial technology company that’s helping banks and the financial services industry to reimagine how to operate in an increasingly digital world. SBS is a trusted partner of more than 1,500 financial institutions and large\-scale lenders in 80 countries worldwide, including Santander, Societé Generale, KCB Bank, Kensington Mortgages, Mercedes\-Benz, and Toyota FS. Its cloud platform offers clients a composable architecture to digitize operations, ranging from banking, lending, compliance, to payments, and consumer and asset finance. With 3,400 employees in 50 offices, SBS is recognized as a Top 10 European Fintech company by IDC and as a leader in Omdia’s Universe: Digital Banking Platforms.
 



  





**Job Description**

036add66.title: Principal Solutions Architect
036add66.description:
**Position :\-Principal Solutions Architect \-Presales** 




**Experience\- 12 \+ years** 




 Location: Noida
 



**Role Overview:** 




 We are looking for a technically strong
 **DAML Presales** 
 with hands\-on expertise in AWS data analytics platforms. advocating for DAML\-based solutions integrated with modern AWS data architectures to solve complex business problems.
 



**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Collaborate with sales teams and AWS stakeholders to understand client challenges and design DAML\-based smart contract solutions coupled with AWS Data Lake and analytics services.
* Deliver compelling demos, PoCs, and technical presentations showcasing DAML solutions and AWS data platforms like Glue, EMR, and Redshift.
* Advocate the strategic use of DAML smart contracts alongside data architectures such as Data Lakes, Lakehouses, and Data Warehouses, balancing performance, cost, and requirements.
* Leverage open table formats (preferably Apache Iceberg) in data modeling and solution design.
* Story tell and communicate effectively to internal sales, marketing teams, AWS partners, and customers on the business value of DAML and AWS data analytics solutions.
* Support large RFP responses by providing detailed technical architecture and data roadmap proposals during the presales stage.
* Build strong relationships with AWS Partner Solution Architects and other stakeholders to identify and drive ongoing business opportunities.

* Expert knowledge of AWS data lake components such as Glue, EMR, and Redshift.

* Proven ability to position complex solutions balancing requirements, cost, and performance.
* Passion for data analytics and ability to advocate trends and solutions to technical and non\-technical audiences.

65ff31fb.title: AWS Solution Architect
65ff31fb.description:
**Full Stack AWS Architect – Cloud\-Native Microservices** 




**Experience Required: 10–15 Years** 




**Location : Bangalore / Chennai / Hyderabad / Pune / Gurgaon / Kolkata** 




  





**Role Overview** 




 We are looking for a Full Stack AWS Architect with deep expertise in cloud\-native microservices architecture and end\-to\-end AWS solution design. The candidate must have proven experience architecting, building, and delivering distributed systems on AWS using Infrastructure as Code, with strong command over containerization, API security, full stack development, observability, and team leadership. The ideal candidate can own the full technical lifecycle — from solution architecture and AWS design to frontend delivery and production operations — and can drive engineering standards across a cross\-functional agile team.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Define and own end\-to\-end solution architecture for cloud\-native applications on AWS
* Design, develop, and maintain scalable Node.js REST microservices using NestJS frameworks
* Architect and implement cloud\-native microservices following 12\-factor app and distributed systems principles
* Build, tag, and push Docker images to Amazon ECR and manage container deployments via Amazon ECS (Fargate / EC2 launch type) and/or Amazon EKS
* Create and manage AWS infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code (Terraform / AWS CDK) — console\-only resource creation is not sufficient
* Deploy and operate services on AWS (EKS, ECS, ECR, EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, SQS, SNS, CloudFront)
* Implement AWS security and identity best practices including IAM, IRSA, JWT, and Cognito
* Configure and manage API Gateway, ALB, and Ingress Controllers for scalable and secure API management
* Design event\-driven microservices using SQS, SNS, Kafka, or EventBridge for reliable async communication
* Deliver frontend solutions using React.js with integration to backend microservices and AWS services
* Serve static assets via Amazon S3 and CloudFront CDN for optimized global content delivery
* Set up and maintain CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, Jenkins, or AWS CodePipeline — including ECR image push and ECS/EKS deployment automation
* Write and maintain unit, integration, and API tests using Jest, Supertest, and Playwright
* Set up and maintain observability — CloudWatch dashboards, structured logging, distributed tracing, and alerting
* Author architecture documentation, conduct design reviews, and mentor junior engineers
* Use AI\-assisted development tools (GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude) effectively while ensuring code quality, security, and adherence to project standards
* Analyze and optimize application performance across frontend, backend, APIs, databases, containers, and cloud infrastructure
* Optimize Node.js/NestJS microservices for latency, throughput, memory utilization, and CPU efficiency
* Tune React.js applications for improved page load times, rendering performance, caching, and Core Web Vitals
* Design and implement caching strategies using CloudFront, Redis/ElastiCache, CDN caching, and application\-level caching



  





**Good to Have** 



* AWS Solutions Architect certification (Associate or Professional)
* Experience with Kafka or EventBridge for event\-driven workflows
* Knowledge of service mesh (Istio / Linkerd)
* Experience with OpenTelemetry, Dynatrace, or Splunk
* Familiarity with TypeScript and monorepo setups
* Experience with GraphQL APIs

530eac74.title: Cloud Architect
530eac74.description:
**Job Summary** 




 Own the Cloud design, and governance of AWS\-first cloud platforms, with strong focus on enterprise networking, hybrid connectivity, disaster recovery, and Infrastructure as Code. Drive secure, scalable, and cost\-optimized architectures across multi\-account AWS environments with supporting Azure integration.
 



  





**What is the Role Expected to Do** 




**Cloud Architecture \& Landing Zone** 



* Design and manage AWS Landing Zone (multi\-account, OUs, account vending, SCPs) using Control Tower or custom frameworks
* Define centralized networking and shared services architecture
* Establish governance guardrails and baseline standards
* Design AWS DR strategies\- Pilot Light, Warm Standby, Active\-Active



  





**AWS Networking (Core Focus)** 



* Architect and operate: VPC design (CIDR strategy, subnet segmentation, route tables, IGW/NAT, NACLs, SGs),Transit Gateway (TGW) with route propagation and segmentation, Private connectivity: Private Link, VPC Endpoints
* Design hybrid connectivity Direct Connect (DX), Site\-to\-Site VPN (BGP\-based)
* Define North\-south and east\-west traffic flows and Ingress/egress patterns and NAT strategies
* Design DNS architecture using Route53 (private/public zones, resolver endpoints)
* Define Hub\-Spoke/hub\-mesh topologies and architect multi\-region connectivity



  





**Cost Optimization** 



* Drive AWS \& Azure cost optimization initiatives, including monitoring usage, implementing tagging standards, managing Savings Plans and Reserved Instances, and providing cost\-saving recommendations based on FinOps model.



  





**Cloud Operations \& Reliability** 




  




* **Define architecture and best practices for Kubernetes clusters on AWS (EKS) including node groups/node pools, cluster networking, autoscaling, upgrades, monitoring, and troubleshooting.**
* Define and govern Azure\-to\-Amazon RDS migration strategies, including workload assessment, target architecture, cutover planning, and post\-migration validation.
* **Execute application and database migrations to AWS and Azure, supporting on\-premises and cross\-cloud migration initiatives.**
* **Monitor and optimize AWS and Azure environments, manage production incidents, perform RCA, and support SLA\-driven operations.**



  





**Security \& Governance** 



* Implement WAF, NGFW, DDoS protection, micro\-segmentation
* Define and enforce guardrails (SCPs, policies, CSPM)



  





**Qualifications** 



* 6\-9 years of industry experience on AWS.
* Strong expertise in:



 AWS Networking (VPC, TGW, DX, PrivateLink, Route53\)
 



 Terraform/CloudFormation
 


* Strong fundamentals on Routing (BGP), DNS, VPN, firewall architectures
* Certifications:
* AWS: Solutions Architect Associate/Professional (preferred)
* AWS Certifies DevOps Engineer\-Professional(nice\-to\-have)
* HashiCorp Certified: Terraform Associate (nice\-to\-have)
* AZ\-104 (nice\-to\-have)

5cbdb62f.title: Cloud Architect
5cbdb62f.description:
Everest DX – We are a Digital Platform Services company, headquartered in Stamford. Our Platform/Solution includes Orchestration, Intelligent operations with BOTs’, AI\-powered analytics for Enterprise IT. Our vision is to enable Digital Transformation for enterprises to deliver seamless customer experience, business efficiency and actionable insights through an integrated set of futuristic digital technologies.
 



  





 Digital Transformation Services \- Specialized in Design, Build, Develop, Integrate, and Manage cloud solutions and modernize Data centers, build a Cloud\-native application and migrate existing applications into secure, multi\-cloud environments to support digital transformation. Our Digital
 



 Platform Services enable organizations to reduce IT resource requirements and improve productivity, in addition to lowering costs and speeding digital transformation.
 



  





 Digital Platform \- Cloud Intelligent Management (CiM) \- An Autonomous Hybrid Cloud Management Platform that works across multi\-cloud environments. helps enterprise Digital Transformation get most out of the cloud strategy while reducing Cost, Risk and Speed.
 



 To know more please visit:
 **http://www.everestdx.com** 




  





**Role:** 
 Cloud Architect
 



**Experience:** 
 10\+ Years
 



**Location:** 
 Hyderabad
 



**Employment Type:** 
 Onsite\-Full Time
 



  





**Job Summary** 




 Experienced Cloud Platform Engineer with 10\+ years of expertise in multi\-cloud infrastructure provisioning, automation, and enablement across Azure, AWS, and GCP. Proven track record of driving secure, scalable, and compliant cloud foundations, enabling developer self\-service, and improving platform efficiency through automation and governance. Strong technical leader with hands\-on experience in networking, IAM, AKS, API management, and ServiceNow workflows.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Lead end\-to\-end cloud provisioning and enablement across Azure, AWS, and GCP, from intake to deployment and operational readiness.
* Identify, Design \& Implement Continuous Improvement track to actively work on open challenges and issues faced by end engineering teams
* Report progress on Continuous Improvement around Month\-on\-Month productivity gains to PepsiCo Lead
* Own problem management and RCA, identify systemic issues, and implement long\-term fixes to improve platform stability.
* Implement best practices around cloud provisioning and Automations to help elevate the end customer experience
* Partner with cross\-functional teams (application, platform, network, DB, ops) to deliver standardized and secure cloud environments.
* Manage cloud access provisioning (subscriptions, projects, IAM roles, service principals, service accounts) ensuring least privilege and auditability.
* Provide L2/L3 support, resolving complex issues in infrastructure deployment, networking, IAM, and policy enforcement.
* Manage DNS provisioning and troubleshooting, ensuring reliable name resolution across cloud platforms.
* Resolve application connectivity issues involving private endpoints, firewalls, routing, TLS, and DB integrations.
* Lead API onboarding and provisioning, ensuring adherence to operational, security, and governance standards.
* Define and enforce Apigee onboarding standards, including proxy configuration, traffic management, and lifecycle compliance.
* Understand ServiceNow workflows, catalogs, and approvals to improve request validation, automation, and user experience.
* Drive Cloud Marketplace Portal (DevX) improvements, enabling self\-service provisioning and faster onboarding.
* Create and maintain documentation, runbooks, and knowledge articles to support operational excellence.
* Act as a Subject Matter Expert (SME), mentor engineers, and lead adoption of cloud standards and best practices.



  





**Required Skills** 



* Multi\-Cloud: Azure, AWS, GCP
* Infrastructure as Code: Terraform, CloudFormation
* Cloud Services: IAM, Networking, DNS, Compute, Storage
* Containers: AKS, Ingress Controllers, TLS, Container Networking
* API Management: Apigee (Onboarding, Governance, Security)
* Automation \& DevX: ServiceNow, Self\-Service Platforms
* Tools: Azure CLI, AWS CLI, GCP CLI, Linux
* ITIL Processes: Incident, Problem, Change Management
* Demonstrates strong ownership and initiative, confidently taking on challenging tasks and driving them to completion
