e5615eb4.title: Cloud Security Architect (L2)
e5615eb4.description:
**Job Purpose** 




 The Cloud Security Architect (L2\) is responsible designing, implementing, and supporting cloud security solutions across multi\-cloud environments. The role focuses on cloud security architecture, governance, compliance, security controls implementation, and operational support to ensure secure adoption of cloud technologies while supporting SOC and security engineering teams.
 



  





**Roles \& Responsibilities** 



* Design and implement cloud security architectures across AWS, Azure, and GCP environments.
* Support deployment and management of cloud\-native security controls, including CSPM, CWPP, CNAPP, CASB and Zero Trust architectures.
* Implement and maintain cloud network security controls such as security groups, firewalls, WAF, DDoS, micro\-segmentation, EDR, DLP, PIM/PAM and secure connectivity etc.
* Review cloud environments for compliance with security standards, policies, and best practices.
* Perform cloud security assessments, risk analyses, and security architecture reviews.
* Support DevSecOps initiatives by integrating security controls into CI/CD pipelines.
* Assist in incident response, forensic investigation, and remediation activities for cloud security incidents.
* Collaborate with SOC, Infrastructure, Network, Application, and DevOps teams to address cloud security requirements.
* Ensure cloud deployments comply with regulatory and industry frameworks.
* Develop cloud security documentation, standards, architecture diagrams, and operating procedures.
* Participate in onboarding customers onto cloud security services and managed security platforms.
* Support cloud security monitoring, logging, and integration with enterprise SIEM solutions.



  





**Experience \& Educational Requirement** 




 BE/B\-Tech or equivalent with Computer Science or Electronics \& Communication
 



**Certifications** 
 :\- CISSP, CCSP, Microsoft SC\-100 (Cybersecurity Architect), Microsoft AZ\-500, AWS Security Specialty, Google Cloud Security Engineer, CISM
 



  





**RELEVANT EXPERIENCE** 



* 5–8 years of cybersecurity experience with at least 3 years in cloud security.
* Hands\-on experience with E2E , AWS, Azure, and/or Google Cloud security services.
* Experience implementing IAM, PAM, MFA, Zero Trust, and cloud governance controls.
* Knowledge of cloud security frameworks such as CIS Benchmarks, NIST, ISO 27001, PCI\-DSS.
* Experience with cloud logging, monitoring, and SIEM integrations.
* Knowledge of container security and Kubernetes security fundamentals.
* Exposure to Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, ARM, CloudFormation).
* Experience supporting cloud migration and security transformation projects.



  





**Tools / Tech** 




 Splunk Enterprise Security, IBM QRadar, Elastic Security (ELK), Cortex XSOAR, Splunk SOAR, CrowdStrike Falcon, Palo Alto Networks, Fortinet FortiGate, Cisco Secure Firewall, Check Point, F5 BIG\-IP, Imperva WAF, F5 Advanced WAF, Cloudflare WAF, CyberArk, Tenable Nessus, Qualys VMDR, Rapid7 InsightVM, VirusTotal, Syslog, Logstash, PowerShell, Python, Bash, REST APIs, Git, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, Ansible.

770cbece.title: Cloud Architect
770cbece.description:
**Cloud / Solutions Architect** 




**Location:** 
 Hyderabad
 



**Company:** 
 Northbridge Strategy
 



**Type:** 
 Full\-time \| On\-site/Hybrid
 



**🚀 About Northbridge Strategy** 




 Northbridge Strategy partners with global enterprises to modernize mission\-critical forecasting and planning platforms through cloud\-native engineering, scalable SaaS architecture, and advanced data\-driven systems.
 



 We are leading a major transformation initiative for a globally trusted forecasting platform used by enterprises worldwide. The platform has historically been a sophisticated desktop/thick\-client ecosystem powered by proprietary forecasting algorithms and deep statistical modeling capabilities. Our mission is to evolve it into a modern, cloud\-native, multi\-tenant SaaS platform while preserving the performance, accuracy, and reliability that enterprise customers depend on.
 



 This is a high\-impact architectural leadership opportunity to shape the future of enterprise forecasting technology.
 



  





**💡 The Opportunity** 




 We are seeking an experienced Cloud / Solutions Architect to lead the end\-to\-end architecture and modernization strategy for a large\-scale forecasting platform moving from traditional desktop architecture to a modern Azure\-based SaaS ecosystem.
 



 You will define the technical direction, architectural standards, and modernization roadmap across cloud infrastructure, backend services, database architecture, security, CI/CD, and legacy system integration.
 



 This role is highly hands\-on and ideal for someone who enjoys balancing strategic architecture with practical engineering execution.
 



**In this role, you will:** 



* Architect a multi\-tenant SaaS platform on Azure with enterprise\-grade scalability and security
* Design PostgreSQL multi\-tenant strategies and high\-performance data architectures
* Modernize legacy forecasting systems and integrate existing C\+\+/MFC components with cloud\-native services
* Define backend architecture using NestJS, TypeScript, Prisma, and PostgreSQL
* Establish scalable deployment and DevOps patterns using Azure Container Apps, Docker, Bicep, and GitHub Actions
* Lead architectural decision\-making while mentoring engineering teams
* Work closely with distributed product and engineering stakeholders in an async\-first environment



  





**🎯 What You'll Do** 




**Architecture \& Platform Strategy** 



* Define the end\-to\-end architecture for a cloud\-native multi\-tenant SaaS platform
* Design tenant isolation strategies, scalability models, and secure enterprise data boundaries
* Architect backend services using NestJS, TypeScript, Prisma ORM, and PostgreSQL
* Define API standards, service boundaries, and distributed system communication patterns
* Create migration strategies from legacy thick\-client systems to modern web/cloud platforms
* Architect integration approaches between modern services and existing C\+\+/MFC forecasting components using libpq and native interoperability patterns
* Design highly available and fault\-tolerant Azure infrastructure



**Cloud \& Infrastructure** 



* Architect and implement Azure infrastructure including:
* Azure Container Apps (ACA)
* Azure PostgreSQL Flexible Server
* Azure Storage
* Azure Entra ID
* Azure Networking and Identity services
* Design secure infrastructure patterns with governance, auditability, and compliance in mind
* Define CI/CD and deployment standards using GitHub Actions and Bicep
* Drive containerization strategy using Docker
* Establish observability, monitoring, backup, disaster recovery, and operational best practices



**Engineering Leadership** 



* Provide technical leadership across backend, cloud, and platform engineering teams
* Review architecture, code, database design, and deployment patterns
* Mentor engineers on scalable SaaS design and cloud\-native development
* Participate in technical planning, roadmap discussions, and architecture reviews
* Drive engineering best practices for maintainability, reliability, testing, and security



**Modernization \& Performance** 



* Optimize PostgreSQL schema design, indexing, and query performance
* Design migration pathways for enterprise customers moving from desktop deployments to SaaS
* Ensure performance and scalability for data\-intensive forecasting workloads
* Collaborate with teams building advanced forecasting and analytical systems



  





**🌟 Who You Are** 




**Required Experience** 



* 8\+ years of software engineering and architecture experience
* 5\+ years designing cloud\-native platforms and distributed systems
* Strong experience architecting multi\-tenant SaaS applications
* Deep expertise with:
* NestJS
* TypeScript
* Prisma ORM
* PostgreSQL
* Strong Azure architecture experience:
* Azure Container Apps (ACA)
* Azure PostgreSQL Flexible Server
* Azure Entra ID
* Azure networking and identity services
* Experience with Docker\-based deployment architectures
* Experience with GitHub Actions and Infrastructure\-as\-Code using Bicep
* Experience integrating legacy/native applications with modern services
* Familiarity with C\+\+, MFC, and libpq integration patterns
* Strong understanding of enterprise application modernization strategies



**Technical Skills We Value** 



* Distributed systems and microservices architecture
* Enterprise SaaS platform design
* PostgreSQL performance optimization and multi\-tenant patterns
* RESTful API architecture and backend scalability
* Authentication and authorization design
* Enterprise security and compliance practices
* CI/CD and DevOps automation
* Async\-first collaboration within distributed engineering teams



**Soft Skills \& Mindset** 



* Strong architectural ownership mentality
* Pragmatic decision\-maker balancing innovation and reliability
* Excellent communicator and technical mentor
* Comfortable operating in ambiguity and transformation environments
* Passionate about building scalable enterprise\-grade systems



  





**🎁 Why Join Northbridge Strategy?** 



* Architect a globally impactful enterprise platform modernization initiative
* Work on advanced forecasting and analytical systems used by enterprise customers worldwide
* High ownership and influence across product and engineering strategy
* Modern Azure\-first technology stack
* Collaborative async\-first engineering culture
* Competitive compensation and long\-term growth opportunities
* Modern workspace in Hyderabad

18f35161.title: IT Service Delivery Manager
18f35161.description:
**Your Career, Accelerated** 




 Vivanti, Australia's leading technology data and analytics consulting firm, is growing their team in their Bengaluru Global Delivery Center.
 



 Vivanti was founded as a platform for talented technologists who want to make a real impact for their clients. Some of the world’s biggest businesses turn to us to help bring their data strategy, AI, cloud engineering and digital solutions to life. We’re the home base for talented technologists who want more and are looking to take their career to the next level by having more learning, more variety, more support and more chances to do meaningful work.
 



 Our consultants use emerging technologies and best practices to help clients become more data driven across a range of industries. Recent projects include building a customer data platform for a leading Airline, an IoT based real\-time driver safety dashboard for a global logistics firm, architecture advisory for Australia’s largest radio network, a full fledged enterprise cloud and data platform for the world’s leading medical aid manufacturing company, to name a few.
 



 We work with all the major technologies used in the market today and are partners with some of the largest names in the industry i.e. Databricks, Snowflake, Google, AWS, Azure and many more.
 



 If that sounds like the kind of place you’d thrive in, keep reading.
 



  





**What You’ll Get** 




 We know you're bringing the skills, the passion and the drive. What we bring is the platform to help you go further.
 



 At Vivanti, you're not just taking a job, you're investing in your growth.
 



 Here’s a taste:
 


* A platform for growth: Work across industries, clients and technologies that stretch your thinking and build your personal and professional skills.
* Access global businesses: Work with some of the world's biggest brands
* IP, frameworks and accelerators: We share what we know. Our playbooks and toolkits fast\-track your success on projects.
* Access to a broad ecosystem of technologies
* Senior consultants who have your back: You’ll always have a guide on your journey, not just be thrown into the deep end.
* Serious learning support: Paid certs, weekly training, guilds, hackathons, mentoring and more.
* Progress that’s transparent: Annual Progress Reviews based on 360° feedback, not vague vibes. Clear goals, solid feedback and real growth.
* Toastmasters and Pitch sessions to embrace your public speaking and leadership skills
* Hackathons to gear up for technologies on the horizon
* Comprehensive Health Insurance
* Kudos and rewards: We celebrate wins, reward impact and offer long\-term incentives.
* Real connection: From Friday socials to annual team building days \- we work hard and play harder.



  





**What You’ll Do** 




 As Senior Consultant \- Service Delivery, you will be the core engine driving our Cloud Managed Services delivery. You will lead a high\-performing team of engineers, manage executive\-level client relationships, and oversee the daily "Run" operations while strategically navigating "Change" and "Project" lanes.
 



 This role bridges technical execution, commercial management, and strategic stakeholder governance to ensure our clients receive seamless, optimized, and secure cloud operations.
 



**1\. Governance \& Operational Excellence** 



* Establish, track, and report on client\-facing
 **Service Level Agreements (SLAs)** 
 and internal
 **Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)** 
 .
* Maintain active
 **RAID logs** 
 (Risks, Assumptions, Issues, Dependencies) across multiple client engagements.
* Develop and present concise, executive\-ready monthly service review packs and lead
 **Executive Business Reviews (EBRs)** 
 with client leadership.



**2\. Operating Model \& Capacity Management** 



* Enforce the structural separation of
 **Run** 
 (BAU operations),
 **Change** 
 (small\-to\-medium enhancements via capped blocks of hours), and
 **Project** 
 (major builds or migrations) work.
* Protect the capacity reserved for BAU operations by putting up guardrails against ad\-hoc, out\-of\-scope enhancement requests.
* Drive resource and capacity planning to ensure optimal team utilization while maintaining appropriate headroom for unforeseen incidents.



**3\. Service Transition \& Hypercare** 



* Enforce strict
 **readiness gates** 
 and transition\-to\-service checklists before any new platform or system is accepted into BAU support.
* Govern the
 **hypercare period** 
 post\-go\-live, ensuring project delivery teams remediate defects before formal handover to the Managed Services team.



**4\. Stakeholder \& Client Communication** 



* Build deep, trusted relationships with
 **CXO, VP, and Director\-level stakeholders** 
 early in engagements.
* Provide clear, proactive written status updates tailored for time\-poor executives, reducing the need for unnecessary meetings.
* Effectively negotiate and facilitate prioritization decisions when senior client stakeholders present conflicting demands.



**5\. Incident, Escalation \& Risk Management** 



* Own the response strategy for critical
 **P1 outages** 
 , managing communication, coordination, and mitigation within the first 60 minutes of an event.
* Proactively identify and mitigate likely SLA breaches on open tickets.
* Design and execute defined escalation matrices and lead
 **Post\-Incident Reviews / Root Cause Analyses (RCAs)** 
 to eliminate recurring issues.



**6\. Commercial \& FinOps Management** 



* Utilize a
 **"service unit" approach** 
 to scale the managed service efficiently as client environments grow.
* Manage engagements under varying commercial structures, including baseline fixed retainers, flexible capacity tokens, and "not\-to\-exceed" fee caps.
* Partner with clients on
 **FinOps outcomes** 
 , driving cost optimization, periodic user access reviews (UARs), and license cleanups.



**7\. Team Leadership \& Knowledge Culture** 



* Mentor, coach, and manage the performance of engineers, implementing corrective plans when quality benchmarks are missed.
* Cultivate robust
 **knowledge management systems** 
 and up\-to\-date
 **runbooks** 
 to prevent key\-person dependency.
* Lead agile team rituals, including daily stand\-ups and
 **Sprint Retrospectives** 
 , to continuously inspect and adapt the team's way of working.



  





**What We’re Looking For** 



* **Experience:** 
 8\+ years of experience in a Service Delivery Management or Senior Service Delivery Consultant role specifically within a
 **Cloud and Data Managed Services** 
 or IT professional services environment.
* **Frameworks:** 
 Deep practical knowledge of
 **ITIL frameworks** 
 (Incident, Problem, Change management) and
 **Agile/Scrum methodologies** 
 .
* **Stakeholder Management:** 
 Proven track record of managing enterprise clients and de\-escalating tense, high\-pressure situations with executive stakeholders.
* **Technical Awareness:** 
 Strong structural understanding of data platforms and cloud infrastructure, platform operations models, automation maturity scales, and Change Advisory Boards.
* **Commercial Acumen:** 
 Demonstrated experience managing scope creep, tracking enhancement hour blocks, and aligning operational delivery with Statement of Work (SOW) guidelines.
* **Attributes:** 
 Exceptional judgment under pressure, clear and empathetic communication style, and a passion for building scalable operational processes.



  





**Why Explore a Career at Vivanti** 




 We are a consultant led organisation. We invest heavily in our consultants to ensure they have the technical skills and commercial acumen to be successful in their work. Our consultants have a passion for data and solving complex problems. They are curious, ambitious and experts in their fields. We have developed a first rate team so you will be supported and learn from the best.
 



 We invest heavily in professional development both technically, through training and guided certification pathways, and in consulting, through workshops in client engagement and communication. Growth in our organisation happens from growth in our people.
 



 Working on your own macbooks in our custom designed offices in the heart of Bengaluru, away from the big tech parks, we provide a peaceful and productive work environment close to shops, parks and metro stations.
 



 Vivanti consultants engage with the business to give expert advice, solve problems and deliver data, analytics, digital, AI, customer and cloud solutions, by drawing on years of experience across diverse projects, industries and technologies!
 



  





**The Vivanti Interview Process** 




 We like keeping it to the point and explore a candidate's competence through 4 stages of:
 


* A technical online screening test where we do a baseline assessment of your problem solving skills
* Introductory and Cultural Assessment to make sure we are all on the same page in terms of our growth and career prospects.
* Technical Assessment to understand your technical competency assessed by our technical panel.
* Final Round to make sure the technicality is in balance with the aptitude and culture fit.



 And after this, you pack and join us: )

The position demands continuous engagement with various stakeholders to ensure that the solutions developed are practical, innovative, and support the overall business strategy, fostering strong partnerships and driving project success.

853a0839.title: Solutions Architect- Identity Governance
853a0839.description:
**Company Description** 
 ALIQAN Technologies is an IT services company focused on delivering end\-to\-end technology solutions from a single, convenient location. The organization combines innovative design with high\-quality software and web development to create a “one\-stop” experience for clients. By offering a broad range of related IT services under one roof, ALIQAN Technologies helps customers avoid the complexity of working with multiple vendors. The company is committed to customer satisfaction, efficient service delivery, and tailored solutions that meet diverse business needs.
 



**Role Description** 
 Solutions Architect – Identity Governance and Administration 
 



  





 We are looking for a Solutions Architect with specialist knowledge of Identity Governance and Administration. Our clients are exasperated by the slow drawl of applications onboarding the pre\-ponderance of poor identity data and directory architecture that impede the delivery of identity governance. Our clients are dealing with mergers and acquisitions and complex migration patterns of their applications to PaaS and IaaS platforms. The successful candidate for this role will have the vision, foresight, technical calibre and the temperament to guide our clients through this complexity. 
 



  





 To be successful in this role, you would typically have the following mix of experiences and skills:
 



  





 ●    You will have delivered at least two identity governance programmes as a Technical or Solutions Architect either as a part of the client\-side team or as a consultancy working for a client. Hands on Saviynt development, deployment experience preferred. 
 



 ●    You will have an in\-depth understanding of directory services infrastructure, Microsoft Entra Identity Governance capabilities and would have integrated third party and employee authoritative sources like Fieldglass, Workday or SuccessFactors. 
 



 ●    You will have built Access Models, implemented connectors and workflows that can do account and access reconciliation and automated the execution of controls like access reviews 
 



 ●    Expertise in multi\-solution environments legacy IGA systems, their migration, building and integrating with bespoke entitlement stores, complex connector integration experience (e.g; SAP, Workday, Salesforce, Oracle Financials)
 



 ●    You will have a good business understanding of Third\-Party Access controls required and their impact on Identity and Access Governance and solutions design.
 



 ●    Expertise in managing mergers and acquisitions, as well as the subsequent integration or division of Identity Infrastructure, will be highly valued for this position.
 



 ●    Previous experience of building access models for IaaS and PaaS platforms, Just in time Access and or experience in Access Governance for AWS, GCP and Microsoft Cloud based services, applications and infrastructure will be highly valuable for this position. 
 



 ●    Effective communicator, active listener, patient interlocutor and collaborative team player all in one. 
 



 ●    You will have published point of views in professional publications related to Identity Governance or Identity Management. You share your knowledge empathetically and participatively. 
 



 ●    Strong grounding in Cyber Security concepts, including resilience, data governance, network security, supported by certifications like CISSP or CISM. 
 



 ●    Enterprise Architecture credentials –TOGAF, Zachman, DoDAF desired but not essential
 



 ●    Although it is given, you are at home troubleshooting configuration on at least two of the following Identity Governance solutions – Saviynt, SailPoint, Omada, One Identity, Microsoft Entra, Okta.

b71894b9.title: Sr. Delivery Manager - Life Sciences/Pharmaceuticals
b71894b9.description:
We are seeking an experienced
 **IT Delivery Leader** 
 to oversee and ensure the successful execution of a portfolio of technology projects, with a preference for candidates who have supported or operated within the pharmaceutical or life sciences sector. This role requires a strategic, delivery\-driven leader with exceptional client\-facing skills, a deep understanding of enterprise IT delivery models, and the ability to manage and grow relationships with senior stakeholders.
 



 The ideal candidate brings a blend of delivery excellence, portfolio leadership, and domain knowledge in pharma environments.
 



  
 



**Responsibilities** 



* Lead end\-to\-end delivery of a portfolio of IT projects, ensuring on\-time, on\-budget, and high\-quality outcomes
* Establish and manage delivery roadmaps, resource plans, and performance metrics across multiple workstreams
* Coordinate cross\-functional teams (client, vendor, onshore) to drive accountability and resolve delivery issues proactively
* Ensure adherence to project governance frameworks, SDLC/Agile methodologies, and compliance requirements (including GxP, where preferrable)
* Leverage and promote adoption of AI in project SDLC
* Identify delivery risks and implement mitigation strategies to ensure project continuity and success
* Serve as the primary point of contact for senior client stakeholders, fostering trust and credibility
* Understand client business needs, industry challenges, and strategic objectives to propose value\-aligned solutions
* Manage expectations, provide transparent communication, and ensure stakeholder alignment throughout the project lifecycle
* Facilitate executive\-level presentations and status reporting, translating complex technical concepts into business\-relevant insights
* Provide strong leadership to project managers, business analysts, architects, developers, and QA teams
* Mentor team members, promote continuous improvement, and instill a high\-performance delivery culture
* Support talent planning, capability development, and team motivation across distributed teams
* Manage portfolio budgets, forecasts, and financial controls
* Oversee vendor and partner performance, including contract adherence, quality, and service levels
* Drive cost optimization while maintaining high delivery standards







**Requirements** 



* 15 to 18 years of experience in IT project or program delivery, including leadership of complex multi\-project portfolios
* Extensive experience in Life Sciences/Pharmaceuticals
* Proven experience managing enterprise technology initiatives (e.g., digital transformation, cloud migration, data platforms, application development)
* Strong, demonstrable client stakeholder management and executive communication skills
* Solid understanding of SDLC, Agile/Hybrid methodologies, and IT governance frameworks
* Experience working with cross\-functional, global delivery teams
* English language proficiency at an Upper\-Intermediate level (B2\) or higher

d93514e8.title: Delivery Manager
d93514e8.description:
**Delivery Manager \- Data \& AI Managed Services**
 We are seeking a high\-impact
 **Delivery Manager \- Data \& AI Managed Services** 
 to lead strategic enterprise engagements focused on modern data platforms, AI enablement, analytics transformation, and business value realization. This role requires a unique blend of deep technical expertise, consulting leadership, operational excellence, innovation mindset, and customer relationship management.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead end\-to\-end delivery and operational management of enterprise Data \& AI managed services engagements.
* Act as a trusted advisor to client executives, business stakeholders, and technology leadership teams.
* Drive strategic roadmaps for data modernization, AI enablement, analytics transformation, and operational optimization.
* Build and scale high\-performing global delivery teams across onsite, nearshore, and offshore models.
* Own delivery governance including KPIs, SLAs, financial management, risk mitigation, escalations, staffing, and client satisfaction.
* Identify opportunities for account growth, expansion, innovation, and value\-added services.
* Partner with client stakeholders to define and prioritize data products, business capabilities, and AI\-driven use cases.
* Drive proactive consulting conversations around modernization, automation, data quality, governance, semantic models, and AI adoption.
* Lead architecture and solution discussions for modern cloud data platforms.
* Establish engineering best practices, reusable frameworks, accelerators, automation patterns, and operational excellence models.
* Mentor technical leads and other team members while fostering a culture of accountability, innovation, and continuous improvement.
* Collaborate closely with sales, pre\-sales, architecture, and executive leadership teams on proposals, estimations, solutioning, and strategic pursuits.


**Required Qualifications**
* 10\+ years of experience in enterprise data engineering, analytics, or data platform delivery.
* 5\+ years leading large\-scale managed services or consulting engagements.
* Proven experience managing complex global delivery teams across multiple geographies.
* Strong consulting mindset with the ability to engage executive stakeholders and drive business\-focused outcomes.
* Deep expertise in Retail, Food \& Beverage, and/or Entertainment industry domains.
* Strong experience building and operationalizing enterprise data products and analytics solutions.
* Demonstrated ability to drive account growth, innovation initiatives, and strategic transformation programs.


**Technical Expertise**
* Deep expertise in modern cloud data platforms and large\-scale data ecosystems.
* Strong hands\-on architecture and engineering knowledge in:
+ Databricks
+ Microsoft Azure ecosystem
+ Azure Data Factory (ADF)
+ Delta Lake \& Medallion Architecture
+ Data Lakehouse architectures
+ PySpark / Spark optimization
+ SQL and advanced data modeling
+ Real\-time and batch data processing
+ Data governance and data quality frameworks
+ CI/CD and DataOps practices
+ API and integration patterns

* Experience with AI/ML enablement, semantic models, conversational analytics, or Agentic AI ecosystems is highly preferred.
* Strong understanding of enterprise architecture, scalability, security, observability, and platform operations.


**Leadership Expectations**
* Operate as an owner and strategic leader, not just a project manager.
* Bring strong executive presence and communication skills.
* Drive innovation and challenge conventional approaches.
* Build trusted client relationships and become a strategic partner.
* Create a culture of engineering excellence, accountability, collaboration, and continuous learning.
* Inspire teams to deliver business outcomes with speed, quality, and operational rigor.


**Preferred Background**
 Experience working with:
   

  

* Enterprise Retail organizations
* Restaurant / F\&B brands
* Entertainment and hospitality companies
* Large\-scale cloud modernization initiatives
* Data platform managed services environments
* Consulting or professional services organizations


 This is an opportunity to lead transformative Data \& AI initiatives for enterprise clients while helping shape next\-generation data\-driven organizations through modern engineering, consulting excellence, and innovation leadership.

cc93024c.title: Senior Engagement Manager (Salesforce Pre-sales exp. mandatory)
cc93024c.description:
*To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.*
 Job Category
   

  

 Customer Success
   

  

 Job Details
   

  

**About Salesforce**
 Salesforce is the \#1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.
   

  

 Ready to level\-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.
   

  

 We are looking for a Senior Engagement Manager to join India PS Pre\-Sales team in India. This is a senior individual contributor \+ team leadership role sitting at the intersection of pre\-sales, solution architecture, and delivery — you will own the scoping, solutioning, and commercialisation of complex Salesforce PS engagements across the India enterprise market.
   

  

 You will be the trusted technical advisor to customers and account teams during the pre\-sales cycle, responsible for shaping winning
   

  

 PS deals from qualification through to SPW/SOW signature.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Lead end\-to\-end PS pre\-sales engagements — from discovery and scoping through to effort estimation, SPW/proposal creation, and deal closure.
* Architect Agentforce\-led solutions for enterprise customers, designing agentic workflows, LLM orchestration, and AI automationpatterns on the Salesforce platform.
* Partner with AEs, Solution Engineers, and Customer Success to position PS as a strategic differentiator on complex, multi\-cloud opportunities.
* Own the effort estimation and resource planning process — producing credible, commercially sound PS proposals that balance customer value with delivery margin.
* Conduct executive\-level workshops and solution presentations with CXO stakeholders.
* Build reusable PS assets — solution blueprints, reference architectures, estimations, and proposal templates — to accelerate the team.
* Mentor junior team members and contribute to the PS Pre\-Sales practice capability agenda.


 What We're Looking For
   

  

**Must\-have**
* Overall 12 years of experience and 8\+ years of Salesforce experience, with at least 3–4 years in a pre\-sales or solution architecture role.
* Hands\-on Agentforce expertise — you have designed and scoped agentic solutions involving Einstein Bots, Agentforce, Prompt Builder, Model Builder, or equivalent AI orchestration on Salesforce
* Strong understanding of the Salesforce PS delivery model — you know how to scope, estimate, and price professional services engagements.
* Proven experience writing SPWs, proposals, and DDs — you can own a document end to end.
* Excellent executive communication and storytelling skills — you are credible in a boardroom.
* Salesforce certifications: minimum Application Architect or System Architect; Agentforce Specialist a strong plus.


**Good To Have**
* Experience across multiple Salesforce clouds — Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, MuleSoft, Data Cloud.
* Exposure to India enterprise market dynamics — FSI, Manufacturing, Hi\-Tech, or Public Sector.
* Prior experience managing or mentoring a pre\-sales team.


**Why This Role**
* Work on India's most complex and strategic Salesforce PS deals.
* Be at the forefront of Agentforce go\-to\-market in India — one of the highest\-priority growth areas globally.
* Direct exposure to senior leadership and a high\-visibility role within the PS organisation.
* Opportunity to shape how PS Pre\-Sales operates and scales in India.


 Unleash Your Potential
   

  

 When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and
 *be your best* 
 , and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can
 *do your best* 
 . Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.
   

  

 Accommodations
   

  

 If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form.
   

  

 Please note that Salesforce uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to help our recruiters assess and evaluate candidates’ resumes and qualifications throughout the recruiting process. Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options.
   

  

 Posting Statement
   

  

 Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non\-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.

558620e9.title: Business Engagement Manager
558620e9.description:
**Company Description**
  

 Saffron Networks Pvt Ltd is a leading cybersecurity consulting firm, specializing in providing expert guidance and solutions to enhance security postures and protect against modern cyber threats. Our team comprises highly skilled cybersecurity professionals with extensive industry experience, offering tailored, comprehensive services to meet our clients' unique needs. By combining strategic consulting, technical expertise, and a proactive approach, we empower organizations with robust cybersecurity strategies to ensure the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of their digital assets. As a client\-centric organization, we prioritize building strong partnerships and working collaboratively to achieve our clients' cybersecurity objectives.
   

**Role Description**
  

 This is a full\-time, on\-site role for a Business Engagement Manager located in Gurugram. The Business Engagement Manager will be responsible for developing and maintaining strong relationships with clients, overseeing business planning and project management, and ensuring the successful execution of business processes. Day\-to\-day tasks include analyzing business needs, managing customer service operations, and facilitating communication between clients and internal teams.
   

**Qualifications**
  

* Analytical Skills and Business Process proficiency
* Experience in Business Planning and Project Management
* Strong Customer Service skills
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
* Ability to work collaboratively and manage multiple stakeholders
* Relevant bachelor's degree or equivalent work experience
* Experience in the cybersecurity industry is a plus

8eef70fa.title: Sovereign Cloud Engagement Expert
8eef70fa.description:
**We help the world run better**
 At SAP, we keep it simple: you bring your best to us, and we'll bring out the best in you. We're builders touching over 20 industries and 80% of global commerce, and we need your unique talents to help shape what's next. The work is challenging – but it matters. You'll find a place where you can be yourself, prioritize your wellbeing, and truly belong. What's in it for you? Constant learning, skill growth, great benefits, and a team that wants you to grow and succeed.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
 We are looking for a Sovereign Cloud Engagement Expert (f/m/d) to join our global team. This position is part of the Sovereign Cloud Alliances unit within the Sovereign Services \& Delivery (SS\&D) organization that combines all Sovereign Cloud deliveries at SAP.
   

  

**The Role Includes The Following Tasks**
* Project manage complex customer engagements pre\-signature and post\-signature in line with Sovereign Cloud Engagement case management practice
* Ensure early, consistent, and consumable information flows to speed up the bid\-to\-signature phase as well as time adherence in the signature to go\-live phase
* Eliminate processual disarray for complex Sovereign Cloud Engagement cases with standardized, repeatable procedures that track deliverables
* Multi\-level stakeholder management within SAP to structure and strengthen alignment as foundation to enable success of Sovereign Engagement cases
* Collaborate with cross functional teams (infrastructure operations, sales, regulatory affairs, marketing, operations, delivery, product management and legal) to ensure seamless integration and the on\-time delivery of key milestones
* Proactive screening for escalation interactions or delivery items with escalation potential and working on solutions to prevent actual Executive Board and/or customer escalations
* Implement a robust collaboration model, governance, strategy to ensure Sovereign Cloud Engagement cases are aligned with all SAP internal processes and projects according to SAP’s Sovereign Cloud Strategy
* Support Head of Sovereign Cloud Engagement and Global Head of Sovereign Cloud Alliances to enforce one holistic Sovereign Cloud Engagement case reporting


**What You Bring**
* Master’s degree or equivalent
* 15\+ years of professional experience
* Experience in sales and/or commercial roles
* Experience in collaborating in complex engagements
* Experience in project management in a multinational context is a must
* Solid understanding of SAP Cloud offerings is a must
* Experience in driving initiatives through multiple organizations
* Experience in communication with senior management
* Experience in SAP’s reporting systems
* Excellent communication and liaison skills
* English language skills on native speaker level


**Beneficial**
* Experience in Sovereign Cloud
* Experience in handling official government classified information


**Meet Your Team**
 SAP Sovereign Services \& Delivery (SS\&D) is part of Customer Value Group (CVG) board area and manages end\-to\-end Sovereign Cloud delivery as well as Government Security fulfilment for SAP.
   

  

 \#DevT4
   

  

**Bring out your best**
 SAP innovations help more than four hundred thousand customers worldwide work together more efficiently and use business insight more effectively. Originally known for leadership in enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, SAP has evolved to become a market leader in end\-to\-end business application software and related services for database, analytics, intelligent technologies, and experience management. As a cloud company with two hundred million users and more than one hundred thousand employees worldwide, we are purpose\-driven and future\-focused, with a highly collaborative team ethic and commitment to personal development. Whether connecting global industries, people, or platforms, we help ensure every challenge gets the solution it deserves. At SAP, you can bring out your best.
   

  

**We win with inclusion**
 SAP’s culture of inclusion, focus on health and well\-being, and flexible working models help ensure that everyone – regardless of background – feels included and can run at their best. At SAP, we believe we are made stronger by the unique capabilities and qualities that each person brings to our company, and we invest in our employees to inspire confidence and help everyone realize their full potential. We ultimately believe in unleashing all talent and creating a better world.
   

  

 SAP is committed to the values of Equal Employment Opportunity and provides accessibility accommodations to applicants with physical and/or mental disabilities. If you are interested in applying for employment with SAP and are in need of accommodation or special assistance to navigate our website or to complete your application, please send an e\-mail with your request to Recruiting Operations Team: Careers@sap.com.
   

  

 For SAP employees: Only permanent roles are eligible for the SAP Employee Referral Program, according to the eligibility rules set in the SAP Referral Policy. Specific conditions may apply for roles in Vocational Training.
   

  

 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to their age, race, religion, national origin, ethnicity, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, et al), sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, protected veteran status, or disability, in compliance with applicable federal, state, and local legal requirements.
   

  

 Successful candidates might be required to undergo a background verification with an external vendor.
   

  

**AI Usage in the Recruitment Process**
 For information on the responsible use of AI in our recruitment process, please refer to our Guidelines for Ethical Usage of AI in the Recruiting Process.
   

  

 Please note that any violation of these guidelines may result in disqualification from the hiring process.

3b9e8778.title: Cloud Software Engineering Manager
3b9e8778.description:
Cloud Software Engineering Manager  



This role has been designed as ‘’Onsite’ with an expectation that you will primarily work from an HPE office.**Who We Are:**


Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge\-to\-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.

**Job Description:**

  



HPE Networking Business Unit, powered by the Aruba Networks, Juniper Networks and Axis Security portfolios, delivers secure, AI\-driven networking solutions that connect users, devices, applications, and data across campus, branch, data centre, WAN, data centre, and cloud environments. HPE Networking BU enables organizations to modernize infrastructure through on\-prem, hybrid and cloud\-native management, automation, AIOps\-driven operations, and high\-performance wired, wireless, routing, and switching and security solutions, while supporting seamless hybrid work experiences with scalability, resiliency, and operational simplicity.


HPE Networking BU’s SASE and Security Group develops solutions that provide a unified, cloud\-delivered architecture that combines networking and security capabilities for the modern edge\-to\-cloud enterprise. The portfolio integrates SD\-WAN, Secure Service Edge (SSE), Zero Trust Network Access (ZTNA), Next Generation Firewall (NGFW), CASB, Secure Routing, Unified Endpoint Client and AI\-Native network operations capabilities to deliver secure and optimized access for users regardless of location.

 ***Management Level Definition:***


Applies advanced subject matter knowledge to manage staff activities in solving common and complex business/technical issues within established policies. Manages exempt individual contributors and/or supervisors. Has accountability for the results of a major program in terms of cost, direction, and people management. Provides guidance on process improvements and recommends changes in alignment with business tactics and strategy for the area of responsibility. Plans, manages, and monitors operational/tactical activities of the staff. Staff members' work may involve strategic issues. Recruits and supports the development of direct staff members. Typically reports to MG2 or Director.  

  

Additional guidance/criteria: Manages and controls activities within a single country or a sub\-region which is part of a larger geographical Region; Manages at least 4 employees and typically between 8 and 15 direct reports. Span of Control guidelines may differ from these numbers.

***Job Family Definition:***


HPE Networking is a leading provider of next\-generation networking solutions for the enterprise that transform companies from edge to cloud. We are helping enterprise customers to connect, protect, analyze, and act on all your data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so you can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. The results are dramatically improved productivity and lower operational costs.

  

We are looking for a Cloud Software Engineering Manager for our Next Generation Central, which is a unified AI\-powered cloud network management platform. The candidate will participate in architecture and design discussions and develop scalable applications that run on top of Next Generation Central. We are looking for candidates with the following requirements:

  



**What you’ll do**

***Responsibilities:***

* Provides direct and ongoing leadership for a team of individual contributors designing, developing, and sustaining products, enhancements, and updates.
* Plans and delivers features for multiple ongoing projects, ensuring that resources are appropriately allocated and that goals, objectives, timelines, and budgets are met in accordance with program and organizational roadmaps.
* Manages relationships with internal and external stakeholders, setting expectations regarding deliverables, product quality, schedules, and costs.
* Proactively identifies process improvement and cost reduction opportunities and achieves operational excellence through metrics and continuous learning.
* Provides people management for assigned team members, including hiring, setting, and monitoring of performance goals, coaching, and career development.
* Builds a best\-in\-class engineering team that delivers excellent results.
* Advanced project management skills, including time and risk management, resource prioritization, and project structuring

**What you need to bring:**


***Education and Experience Required:***

* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, engineering, information systems, or a related field.
* Typically, 10\+ years’ experience, including 0\-2 years of people management experience.

**Our Minimum Requirements for this Role Are**

* Experience in implementing scalable cloud applications.
* Proven record of developing and releasing cloud applications in a production environment.
* Experience working with Product Marketing to understand requirements and translate those into design and implementation.
* Solid grasp of computer science/software engineering concepts, including:
* Common data structures
* Standard algorithms
* Object\-oriented design
* Distributed computing
* Cloud computing paradigms
* Hands\-on experience with SQL database (Postgres), NOSQL databases (Cassandra, Clickhouse, etc.), Graph database, and Redis
* Hands\-on experience with messaging systems such as Kafka and RabbitMQ
* Experiences in deploying various techniques to ‘scale’ an application in a cloud environment.
* Experience with Kubernetes, Docker, and developing Microservices
* Demonstrated abilities to work with QA and Remote Teams.
* Experience in working with Agile Methodology.
* Experience and proficiency in developing in Python, Golang, and Java
* Previous experience in software management and working with Product Management on new software requirements and customer needs
**Experience in any of the following will be considered a plus**

* Good understanding of Networking Technologies, various networking protocols, L2, L3, and SDN concepts.
* Ability to contribute to multiple ‘technical programs’ simultaneously.
* Help build a team, mentor junior engineers, and collaborate with other teams for developing new technologies.
***Knowledge and Skills:***

* Advanced business acumen, technical knowledge, and extensive knowledge of cloud applications and related technologies.
* Strong leadership skills, including coaching, team building, and conflict resolution.
* Advanced project management skills, including time and risk management, resource prioritization, and project structuring.
* Strong multi\-tasking and prioritization skills.
* Strong verbal and written communication skills, including negotiation, presentation, and influence skills.

**Additional Skills:**


Accountability, Accountability, Action Planning, Active Learning, Active Listening, Agile Methodology, Agile Scrum Development, Analytical Thinking, Bias, Coaching, Creativity, Critical Thinking, Cross\-Functional Teamwork, Data Analysis Management, Data Collection Management (Inactive), Data Controls, Design, Design Thinking, Empathy, Follow\-Through, Group Problem Solving, Growth Mindset, Intellectual Curiosity (Inactive), Long Term Planning, Managing Ambiguity {\+ 5 more}**What We Can Offer You:**

**Health \& Wellbeing**


We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.

**Personal \& Professional Development**


We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.

**Unconditional Inclusion**


We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.

**Let's Stay Connected:**


Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.


\#india

Manager\_1  



HPE is an Equal Employment Opportunity/ Veterans/Disabled/LGBT employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender, or any other protected category, and all decisions we make are made on the basis of qualifications, merit, and business need. Our goal is to be one global team that is representative of our customers, in an inclusive environment where we can continue to innovate and grow together. Please click here: Equal Employment Opportunity.

**Hewlett Packard Enterprise is EEO Protected Veteran/ Individual with Disabilities.**

  



HPE will comply with all applicable laws related to employer use of arrest and conviction records, including laws requiring employers to consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories.

  



**Recruitment Fraud Alert**


We have become aware of an increase in fraudulent recruitment activities in which individuals impersonate our company or authorized recruitment agencies to offer fake employment opportunities. These scams may occur through false websites, emails, social media, or chat\-based applications and often aim to obtain personal information or money. Please note that Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE), its direct and indirect subsidiaries and affiliated companies, and its authorized recruitment agencies/vendors will never charge a candidate a registration fee, hiring fee, or any other fee in connection with its recruitment and hiring process. We also never request personal information such as back account details, Social Security numbers, or national IDs via social media or chat applications.


All legitimate job opportunities will come through official company channels, and candidates are responsible for verifying the credentials of any third party claiming to represent the company. Any reliance on fraudulent communication is at the individual’s own risk, and HPE disclaims legal liability for any resulting damages. If you suspect recruitment fraud, do not share personal information or make any payments and report the incident to your local authorities immediately.

e08d2be9.title: Senior Sustainability Program Manager
e08d2be9.description:
Senior Sustainability Program Manager  



This role has been designed as ‘Hybrid’ with an expectation that you will work on average 2 days per week from an HPE office.**Who We Are:**


Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge\-to\-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.

**Job Description:**

  



***HPE Operations***is our innovative IT services organization. It provides the expertise to advise, integrate, and accelerate our customers’ outcomes from their digital transformation. Our teams collaborate to transform insight into innovation. In today’s fast paced, hybrid IT world, being at business speed means overcoming IT complexity to match the speed of actions to the speed of opportunities. Deploy the right technology to respond quickly to market possibilities. Join us and redefine what’s next for you.


HPE has committed to ambitious climate goals, including reducing Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions by 70%, reducing Scope 3 emissions by 42% by 2030 (2020 baseline), and achieving net\-zero greenhouse gas emissions across the value chain by 2040\. This role will play a critical part in enabling the data, systems, reporting, and operational programs needed to achieve these targets.  

  

**What You’ll Do:**  

  

Lead and manage a small global team supporting sustainability data management, reporting, analytics, and tool development initiatives across HPE Operations.  

Drive execution of sustainability reporting and emissions measurement programs across manufacturing, logistics, fulfillment, packaging, supplier operations, and purchased goods \& services.  

Partner with Digital Transformation and business stakeholders to develop and scale sustainability reporting tools, dashboards, automation capabilities, and data governance processes.  

Support development and operationalization of HPE’s sustainability data platforms including carbon measurement, supplier reporting, product carbon footprint (PCF), and operational sustainability tools.  

Establish scalable processes for sustainability data collection, validation, governance, and reporting across multiple business units and operational functions.  

Lead cross\-functional initiatives focused on operational carbon reduction, renewable energy strategy support, energy efficiency, circularity, and supply chain decarbonization.  

Collaborate with internal and external stakeholders to improve transparency, reporting accuracy, and sustainability performance tracking aligned with corporate sustainability commitments.  

Translate complex sustainability and operational data into executive\-ready insights, business recommendations, and strategic decision\-making support.  

Manage multiple strategic programs simultaneously while driving alignment across Operations, Corporate Sustainability, DT, Finance, Procurement, and Supply Chain organizations.  

Support roadmap development for future sustainability capabilities including automation, predictive analytics, digitalization, and enterprise sustainability reporting.  

Mentor and develop team members while fostering a culture of accountability, collaboration, innovation, and continuous improvement.  

  

**What You Need to Bring:**

* Bachelor’s degree in engineering, Sustainability, Environmental Sciences, Supply Chain, Data Analytics, Business, or related field.
* Master’s degree preferred in Sustainability, Engineering, Business Administration, Environmental Management, or related discipline.
* 8\+ years of experience in sustainability, supply chain operations, manufacturing operations, logistics, procurement, or enterprise sustainability program management.
* 2\+ years of people management or team leadership experience.
* Strong understanding of corporate sustainability reporting, carbon accounting methodologies, Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions measurement, and operational sustainability programs.
* Experience working across global operations, supply chain, manufacturing, logistics, or procurement organizations.
* Experience leading cross\-functional programs involving data, reporting, analytics, and digital transformation initiatives.
* Strong analytical, problem\-solving, and project management skills with ability to structure and drive complex initiatives independently.
* Ability to communicate effectively with executive leadership and translate technical concepts into business value and operational impact.
* Experience working with sustainability reporting systems, dashboards, data visualization tools, and enterprise reporting platforms.
* Strong collaboration and stakeholder management skills across geographically distributed teams.
* Ability to manage ambiguity, drive execution, and influence without direct authority across matrixed organizations.

 **Knowledge \& Skills**

  

* Sustainability Strategy \& Execution
* Scope 1, 2 \& 3 Carbon Accounting
* Supply Chain \& Operations Sustainability
* Sustainability Data Management \& Governance
* Sustainability Reporting \& Analytics
* Program \& Portfolio Management
* Cross\-Functional Leadership
* Digital Transformation \& Tool Development
* Executive Communications \& Storytelling
* Business Acumen \& Strategic Thinking
* Process Improvement \& Operational Excellence
* Change Management \& Stakeholder Engagement
* Power BI, Excel, Data Visualization \& Reporting Tools
* Supplier Sustainability \& Decarbonization Programs
* Product Carbon Footprint (PCF) \& Environmental Reporting

 **Additional Skills**  

  

Accountability, strategic thinking, analytical problem solving, systems thinking, collaboration, influencing skills, executive presence, customer\-centric mindset, sustainability leadership, operational rigor, innovation mindset, communication skills, adaptability, and continuous improvement orientation.

**Additional Skills:**


Accountability, Accountability, Active Learning, Active Listening, Bias, Coaching, Commercial Acumen, Complex Project Management, Contract Management, Creativity, Critical Thinking, Customer Experience Strategy, Data Science, Design Thinking, Empathy, Engineering Product Development, Financial Acumen, Follow\-Through, Global Sourcing, Growth Mindset, Intellectual Curiosity (Inactive), Long Term Planning, Managing Ambiguity, Manufacturing Supply Chain, Negotiation {\+ 4 more}**What We Can Offer You:**

**Health \& Wellbeing**


We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.

**Personal \& Professional Development**


We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.

**Unconditional Inclusion**


We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.

**Let's Stay Connected:**
