680dcc43.title: Technical Delivery Manager
680dcc43.description:
**Description**
---------------

**About Us**


Zelis is modernizing the healthcare financial experience in the United States (U.S.) across payers, providers, and healthcare consumers. We serve more than 750 payers, including the top five national health plans, regional health plans, TPAs and millions of healthcare providers and consumers across our platform of solutions. Zelis sees across the system to identify, optimize, and solve problems holistically with technology built by healthcare experts – driving real, measurable results for clients.


At Zelis, AI is woven into the fabric of how we work. Every associate is expected \- and empowered \- to partner with AI to challenge the status quo, accelerate innovation, and amplify their impact. This is a place for builders with a growth mindset who act with agility, embrace change, and use modern technology to shape smarter solutions, exceptional experiences, and the future of our industry for our clients, customers, and our culture.

**Why We Do What We Do**


In the U.S., consumers, payers, and providers face significant challenges throughout the healthcare financial journey. Zelis helps streamline the process by offering solutions that improve transparency, efficiency, and communication among all parties involved. By addressing the obstacles that patients face in accessing care, navigating the intricacies of insurance claims, and the logistical challenges healthcare providers encounter with processing payments, Zelis aims to create a more seamless and effective healthcare financial system.


Zelis India plays a crucial role in this mission by supporting various initiatives that enhance the healthcare financial experience. The local team contributes to the development and implementation of innovative solutions, ensuring that technology and processes are optimized for efficiency and effectiveness. Beyond operational expertise, Zelis India cultivates a collaborative work culture, leadership development, and global exposure, creating a dynamic environment for professional growth. With hybrid work flexibility, comprehensive healthcare benefits, financial wellness programs, and cultural celebrations, we foster a holistic workplace experience. Additionally, the team plays a vital role in maintaining high standards of service delivery and contributes to Zelis’ award\-winning culture.

**Position Overview**


Technical Program Manager – AI\-Enabled Engineering Pods  

Role Title: Technical Program Manager – Full Stack, Cloud \& AI Engineering  

Location: Hyderabad, India  

Experience Required: Minimum 14\+ years of experience
We are looking for a seasoned **Technical Program Manager** to lead and manage multiple cross\-functional engineering pod teams based in Hyderabad. This role requires strong technical depth, hands\-on understanding of modern full stack engineering practices, cloud\-native platforms, DevSecOps, and practical experience using AI and Gen AI platforms to improve engineering productivity, delivery predictability, quality, and operational excellence.


The ideal candidate should have prior experience managing complex technology programs involving distributed engineering teams, product owners, architects, developers, QA engineers, DevOps teams, security teams, and business stakeholders. The candidate must be comfortable operating at both strategic and execution levels — driving roadmap alignment, technical delivery, architecture discussions, release governance, dependency management, risk mitigation, and executive\-level reporting.


This is not a pure project management role. The candidate is expected to bring strong technical judgment, understand engineering trade\-offs, challenge solution approaches where required, and guide teams toward scalable, secure, maintainable, and AI\-enabled delivery practices.

**Key Responsibilities**

**Program \& Delivery Leadership**

* Lead multiple engineering pod teams delivering full stack, cloud\-native, and enterprise\-grade digital applications.
* Own end\-to\-end program execution across planning, design, development, testing, release, deployment, and production support.
* Drive delivery predictability across multiple pods by managing scope, schedule, dependencies, risks, milestones, and release commitments.
* Partner with product owners, architects, engineering managers, QA leads, DevOps teams, security teams, and business stakeholders to ensure successful execution.
* Establish clear operating rhythms across sprint planning, backlog refinement, architecture reviews, dependency tracking, release planning, and production readiness.
* Monitor execution health across pods and proactively address blockers, capacity gaps, technical risks, and cross\-team dependencies.
* Drive alignment between business objectives, product priorities, technical architecture, and delivery execution.
* Ensure programs are delivered with strong focus on quality, security, scalability, maintainability, and operational stability.

**Technical Program Management**

* Facilitate technical design discussions across .NET Core, Angular, REST APIs, microservices, cloud platforms, databases, DevSecOps, and integration platforms.
* Partner with architects and senior engineers to validate solution approaches, identify architectural risks, and ensure adherence to enterprise standards.
* Drive technical governance across application architecture, API design, cloud integration, security, performance, observability, and deployment practices.
* Ensure engineering teams follow clean architecture, SOLID principles, secure coding practices, CI/CD standards, and cloud engineering best practices.
* Track and manage technical debt, platform modernization initiatives, production stability issues, and engineering improvement plans.
* Support teams in resolving production issues related to performance, scalability, reliability, integrations, cloud services, and deployment pipelines.
* Ensure delivery teams adopt appropriate engineering metrics, including sprint predictability, defect leakage, deployment frequency, change failure rate, code quality, test coverage, and production incident trends.

**AI \& Gen AI Enablement**

* Drive responsible adoption of AI and Gen AI tools across engineering pods to improve productivity, code quality, documentation, testing, and problem\-solving.
* Enable teams to use platforms such as **GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT Enterprise, Azure OpenAI, Amazon Q, Gemini**, or similar enterprise\-approved AI platforms.
* Identify practical AI use cases across software delivery, including code generation, refactoring, unit test generation, API documentation, technical design documentation, defect analysis, and security review support.
* Establish AI usage guardrails aligned with enterprise security, data privacy, compliance, intellectual property, and responsible AI policies.
* Partner with engineering and security teams to evaluate AI\-assisted development workflows and ensure safe adoption.
* Track productivity and quality improvements resulting from AI\-enabled engineering practices.
* Promote a culture of AI\-assisted engineering while ensuring human accountability for design, code quality, security, and production outcomes.

**Agile, DevSecOps \& Release Governance**

* Lead agile execution across multiple pods using Scrum, Kanban, SAFe, or hybrid delivery models.
* Drive consistent sprint ceremonies, backlog hygiene, estimation practices, release planning, and execution governance.
* Ensure CI/CD pipelines, automated deployments, quality gates, code reviews, test automation, security scans, and release approvals are integrated into delivery workflows.
* Partner with DevOps and platform teams to improve deployment reliability, environment stability, monitoring, logging, and incident response.
* Ensure production releases meet defined entry and exit criteria, including quality, security, performance, and operational readiness checks.
* Drive continuous improvement across engineering processes, agile maturity, DevSecOps adoption, and delivery effectiveness.

**Stakeholder \& Executive Communication**

* Provide clear, concise, and data\-driven program updates to senior leadership, including Directors, VPs, and CXO\-level stakeholders where required.
* Communicate program status, risks, dependencies, financial impacts, delivery trade\-offs, and mitigation plans with appropriate executive clarity.
* Prepare roadmap views, release dashboards, dependency maps, risk registers, decision logs, and program health reports.
* Translate complex technical topics into business\-relevant insights for non\-technical stakeholders.
* Drive decision\-making across competing priorities, delivery constraints, architecture options, and risk scenarios.

**Required Skills and Experience**

* Minimum **14\+ years of overall technology experience**, with strong background in software engineering, technical delivery, program management, or engineering leadership.
* Proven experience managing **multiple engineering pods or cross\-functional agile teams** in a complex enterprise environment.
* Strong technical understanding of full stack application delivery using **.NET Core / ASP.NET Core, Angular, C\#, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS**.
* Solid understanding of **REST APIs, microservices, backend services, cloud\-native application patterns, and scalable web architectures**.
* Experience working with **AWS and/or Azure** cloud platforms.
* Strong understanding of relational databases such as **SQL Server, PostgreSQL, or MySQL**.
* Good understanding of application security, authentication, authorization, identity management, logging, monitoring, and performance optimization.
* Experience with **CI/CD pipelines, DevSecOps practices, Git\-based workflows, automated deployment, and production release governance**.
* Working knowledge of containerization and orchestration platforms such as **Docker and Kubernetes**.
* Familiarity with event\-driven systems and messaging platforms such as **Azure Service Bus, AWS SQS/SNS, Kafka, or RabbitMQ**.
* Experience with Infrastructure as Code tools such as **Terraform, ARM templates, Bicep, or AWS CloudFormation**.
* Practical experience using AI or Gen AI platforms such as **GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, Azure OpenAI, Amazon Q, Gemini**, or equivalent tools.
* Strong understanding of agile delivery models, sprint execution, roadmap planning, dependency management, and engineering metrics.
* Ability to challenge technical assumptions, identify delivery risks, and drive resolution across engineering, product, QA, DevOps, security, and business teams.
* Excellent communication skills with ability to engage senior leadership and technical teams with equal effectiveness.

**Preferred Technical Capabilities**

* Prior hands\-on software engineering experience before moving into technical program management or engineering leadership.
* Experience managing enterprise\-scale modernization, cloud migration, platform transformation, or digital product engineering programs.
* Exposure to regulated industries such as healthcare, fintech, insurance, life sciences, or other compliance\-heavy environments.
* Strong understanding of enterprise architecture governance, security reviews, audit requirements, and compliance controls.
* Experience with observability platforms, production support models, SRE practices, and incident management.
* Experience implementing AI\-assisted SDLC practices across large engineering teams.
* Understanding of responsible AI, AI governance, data privacy, secure prompt usage, and enterprise AI adoption frameworks.

**AI Platform Expectations**


The candidate should be hands\-on and comfortable using AI platforms to:

* Improve engineering productivity across multiple pod teams.
* Assist with code review, code generation, and refactoring analysis.
* Generate unit test cases and improve test coverage.
* Support API documentation, architecture documentation, and technical design documentation.
* Analyze technical designs, logs, defects, and production issues for faster triage.
* Identify security, performance, and maintainability concerns in application delivery.
* Build reusable AI\-enabled workflows for engineering teams.
* Promote responsible AI adoption in alignment with enterprise policies.
* Ensure AI tools are used as productivity accelerators while preserving engineering accountability, security, and compliance.

**Leadership \& Soft Skills**

* Strong ownership mindset with ability to operate independently in a senior leadership\-facing role.
* Excellent stakeholder management, negotiation, and conflict\-resolution skills.
* Ability to lead multiple teams through ambiguity, changing priorities, and complex dependencies.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills.
* Ability to balance delivery speed with technical quality, security, scalability, and maintainability.
* Strong communication skills with ability to simplify complex technical issues for executive audiences.
* Ability to mentor pod leads, scrum masters, technical leads, and engineering teams on delivery discipline and engineering best practices.
* Strong execution discipline with focus on measurable outcomes, delivery transparency, and continuous improvement.

**Commitment to Diversity, Equity, Inclusion, and Belonging**


At Zelis, we champion diversity, equity, inclusion, and belonging in all aspects of our operations. We embrace the power of diversity and create an environment where people can bring their authentic and best selves to work. We know that a sense of belonging is key not only to your success at Zelis, but also to your ability to bring your best each day.




**Equal Employment Opportunity**


Zelis is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local laws.


**Accessibility Support**


We are dedicated to ensuring our application process is accessible to all candidates. If you are a qualified individual with a disability and require reasonable accommodation with any part of the application and/or interview process, please email talentacquisition@zelis.com.

c9dde276.title: Technical Program Manager
c9dde276.description:
**Job Title:** Technical Program Manager


**Location:** Bangalore, India


**Role Overview**



RhythmX AI is revolutionizing primary care through AI\-powered precision medicine, helping physicians deliver personalized care for chronic conditions like diabetes, hypertension, and CKD. As our Technical Program Manager, you'll drive critical programs that directly impact patient outcomes and clinician efficiency across our growing network of healthcare providers.



The Impact You'll Drive:


* Lead programs serving 500K\+ patients through our AI clinical assistant
* Coordinate complex EHR integrations processing millions of FHIR transactions daily
* Deliver AI model deployments that improve clinical decision\-making for primary care physicians


What you'll Own:


* Program Leadership
* + Lead high\-impact cross\-functional programs from planning through execution and launch across PM, AI, data eng, cloud infra and clinical teams.
	+ Drive complex integration with Epic, Cerner and other major healthcare systems
	+ Coordinate AI model deployment from development through clinical validation and release
	+ Manage scope, technical dependencies, risk, and timelines across multiple initiatives
	+ Serve as a thought partner to engineering and product management teams to break down complex goals into actionable plans
* Agile \& Execution Leadership
* + Run scrum of scrums across 4\-6 engineering pods
	+ Drive delivery velocity while maintaining clinical safety and regulatory compliance
	+ Run agile ceremonies across sprint teams
	+ Track program KPIs, timelines, velocity, tech debt and clinical impact metrics
	+ Facilitate cross\-team alignment between AI/ML, data eng, clinical and product teams
* Risk \& Change Management
* + Own program\-level risk tracking, mitigation plans, and change control
	+ Proactively escalate to leadership with clear context and resolution paths
	+ Ensure decisions are data\-driven and aligned with clinical and business priorities
* Executive Communication and Stakeholder management
* + Deliver structured updates to senior executives on program health, timelines, outcomes and clinical impact
	+ Align cross\-functional stakeholders from product, engineering, data science, clinical, customer success
	+ Document and communicate scope trade\-offs and execution plans clearly

**Core Experience (8\-12 years)**


* 8\-12 years in technical program management with experience in healthcare technology
* Proven track record leading complex programs in regulated industries (healthcare, fintech, or similar)
* Strong agile leadership experience managing 25\+ person engineering teams
* Hands\-on expertise with Jira, Confluence, and project tracking tools
* PMP, CSM, or equivalent certifications are a plus


**Healthcare \& technology**


* Familiarity with healthcare data systems (EMRs, HL7/FHIR, clinical coding)
* Comfort navigating architecture discussions, model deployment workflows, and data privacy/security requirements

  


**Why RhythmX AI?**


* Direct Clinical Impact: Your work immediately improves patient care for chronic disease management
* Cutting\-Edge AI: Lead programs deploying the latest in clinical AI, LLMs, and precision medicine
* Growth Stage: Join a fast\-scaling company transforming a $4T healthcare industry
* Strong Technical Culture: Work with world\-class engineering and clinical teams
* Meaningful Mission: Help address physician burnout while improving patient outcomes


**30/60 Day Success Plan**


**First 30 Days**


* Ramp up on current programs, stakeholders, and product roadmap
* Audit agile practices and identify gaps across delivery teams
* Start running Scrum of Scrums and aligning cross\-pod dependencies
* Learn EHR/EMR workflows, RhythmX AI assistant capabilities, and data architecture
* Review and refine milestone plans and risk tracking for existing initiatives


**Next 30 Days (30–60\)**


* Start owning high\-impact programs working alongside with PMs; drive timelines, risk plans, and milestone reviews
* Streamline reporting and escalation paths for leadership
* Surface technical and product gaps that affect delivery and recommend changes
* Partner with engineering leads to define repeatable release workflows

0670cf3f.title: Technical Program Manager 3
0670cf3f.description:
**The group you’ll be a part of**
 In the Global Products Group, we are dedicated to excellence in the design and engineering of Lam's etch and deposition products. We drive innovation to ensure our cutting\-edge solutions are helping to solve the biggest challenges in the semiconductor industry.
   

  

**The impact you’ll make**
 As a Technical Program Manager at Lam, you are not just overseeing projects – you’re orchestrating breakthroughs in support of \[insert strategic initiative]. You’ll lead cross\-functional teams through successful project execution blending your technical excellence with strategic planning to deliver new or upgraded products. Your role is vital, owning technical projects from initiation through delivery using your expertise in planning, directing, and monitoring schedules and budget.
   

  

 In this role, you will directly contribute to \_\_\_.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Over\-see the optimization or creation of technical product offerings, processes, or programs, developing project plans, aligning teams, managing risk, and driving projects through release.
* Take ownership and accountability for the success of projects and cross\-functional teams to ensure program schedules, performance metrics, and delivery meets business requirements on time and within budget.
* Partner with stakeholders to understand process and system requirements, and deliver enhancements based on a changing technology landscape.
* Participate in Continuous Improvement projects from inception to impactful results.
* Perform data collection and statistical analysis, and report results to inform program schedules and deliverables.
* Influence cross\-functional stakeholders to continuously improve the process and inspire alignment.
* Deliver change management for programs that are sustainable and maintains long\-term success.
* Successfully navigate multiple projects in a dynamic environment.


**Minimum Qualifications**
**Who we’re looking for**
* Bachelor’s degree with 5\+ years of experience; or Master’s degree with 3\+ years’ experience; or a PhD with no previous professional experience; or equivalent experience.
* 3\+ years of continuous improvement or technical program management.
* Experience guiding cross\-functional teams and demonstrating influence skills to deliver results.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills with the ability to present to audiences at all levels in the Company.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience in or knowledge of Semiconductor fabrication, Semiconductor Equipment Operations, or related industries is a plus.
* Knowledge of E\&O processes, Change orders, repair/refurbishment processes.
* Knowledge of Quality Problem solving 8D methodology.
* Knowledge of Program Management methods and experience in Product Development \& Release (PDR) procedures.
* Relevant project management certifications such as PMP, CAPM, Scrum Master, or PRINCE2\.
* Experience in Lean Six Sigma methodology or certification (Green Belt, Black Belt) is a plus.
* Experience with Agile and/or Waterfall project methodologies.
* Familiarity with project management software and tools including MS Project, QuickBase, Office Timeline, or equivalent.
* Knowledge of Change Management methodologies is a plus.


**Our commitment**
 We believe it is important for every person to feel valued, included, and empowered to achieve their full potential. By bringing unique individuals and viewpoints together, we achieve extraordinary results.
   

  

 Lam Research ("Lam" or the "Company") is an equal opportunity employer. Lam is committed to and reaffirms support of equal opportunity in employment and non\-discrimination in employment policies, practices and procedures on the basis of race, religious creed, color, national origin, ancestry, physical disability, mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, marital status, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth and related medical conditions), gender, gender identity, gender expression, age, sexual orientation, or military and veteran status or any other category protected by applicable federal, state, or local laws. It is the Company's intention to comply with all applicable laws and regulations. Company policy prohibits unlawful discrimination against applicants or employees.
   

  

*Lam offers a variety of work location models based on the needs of each role. Our hybrid roles combine the benefits of on\-site collaboration with colleagues and the flexibility to work remotely and fall into two categories – On\-site Flex and Virtual Flex. ‘On\-site Flex’ you’ll work 3\+ days per week on\-site at a Lam or customer/supplier location, with the opportunity to work remotely for the balance of the week. ‘Virtual Flex’ you’ll work 1\-2 days per week on\-site at a Lam or customer/supplier location, and remotely the rest of the time.*

c06a66fb.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
c06a66fb.description:
**About Tekion:** 




 Positively disrupting an industry that has not seen any innovation in over 50 years, Tekion has challenged the paradigm with the first and fastest cloud\-native automotive platform that includes the revolutionary Automotive Retail Cloud (ARC) for retailers, Automotive Enterprise Cloud (AEC) for manufacturers and other large automotive enterprises and Automotive Partner Cloud (APC) for technology and industry partners. Tekion connects the entire spectrum of the automotive retail ecosystem through one seamless platform. The transformative platform uses cutting\-edge technology, big data, machine learning, and AI to seamlessly bring together OEMs, retailers/dealers and consumers. With its highly configurable integration and greater customer engagement capabilities, Tekion is enabling the best automotive retail experiences ever. Tekion employs close to 3,000 people across North America, Asia and Europe.
 



**Summary:** 




  





 The Senior Technical Program Manager drives large\-scale, cross\-functional technical initiatives that are critical to Tekion’s business and product strategy. This role is responsible for end\-to\-end program leadership, ensuring alignment across engineering, product, and operational teams while delivering complex programs on time and within scope. The ideal candidate is a seasoned program leader with strong technical depth, stakeholder management experience, and a track record of delivering in high\-growth environments.
 



  





**Duties \& Responsibilities:** 




  





 • Lead the execution of high\-impact technical programs involving multiple teams, systems, and stakeholders
 



 • Partner with Product, Engineering, Infrastructure, Security, and other functions to define scope, success metrics, and delivery plans
 



 • Identify and proactively manage program risks, dependencies, and trade\-offs; escalate as needed to unblock progress
 



 • Establish clear operating cadences, including status reporting, stakeholder communication, and executive updates
 



 • Drive clarity and accountability across workstreams, ensuring alignment with company goals and product milestones
 



 • Mentor junior TPMs and contribute to developing best practices, templates, and tools for the TPM function
 



 • Influence strategic planning and roadmapping with a program\-centric execution lens
 



  





**Job Complexity:** 




  





 Manages technically and operationally complex programs with significant business impact and multiple dependencies
 



  





**Required Supervision:** 




  





 Operates with minimal supervision; expected to drive cross\-functional programs independently and make strategic execution decisions
 



  





**Expertise:** 




  





 Recognized expert in technical program delivery; demonstrates leadership in both technical execution and stakeholder alignment
 



  





**Qualifications:** 




  





 • 6–8 years of experience in technical program management, software delivery, or engineering leadership
 



 • Proven track record of leading complex technical programs in fast\-paced or high\-growth environments
 



 • Deep understanding of software development, system architecture, and agile methodologies
 



 • Exceptional stakeholder engagement, conflict resolution, and communication skills
 



 • Proficiency with Jira, Confluence, and other project management and collaboration tools
 



 • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field; advanced certifications (e.g., PMP, SAFe) a plus
 



  





 Tekion is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, victim of violence or having a family member who is a victim of violence, the intersectionality of two or more protected categories, or other applicable legally protected characteristics.

e8b683db.title: Program Manager – Automotive Software
e8b683db.description:
**WHAT YOU DO AT AMD CHANGES EVERYTHING**
 At AMD, our mission is to build great products that accelerate next\-generation computing experiences—from AI and data centers, to PCs, gaming and embedded systems. Grounded in a culture of innovation and collaboration, we believe real progress comes from bold ideas, human ingenuity and a shared passion to create something extraordinary. When you join AMD, you’ll discover the real differentiator is our culture. We push the limits of innovation to solve the world’s most important challenges—striving for execution excellence, while being direct, humble, collaborative, and inclusive of diverse perspectives. Join us as we shape the future of AI and beyond.
 **Together, we advance your career.**
**Program Manager – Automotive Software PM**
**The Role**
 As a Software Program Manager in Embedded Business Unit, you will have the opportunity to manage end to end ownership of overall Automotive software solutions for all embedded products. By managing both internal and external deliverables, you will work to ensure all embedded new products are delivered on time. This critical and highly visible role provides an excellent growth opportunity for high performing individuals looking to make a difference and deliver a stand\-out experience to customers of AMD.
   

  

**The Person**
 A successful candidate will have the ability to establish and drive to goals including plan of record, timelines, budget, scope, performance, and quality. A candidate must be self\-motivated, must have a passion for working with a diverse team of creative engineers and senior executives, must be able to deftly manage both internal and external dependencies and ensure all embedded products are delivered on time.
   

  

 The candidate must be a team player with a commitment to meeting deadlines and an aptitude to thrive in a fast paced, multi\-tasking environment.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Work closely with engineering managers, technical leads and product managers to drive project planning and execution of multiple complex software development projects
* Define, plan, and drive scope and schedules for Automotive segment team including both development and validation.
* Handle activities involving Linux, Windows and Android SW stacks across IVI and ADAS solutions.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional engineering groups throughout the product life cycle, from definition to successful delivery of releases.
* Manage cross\-team dependencies, initiatives, and blocker issues
* Provide status reports on program schedule, status, risks, issues, and other key metrics
* Maintain dashboards on status and issues for projects and deliverables in Confluence and use Jira/MS Project to track all the engineering work
* Own the development of project plans and schedules
* Develop and improve processes for project tracking and risk mitigation
* Support senior management to drive execution excellence, tracking \& reporting of key metrics.
* Assist in developing and implementing project management best practices, tools, templates, and metrics to drive continuous process improvement within engineering


**Preferred Experience**
* Technical background in semiconductor industry with 5 years hands on technical work in Automotive Software (OS, Drivers, validation across IVI and ADAS), 5 years of program management experience and an overall industry experience of 15\+ years
* Proven project \& program management experience in dynamic and competitive industry with prior experience in SW development
* Understanding of BIOS, Firmware, Windows and Linux operating system, and Graphics technology
* Knowledge of automotive domain is a must.
* Strong exposure to various project management processes and principles – Waterfall, Agile, etc.
* Experience using tools such as JIRA, Confluence, SharePoint, MS Project, etc.
* Ability to structure and execute complex analysis, draw insights, and communicate summary findings/recommendations to senior management.
* Ability to network, build relationships, and drive effective decision\-making across multiple functions and levels within the organization
* Highly organized, able to prioritize, and juggle multiple work streams to tight deadlines
* Flexible working schedule to manage global (Asia and North America) program execution teams
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills


**Academic Credentials**
* Engineering degree with 15\+ years of industry experience
* PMP certification is preferred, but not mandatory.
* Excellent communication and inter\-personal skills.


**Location:**
* Bangalore, India


 \#PAVS\- Auto
   

  

*Benefits offered are described:* 
 AMD benefits at a glance.
   

  

*AMD does not accept unsolicited resumes from headhunters, recruitment agencies, or fee\-based recruitment services. AMD and its subsidiaries are equal opportunity, inclusive employers and will consider all applicants without regard to age, ancestry, color, marital status, medical condition, mental or physical disability, national origin, race, religion, political and/or third\-party affiliation, sex, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity, military or veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We encourage applications from all qualified candidates and will accommodate applicants’ needs under the respective laws throughout all stages of the recruitment and selection process.*
*AMD may use Artificial Intelligence to help screen, assess or select applicants for this position. AMD’s “Responsible AI Policy” is available here.*
*This posting is for an existing vacancy.*

5b662d47.title: Technical Program Manager
5b662d47.description:
**About the Role** 





 We are looking for an experienced
 
**Technical Program manager** 

 to design, manage and evolve the mission\-critical, large\-scale, asynchronous, microservice\-driven applications powering the
 
**Open Network for Digital Commerce (ONDC)** 

 leveraging emerging tech. At ONDC, we have built multiple nationwide, population\-scale applications across different sectors including consumer goods, F\&B, mobility, and financial services.  This role demands a
 
**builder** 

 who understands how to design and manage
 
**massive distributed systems** 

 while driving network\-wide
 
**adoption and scaling** 

 .
 




  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




  





**Technical Program Leadership \& Implementation** 



* Own the end\-to\-end technical implementation activities for high\-impact programs within the ONDC ecosystem.
* Define processes and Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for implementing utilities, protocols, and products.
* Serve as the Single Point of Contact (SPOC) for business and operations teams regarding organization\-wide technical initiatives.



  





**Stakeholder Coordination \& Strategic Initiatives** 



* Coordinate across multiple vendor teams, internal stakeholders, and cross\-functional units to ensure timely delivery within resource constraints.
* Lead organization\-wide strategic initiatives that cut across verticals, such as registry upgrades, certification frameworks, and network observability.
* Utilize storyboarding to explain complex technical concepts and strategic roadmaps to key stakeholders.



  





**Procurement \& Lifecycle Management** 



* **RFP \& Bid Management:** 

 Lead the end\-to\-end preparation of Requests for Proposal (RFPs), manage the competitive bidding process, and oversee vendor evaluation and selection.
* **Contract Management:** 

 Drive the contract lifecycle, ensuring all technical and functional SLAs are clearly defined, negotiated, and adhered to by technology partners.
* **Vendor Governance:** 

 Manage the technology service providers for core network components, including registries and gateways, ensuring high performance and accountability.



  





**Risk Management \& Governance** 



* Ensure all project guidelines, policies, and procedures (both functional and technical) are strictly followed throughout the project lifecycle.
* Identify potential risks to project success and develop robust mitigation strategies to safeguard delivery.
* Oversee tech operations specifically related to protocol implementation and network compliance.



**Required Skills \& Experience** 



* **Program Management:** 

 8\+ years in IT, with a proven track record of managing complex, technically diverse, and successful IT products.
* **Strategic Planning:** 

 Demonstrated experience developing and executing project plans involving multiple stakeholders across business and engineering.
* **Methodology \& Tools:** 

 Excellent understanding of Agile\-based delivery and proficiency with tools such as
 
**GitHub, Jira, and SwaggerHub** 

 .
* **Planning:** 

 Mastery in developing detailed project milestones, timeline plans, and resource mapping.
* **Communication:** 

 Exceptional presentation and communication skills, capable of bridging the gap between deep technical teams and business leadership.



  





**Preferred Qualifications** 



* **Education:** 

 Master’s degree preferred; minimum qualification of BE / BTech / MCA / MBA or equivalent. Relevant certification will be preferred
* **Technical Literacy:** 

 Good understanding of
 
**OpenAPIs** 

 ; hands\-on knowledge of
 
**JSON, XML, or YAML** 

 is a significant plus.
* Agile/Scrum/DevOps program management exposure
* **Domain Expertise:** 

 Experience in digital commerce or large\-scale, internet\-facing infrastructure.
* **Procurement Expertise:** 

 Solid experience in drafting RFPs, managing bid processes, and handling complex contract negotiations with IT vendors.



  





**Why Join Us** 



* Build the
 
**population\-scale applications** 

 for one of the world’s largest and most ambitious digital commerce networks.
* Work on core applications across diverse sectors, adopting and shaping
 
**emerging technologies** 

 .
* Influence the future of
 
**AI\-driven orchestration** 

 and design new business and operating models that create massive market impact.

edd60cdd.title: Senior Engineering Program Manager
edd60cdd.description:
Dover is a diversified global manufacturer with annual revenue of over $7 billion. We deliver innovative equipment and components, specialty systems, consumable supplies, software and digital solutions, and support services through five operating segments: Engineered Products, Fueling Solutions, Imaging \& Identification, Pumps \& Process Solutions and Refrigeration \& Food Equipment. Dover combines global scale with operational agility to lead the markets we serve. Recognized for our entrepreneurial approach for over 60 years, our team of approximately 24,000 employees takes an ownership mindset, collaborating with customers to redefine what's possible. Headquartered in Downers Grove, Illinois, Dover trades on the New York Stock Exchange under "DOV." Additional information is available at dovercorporation.com.
   

  

**Designation:** 
 Senior Program Manager: Process, Execution \& Portfolio Manager
   

  

**Experience:** 
 15 – 20 Year
   

  

**Location :** 
 Jigani, Bangalore
   

  

 We are seeking a high\-calibre
 **Senior Engineering Program Manager** 
 to bridge the gap between breakthrough innovation and scalable manufacturing. In this role, you will lead the end\-to\-end journey of new product development (NPD), from initial laboratory research (R\&D) to full\-scale market delivery.
   

  

 The ideal candidate is a hybrid leader who possesses both the technical rigor of
 **Technology Development,** 
**Product Development** 
 using
 **Design for Six Sigma (DFSS)** 
 principles and strategic mindset required for
 **Innovation Portfolio Management** 
 . You will be responsible for navigating complex technical challenges while ensuring that our product pipeline aligns with long\-term business goals.
   

  

**Roles \& Responsibilities**
* Program \& Portfolio Leadership: Drive the strategic execution of the innovation portfolio, ensuring resources are allocated effectively across multiple high\-priority projects.
* Stage\-Gate Governance: Own and optimize the Stage\-Gate process, leading cross\-functional teams through rigorous design reviews, risk assessments, and milestone approvals.
* New Product Development (NPD): Lead products through the entire lifecycle, ensuring technical specifications, timelines, and budget targets are met or exceeded.
* DFSS \& Quality Excellence: Implement Design for Six Sigma (DFSS) methodologies to ensure product robustness, reliability, and performance from the earliest design phases.
* Technology to Product Scaling: Manage the transition of "Lab\-to\-Fab," ensuring that emerging technologies are successfully scaled into manufacturable, commercially viable products.
* Design for Manufacturing (DFM): Collaborate with engineering and manufacturing teams to integrate DFM/DFA principles, reducing cost and complexity while maintaining high quality.
* Laboratory \& Resource Management: Oversee laboratory operations, ensuring equipment, protocols, and safety standards support rapid prototyping and experimental validation.
* Stakeholder Orchestration: Act as the primary liaison between engineering, executive leadership, and external partners, translating technical roadmaps into business value.


**Must Have Skills**
* Education: Master’s or PhD in Engineering, Physics, or a related technical field.
* Experience: 15\+ years in R\&D or Product Development, with at least 5 years in a leadership/managerial role.
* Methodology Expertise: Certified or highly proficient in DFSS (Green/Black Belt), proven track record in Stage\-Gate project management and R\&D portfolio
* Strategic Execution: Proven track record of scaling at least one complex technology from laboratory concept to successful commercial launch.
* Leadership: Experience of managing engineering teams and laboratory environments.
* Project Management Tools: PMP certification, statistical analysis software (e.g., Minitab, MATLAB), and lab management tools.
* Communication: Exceptional stakeholder management skills with the ability to influence the top\-level business leaders


 We consider several job\-related, non\-discriminatory factors when determining the pay rate for a position, including, but not limited to, the position’s responsibilities, a candidate’s work experience, a candidate’s education/training, the position’s location, and the key skills needed for the position. Pay is one of the Total Rewards that we provide to compensate and recognize employees for their work.
   

  

 All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without discrimination on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, protected veteran status, disability, age, genetic information, or any other factors prohibited by law.

820f9646.title: Program Manager
820f9646.description:
**What You’ll Do**
* Manages the complex New Product Introduction (NPI), New Technology Introduction (NTI), Technology Exploration projects. Responsibility, Authority and Accountability (RAA) for project scope delivery and successful execution within technical, schedule, cost and quality commitments on division
* Drive and lead the scrum teams by ensuring the team lives agile values and principles and follows the processes and practices that the team agreed
* Establishes objectives and goals and provides direction to the project teams in areas of customer concerns, potential changes in scope and risk assessment
* Manage effective customer communications. Improve organization responsiveness to customer requirements. Communication and manage customer expectations and contractual commitments internal to the business.
* Ensure standard program management processes are utilized and adequate support to the project team by coordinating PM reviews, preparing \& publishing PM metrics and reports.
* Maintain metrics for project for earned value (CPI/SPI), quality, technical performance and delivery through all of the PROLaunch phases.
* Coordinates all risks and requirements of the project. This is accomplished by planning, controlling, integrating all project activities and deliverables and measuring all elements to ensure the requirements and goals are successfully achieved.
* Provides periodic project updates (Program Status Report – Green/Yellow/Red) of current situation relating to contractual milestones and problem/high risk areas (e.g., technical, cost, and schedule). Provides updates to the business units as well as divisional levels.
* Manage effective stakeholder and team communications. Improve organization responsiveness to customer requirements. Communication and manage customer expectations and contractual commitments internal to the business. Ensure effective change management process is utilized
* Participate in the development and implementation of a development project scorecard
* Identify and develop reporting tools (ideally through corporate or industry reuse) of project status, burn\-down, scheduled completions, etc.
* Work with applicable functions to ensure that the supply chain and manufacturing systems are aligned to the product strategy and are supporting growth and profitability objectives
* Electrical/Electronic/Mechanical Engineering degree mandatory.
* 5\-7 years’ experience in Program Management and/or Product Development Management with a total experience of 3 \-5 years
* Experienced in New Product Development (NPD) programs with hands on experience on managing the Embedded Systems development.
* Exposure of Software development lifecycles i.e. Waterfall, Agile and incremental etc. Certified Scrum master would be advantage.
* Leadership skills \- capability to lead change in an Integrated Team (IPT).
* Developing to fully demonstrating in Program and Project Management methodologies, processes and tools
* Project Management Institute (PMI) accreditation (SAPM or PMP) highly recommended
* Good communication and presentation skills – both verbal and written with ability to make necessary status reports and technical presentations to Eaton management and customer
* High proficiency in preparing and managing schedule using Microsoft Project software.
* Ability to work effectively in team environment and independently.
* Demonstrated problem\-solving ability and an innovative mind set.
* Strategic planning ability and strong organizational skills.


**Qualifications**
 B.E. / B Tech / M Tech,7 Years \+ of experience
   

  

**Skills**
 PMP,Microsoft Project Plan, Advanced Excel,Global Project Management, Project Proposals, Scoping, Stage GATE product development process, Risk Management.

5043b870.title: ASIC RTL Technical Program Manager- Bangalore | Chennai| Hyderabad
5043b870.description:
**🔎 Hiring: ASIC/RTL Program Manager \| 13–18 Years \| Bengaluru,Chennai,Hyderabad \| HCLTech** 




**HCLTech** 
 is looking for an experienced
 **ASIC/RTL Program Manager** 
 to lead the execution of complex semiconductor programs across the complete ASIC development lifecycle. This is a
 **high‑visibility, high‑impact role** 
 in a fast‑paced engineering environment.
 



  





**📌 Role Overview** 




 As an ASIC Program Manager, you will be responsible for driving program execution across schedule, performance, power, and cost metrics—from
 **program conception to commercial sample release** 
 . You’ll collaborate with cross‑functional engineering teams and leadership to ensure successful tape\-outs and program delivery.
 



  





**🧩 Key Responsibilities** 



* Lead and manage the complete
 **ASIC/IP development lifecycle**
* Partner closely with Design, Verification, Synthesis, DFT, Physical Design, and other teams
* Drive program schedules, milestones, and deliverables
* Manage risks, track issues, and implement effective mitigation plans
* Provide regular executive‑level roll\-up reporting on metrics, progress, risks, and staffing
* Ensure disciplined adherence to product development processes, design reviews, and change control
* Engage with internal and external stakeholders, including foundries and operations teams



  





**🎓 Minimum Qualifications** 



* **Bachelor’s \+ 4 years** 
 ,
 **Master’s \+ 3 years** 
 , or
 **PhD \+ 2 years** 
 in
* Computer Science, Electrical/Electronics Engineering, or related fields
* Strong experience in
 **ASIC lifecycle development**
* Proven leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills
* Ability to motivate and align engineering and program teams
* Strong proficiency in
 **MS Project, Advanced Excel, PowerPoint**
* Foundry/operations exposure is an added advantage
* **Total Experience: 13–18 years** 
 , with
 **3\+ years in project/program management**



  





**💼 Why Join HCLTech?** 




 At HCLTech, we enable you to
 **supercharge progress** 
 —with cutting\-edge technology projects, global exposure, and the opportunity to make a meaningful impact in the semiconductor space.

f7f84852.title: Healthcare Solutions Consultant (Presales)
f7f84852.description:
**About the Role**
We are seeking a seasoned **Healthcare Solutions Consultant (Presales)** who blends deep US healthcare domain expertise with hands\-on business analysis pedigree and a proven presales track record. You will be the domain and solution authority in our pursuit teams — owning RFP/RFI responses, discovery\-to\-solution translation, demo narratives, and proposal architecture for opportunities across Provider Health IT, EHR/interoperability engineering, and MedTech software.
This is a **presales\-heavy role (approximately 70/30\)**: your primary charter is winning business by shaping compelling, technically credible solutions; your BA depth is what makes those solutions land with clinical, operational, and technical buyers alike.
You will work closely with our US\-based sales and leadership team and our Ahmedabad delivery organization, acting as the connective tissue between what the client needs, what we propose, and what we can credibly deliver. **Location:**Ahmedabad (Preferred)/ Remote **Key Responsibilities** **Presales \& Solutioning (Primary Charter)*** + Identify Healthcare domain capability areas based on Dash’s project experiences.
	+ Develop accelerators based on industry trends and evolving needs.
	+ Help with designing and running campaigns for the identified domain capabilities and accelerators.
	+ Lead discovery calls with prospect stakeholders (CIOs, CMIOs, VPs of Product, Directors of Clinical Informatics, Revenue Cycle leaders) to elicit business drivers, current\-state workflows, and technical constraints — and translate these into solution blueprints.
	+ Design and deliver solution presentations, capability demos, and proof\-of\-concept (POC) scoping — tailored to clinical, operational, and executive audiences.
	+ Partner with Delivery Leads to build effort estimates, staffing models, phased implementation roadmaps, and commercial constructs (T\&M, fixed\-bid, managed capacity).
	+ Develop reusable presales assets: capability decks, solution one\-pagers, case studies, battlecards, demo scripts, and reference architectures.
	+ Support pipeline development by partnering with Business Development and Sales on account plans, opportunity qualification, and competitive positioning.
	+ Represent Dash in client workshops, industry events, webinars, and partner ecosystem conversations (EHR vendor programs, cloud/AI platform alliances).

 **Business Analysis \& Domain Leadership (Supporting Charter)*** + Bring current\-state/future\-state workflow mapping, requirements elicitation, user story definition, and traceability discipline into early\-stage engagements and pilot phases.
	+ Serve as the US healthcare domain SME internally — coaching delivery teams on clinical workflows, revenue cycle processes, regulatory context, and payer\-provider dynamics.
	+ Contribute to thought leadership: white papers, POVs, and webinar content that establish Dash's domain authority in healthcare AI, interoperability, and MedTech engineering.

 **Required Qualifications*** + **12\-15 years** in US healthcare IT, with a demonstrable blend of business analysis and presales/solution consulting roles at IT services firms, health tech ISVs, or consulting organizations.
	+ **US Healthcare domain mastery:** provider workflows (ambulatory, acute, post\-acute), revenue cycle management (837/835, CMS\-1500/UB\-04, prior authorization, denials), payer\-provider data exchange, value\-based care constructs, and regulatory landscape (HIPAA, 21st Century Cures Act, information blocking, ONC certification criteria).
	+ **EHR implementation experience:** hands\-on involvement in implementations, optimizations, integrations, or migrations across one or more major platforms — Epic, Oracle Health (Cerner), MEDITECH, athenahealth, eClinicalWorks, or NextGen — including module\-level familiarity (clinical documentation, orders, scheduling, patient accounting).
	+ **Interoperability depth:** working fluency in HL7 v2\.x, FHIR (R4, US Core, SMART on FHIR), C\-CDA, X12 EDI transactions, API\-based integration patterns, integration engines (Mirth/Rhapsody/Cloverleaf), and familiarity with TEFCA/QHIN developments.
	+ **MedTech exposure:** experience supporting medical device software, SaMD, or device\-connectivity programs — with awareness of FDA regulatory pathways (510(k), De Novo), IEC 62304, ISO 13485, and design control expectations. (Depth is a plus; credible fluency is a must.)
	+ **Presales craft:** proven record of shaping and winning deals — RFP authorship, solution demos, estimation, proposal defense/orals — ideally for US clients from an offshore/GCC or onsite\-offshore model.
	+ **Exceptional communication:** ability to command a room (virtual or in\-person) with US executive and clinical stakeholders; crisp written English for proposals and client artifacts.
	+ Bachelor's degree in engineering, life sciences, health informatics, or related field.

**Preferred Qualifications*** + Exposure to healthcare AI/ML use cases — ambient clinical documentation, clinical decision support, deterioration prediction, prior\-auth automation, NLP on clinical notes — and the governance/regulatory considerations around them.
	+ Familiarity with cloud healthcare platforms: AWS HealthLake, Azure Health Data Services, Google Cloud Healthcare API.
	+ Experience with EHR vendor partner programs (e.g., Epic Vendor Services/Connection Hub, Oracle Health partnerships, MEDITECH Alliance) or app marketplace listings.
	+ Certifications such as CBAP, PMI\-PBA, AHIMA/HIMSS credentials (CPHIMS), Epic/Cerner certifications, or HL7 FHIR proficiency.
	+ Prior experience in a GCC or offshore delivery center serving US healthcare clients, including onsite client\-facing stints in the US.
	+ MBA or master's in health informatics/healthcare management.

3bc106af.title: Senior Pre-Sales Consultant
3bc106af.description:
**Responsibilities**
* To work closely with Sales / Channel Team in approaching new engagements/prospects to find out and document the requirements and key findings. Perform solution mapping and relay requirements to Pre\-Sales Team for demonstrations.
* To conduct product demonstrations with focus on Microsoft Defender, Entra ID, Microsoft Purview, Microsoft Sentinel, Defender for Cloud \& Azure Security.
* To provide assistance to the Sales / Channel Team in preparing Presentation Slides, Solution Proposals, solution BOM, Response to RFP and Tenders.
* Work closely with Sales / Channel Teams to ensure customer security requirements are addressed using Microsoft\-native security solutions, with or without the inclusion of approved third\-party products distributed by the company.
* Assist Sales / Channel Teams in preparing presentation decks, security solution proposals, BOMs, RFP/Tender responses, and technical compliance documentation.
* To perform research on respective solution domain technologies and how it can enhance solution or product positioning. If there are other technologies that can value add to the position, it should also be incorporated.
* To work closely with the Sales / Channel Team and Post\-Sales Team in preparing Solution Plays \& blueprints for enablement.
* Support In\-Country Pre\-Sales team with technical guidance.
* To assist and jointly execute a hand\-over meeting upon successful win to the Post\-Sales Team with the Sales / Channel Team and Pre\-Sales Team.
* To be updated with latest changes or new products introduced by principals and/or 3rd party vendors.
* To fulfill and undergo product certification trainings as required.
* To understand and execute company's marketing strategies and understand competitors' products, services and strategies, feedback to management on plans and strategies.
* Participate in exhibitions to showcase products/solutions, capture leads, network with audiences to be closely updated with industry trends and needs.
* Represent solutions at Tech Data, vendor, and partner\-led events
* Any other duties as and when assigned from time to time.
* Validates pre\-sales solutions design and sizing.
* Coaches and mentor pre\-sales team
* Leads the technical discussion with suppliers on new initiatives.
* Responsible for cross solutions bundles.
* Continuously upskill and maintain relevant product certifications.
* Open to expand technical skills around Azure.
* Attends QBR sessions with sales.


**Knowledge, Skills And Experience**
* Proficient knowledge in Microsoft 365 Security, Entra ID, Defender Suite, Microsoft Sentinel, Azure Security (Defender for Cloud, Azure Network Security, Key Vault, IAM)
* Bachelor's degree in information technology/computer science or equivalent experience certifications preferred.
* 7\+ years of experience with Minimum of 4 years relevant working experience, ideally in IT multinational environment.
* Track record on the assigned line Cards experience is an added advantage.
* IT Distributor and/or SI experience would also be an added advantage.
* Have good communication in English, on the job understanding and problem\-solving skills.
* Proven ability to work independently, effectively in an off\-site environment and under high pressure.


 At Tech Data, a TD SYNNEX Company, our values guide everything we do: Together, We Own It, We Dare to Go, We Grow and Win, and above all, We Do the Right Thing. These principles shape how we work with each other, our partners, and our communities as we drive innovation and create lasting impact.
   

  

**What's In It For You?**
* Elective Benefits: Our programs are tailored to your country to best accommodate your lifestyle.
* Grow Your Career: Accelerate your path to success (and keep up with the future) with formal programs on leadership and professional development, and many more on\-demand courses.
* Elevate Your Personal Well\-Being: Boost your financial, physical, and mental well\-being through seminars, events, and our global Life Empowerment Assistance Program.
* Diversity, Equity \& Inclusion: It's not just a phrase to us; valuing every voice is how we succeed. Join us in celebrating our global diversity through inclusive education, meaningful peer\-to\-peer conversations, and equitable growth and development opportunities.
* Make the Most of our Global Organization: Network with other new co\-workers within your first 30 days through our onboarding program.
* Connect with Your Community: Participate in internal, peer\-led inclusive communities and activities, including business resource groups, local volunteering events, and more environmental and social initiatives.


**Don't meet every single requirement? Apply anyway.**
 At Tech Data, a TD SYNNEX Company, we're proud to be recognized as a great place to work and a leader in the promotion and practice of diversity, equity and inclusion. If you're excited about working for our company and believe you're a good fit for this role, we encourage you to apply. You may be exactly the person we're looking for!
   

  

 We are an equal opportunity employer and committed to building a diverse team that represents and empowers a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and skills. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment based on merit, without regard to race, colour, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, genetics, age, or any other characteristic protected by law. To support our diversity and inclusion efforts, we may ask for voluntary gender disclosure information. This data will be used solely to improve our hiring practices and ensure fair treatment for all candidates.

4405190b.title: Solution Architect
4405190b.description:
**Join our Team**
**About this opportunity:**
 Join our dynamic team at Ericsson as a Solution Architect. In this pivotal role, you will be tasked with analyzing, designing, and developing commercially viable technical solutions in your respective technical domain. These solutions will be based on customer specifications and business needs. As Solution Architect, you will be responsible for creating both short\- and long\-term profitable business strategies for Ericsson. This will be accomplished by working closely with the Core 3 team to translate customer needs and technology opportunities into detailed technical offerings, solutions, and proposals.
   

  

**What you will do:**
* Engage in detailed discussions with customers to understand their technology strategy and identify key challenges.
* Analyze customer's technology and business environment along with their non\-functional requirements.
* Identify customer's improvement areas and challenges related to both technology and business.
* Collaborate with the Core 3 team to develop a list of potential activities and solutions.
* Construct value arguments alongside the Core 3 team.
* Develop and present technical presentations to customers.


**The skills you bring:**
* Consultative Skills.
* Solution Delivery.
* Project Implementation.
* Negotiation.
* Hardware, Architecture, Virtual Environment, Technology, Protocol and Interface.
* Coaching and Mentoring.
* Solution Architect.
* Financial Acumen.
* Customer Solution Design.
* Market insights.
* Ericsson Portfolio.
* Business Acumen.
* Knowledge sharing and learning.
* Infra Capacity,Perf AnalysisandSol Def.
* Technical Sales.

ad074472.title: Specialist - Presales
ad074472.description:
Ingram Micro is a leading technology company for the global information technology ecosystem.
   

  

 With the ability to reach nearly 90% of the global population, we play a vital role in the worldwide IT sales channel, bringing products and services from technology manufacturers and cloud providers to business\-to\-business technology experts.
   

  

 Our market reach, diverse solutions and services portfolio, and digital platform Ingram Micro Xvantage™ set us apart
   

  

**Role Summary**
 We are seeking a technically strong and customer\-focused
 **Pre\-Sales Associate** 
 to support enterprise sales for core infrastructure solutions. The role will involve designing and presenting solutions leveraging platforms such as
 **Zebra** 
 ,
 **PeopleLink** 
 , and
 **Versa** 
 , along with associated infrastructure hardware.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Solution Design \& Architecture
* Design end\-to\-end solutions using:
+ Zebra devices (barcode scanners, RFID, mobility solutions)
+ PeopleLink video conferencing \& AV solutions
+ Versa SD\-WAN / SASE platforms

* Build integrated architectures combining hardware, networking, and collaboration tools
* Develop HLDs (High\-Level Designs) and LLDs (Low\-Level Designs)
* Pre\-Sales Engagement
* Work closely with sales and product teams during client engagements
* Understand customer business requirements and map to technical solutions
* Conduct product demos, PoCs, and technical workshops
* Respond to RFPs/RFIs with detailed technical proposals
* Technical Expertise
* Strong knowledge of:
+ SD\-WAN, SASE (especially Versa)
+ Enterprise networking (LAN/WAN, routing, switching)
+ Collaboration technologies (VC systems, AV integration)
+ Endpoint \& mobility hardware (Zebra devices)

* Ability to integrate hardware with cloud and on\-prem environments
* Stakeholder Management
* Interface with OEMs (Zebra, PeopleLink, Versa, etc.) for solution validation
* Collaborate with delivery and implementation teams for smooth transition
* Act as a trusted advisor to customers and internal stakeholders
* Commercial \& Proposal Support
* Support solution costing, BOM preparation, and pricing strategy
* Ensure solutions are scalable, cost\-effective, and aligned with client needs


**Required Skills \& Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in engineering / IT
* 4–6 years in Pre\-Sales / Solution Architecture roles
* Hands\-on experience with:
+ Versa SD\-WAN / SASE
+ AV \& VC solutions for PeopleLink
+ Mobility / scanning devices (Zebra or equivalent)

* Strong presentation and client\-facing skills
* Experience in enterprise or large deal environments


**Preferred Certifications**
* Versa Certified Professional (VCP\-SASE or equivalent)
* Cisco / Networking certifications (CCNP/CCIE preferred)
* AV / Collaboration certifications

a82959d6.title: Specialist - Presales
a82959d6.description:
**Role Overview**
 We are looking for a skilled
 **Fortinet Pre\-Sales Engineer \& Product Technical Specialist** 
 to support our
 **distribution business** 
 . The role focuses on
 **technical pre\-sales** 
 ,
 **partner enablement** 
 , and
 **customer engagement** 
 across the
 **Fortinet portfolio** 
 .
   

  

 The candidate will work closely with
 **distribution\-managed partners, system integrators, and enterprise customers** 
 , providing technical expertise, solution design support, and enablement to drive Fortinet adoption and growth.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Pre\-Sales \& Solution Engineering**
* Act as a technical SME for the Fortinet security portfolio, including:
+ FortiGate (NGFW)
+ FortiManager / FortiAnalyzer
+ FortiSwitch \& FortiAP
+ FortiEDR, FortiClient, FortiSIEM (as applicable)

* Support pre\-sales activities such as:
+ Requirement gathering and technical discovery
+ Solution architecture and design
+ Technical presentations, demos, and POCs

* Assist sales teams with:
+ RFP/RFI responses
+ BOM creation and solution size
+ Licensing and subscription guidance


**Partner \& Customer Engagement**
* Participate in:
+ Distribution Managed Partner Round Tables
+ Partner Round Tables
+ Customer Round Tables

* Engage directly with partners and customers to position Fortinet solutions effectively.
* Act as a trusted technical advisor during the sales lifecycle.


**Training, Enablement \& Onboarding**
* Deliver partner enablement and training sessions on Fortinet solutions.
* Support new partner onboarding, ensuring technical readiness and alignment with Fortinet best practices.
* Conduct Fast Track trainings and technical workshops.
* Help partners prepare for and achieve Fortinet NSE certifications.
* Develop and maintain technical documentation, demo labs, and enablement material.


**Collaboration \& Vendor Interaction**
* Work closely with:
+ Internal sales and product teams
+ Fortinet vendor technical and channel teams

* Stay updated with Fortinet product roadmap, new releases, and security trends.
* Provide feedback from partners and customers to improve GTM and enablement strategy.


**Technical Skills**
**Required Skills \& Experience**
* Strong hands\-on experience with Fortinet security solutions, especially FortiGate.
* Solid understanding of:
+ Network security concepts (Firewall, VPN, IPS, Web Filtering)
+ SD\-WAN and Secure Networking
+ Endpoint and access security (basic to intermediate)

* Knowledge of:
+ Networking fundamentals (TCP/IP, routing, switching)
+ Linux basics
+ Cloud security (AWS / Azure / GCP) – preferred


**Certifications (Mandatory / Preferred)**
* Fortinet NSE 1 – NSE 7 (at least NSE 4/5 preferred)
* Fortinet Fast Track certification
* Higher NSE levels are a strong advantage.


**Professional Skills**
* Strong presentation and communication skills.
* Ability to explain complex security concepts to both technical and non\-technical audiences.
* Experience working in a distribution or channel\-driven environment.
* Self\-motivated, organized, and comfortable handling multiple partners.


**Experience Requirements**
* 3 – 5 years of experience in:
+ Pre\-sales engineering
+ Network/security consulting
+ Technical specialist or solution engineering roles

* Prior experience with network security or firewall technologies is mandatory.

ef9e0e40.title: Solution Consultant - C&P
ef9e0e40.description:
The Role
   

  

 In this role, the focus is on helping customers realise genuine value from Adobe’s Document Cloud and Creative solutions, including Adobe Firefly and Acrobat Studio. Working closely with Sales and Channel teams, the Solutions Consultant uses a consultative approach to guide customers through their buying journey: from discovery and demonstration through to solution design. Generative AI has fundamentally changed how creative teams work, and this role sits right at the front of that shift!
   

  

 The Job
   

  

 Run discovery sessions to understand customer goals, workflows, and challenges. Deliver tailored demos and proof\-of\-concepts across Creative Cloud, Acrobat Studio and Adobe Firefly that clearly connect to business outcomes. Facilitate customer workshops and executive briefings. Provide technical guidance on creative workflows, document automation, and solution design. Partner with Sales, Marketing, and Channel Partners to support deal cycles and respond to RFPs. Build lasting relationships with customers and partners.
   

  

 What We’re Looking For
   

  

 Strong candidates bring a background in pre\-sales, solutions consulting, or solutions engineering within a tech organisation, and:
   

  

* Strong communication and presentation skills, with the ability to engage stakeholders across creative, business, and IT functions
* Hands\-on knowledge of Adobe Creative Cloud, Document Cloud, or a comparable platform
* Ability to translate product features into clear business outcomes for diverse audiences
* Familiarity with digital workflows, document automation, or creative content production
* Understanding of APIs, integrations, and SaaS or cloud platforms
* Business\-level English, and readiness to travel across India


 Working at Adobe
   

  

 Adobe is an encouraging work environment celebrated globally. Colleagues are dedicated to each other’s growth, and the feedback culture is one of the things people value most. This role offers the chance to make a real impact and be part of Adobe’s story as it evolves. Read more about life at Adobe on the Adobe Life blog.
   

  

 Why Adobe?
   

  

 Adobe has spent over 40 years at the intersection of creativity and technology, and the generative AI era is the most exciting chapter yet! India’s teams are growing fast, with real paths into senior pre\-sales, product specialisation, or field roles. Adobe is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applications from all backgrounds.

07653fa5.title: Advisory Solution Consultant
07653fa5.description:
**Company Description**
 It all started when engineer Fred Luddy wrote code that automated a tedious task for his coworker, Phyllis. She cried tears of joy. That moment inspired Fred to build a company that could do that for everyone—freeing people from busywork so they could focus on meaningful work. Today, ServiceNow is the AI control tower for business reinvention. Our ServiceNow AI platform brings together any AI, any data, and any workflow— helping 85% of the Fortune 500® work smarter, faster, and better. We're building an AI\-native culture where technology and talent are unstoppable together. And we're just getting started.
   

  

 Join us to put AI to work for people.
   

  

**Job Description**
 As a member of our Solution Consulting team, you will have a major impact on our future success by supporting \[Employee Experience, Customer Workflow, ITX] Solution Sales. You will guide revenue for one of our products with the support and partnership of Sales, Product Management, and the executive team. This is a hands\-on technical consultant who can go wide and deep on solution delivery and solution positioning during sales cycles.
   

  

**What You Get To Do In This Role**
 The Solution Consultant is a technical consultant with the advanced ability to develop, position and provide product\-specific solutions during sales cycles while achieving quarterly and annual sales goals for an assigned territory.
   

  

* Support product sales as a technical and domain expert of a client\-facing sales team
* Lead discovery workshops to determine customers' challenges and give product demonstrations to align our solution with customer needs
* Answer product feature and technical questions from customers, channel partners and ServiceNow colleagues
* Provide feedback to product management about product enhancements that can address customer needs and provide additional value
* Share and learn best practices and re\-usable assets with other Solution Consultants to enhance the quality and efficiency of the team
* Stay current on competitive analysis and market differentiation
* Support marketing events including executive briefings, conferences, user groups, and trade shows


**Qualifications**
**To be successful in this role you have:**
* Experience in leveraging or critically thinking about how to integrate AI into work processes, decision\-making, or problem\-solving. This may include using AI\-powered tools, automating workflows, analyzing AI\-driven insights, or exploring AI's potential impact on the function or industry.
* 7\+ years of pre\-sales solution consulting or sales engineering experience
* Proficiency with the ServiceNow platform or technical expertise with cloud software solutions
* Experience working collaboratively with product management, product marketing, partners, and professional services
* Territory management skills, including pipeline building and working with Sales counterpart to guide execution excellence
* Travel, as necessary


 FD21
   

  

 Additional Information
   

  

**Work Personas**
 We approach our distributed world of work with flexibility and trust. Work personas (flexible, remote, or required in office) are categories that are assigned to ServiceNow employees depending on the nature of their work and their assigned work location. Learn more here. To determine eligibility for a work persona, ServiceNow may confirm the distance between your primary residence and the closest ServiceNow office using a third\-party service.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer**
 ServiceNow is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, gender identity, veteran status, or any other category protected by law. In addition, all qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with legal requirements.
   

  

**Accommodations**
 We strive to create an accessible and inclusive experience for all candidates. If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process, or are unable to use this online application and need an alternative method to apply, please contact globaltalentss@servicenow.com for assistance.
   

  

**Export Control Regulations**
 For positions requiring access to controlled technology subject to export control regulations, including the U.S. Export Administration Regulations (EAR), ServiceNow may be required to obtain export control approval from government authorities for certain individuals. All employment is contingent upon ServiceNow obtaining any export license or other approval that may be required by relevant export control authorities.
