 to lead the design and delivery of enterprise\-scale technology solutions. The ideal candidate will possess strong expertise in solution architecture, cloud platforms, modern application development, data engineering, DevOps, and enterprise integration. This role requires close collaboration with business stakeholders and technical teams to design secure, scalable, and high\-performing solutions from concept through deployment.
 


 Key Responsibilities
 * Lead end\-to\-end solution architecture for enterprise applications and digital transformation initiatives.
* Gather business and technical requirements and translate them into scalable solution designs.
* Define application, data, infrastructure, integration, and security architectures.
* Design cloud\-native solutions using AWS, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud Platform.
* Architect data platforms, ETL pipelines, data lakes, and data warehouses.
* Design Microservices, REST APIs, GraphQL, Event\-Driven Architecture, and enterprise integration solutions.
* Drive DevOps practices including CI/CD, Infrastructure as Code (Terraform/CloudFormation), Docker, and Kubernetes.
* Ensure solutions meet performance, scalability, security, compliance, and disaster recovery requirements.
* Conduct architecture reviews, mentor engineering teams, and establish architecture best practices.
* Collaborate with Product Owners, Business Analysts, Developers, DevOps, QA, Security, and Data Engineering teams throughout the project lifecycle.
* Support production deployments and continuous improvement initiatives.


 Required Skills
 * 14\+ years of experience in Solution Architecture or Enterprise Architecture.
* Strong expertise in AWS, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud Platform.
* Proficiency in Java, .NET, Python, or Node.js.
* Strong understanding of Microservices, REST APIs, GraphQL, Kafka, and Event\-Driven Architecture.
* Experience with Databricks, Apache Spark, Hadoop, Airflow, Snowflake, or similar data platforms.
* Strong knowledge of SQL, NoSQL databases, data modeling, and data governance.
* Hands\-on experience with Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps, or GitLab CI/CD.
* Knowledge of IAM, OAuth2, JWT, encryption, Zero Trust Architecture, and enterprise security best practices.
* Experience with monitoring tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack, or Splunk.
* Excellent communication, stakeholder management, leadership, and problem\-solving skills.


 Preferred Qualifications
 * Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field.
* AWS Certified Solutions Architect, Microsoft Azure Solutions Architect Expert, Google Professional Cloud Architect, TOGAF, Kubernetes, or equivalent certifications are preferred.


 Why Join MW InfoTech?
 * Work on enterprise\-scale digital transformation projects.
* Exposure to modern cloud, AI, and data engineering technologies.
* Collaborative and innovation\-driven work culture.
* Competitive compensation based on experience.
* Opportunity to work with a highly skilled and dynamic technology team.


 How to Apply
 
 Interested candidates can share their updated resume at:
 



 📧
 **hr@mwinfotech.com** 




 📧
 **sanskritithombre@gmail.com** 




**Subject Line:** 
*Application for End\-to\-End Solution Architect*

ddde65df.title: Sr.Data Cloud Engineer
ddde65df.description:
**About Persistent**
 We are an AI\-led, platform\-driven Digital Engineering and Enterprise Modernization partner, combining deep technical expertise and industry experience to help our clients anticipate what’s next. Our offerings and proven solutions create a unique competitive advantage for our clients by giving them the power to see beyond and rise above. We work with many industry\-leading organizations across the world, including 20 Fortune 50 companies and 4 of the 5 top banks in both the US and India, and numerous innovators across the healthcare ecosystem.
   

  

 Our disruptor’s mindset, commitment to client success, and agility to thrive in the dynamic environment have enabled us to sustain our growth momentum. Persistent has been recognized across top industry platforms for innovation, leadership, and inclusion. We have delivered 21 sequential quarters of growth with $389\.7M in Q1 FY26 revenue, up 3\.9% Q\-o\-Q and 18\.8% Y\-o\-Y growth. Our 25,000\+ global team members, located in 18 countries, have been instrumental in helping the market leaders transform their industries. We have been named the fastest\-growing Indian IT services brand in the “Brand Finance India 100” 2025 report. We were also cited as a Leader in the ISG Provider Lens™ 2025 for Digital Engineering Services 2025 and the Everest Group Talent Readiness for Next\-generation Application Services PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2025
   

  

**About Position**
 We are Looking for a Senior Data Cloud Engineer with strong infrastructure background and hands\-on experience in cloud setup, networking, and FinOps. The role requires working with modern data platforms like Databricks and Snowflake to support scalable and cost\-efficient cloud environments.
   

  

* Role: Sr.Data Cloud Engineer
* Location: Bangalore, Pune \& Chennai
* Experience: 6 to 10 Years
* Job Type: Full Time Employment


**What You'll Do**
* Cloud infrastructure setup \& management (Azure/AWS preferred)
* Hands\-on with Databricks / Snowflake
* Strong understanding of networking concepts (VPC, subnets, security)
* Experience in FinOps / cloud cost optimization
* Basic knowledge of data platforms and integrations


**Expertise You'll Bring**
* Set up and manage secure, scalable cloud environments
* Support Databricks/Snowflake infrastructure and integrations
* Implement networking, security, and access controls
* Monitor and optimize cloud costs (FinOps)
* Collaborate with data engineering teams for platform support


**Benefits**
* Competitive salary and benefits package
* Culture focused on talent development with quarterly growth opportunities and company\-sponsored higher education and certifications
* Opportunity to work with cutting\-edge technologies
* Employee engagement initiatives such as project parties, flexible work hours, and Long Service awards
* Annual health check\-ups
* Insurance coverage: group term life, personal accident, and Mediclaim hospitalization for self, spouse, two children, and parents


**Values\-Driven, People\-Centric \& Inclusive Work Environment**
 Persistent is dedicated to fostering diversity and inclusion in the workplace. We invite applications from all qualified individuals, including those with disabilities, and regardless of gender or gender preference. We welcome diverse candidates from all backgrounds.
   

  

* We support hybrid work and flexible hours to fit diverse lifestyles.
* Our office is accessibility\-friendly, with ergonomic setups and assistive technologies to support employees with physical disabilities.
* If you are a person with disabilities and have specific requirements, please inform us during the application process or at any time during your employment


**Let’s unleash your full potential at Persistent \-** 
**persistent.com/careers**
***“Persistent is an Equal Opportunity Employer and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any kind.”***

514f0f35.title: Sourcing Solutions Billable
514f0f35.description:
**Knowledge, Skills and Experience Qualifications**

· 5\-10 years recent experience with consulting engagements or with large consulting firm or specialty practice related to the outsourcing industry or experience in managing PMO function for large transformation programs in large consulting companies/ global captives.


· Significant experience in the deal advisory space. Must have advised clients on ITO sourcing transactions or have led and managed deals at Service Providers


· An understanding of global corporate large deals practice \- including drivers of win a deal, solution, cost drivers, ability to work with Service Providers to ensure effective cost solutions and agreed upon service level agreements.


· Experience focused on transformation aspects including shared services, operational improvement and outsourcing/offshoring.


· Advised clients in establishing their IT and sourcing strategy.


· Ability to perform assessment projects related to client current environment, specific to IT and process maturity assessment.


· Well versed in new age Digital technologies like cloud and digital solutions and how to embed them in large deals solutions.


· Comprehensive knowledge and experience in financial management of global outsourced Services and Service Providers.


· Experience focused on transformation aspects including shared services, operational improvement and outsourcing/offshoring.


· Business development and sales experience including prospecting, lead qualification, proposal writing, sales calls and sales support.


· Working knowledge of capabilities of Tier 1 and Tier 2 outsourcing vendors.


· Practice development experience, including sales and marketing collateral development, IP development and solution development.


· Delivery management experience, including managing teams at all project phases, successful client relationship management and multi\-project oversight.


· Ability to do both strategic assessment and transactional consulting at senior levels. Understands full sourcing lifecycle. Ability to performs data metrics analysis, comparison with market sourcing data, current state assessments, change readiness, gap and opportunity analysis, delivery model alternatives analysis, and service delivery strategy.


· Strong presentation, verbal and written communication skills with the ability to articulate complex ideas in easy\-to\-understand business terms to all levels of management including senior leaders.


**Travel** \- 30% \- 40% required or as per project requirement.


**Duties \& Responsibilities**

· The Consultant / Senior Consultant participates as a key contributor or as a team member of large or mega\-deal engagements in a given business function.


· The Consultant participates as part of an advisory team in the delivery of methodology and tools in support of client sourcing initiatives.


· The Consultant assists and/or leads in the development of initial assessments, project plans, vendor research and selections, financial modeling, RFP creation, contract negotiations and post selection administrative actions.

a9654c44.title: Delivery Lead
a9654c44.description:
**About the Company** 




 Incedo is a global AI and data transformation specialist empowering companies to realize sustainable business impact from their digital investments by delivering ROI from AI@Scale.
 



 As a long\-term partner for strategy to execution, we operate at the intersection of business and technology. Our integrated services and platforms are built on the foundation of AI \& Data, digital engineering, and operations transformation, bringing deep domain expertise and full\-stack capabilities together.
 



 With over 4,000 people in the US, Canada, Latin America and India and a large, diverse portfolio of Fortune 500 enterprises and fast\-growing clients worldwide, we work across banking \& payments, wealth management, telecom, hi\-tech and life sciences.
 



**Role Overview / Position Summary** 




 Incedo is hiring an IT Delivery Associate Director to lead the strategy, governance, and end\-to\-end delivery of large\-scale technology programs for wealth management clients. This is a senior leadership role for a delivery professional with deep wealth management/capital markets domain expertise, strong technical fluency (.NET Core, cloud, modern architectures), and a proven track record managing P\&L, multi\-vendor delivery, and distributed global teams. The Associate Director will act as the primary delivery partner to client business and technology leaders, ensuring every solution meets regulatory, enterprise, and client expectations.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 



* Lead end\-to\-end delivery of large, multi\-year programs across wealth advisory, financial planning, portfolio management, trading, onboarding, CRM, and client\-facing platforms.
* Establish delivery frameworks, governance models, integrated plans, risk/issue management processes, and release strategies.
* Drive execution across Agile and SAFe delivery models, ensuring predictability, quality, and velocity.
* Ensure tight alignment between engineering, architecture, QA, DevOps, cloud, data, security, and product teams.
* Serve as the executive delivery partner to client executive leadership, translating strategic roadmaps into actionable delivery milestones.
* Oversee audit readiness, traceability, documentation, and risk controls across the delivery portfolio.
* Own P\&L for the delivery portfolio, ensuring margins, revenue predictability, and utilization targets are met.
* Manage contracts, SOWs, timelines, budgets, resource planning, vendor relationships, and change requests.
* Drive continuous optimization through resource alignment, automation, and process improvement.
* Lead distributed delivery teams across onsite, offshore, and nearshore locations.
* Mentor senior project/program managers, architects, and team leads; build talent pipelines aligned to emerging wealth technology, cloud, and data skills.
* Champion a culture of accountability, collaboration, and innovation across the delivery organization.



**Qualifications and Skills (Core Eligibility Criteria / Mandatory Skills)** 



* 15\+ years of IT delivery leadership experience, including a minimum of 7\+ years in Wealth Management, Investment Management, or Capital Markets.
* Proven track record leading large\-scale technology programs for wealth management institutions, fintechs, or custodians.
* Technical expertise in .NET Core with cloud knowledge (AWS preferred), including hands\-on experience delivering cloud migration projects.
* Expertise in modern architectures: APIs, microservices, and event\-driven solutions.
* Hands\-on experience with Agile/SAFe delivery models, DevSecOps, and modern engineering practices.
* Exceptional executive presence, communication, and stakeholder\-influencing skills, with the ability to translate complex technical concepts into business language.
* Strong risk management, decision\-making, and problem\-solving capability.



**Preferred Qualifications (Nice\-to\-Have Skills)** 



* Engineering background with a Master's degree (preferred).
* Experience working directly with custodians or fintech platforms within the wealth management ecosystem.
* Prior exposure to regulatory audit cycles and compliance frameworks within financial services.
* Experience managing multi\-vendor delivery ecosystems and complex commercial contracts/SOWs.



**Educational Qualification** 



* Bachelor's degree in Engineering (B.Tech/BE) is mandatory; a Master's degree is a plus.
* Certifications in cloud platforms (e.g., AWS) preferred.



**3 Problem Areas the Candidate Will Be Expected to Address** 



* Program predictability \& governance: Bringing structure, risk management, and delivery discipline to large, multi\-year, multi\-vendor wealth management programs spanning advisory, trading, and client\-facing platforms.
* P\&L and portfolio health: Owning margin, utilization, and revenue predictability across a distributed onsite/offshore/nearshore delivery portfolio while managing contracts, SOWs, and vendor relationships.
* Regulatory \& audit readiness: Ensuring traceability, documentation, and risk controls meet the compliance expectations of regulated wealth management and capital markets clients.



**Why Join Incedo** 




 At Incedo, you'll work at the intersection of AI, data, and engineering with some of the world's leading wealth management and financial services brands — owning high\-impact delivery portfolios, shaping how global teams execute, and building the next generation of leaders within a fast\-growing, innovation\-led organization.

e1426ecb.title: Service Delivery Manager
e1426ecb.description:
WE’RE HIRING A SERVICE DELIVERY MANAGER IN NAVI MUMBAI, INDIA.
 



  





 Excis is a global IT support leader, driven by innovation and collaboration. We are looking for a highly organized and relationship\-focused Service Delivery Manager to lead and manage end\-to\-end projects — from conception to deployment — ensuring successful delivery, customer satisfaction, and alignment with business goals. The ideal candidate will have strong leadership, technical, and business management skills with the ability to drive results in a fast\-paced environment.
 



  




* Client in 190\+ countries
* 6000\+ Engineers
* 200\+ Enterprise Clients



  





 We foster an open, friendly, and supportive growth\-oriented culture where individual achievements fuel team success. From solving complex Partner Management challenges to celebrating wins together, we put our people first.
 



  





 Start your journey with Excis and grow with us!
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 


* Lead projects from initiation through deployment, ensuring timely and successful delivery of solutions.
* Drive customer satisfaction, manage client relationships, and handle escalations effectively.
* Conduct Root Cause Analysis (RCA) and implement corrective actions to achieve positive outcomes.
* Manage accounts, including P\&L ownership, to achieve targeted business margins.
* Oversee the technical team, providing guidance, mentorship, and support.
* Collaborate cross\-functionally with product, design, sales, and operations teams.
* Manage project timelines, budgets, and resources efficiently.
* Identify and mitigate project and technical risks.
* Stay abreast of emerging technologies and industry trends.
* Recruit, train, and develop technical/IT support staff.
* Present project progress and key updates to senior management and stakeholders.
* Contribute to product design and the definition of technical and business requirements.
* Delegate technical responsibilities and monitor project execution.
* Ensure adherence to company standards, processes, and regulatory requirements.
* Drive process improvements and validation initiatives.
* Analyze data to identify operational trends and opportunities for improvement.
* Collaborate across departments to support business decision\-making.
* Work flexibly in shifts to meet project priorities and deadlines.



  





  





 Requirements
 



**Minimum 10 years of experience in IT management, support, and customer relationship management or related areas.** 




  





 Educational Qualifications
 


* MCA or Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field, or equivalent qualification.
* Diploma or equivalent professional education in the IT domain.



  





 Technical Skills \& Qualifications
 


* Proficient in ITIL principles and best practices.
* Strong working knowledge of Microsoft Office tools including Excel, PowerPoint, and Word.
* PMP, PRINCE2, or equivalent project management certification is highly desirable.
* Excellent verbal, written, and interpersonal communication skills, with the ability to present ideas clearly and persuasively.



  





  





**Why Join Us?** 




  





 At Excis, you will be part of a collaborative and innovative global team driving industry\-leading IT solutions. We prioritize professional growth, continuous learning, and provide opportunities to make a tangible impact. Enjoy a supportive environment with competitive compensation, meaningful career advancement, and the chance to contribute to the success of a global leader in IT services.
 



  





 Ready to make a difference and grow your career? Apply now to join Excis in India!

14076702.title: Senior Service Delivery Manager
14076702.description:
**Title:** 
 Senior Service Delivery Manager
 



**Location:** 
 Remote, India
 



**Experience:** 
 7\+ years
 



**Must have:** 
 JLPT N1 or JLPT N2 certification
 



  





**About the company:** 




 For 35 years, WWT has been helping the world’s biggest brands dream big and build bigger. With 12,000 amazing people in 42 countries, we bring together digital strategy, AI, cybersecurity, cloud, and rock\-solid infrastructure. We don’t just sell hardware—we design, build, and support everything our customers need to succeed. Oh, and in 2025, we were ranked the 9th best place to work… so we must be doing something right.
 



  





**Responsibilities:** 



* Provide strategic oversight and direction for Managed Services operations across multiple high\-complexity client accounts.
* Act as a senior escalation point and lead incident commander for critical outages, complex issues, or cross\-client impacts.
* Lead operational strategy and execute high\-priority client initiatives including onboarding, transformation, and crisis management.
* Create and maintain Standard Operating Processes and Procedures.
* Train D2OS processes to new employees across Managed Services.
* Monitor SLA/SLT/SLO adherence and drive continuous improvement through root cause analysis.
* Build and maintain OEM and vendor relationships.
* Manage D2OS Major Incident Management escalation bridges.
* Create and present Root Cause Analysis for all critical incidents.
* Represent Managed Services in cross\-functional initiatives and executive briefings.
* An ability to perform monthly or bi\-monthly rotational shift work (Japan Time, Japan Time \+8, and Japan Time \+16\)



  





**Qualifications:**

**Benefits** 




 The well\-being of WWT employees is essential. So, when it comes to our benefits package, WWT has one of the best. We offer the following benefits to all full\-time employees:
 


* Health and Wellbeing: Heath, Dental, and Vision Care, Onsite Health Centers, Employee Assistance Program, Wellness program
* Financial Benefits: Competitive pay, Profit Sharing, PF Plan with Company Matching, NPS (National Pension Scheme), Life and Disability Insurance, Tuition Reimbursement
* Paid Time Off: PTO \& Holidays, Parental Leave, Sick Leave, Day of Caring for social responsibility, Bereavement



  





 World Wide Technology is an Equal Opportunity Employer.

c1cc4559.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
c1cc4559.description:
**Company Description** 




 Dentira is a vertically integrated procurement platform focused on the healthcare sector, offering end\-to\-end solutions that streamline purchasing and supply management for providers. Backed by a top\-tier venture capital investor, the company is positioned for long\-term growth and innovation. Dentira is growing 100\+% YoY and is already profitable, providing a stable environment with strong market traction. Team members join a fast\-paced, data\-driven organization that values ownership, collaboration, and impact in modernizing healthcare procurement.
 



  





**Role Description** 




 We're looking for a modern\-age Technical Program Manager to own the execution layer of our
 



 procurement and vendor operations. This is not a roadmap\-and\-strategy product role — it's a role for
 



 someone who makes delivery happen: driving the team's day\-to\-day rhythm, keeping vendor
 



 commitments on track, and unblocking work before it stalls. You'll be the person who always knows the true status of every commitment, surfaces risk early, and turns “we should probably tell them” into a message that's already sent.
 



 But we mean modern\-age seriously. When you flag that something in a process or system is off, we
 



 don't want a paragraph buried in a thread — we want you to use AI tools to paint the picture that doesn't exist yet. Take the raw data, turn it into a chart, a dashboard, a one\-glance visual, and make the message loud and clear. This role is for someone who goes beyond the brief, not someone who waits for one.
 



 The technical requirement here is basic. You won't be writing production code or debugging systems in depth — but you should be willing to learn enough to triage a support escalation, glance at a failing
 



 request, or check a basic config before it reaches an engineer's plate. We'll hone the rest.
 



  





**What You will Own** 




 Run the team's delivery rhythm. Host scrum ceremonies (standups, planning, retros), keep the
 



 board honest, and make sure the team is always working on what matters most.
 



 •
 
 Prioritize and defend scope
 
 . Decide what's picked up now versus later, and push back — with
 



 evidence — on work that can wait. Sound prioritization here depends on staying in active contact with
 



 Support, Customer Success, Business, and other PMs to understand real\-world impact.
 



 •
 
 Own vendor programs
 
 . Drive meetings and communications with procurement vendors and external
 



 partners: set the agenda, keep them focused, capture what was agreed, and ensure it actually gets
 



 implemented and handed over on time.
 



 •
 
 Guard the deliverables
 
 . Track promised deliverables against reality. When something is on track,
 



 keep it quiet and moving. When it's slipping, raise it early and communicate proactively — internally
 



 and to vendors.
 



 •
 
 Make the invisible visible
 
 . When you spot something off in a process, system, or vendor's
 



 performance, don't just describe it — show it. Use AI tools to turn raw, scattered data into a clear
 



 visual, dashboard, or model that makes the problem (and the case for fixing it) impossible to miss.
 



 •
 
 Surface and solve pain
 
 . Identify recurring friction and operational pain across the team and its
 



 stakeholders, bring it to the Team Lead, and work jointly toward the right solution rather than just filing
 



 a ticket.
 



 •
 
 Filter the support funnel
 
 . Triage inbound support and operational asks. Do the basic first\-level
 



 checks, then resolve or correctly route issues so engineers only see what genuinely needs them.
 



  





**What We're Looking For** 




  





**Non\-negotiables** 




 •
 
 Exceptional communication
 
 . You run meetings that end with clear decisions and owners. You write
 



 follow\-ups people actually read. You're comfortable driving conversations with external partners and
 



 senior stakeholders, and you close the loop every time.
 



 •
 
 Cross\-cultural fluency
 
 . Our partners and teammates span the US, Canada, Australia, New Zealand,
 



 France, the UK, Belgium, Germany, and India — and our European footprint is still growing. You
 



 communicate clearly and work smoothly across time zones and cultures without friction.
 



 •
 
 Deep ownership
 
 — nothing gets handed to you. You treat every commitment as yours until it's
 



 shipped. Nobody will spec your work, build your tools, or hand you a process to follow — you're
 



 expected to define your own and take the problem the rest of the way. You chase status, you escalate
 



 before it's a fire, and you don't let things fall through the cracks. “I didn't know it was blocked” is not a
 



 phrase you use.
 



 •
 
 AI\-native by default
 
 . You reach for AI tooling as a first instinct — to draft comms, summarize threads,
 



 triage tickets, and, above all, to build things that don't exist yet: visuals, dashboards, and models that
 



 make a problem land. You build your own workflows and go beyond the brief; you don't wait for tools to be handed to you.
 



 •
 
 Tooling and process discipline
 
 . You're strong with Excel — tracking, filtering, pivoting, and turning a
 



 messy status into a clear picture. You know Jira well and keep a board honest. You've worked in
 



 scrum\-based Agile teams and understand the ceremonies in practice, not just theory.
 



 •
 
 Willing to learn the basics
 
 . Only a very basic level of technical comfort is required up front — enough
 



 to read a simple log or request and know when something is genuinely an engineering problem versus
 



 something you can resolve or route yourself. We'll hone the rest.
 



  





**Strong signals** 




 •
 
 Prior experience
 
 as a TPM, Program Manager, Delivery Manager, Product Owner, or an
 



 engineer/support lead who moved into coordination.
 



 • Experience managing procurement, vendor, or external partner relationships.
 



 • Comfort with Slack and monitoring/status dashboards.
 



 • Background in healthcare, B2B SaaS, or another regulated / reliability\-critical domain.
 



  





**What This Role Is Not** 




 To set clear expectations: this is a delivery\- and execution\-focused role, not a product strategy role. You will strongly influence what gets prioritized and surface the problems worth solving — but product
 



 direction is set jointly with the Team Lead. If your ambition is to own product vision and roadmap end to end, this specific role isn't that (though there's room to grow toward more product ownership over time for the right person).

76718e89.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
76718e89.description:
**About Client:** 




 Our Client is a global IT services company headquartered in Southborough, Massachusetts, USA. Founded in 1996, with a revenue of $1\.8B, with 35,000\+ associates worldwide, specializes in digital engineering, and IT services company helping clients modernize their technology infrastructure, adopt cloud and AI solutions, and accelerate innovation. It partners with major firms in banking, healthcare, telecom, and media.
 



 Our Client is known for combining deep industry expertise with agile development practices, enabling scalable and cost\-effective digital transformation. The company operates in over 50 locations across more than 25 countries, has delivery centers in Asia, Europe, and North America and is backed by Baring Private Equity Asia.
 



  





**Job Title : Senior Technical Program Manager** 




**Key Skills : Technical Program,SDLC,Agile/Scrum,KPI,Stakeholder,PMP,Portfolio.** 




**Experience** 
 : 9\-15 Years
 



**Location** 
 : Pune
 



**Education Qualification** 
 : Any Graduation
 



**Work Mode** 
 : Hybrid
 



**Employment Type :** 
 Contract to Hire
 



**Notice Period** 
 : Immediate \- 10 Days.
 



  





**Job Description :** 




  





 We are looking for an experienced Technical Program Manager (TPM) to lead cross\-functional technical programs from planning through execution and delivery. The ideal candidate should have a strong technical background, excellent stakeholder management skills, and experience managing large\-scale software development projects in Agile environments.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  




* Lead end\-to\-end execution of multiple technical programs and projects.
* Define project scope, objectives, timelines, milestones, and deliverables.
* Collaborate with Engineering, Product Management, QA, DevOps, Security, and Business teams.
* Drive Agile ceremonies including Sprint Planning, Daily Stand\-ups, Reviews, and Retrospectives.
* Track project progress, identify risks, and implement mitigation plans.
* Manage dependencies across multiple teams and business units.
* Monitor program health using KPIs, dashboards, and project metrics.
* Facilitate executive\-level status reporting and stakeholder communication.
* Coordinate software releases and ensure timely delivery.
* Drive process improvements to enhance engineering productivity.
* Ensure adherence to SDLC, governance, compliance, and quality standards.
* Support resource planning, budgeting, and capacity management.
* Resolve blockers and escalate issues appropriately.
* Maintain project documentation, RAID logs, and program artifacts.

28b996d4.title: Senior Technical Support and Program Manager
28b996d4.description:
**About Persistent**
 We are an AI\-led, platform\-driven Digital Engineering and Enterprise Modernization partner, combining deep technical expertise and industry experience to help our clients anticipate what’s next. Our offerings and proven solutions create a unique competitive advantage for our clients by giving them the power to see beyond and rise above. We work with many industry\-leading organizations across the world, including 20 Fortune 50 companies and 4 of the 5 top banks in both the US and India, and numerous innovators across the healthcare ecosystem.
   

  

 Our disruptor’s mindset, commitment to client success, and agility to thrive in the dynamic environment have enabled us to sustain our growth momentum. Persistent has been recognized across top industry platforms for innovation, leadership, and inclusion. We reported $1,654\.4M FY26 revenue with 17\.4% Y\-o\-Y growth. We have delivered 24 sequential quarters of growth with $436\.0M in Q4 FY26 revenue, up 3\.2% Q\-o\-Q and 16\.2% Y\-o\-Y growth. Our 27,500\+ global team members, located in 18 countries, have been instrumental in helping the market leaders transform their industries. We have been recognized as the Fastest Growing IT Services Brand Globally in the 2026 Brand Finance IT Services 25 Report. We named a Leader in the Everest Group Private Equity (PE) Services PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2026 and Software Product Engineering PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2026\.
   

  

**About The Position**
 Leads the Technical support team, ensures timely and effective resolution of client issues, manages performance metrics, and drives customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.
   

  

* Role: Technical Support Operations Manager
* Location: Pune
* Experience: 10\+years

* Work collaboratively with cross\-functional teams to ensure an exceptional customer
* experience.

* Drive customer escalations to resolution by leading and engaging with customers
* directly.

* Ability to identify and manage support metrics, reporting tools, tracking tools and
* infrastructure, to ensure all department activities are process driven.
* Be a part of the weekend coverage rotation to assist with high\-priority and global
* outages.


**Expertise You'll Bring**
 BS Degree in a technical curriculum or equivalent.
   

  

* 10\+ years’ experience successfully leading a customer support team.
* Proven track record of managing top talent and fostering their growth
* A record of creating a team environment with high employee retention, strong job
* satisfaction, and successful career growth
* Ability to self\-direct, multi\-task and prioritize job requirements
* Strong knowledge of customer relationship management
* Excellent verbal, written and interpersonal communication skills.
* Knowledge of security platforms, email protection, cloud services, software as a
* service (SaaS)

**Benefits**
* Competitive salary and benefits package

**Values\-Driven, People\-Centric \& Inclusive Work Environment**

c70bd9c0.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
c70bd9c0.description:
Sprinklr is the definitive, AI\-native platform for Unified Customer Experience Management (Unified\-CXM), empowering brands to deliver extraordinary experiences at scale — across every customer touchpoint.
   

  

 By combining human instinct with the speed and efficiency of AI, Sprinklr helps brands earn trust and loyalty through personalized, seamless, and efficient customer interactions. Sprinklr’s unified platform provides powerful solutions for every customer\-facing team — spanning social media management, marketing, advertising, customer feedback, and omnichannel contact center management — enabling enterprises to unify data, break down silos, and act on real\-time insights.
   

  

 Today, 1,900\+ enterprises and 60% of the Fortune 100 rely on Sprinklr to help them deliver consistent, trusted customer experiences worldwide.
   

  

**Job Description**
**What You’ll Do**
* Project Planning: Develop comprehensive project plans, timelines, and resource allocation to meet project goals and deadlines.
* Technical Expertise: Possess a deep understanding of DevOps principles, tools, and practices to guide project teams effectively.
* Team Collaboration: Collaborate with cross\-functional teams, including developers, system administrators, and QA, to ensure seamless integration of DevOps practices.
* Automation: Promote the automation of development, testing, and deployment processes using tools like CI/CD pipelines, containerization, and configuration management.
* Risk Management: Identify potential project risks and develop mitigation strategies to minimize disruptions to project timelines.
* Monitoring and Reporting: Implement monitoring and reporting tools to track project progress, identify bottlenecks, and ensure continuous improvement.
* Budget Management: Manage project budgets, including cost estimation, tracking expenses, and optimizing resource allocation.
* Documentation: Maintain accurate project documentation, including technical specifications, user manuals, and post\-implementation reports.
* Stakeholder Communication: Effectively communicate project status, updates, and issues to stakeholders, including executives, team members, and clients


**What Makes You Qualified?**
* Bachelor's degree in computer science, engineering, or related field (master's degree preferred).
* 2\-5 years of Technical Project Management experience
* Project management certification (e.g., PMP) is a plus.
* Knowledge of DevOps tools and practices (e.g., Git, Jenkins, Docker, Kubernetes, Ansible).
* Proven experience in project management and technical leadership.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
* Problem\-solving and critical thinking abilities.
* Ability to adapt to evolving technologies and industry trends


**We focus on our mission** 
 : Sprinklr was founded in 2009 to solve a big problem: growing enterprise complexity that separated brands from their customers. Our vision was clear: to unify fragmented teams, tools and data — helping large organizations build deeper, more meaningful connections with the people they serve. Today, Sprinklr has a unified, AI\-native platform for four product suites: Sprinklr Service, Sprinklr Social, Sprinklr Marketing, and Sprinklr Insights. Sprinklr is here to do three things:
   

  

* Lead a new category of enterprise software that we call Unified\-CXM.
* Empower companies to deliver next generation, unified engagement journeys that reimagine the customer experience.
* Create a culture of customer obsession, with trust, teamwork, and accountability.


**We believe in our product** 
 : Customers who value exceptional customer experiences have what they need on our single unified platform, built with an operating system approach on a single codebase. That means that everything — and everyone — can work together to service, respond, sell, and market to customers on the channels they prefer. While Unified Customer Experience Management (Unified\-CXM) as a category is just getting started, we are well on our way to creating a no\-compromise, unified approach to better customer experiences for the world’s leading enterprise brands.
   

  

**We invest in our people** 
 : We offer a comprehensive suite of benefits designed to help each member of our team thrive. Sprinklr believes that you should be able to get the type of care you need for your personal well\-being when you need it. We offer you and your family voluntary healthcare coverage in countries where applicable. We believe it is important to take time off – it is essential for your mental and physical wellbeing. We provide Sprinklrites with paid time off to recharge and spend time with loved ones. We want to grow our talent with purpose. Our open Mentoring Program is designed to create meaningful connections that support growth and amplify our focus.
   

  

 To learn more about employee benefits by region, click here.
   

  

 To learn more about all\-things\-Sprinklr, visit our candidate resource hub here.
   

  

**EEO \- Our philosophy** 
 : Our goal is to ensure every employee feels like they belong and are operating in a collaborative environment. We fervently believe every employee matters and should be respected and heard. We believe we are stronger when we belong because collectively, we’re more innovative, creative, and successful.
   

  

 Sprinklr is proud to be an equal\-opportunity workplace and complies with all applicable federal, state, and local fair employment practices laws. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, religion, creed, national origin or ancestry, ethnicity, sex (including gender, pregnancy, sexual orientation, and gender identity), age, physical or mental disability, citizenship, past, current, or prospective service in the uniformed services, genetic information, or any other characteristic protected under applicable law.
   

  

 Reasonable accommodations are available upon request during the interview process. To request an accommodation, please work directly with your recruitment coordinator or recruiter.
   

  

**Warning about Recruiting Scams:** 
 Please be vigilant for recruiting scams impersonating Sprinklr. Sprinklr will never ask you for money, to pay for equipment, or for unnecessary personal information during the interview process. Sprinklr will also never pay in Bitcoin or send email communications from our executives. Please review the Federal Trade Commission's advice to avoid these types of scams.
   

  

 If you are contacted by someone whom you suspect may not be appropriately representing Sprinklr, please do not engage and block their email or phone number immediately.

7e2bfc30.title: PRE-SALES IT INFRASTRUCTURE ENGINEER
7e2bfc30.description:
**Company Description** 
 Icon Infoline Pvt. Ltd. is an authorized HPE and Cisco partner and a trusted IT infrastructure system integrator, offering security solutions and distribution services for well\-known national and international computer brands. The company provides comprehensive IT professional services, including IT service desk setup, IT infrastructure management, ITSM implementation, backup and restore, server installation, network infrastructure management, and cloud services. Icon Infoline focuses on delivering reliable cloud storage and cloud migration services that support organizations in modernizing their IT environments. The company’s mission is to build trust and transparent partnerships with customers, becoming their preferred IT services provider for all infrastructure needs.
 



  




* THE ROLE Unbilled or Unproposed Solutions \& SME Client Experience Required The Pre\-Sales IT Infrastructure Engineer at ICON Infoline is the technical engine behind every deal. Where the Sales team identifies the opportunity, this role wins it — by understanding customer pain points, designing the right solution, and presenting it with the clarity and confidence that earns purchase orders from enterprise and SME clients. ICON Infoline has strong expertise in IT supply and managed services.
* 
* The Pre\-Sales Engineer is the bridge between that expertise and the customer. They do not wait for a salesperson to hand them a brief — they sit in discovery meetings, ask the right questions, design end\-to\-end solutions, build BOMs and proposals, and support the sales team all the way to deal closure. This is a commercially aware technical role. The right candidate is equally comfortable reading an RFP, configuring a Cisco switch stack, and presenting a solution to a CIO.
* 
* KEY RESPONSIBILITIES \& ROLES
* 
* 1\. Solution Design \& Architecture • Conduct discovery sessions with customers to understand their IT infrastructure requirements, pain points, and future roadmap. • Design end\-to\-end IT infrastructure solutions covering servers, networking, storage, virtualization, security, cloud, and backup/DR. • Prepare solution architecture diagrams that clearly communicate the proposed design to both technical and non\-technical stakeholders. • Recommend the right mix of products and technologies from ICON Infoline's vendor portfolio — Cisco, Fortinet, Dell, HPE, Lenovo, Microsoft. • Ensure every solution is sized correctly — no over\-engineering, no under\-specification. ICON Infoline \| PCMC, Pune \| IT Infrastructure \& Managed Services \| Confidential JOB DESCRIPTION Confidential \| June 2026
* 
* 2\. Pre\-Sales Execution • Respond to RFPs, RFQs, and tenders — own the technical sections from requirement interpretation to final submission. • Prepare Bill of Materials (BOM) with accurate part numbers, specifications, and cost estimates. • Conduct technical presentations and live product demonstrations to prospective clients. • Work with vendors and distributors to obtain pricing, validate lead times, and confirm technical compatibility. • Maintain a library of standard solution templates, architecture blocks, and proposal decks to accelerate response turnaround.
* 
* 3\. Client Engagement \& Relationship Support • Serve as the technical face of ICON Infoline in client meetings — explain complex infrastructure concepts to non\-technical decision makers. • Build credibility and trust with IT managers, infrastructure heads, and procurement teams of enterprise and SME clients. • Support post\-sales handover to the implementation team — ensure the delivered solution matches what was proposed and committed. • Participate in client review meetings and technical workshops where required.
* 
* 4\. Internal Collaboration • Work closely with the Sales team to qualify opportunities and provide technical input on deal strategy. • Collaborate with the Procurement and SCM teams to ensure accurate vendor quotes and product availability before proposals are submitted. • Provide technical feedback to management on recurring customer requirements, product gaps, and vendor performance. • Support the development of case studies and technical references from completed projects for use in future bids.


- 


 QUALIFICATIONS \& EXPERIENCE
 



  





 Essential • B.E./B.Sc. in Computer Science, IT, Electronics, or related engineering discipline. • 4–8 years of hands\-on IT infrastructure experience covering servers, networking, storage, and security. • Minimum 2 years in a pre\-sales or solution consulting role — direct experience preparing BOMs, proposals, and RFP responses. • Proficiency with at least two of the following vendor ecosystems: Cisco, Fortinet, Dell Technologies, HPE, Lenovo, Microsoft. • Proven ability to design and document end\-to\-end IT infrastructure solutions for enterprise and SME clients. • Strong written and verbal communication — able to present technical solutions confidently to CIOs, IT Heads, and procurement teams.
 



  





 Technical Knowledge — Mandatory • Servers: Windows Server, Linux Server administration and sizing. • Networking: LAN/WAN, Switches, Routers, Wi\-Fi controllers, VLANs, SD\-WAN concepts. • Storage: NAS, SAN, backup storage sizing and selection. • Virtualization: VMware vSphere/ESXi, Microsoft Hyper\-V. • Cybersecurity: Firewall configuration (Fortinet/Cisco preferred), VPN, Endpoint Security solutions. • Cloud Platforms: Working knowledge of AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud — hybrid and cloud migration scoping. • Backup \& Disaster Recovery: DR design, RPO/RTO planning, backup tools (Veeam, Veritas, Commvault).
 



  





 Strongly Preferred
 



 • Cisco CCNA or CCNP certification. • Fortinet NSE 4 or above certification. • Microsoft Azure or AWS Solutions Architect Associate certification. • VMware VCP (VMware Certified Professional). • Experience with ITSM tools (Service Now, Fresh service) or MSP platforms. • Exposure to Managed Services contracts — SLA design, scope of services, and pricing models.

92ace90b.title: Design Consultant (Interior / Architecture)
92ace90b.description:
**About Meragi :**  
We're Building Indias biggest wed\-tech startup , set to revolutionise the Indian wedding industry.Meragi is a rapidly growing start up in India's thriving $50 billion wedding industry. As a full\-stack technology platform, we revolutionize the way wedding\-related services are bought and delivered. Our mission is to create pioneering industry\-first solutions that address the complexities of this industry, utilizing innovative technology to consult, design, and sell wedding services with a strong focus on ensuring high\-quality fulfilment. Backed by top\-tier investors, we are at the forefront of transforming the wedding industry landscape.

**Roles \& Responsibilities:**

* You will be the director and creator of the cinematic experience which we design for our clients.
* You will be owning the entire design part starting from conceptualising themes, to creating moodboards, to discussing with clients their vision , ideas and requirements and finally overseeing the execution on the day of the event

**You will be required to:**

* Develop and present creative and unique design concepts that align with the clients' vision, incorporating various themes, color schemes, and styles
* Create detailed design proposals, including sketches, mood boards, and material samples, to effectively communicate design concepts to clients.
* Research and stay updated on the latest wedding decor trends, materials, and techniques to provide innovative and fresh ideas.
* Maintain strong relationships with clients throughout the design process, actively seeking feedback and making necessary adjustments to ensure their satisfaction.
* Conduct on\-site visits and inspections to assess venues, identify potential design challenges, and develop solutions to enhance the overall aesthetic appeal.

**Requirements:**

* Bachelor's degree in Architecture, Interior Design, Event Design, Space Design, Spatial Design or a related field is preferred but not mandatory.
* A creative mind\-set with a passion for keeping up with the latest design trends and continuously seeking inspiration.
* Flexibility and adaptability to work in a fast\-paced, dynamic environment and handle unexpected changes or challenges
* Freshers are also welcomed for internships.
* Candidates must be proficient in understanding and speaking Malayalam.

**Why Join Us?**

* If you are interested in being a part of something creative, artistic and not a boring desk job, this is a great opportunity for you
* Be a part of the first wed\-tech company of India
* Get the opportunity to grow non linearly in the company
* Be a part of a lean team and fun culture
* Work on something exciting and innovative

This is an incredible opportunity to join a fast\-paced, innovative company and make a significant impact in shaping the future of the wedding industry for customers, globally.

Pay: ₹250,000\.00 \- ₹550,000\.00 per year

Application Question(s):

* Current CTC \& Expected CTC?
* Current Notice Period? Are you available for early Joining if required?
* Do you have experience in handling Clients?

Work Location: In person

a3cf7fb6.title: Design Consultant (Interior / Architecture)
a3cf7fb6.description:
**About Meragi :**  
We're Building Indias biggest wed\-tech startup , set to revolutionise the Indian wedding industry.Meragi is a rapidly growing start up in India's thriving $50 billion wedding industry. As a full\-stack technology platform, we revolutionize the way wedding\-related services are bought and delivered. Our mission is to create pioneering industry\-first solutions that address the complexities of this industry, utilizing innovative technology to consult, design, and sell wedding services with a strong focus on ensuring high\-quality fulfilment. Backed by top\-tier investors, we are at the forefront of transforming the wedding industry landscape.

**Roles \& Responsibilities:**

* You will be the director and creator of the cinematic experience which we design for our clients.
* You will be owning the entire design part starting from conceptualising themes, to creating moodboards, to discussing with clients their vision , ideas and requirements and finally overseeing the execution on the day of the event

**You will be required to:**

* Develop and present creative and unique design concepts that align with the clients' vision, incorporating various themes, color schemes, and styles
* Create detailed design proposals, including sketches, mood boards, and material samples, to effectively communicate design concepts to clients.
* Research and stay updated on the latest wedding decor trends, materials, and techniques to provide innovative and fresh ideas.
* Maintain strong relationships with clients throughout the design process, actively seeking feedback and making necessary adjustments to ensure their satisfaction.
* Conduct on\-site visits and inspections to assess venues, identify potential design challenges, and develop solutions to enhance the overall aesthetic appeal.

**Requirements:**

* Bachelor's degree in Architecture, Interior Design, Event Design, Space Design, Spatial Design or a related field is preferred but not mandatory.
* A creative mind\-set with a passion for keeping up with the latest design trends and continuously seeking inspiration.
* Flexibility and adaptability to work in a fast\-paced, dynamic environment and handle unexpected changes or challenges
* Freshers are also welcomed for internships.
* Candidates must be proficient in understanding and speaking Malayalam.

**Why Join Us?**

* If you are interested in being a part of something creative, artistic and not a boring desk job, this is a great opportunity for you
* Be a part of the first wed\-tech company of India
* Get the opportunity to grow non linearly in the company
* Be a part of a lean team and fun culture
* Work on something exciting and innovative

This is an incredible opportunity to join a fast\-paced, innovative company and make a significant impact in shaping the future of the wedding industry for customers, globally.

Pay: ₹250,000\.00 \- ₹550,000\.00 per year

* Current CTC \& Expected CTC?

719165b0.title: Forward Deployed Solutions Lead
719165b0.description:
**Location:** 
 Mumbai or Delhi (with travel to client locations across India as required)
 



**Type:** 
 Full\-time
 



**Reports to:** 

 Leadership
 




**Compensation:** 

 INR 9–11 LPA
 




**Experience:** 
 Minimum 1 year of client\-facing experience
 



  





**Apply at** 
**https://forms.gle/ubFSpwwFaceufvK47** 




  





**About the Role** 




 The Forward Deployed Solutions Lead is the face of the company for the client. From the moment a project is handed over by the Business Development team, this person owns the engagement end\-to end ie understanding the client's problems, conceptualising solutions, aligning stakeholders, coordinating internal delivery, and ensuring the solution is delivered on time and to a high standard.
 



  





 This role sits at the intersection of client relationship management, solution design, project delivery, and hands\-on execution. Our work is focused on digital and AI transformation for the social impact sector ie building bespoke software and applications from scratch, configuring existing platforms, and setting up AI\-native workflows (for example, designing skills and agents on Claude, Claude Code, and Claude co\-work environments) to meet client needs.
 



  





 If you enjoy owning outcomes, working closely with clients, translating messy real\-world problems into clean solutions, and operating in the intersection of technology and social impact, this role is built for you.
 



  





**What You Will Own** 




**Client ownership \& relationship** 



* Serve as the primary point of contact and the face of the company for the client throughout the engagement.
* Take a clean handover from the Business Development team and immediately establish credibility and rapport with client stakeholders.
* Manage client expectations, communication cadence, escalations, and satisfaction across the lifecycle of the project.



  





**Problem discovery \& solution design** 



* Engage deeply with the client to understand and document the problems they are facing through interviews, workshops, on\-site visits, and desk research.
* Produce clear, well\-structured problem statements and align all internal and client stakeholders on a shared understanding.
* Conceptualise and design solutions (technical, process\-based, or a combination) and document them in a way that is unambiguous to both the client and the delivery team.
* Drive stakeholder alignment on the proposed solution before build begins.



  





**Delivery coordination \& hands\-on execution** 



* Coordinate with internal development, design, and AI teams. Brief them thoroughly on the solution, clarify requirements, and support them wherever needed to unblock progress.
* Where the solution is small or well\-suited to no\-code / AI\-native tooling, build it yourself (for example, configuring Claude skills, setting up agents, assembling Claude Code workflows, or standing up light integrations).
* Own the end\-to\-end delivery timeline. Track progress, anticipate risks, resolve issues, and ensure the client receives what was promised, when it was promised.



  





**Client enablement** 



* Build user manuals, training material, and onboarding documentation for every solution delivered.
* Conduct training sessions for client teams — both remote and in\-person — to ensure adoption of what has been built.



  





**Who You Are** 




**Sector understanding** 



* You have a deep understanding of the social impact sector — CSR, corporate foundations, philanthropic foundations, Indian and international NGOs, multilaterals, and government. You understand how these organisations think, buy, and make decisions.
* You understand the fundamentals of social impact research and evaluation — needs assessment, baseline / midline / endline studies, impact assessment, SROI, and similar methods — well enough to design solutions that fit how our clients actually work.



  





**Client craft** 



* You have prior experience working directly with clients in a delivery, consulting, or program management capacity. You know that this role sits at the intersection of many skills — client management, solutioning, delivery, and light building — and you are comfortable operating in that space.
* Your written and verbal communication is exceptional. You can write a crisp problem statement, present a solution to a room of senior stakeholders, and hold a difficult conversation about a slipping timeline — all with equal ease.



  





**AI fluency** 



* You have personally adopted AI in the way you work and think. You are fluent in extracting real value from AI tools — not just using them, but using them well.
* You can independently build small solutions using AI\-native tooling (Claude, Claude Code, Claude co\-work, agent frameworks, and similar).



  





**Delivery mindset** 



* You take end\-to\-end ownership. When something goes wrong, you do not wait to be asked — you move.
* You are comfortable under pressure. Tight timelines, demanding clients, and shifting priorities do not throw you off.
* You work effectively in a remote\-first setup, and you know how to keep momentum without an office to lean on.



  





**Logistics** 



* You are based in, or willing to relocate to, Mumbai or Delhi.
* You are willing to travel to client locations as the engagement requires.



  





**Nice to Have** 



* Prior experience delivering technology, digital, or AI projects — either at a consulting firm, a services company, a technology company, or in\-house at a social impact organisation.
* Hands\-on familiarity with modern software development workflows, even if you are not a full\-time engineer.
* Existing network within the CSR, foundation, or development sector in India.



  





**Why This Role** 




 You will be the person clients trust to solve their hardest problems. You will work at the leading edge of AI applied to the social impact sector, with real stakes and real outcomes. You will have the autonomy of an owner and the support of a team that takes delivery seriously.
 



  





 If this sounds like you, we would like to hear from you.
 



  





**How to Apply** 




 Please apply by filling out our application form:
 **https://forms.gle/ubFSpwwFaceufvK47** 




  





 Please
 **do not email your CV separately** 
 —
 **the form is the only channel we use for this role** 
 . Take your time with the questions; the way you write your answers is itself part of how we will evaluate fit. The form should take about
 **20–25 minutes to complete** 
 .

98314bdc.title: Technical Solutions Consultant, Auto Partner Engineering
98314bdc.description:
**Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 3 years of experience troubleshooting technical issues for internal/external partners or customers.
* Experience in either system design or reading code (e.g., Java, C\+\+, Python).


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Master’s degree in Business, Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, Engineering or Applied Science, or a related field.
* Experience with embedded system architecture and platforms such as Android or Linux.
* Experience managing multiple products and streams of work with excellent time management.
* Passion for innovation in the automotive field.
* Excellent communication skills and attention to detail.


**About the job** 
 As a Technical Solutions Consultant, you will be responsible for the technical relationship of our largest advertising clients and product partners. You will lead cross\-functional teams in Engineering, Sales and Product Management to leverage emerging technologies for our external clients/partners. From concept design and testing to data analysis and support, you will oversee the technical execution and business operations of Google's online advertising platforms and product partnerships.
   

  

 You will be able to balance business and partner needs with technical constraints, develop innovative, cutting edge solutions and act as a partner and consultant to those you are working with. You will also be able to build tools and automate products, oversee the technical execution and business operations of Google's partnerships, as well as develop product strategy and prioritize projects and resources.
   

  

 The Android Partner Engineering team works with a global and set of partners who use Android to build devices and services. The team works to align the goals of Google and its partners to make Android the platform of choice across multiple consumer and enterprise domains.
   

  

 In this role, you will be responsible for enabling Android auto across multiple programs per year, with active users and growth opportunities in an industry going through major technological transformation.
   

  

 Android is Google’s mobile operating system powering more than 3 billion devices worldwide. Android is about bringing computing to everyone in the world. We believe computing is a super power for good, enabling access to information, economic opportunity, productivity, connectivity between friends and family and more. We think everyone in the world should have access to the best computing has to offer. We provide the platform for original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) and developers to build compelling computing devices (smartphones, tablets, TVs, wearables, etc) that run the best apps/services for everyone in the world.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Perform implementation reviews, advocate new product features, and ensure the prompt and proper resolution of technical challenges.
* Improve product feature offerings by providing partner feedback to internal cross\-functional teams including Product Management and Core Engineering.
* Guarantee the technical aspects of a partner’s integration (both new and ongoing) by providing necessary documentation and technical guidance.
* Identify, drive, and optimize technical and business process flows for existing and new opportunities by leveraging Google technologies.
* Have the ability to communicate in English fluently in order to interact with stakeholders. Possess excellent presentation, communication, and convincing skills with external partners and internal cross functional teams.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

ac7fa3ed.title: CONFIGURATOR SOLUTION ARCHITECT - QUALITY
ac7fa3ed.description:
At ABB, we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world.


This Position reports to:


Chapter Lead **Your role and responsibilities:**  

  

We are seeking an experienced QA Lead to establish and lead a high\-performing automation and manual testing team. You will be responsible for defining testing strategies, implementing advanced automation frameworks using Selenium, Tosca, and Playwright, and driving quality standards across the organization. This is a strategic role that combines technical expertise with team leadership.  

  

The work model for the role is: \#LI\-Hybrid


This role is contributing to the Electrification business Smart Power division in Bangalore, India.

  

You will be mainly accountable for:

* Lead and mentor a team of automation and manual QA engineers, fostering a culture of continuous improvement and technical excellence
* Design and implement comprehensive test automation strategies using Selenium, Tosca Automation, and Playwright frameworks
* Establish and maintain test automation standards, best practices, and coding guidelines across the team
* Oversee the development and optimization of automation frameworks for UI, API, and mobile testing
* Drive the integration of test automation into CI/CD pipelines and DevOps workflows
* Collaborate with product, development, and operations teams to define testing scope and requirements
* Conduct regular code reviews and ensure code quality, maintainability, and scalability
* Lead technical problem\-solving and root cause analysis for test failures and automation challenges


Stay updated with testing trends and emerging automation technologies

 **Qualifications for the role:**

* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field with Minimum 7\-10 years of software testing experience with 3\+ years in test automation leadership
* Expert\-level proficiency in Selenium WebDriver with complex framework design
* Strong hands\-on experience with Tosca Automation (TOSCA UI, TOSCA Service Virtualization)
* Proficiency in Playwright for modern web automation testing with advanced programming skills in Java, Python, or JavaScript
* Deep understanding of automation testing frameworks (POM, Data\-Driven, BDD, Keyword\-Driven) and Experience with BDD tools such as Cucumber or Behave
* Proficiency in API testing using tools like REST Assured, Postman, or Karate DSL and Knowledge of performance and load testing tools (JMeter, LoadRunner)
* Expertise in CI/CD integration (Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps, GitLab CI) and Database knowledge (SQL) and backend testing capabilities
* Experience with containerization (Docker) and cloud platforms
* ISRQB certification will be added advantage
 **More about us :**

  

ABB Smart Power provides energy distribution solutions for data centers, industrial and manufacturing plants, critical infrastructure and commercial buildings. The Division’s technical teams work closely with industry partners, delivering advanced solutions that support rapid growth, energy transition, and sustainability objectives. The Division’s portfolio includes industrial circuit breakers, low\-voltage systems, motor starting applications, and safety devices like switches and relays. Its Power Protection unit supports the world’s largest data center companies with advanced energy\-efficient UPS solutions. The Division’s ABB Ability™ Energy Manager provides a scalable, easy\-to\-use platform that helps organizations save energy and reduce CO2 emissions.

  

Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. We welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences.


Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.


Recruitment Fraud Warning


ABB never asks for payment from job applicants. All genuine job offers follow a formal application and interview process.


View current job openings and apply at: https://careers.abb/global/en/home


For more information, read our full fraud warning notice at: https://global.abb/group/en/careers/how\-to\-apply/fraud\-warning

da485829.description:
* OLAP, Data Engineering, Data warehousing, ETL
* Hadoop ecosystem or AWS, Azure or GCP Cluster and processing
* Experience working on Hive or Spark SQL or Redshift or Snowflake
* Experience in writing and troubleshooting SQL programming or MDX queries
* Experience of working on Linux
* Experience in Microsoft Analysis services (SSAS) or OLAP tools
* Tableau or Micro strategy or any BI tools
* Expertise of programming in Python, Java or Shell Script would be a plus


 OLPA, MDX, SQL
   

  

* Be frontend person of the world’s most scalable OLAP product company – Kyvos Insights.
* Interact with senior\-most technical and business people of large enterprises to understand their big data strategy and their problem statements in that area.
* Create, present, align customers with and implement solutions around Kyvos products for the most challenging enterprise BI/DW problems.
* Be the Go\-To person for prospects regarding technical issues during POV stage.
* Be instrumental in reading the pulse of the big data market and defining the roadmap of the product.
* Lead a few small but highly efficient teams of Big data engineers
* Efficient task status reporting to stakeholders and customer.
* Good verbal \& written communication skills
* Be willing to work on off hours to meet timeline.
* Be willing to travel or relocate as per project requirement

d2c2b73b.title: Senior Customer Solutions Engineer
d2c2b73b.description:
Note: By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following:
 **Hyderabad, Telangana, India; Bengaluru, Karnataka, India** 
 .
 **Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 6 years of experience working with client\-side web technologies (e.g., HTML, CSS, JavaScript, or HTTP).
* 6 years of experience coding with one or more programming languages (e.g., Java, C/C\+\+, Python).
* Experience troubleshooting technical issues for internal/external partners or customers.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Master’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Business, or a related field.
* Experience working with database technologies (e.g., SQL, NoSQL).
* Experience in investigative roles such as business intelligence, data analytics, or statistics.
* Experience with cloud technologies such as architecting, developing, or maintaining cloud solutions in virtualized environments or cloud data engineering.
* Experience in using machine learning and building solutions.


**About the job** 
 gTech’s Professional Services team takes a creative, collaborative, and customer\-centric approach to provide foundational services and forward\-looking business solutions to top advertiser and publisher customers. Through technical implementation, optimization, and key solutions, gTech Professional Services helps customers attain their business goals while building long\-term capabilities. Google creates products and services that make the world a better place, and gTech’s role is to help bring them to life. Our teams of trusted advisors support customers globally. Our solutions are rooted in our technical skill, product expertise, and a thorough understanding of our customers’ complex needs. Whether the answer is a bespoke solution to solve a unique problem, or a new tool that can scale across Google, everything we do aims to ensure our customers benefit from the full potential of Google products.
   

  

 To learn more about gTech, check out our video .
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Collect requirements, provide guidance, and best practices to apply to ad products and technologies.
* Be responsible for proactively scoping, designing, and building a series of solutions and best practices at a global level to be reused by customers, sellers, partners.
* Leverage engineering skills to adapt existing bespoke ads solutions created by Regional teams into globally scaled solutions that can support thousands of customers.
* Own solution life\-cycle from discovery, to launch, managing maintenance bugs and feature requests, as well as deprecation for a portfolio of scaled solutions.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law.
