202e6f20.title: Project Delivery Leader
202e6f20.description:
Search All Jobs
   

  

**Project Delivery Leader**
 Job Category: Client Success
   

  

 Location: India \- Telangana \- Hyderabad
   

  

 Share this page Share via Facebook Share via X Share via LinkedIn Share via Email Copying...
   

  

 Copied!
   

  

******Meet Our Team:******
 This role will be a part of our expanding consulting business which provides a fantastic opportunity to work with an industry leading collaborative and innovative team along with the latest and greatest, cutting edge Pega technology.
   

  

 Pegasystems is seeking
 **Client Success Journey Designers** 
 who partner with executives and product/delivery teams to design and realize measurable client outcomes. You will blend strategy, service design, strong negotiation, and storytelling to align stakeholders, shape outcome\-led roadmaps, and guide squads from vision to value—ensuring adoption, satisfaction, and sustained impact.
   

  

******Picture Yourself At Pega:******
 Co\-design the client success journey—from vision to value —using the
 **Pega blueprints** 
 , journey maps, and testable value hypotheses as a Solution Designer.
   

  

 Champion Blueprint based Rapid Delivery.
   

  

 At Pega, we actively explore and embrace emerging AI capabilities with curiosity, responsibility, and a drive for meaningful innovation. You will work in an environment where AI‑enabled tools are used to enhance learning, improve engineering efficiency, and support better decision‑making across the cloud platform.
   

  

 We expect everyone to apply critical thinking to all AI‑generated outputs—validating accuracy, quality, and relevance before applying them in production environments. We view AI maturity as a spectrum, progressing from foundational adoption toward more strategic, advocacy‑driven integration, and you will play an active role in that journey.
   

  

******What You'll Do At Pega:******
* Deliver engagements to agreed client scope, timescales, budget, and quality metrics, as well as assisting clients to achieve the expected ROI.
* Translate strategy into action with MVP definitions, outcome\-based road maps, and prioritized backlogs tied to OKRs/KPIs.
* Negotiate scope and priorities to protect outcomes while managing constraints; facilitate governance and issue resolution with senior stakeholders.
* Tell the story of value through executive\-ready narratives, data\-driven visuals, and compelling demonstrations that accelerate decisions and adoption.
* Coach teams on journey\-centric delivery and help mature practices, templates, and playbooks that scale success across accounts.
* Identify growth opportunities through realized outcomes, adoption signals, and stakeholder advocacy; contribute to proposals and SoWs.
* Drive account hygiene (timely and accurate contractual documentation, Project Status Reports (PSRs), Engagement Status Updates (ESUs), forecasts, and A/R collections)
* Step up to play Scrum Master or a Pega Business Architect role as required
* Advise on Pegasystems’ delivery methodology and how this can be harmonized with a client’s methodology; demonstrate a thorough understanding of Agile, Waterfall, and Scrum approaches to delivery.
* Willingness and flexibility to work in shifts to support client time zones. Typical Asia\-Pacific projects work timings are from 7 AM \- 4 PM and North America/Europe projects from 1 PM \- 10 PM


******Who You Are:******
 You are a Designer for Customer Success—a confident facilitator, negotiator, and storyteller who can move seamlessly from the whiteboard to the boardroom. You make ambiguity actionable, connect ideas to outcomes, and inspire teams and executives alike. You balance creativity with pragmatism—and never lose sight of measurable value. You thrive on co‑creating client success journeys, blending design thinking with business acumen to deliver outcomes that matter.
   

  

******What You've Accomplished:******
* 12\-15 years in consulting/technology/ GTM with 4\+ years leading cross\-functional engagements and/or product/program work; proven track record designing client journeys, conflict resolution, stakeholder mediation and landing measurable business outcomes.
* Experience in managing resources in Matrix or non\-direct reporting structures
* Knowledge of cloud migration strategies and legacy modernization approaches
* Demonstrated ability to build trusted advisor relationships at multiple organizational levels.
* Executive\-caliber written communication; storytelling; ability to simplify complex concepts into crisp narratives. Practical Agile experience (Scrum/Kanban); skilled in discovery\-to\-delivery orchestration and backlog management.
* Certifications (nice to have): PMP(preferred), PSM/CSM, PRINCE2, SAFe POPM/Lean Portfolio, Service Design (e.g., SDN)


****Travel Requirements:****
* 25% domestic Travel – periodic travel for co\-design workshops, executive playbacks, and key launches (may vary by client phase).


******Pega Offers You:******
* A rapidly growing yet well\-established business
* The world’s most innovative organizations as reference\-able clients
* Analyst acclaimed technology leadership in a massive emerging market
* A fast\-paced, exciting, collaborative, and rewarding sales environment within innovative industries


 Job ID: 23701
   

  

 Ready to build a Blueprint?
   

  

 Choose the reinvention engine for your needs.
   

  

 For workflows \& app design
   

  

 Reimagine your processes and turn any workflow into a build\-ready application with confidence.
   

  

 Pega Blueprint™
   

  

 For marketing \& CX strategy design
   

  

 Visualize customer journeys and engagement strategies across all touchpoints and activate them.
   

  

 Pega Customer Engagement Blueprint™
   

  

******Pega Offers You:******
* A rapidly growing yet well\-established business
* The world’s most innovative organizations as reference\-able clients
* Analyst acclaimed technology leadership in a massive emerging market
* A fast\-paced, exciting, collaborative, and rewarding sales environment within innovative industries


 Job ID: 23701

2a034133.title: Client Solutions Manager, Ecommerce
2a034133.description:
Meta is seeking a Client Solutions Manager (CSM) to join Meta The CSM will work with large local advertisers, who are operating multi\-channel, and combine a focus on eCommerce \& Retail with brand \& performance marketing on the fast growing Meta platforms Facebook, Instagram \& WhatsApp. We are looking for a strategic and enthusiastic solution\-driver who puts customers at the core of everything. This person has a passion for marketing, and firm belief that the future of marketing is identity\-based, data\-driven and grounded in measurable outcomes.The CSM is responsible to drive revenue by advising on campaigns on Meta platforms, negotiating and optimizing the advertising solutions, and use data and analytics to build consultative advice for our customers.Success in this position requires a high level of consultative depth (focus on business outcomes sought by the client and customize appropriate solutions) and analytical skills (campaign analytics, ad solution optimization), with focus on client KPI’s. The CSM must be solution\-oriented, with curiosity and the ability to drive impact in a dynamic, team\-focused environment, while prioritizing work effectively to meet deadlines.
   

  

 Client Solutions Manager, Ecommerce Responsibilities:
   

  

* Work with top companies to understand their business objectives and develop the Meta strategy in partnership with the Client Partner, which will constitute building on insights, crafting media plans, page strategy, creative and measurement recommendations
* Build key stakeholder relationships both internally and externally, and be seen as a key influencer in shaping product roadmaps, platform strategy and the overall Meta narrative
* Provide dedicated account management to top clients, to develop, manage, optimize, and support strategic account plans, and leverage data to create business solutions for clients
* Develop vertical expertise, including industry research and perspective, to drive overall business objectives and marketing solutions for advertisers
* Media Planning, Strategy, and Measurement :Manage planning, execution, ongoing reporting and optimization of campaigns (oversee budget spend, manage internal analytics and dashboards, provide optimization and real time targeting recommendations)
* Project Management \- Manage complex work streams to optimize marketing objectives for clients. Manage Analytics and dashboards to advise clients (e.g. daily client facing data/insights reporting, understanding performance across hundreds of accounts used by client, setting up pipelines to pull conversion and impression data, etc.)


 Minimum Qualifications:
   

  

* 3\+ years of experience in performance marketing and/or account management roles
* Understanding of online and traditional advertising and/or deeply passionate about digital markeiting and proven ability to learn and deliver rapidly in new environments
* Experience in ad tech/online marketing technologies and understands how to implement them for an effective and efficient marketing strategy is useful
* Critical thinking, analytical and technical skills are essential, as well as curiosity, persistence, and the ability to arrive at solutions in a structured manner and the ability to communicate this clearly and effectively
* Experience developing and managing cross\-functional partnerships as well as client relationships in a complex and rapidly evolving environment


 Preferred Qualifications:
   

  

* Demonstrated ability to integrate AI tools to optimize/redesign workflows and drive measurable impact (e.g., efficiency gains, quality improvements)
* Demonstrated ongoing AI skill development (e.g., prompt/context engineering, agent orchestration) and staying current with emerging AI technologies
* Ecommerce Industry understanding
* Experience adhering to and implementing responsible, ethical AI practices (e.g., risk assessment, bias mitigation, quality and accuracy reviews)
* Digital Marketing, Technology, and accompanying Meta advertising solutions


 About Meta:
   

  

 Meta builds technologies that help people connect, find communities, and grow businesses. When Facebook launched in 2004, it changed the way people connect. Apps like Messenger, Instagram and WhatsApp further empowered billions around the world. Now, Meta is moving beyond 2D screens toward immersive experiences like augmented and virtual reality to help build the next evolution in social technology. People who choose to build their careers by building with us at Meta help shape a future that will take us beyond what digital connection makes possible today—beyond the constraints of screens, the limits of distance, and even the rules of physics.
   

  

 Individual compensation is determined by skills, qualifications, experience, and location. Compensation details listed in this posting reflect the base hourly rate, monthly rate, or annual salary only, and do not include bonus, equity or sales incentives, if applicable. In addition to base compensation, Meta offers benefits. Learn more about benefits at Meta.

c8fd2dec.title: Customer Program Manager- Husky (India)Chennai
c8fd2dec.description:
**Job Description**
**Title:** 
 Customer Program Manager\- Husky (India)Chennai
   

  

**Id:** 
 21045
   

  

**Type:** 
 FullTime
   

  

**Location:** 
 Chennai, India
   

  

 At Husky TechnologiesTM, our success is based on your success. Our ability to keep our customers in the lead is based on building the strongest team possible.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM has a strong foundation built on innovation, close customer relationships and a unique culture and values. We are dedicated to offering our customers the highest quality products and services and are looking for people with the inspiration and talent to develop with us as we pursue our ambitious growth strategy. We are a leader in developing state\-of\-the\-art technology and it is this technology base that uniquely positions us to serve customers who seek differentiation through solutions that provide speed, flexibility and maximum productivity. This capability is at the core of our mission and competitive strategy.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM offers a wealth of opportunity for personal growth and development. Most importantly, Husky Technologies TM offers an opportunity to work with – and be challenged by – a team of great people. Our success is possible because of the creativity, intelligence and passion of our people around the world and their desire to lead change. At the same time, we are not afraid to expect a lot and strive for leadership in all of our key markets. We are a company taking on new challenges and for the right people this means exceptional career development opportunities, the chance to be part of a team that is the best in the world at what we do and the experience that comes from working in an environment that demands constant transformation and innovation.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM is an exciting company with tremendous potential. We have a great team and great expectations. If you are attracted to bold goals, believe in uncompromising honesty, support mutual respect, care about environmental responsibility, have a passion for excellence and a desire to make a positive contribution – then we want you to join the Husky TechnologiesTM team!
   

  

****Job Description****
 As a member of the Customer Success Management (CSM) SAARC team, you will be responsible for managing Advantage \+ Elite Contracts from order intake to delivery as well as to achieve the key performance indicators of the product. In this role, you will be a key contact for customers to ensure customer satisfaction and contract renewal.
   

  

****Responsibilities:****
* Implements and leads the Contract planning process, its implementation and sustainment, responsible to achieve the stated KPI (availability, cycle time, energy consumption, quality, resin usage)
* Work with key cross\-functional teams throughout the Organization with the goal of maintaining the Contract commitments on a continuous basis
* Project Manages all activities and services provided within the Contract, ensuring they are done on time, based on a predefined timetable, in an efficient way
* Ensures all services included in the Contract are well defined, properly documented (in the proper Husky systems), and properly scheduled
* Manages customer expectations to ensure complete alignment with the Contract objectives and goals
* Plan and schedule Contract timelines and milestones using the appropriate tools. Responsible for the milestones and deliverables.
* Develop and deliver progress reports, presentations, and other Contract documentation, internally and to the customer.
* Coordinate all activities related to the Contract implementation and ongoing activities.
* Focus should be in the involvement and awareness of the daily activities and issues related to the Contract. Key contact, both internally and customer.
* Ensure customer is satisfied with contract
* Manage and lead weekly call with customer
* Escalate issues when required
* Builds relationship with customers
* Schedule upcoming work with Field Service teams


****Qualifications:****
* Familiar with preform or plastics manufacturing environment. Understands plants KPI.
* Project Management experience
* Mechanical or electrical engineering or equivalent experience
* A minimum of 5 years’ work experience gained in a similar work environment
* Knowledge of injection molding machinery and related mechanical, hydraulic, and electronic technologies considered an asset
* Customer\-focused attitude
* Fluent in English and Hindi language will be an advantage
* Excellent communication and coordination skills
* Strong organizational and project management skills
* Strong negotiation, facilitation, conflict management skills and the ability to professionally interact with team members
* Experience or knowledge of CRM, ERP, CPQ systems
* Sales attitude and capacity to judge business requirements
* Good knowledge of all MS Office applications
* Logical thinking capabilities and continuous improvement attitude


 Husky TechnologiesTM offers a competitive compensation and benefits package and excellent opportunities for growth and advancement. We are committed to equal employment opportunity and respect, value and welcome diversity in our workplace. Husky TechnologiesTM also values being a great place to work and strives to maintain a safe workplace. Accordingly, Husky TechnologiesTM conditions all offers of employment on satisfactory completion of background checks. No agency or telephone inquiries please.

c2d466d6.title: Technical Program Manager
c2d466d6.description:
**This role is for one of our clients**
  

Company Name: Tekion
Industry: Software Development
Seniority level: Mid\-Senior level  



Min Experience: 7\+ years



Location: Bengaluru, Chennai



JobType: full\-time



**ABOUT THE ROLE** :



Tekion is redefining automotive retail with a cloud\-native, AI\-native platform serving 1,700\+ dealerships. We are looking for a Technical Program Manager to join our CIO/PMO organization at a pivotal moment, as we accelerate an enterprise\-wide AI transformation. This is not a conventional program management role. You will sit at the intersection of strategy, governance, and execution, shaping how critical transformative programs are run. Reporting into the Director, Technical Program Manager, you will be a key voice in building the PMO function and driving transformation across CIO Organization.


**WHAT YOU WILL DO** :


* Partner directly with the CIO and his leadership team on critical transformation program strategy and delivery
* Build and run program governance structures that scale with Tekion's hyper growth
* Establish and continuously improve sprint cadence, story point estimation, Definition of Done, milestone tracking etc.
* Identify and proactively manage risks, blockers, and escalation paths across complex, multi\-team programs
* Drive structured program rollouts with defined scope, success metrics, and dependency management
* Produce C\-suite facing deliverables: program status decks, OKR scorecards, quarterly business narratives, and business proposals
* Define and track PMO KPIs: delivery velocity, capacity utilization, and quality indicators
* Build and maintain dashboards in Jira, Confluence, and other AI tools for real\-time program visibility
* Champion PMO maturity across teams\- standardizing processes, governance frameworks, and reporting cadences


 **WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR** :


* 7\+ years of technical program management experience, with demonstrated ownership of complex, cross\-functional technical programs
* 2\-4 years of management consulting experience preferred at a recognized firm, with strong executive\-facing communication and structured problem\-solving skills
* Prior experience embedded in a PMO within a multinational company, you have operated across geographies, time zones, and cross functional teams
* Strong written and verbal communication skills with ability to present to senior leadership team
* Proven track record delivering programs in enterprise technology environments (GTM, Finance, Data/AI, or similar)
* Proficiency with Jira, Confluence, and Agile/PDLC delivery frameworks
* Well versed with AI LLM models and building skills/agents
**About the company**
---------------------


Tekion is redefining automotive retail with an end\-to\-end, AI\-native platform purpose\-built for the industry. With AI built into every workflow, Tekion delivers intelligent automation, real\-time insights, and advanced decision support—driving measurable efficiency, revenue, and modern consumer.
### **Must\-have skills**



Program Management, program development


### **Good\-to\-have skills**



Jira, Confluence, Artificial Intelligence



We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

b03e6174.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
b03e6174.description:
WHAT YOU WILL DO
 



  





 We are looking for a highly execution\-focused Technical Program Manager (TPM) with a strong technical background who can effectively partner with engineering teams and drive cross\-functional program execution. This is not a generalist project management role — we are specifically looking for someone who understands technology, engineering workflows, sprint execution, and can actively collaborate with developers on technical deliverables.
 



  





 We also use AI extensively in our work \- if you’re keen to work with an AI Native company and use AI extensively in your own work, we are the right company for you. 
 



  





 In this role you would:
 


* Drive end\-to\-end execution of technology development across engineering teams.
* Work closely with developers, product managers, and leadership during sprint planning and execution.
* Facilitate Agile execution including sprint planning, stand\-ups, retrospectives, and backlog grooming.
* Understand technical architecture, engineering workflows, and code\-level discussions to effectively communicate with developers.
* Ensure alignment between product requirements and engineering implementation.
* Maintain clear documentation for project status, timelines, and stakeholder updates.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to ensure smooth release and deployment cycles.



  





  REQUIREMENTS
 



  




* 5–6 years of experience as a Technical Program Manager or Engineering Program Manager
* Strong technical background with prior exposure to software development or engineering environments.
* Ability to understand code, technical architecture, APIs, and engineering discussions.
* Hands\-on experience working with Agile/Scrum methodologies.
* Strong understanding of sprint management, story tracking, backlog prioritization, and release planning.
* Experience working closely with engineering teams in fast\-paced product organizations.
* Strong stakeholder management and communication skills.
* Familiarity with tools like Jira, Confluence, Slack, GitHub, or similar project management tools.
* Ability to manage multiple parallel technical initiatives with strong attention to detail.



  





 ABOUT RIA
 



  





 RIA is an AI\-first insurance holding company dedicated to building and transforming the future of the insurance ecosystem. Inspired by the Berkshire/Fairfax model, we leverage cutting\-edge AI to create and scale insurance businesses. 
 



  





 Our mission is to redefine the insurance landscape by building AI\-Native businesses that address unmet needs of customers and drive innovation across the insurance value chain.
 



  





 Symphony is our Vertical AI Platform for insurance and healthcare, which can be used for cutting edge decisioning, automation, and data orchestration across the health and insurance value chain.  
 



  





 WHY JOIN US
 



 We’re building the foundation of our team right now, and are looking for ambitious team members to join us and increase with us. The work environment is fast\-paced and you would make a clear impact! 
 



  





 You’ll partner with a stellar leadership team from IIT Kanpur, Kellogg, MIT Sloan, IIT Guwahati, and the University of Michigan. The team has also worked at companies such as McKinsey, Goldman Sachs, Niva Bupa, Acko, Care, ICICI Prudential, etc.
 



  





 We’re a well\-funded company, which has raised capital from top VCs, global insurers, and prominent Indian family offices. 
 



  





 APPLY
 



  





 Email your resume to sakshi.gupta@ria.insure with the subject: Senior Technical Program Manager

0485c0a7.title: Technical Program Manager
0485c0a7.description:
**This role is for one of our clients**
 Company Name: Tekion
   

  

 Industry: Software Development
   

  

 Seniority level: Mid\-Senior level
   

  

 Min Experience: 7\+ years
   

  

 Location: Bengaluru, Chennai
   

  

 JobType: full\-time
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.
   

  

**ABOUT THE ROLE** 
 :
   

  

 Tekion is redefining automotive retail with a cloud\-native, AI\-native platform serving 1,700\+ dealerships. We are looking for a Technical Program Manager to join our CIO/PMO organization at a pivotal moment, as we accelerate an enterprise\-wide AI transformation. This is not a conventional program management role. You will sit at the intersection of strategy, governance, and execution, shaping how critical transformative programs are run. Reporting into the Director, Technical Program Manager, you will be a key voice in building the PMO function and driving transformation across CIO Organization.
   

  

**WHAT YOU WILL DO** 
 :
   

  

  

* Partner directly with the CIO and his leadership team on critical transformation program strategy and delivery
* Build and run program governance structures that scale with Tekion's hyper growth
* Establish and continuously improve sprint cadence, story point estimation, Definition of Done, milestone tracking etc.
* Identify and proactively manage risks, blockers, and escalation paths across complex, multi\-team programs
* Drive structured program rollouts with defined scope, success metrics, and dependency management
* Produce C\-suite facing deliverables: program status decks, OKR scorecards, quarterly business narratives, and business proposals
* Define and track PMO KPIs: delivery velocity, capacity utilization, and quality indicators
* Build and maintain dashboards in Jira, Confluence, and other AI tools for real\-time program visibility
* Champion PMO maturity across teams\- standardizing processes, governance frameworks, and reporting cadences


**WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR** 
 :
   

  

  

* 7\+ years of technical program management experience, with demonstrated ownership of complex, cross\-functional technical programs
* 2\-4 years of management consulting experience preferred at a recognized firm, with strong executive\-facing communication and structured problem\-solving skills
* Prior experience embedded in a PMO within a multinational company, you have operated across geographies, time zones, and cross functional teams
* Strong written and verbal communication skills with ability to present to senior leadership team
* Proven track record delivering programs in enterprise technology environments (GTM, Finance, Data/AI, or similar)
* Proficiency with Jira, Confluence, and Agile/PDLC delivery frameworks
* Well versed with AI LLM models and building skills/agents


**About The Company**
 Tekion is redefining automotive retail with an end\-to\-end, AI\-native platform purpose\-built for the industry. With AI built into every workflow, Tekion delivers intelligent automation, real\-time insights, and advanced decision support—driving measurable efficiency, revenue, and modern consumer.
   

  

 Must\-have skills
   

  

 Program Management, program development
   

  

 Good\-to\-have skills
   

  

 Jira, Confluence, Artificial Intelligence

ee14ef7d.title: Engineering Program Manager
ee14ef7d.description:
**Company Description**
 Sandiskunderstands how people and businesses consume data and we relentlessly innovate to deliver solutions that enable today’s needs and tomorrow’s next big ideas. With a rich history of groundbreaking innovations in Flash and advanced memory technologies, our solutions have become the beating heart of the digital world we’re living in and that we have the power to shape.
   

  

 Sandiskmeets people and businesses at the intersection of their aspirations and the moment, enabling them to keep moving and pushing possibilityforward. We do this through the balance of our powerhouse manufacturing capabilities and our industry\-leading portfolio of products that are recognized globallyforinnovation, performance and quality.
   

  

 Sandiskhas two facilities recognized by the World EconomicForum as part of the Global Lighthouse Networkforadvanced 4IR innovations. These facilities were also recognized as Sustainability Lighthousesforbreakthroughs in efficient operations. With our global reach, we ensure the global supply chain has access to the Flash memory it needs to keep our world movingforward.
   

  

**Job Description**
 We are seeking an experienced
 **Engineering Program Manager (EPM)** 
 to drive execution excellence across complex ASIC/Product development programs. This role partners closely with ASIC/FPGA, Firmware Engineering, Validation, Architecture, and Cross‑Functional stakeholders to ensure predictable delivery, risk management, and transparent execution across multiple concurrent firmware projects.
   

  

 The ideal candidate brings strong program management fundamentals
 **combined with working knowledge of firmware / Validation/ embedded systems** 
 , enabling effective engagement with engineering teams and leadership.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Program \& Delivery Management**
* Own end‑to‑end project execution for one or more ASIC/FPGA/Validation programs, from planning through release.
* Build and maintain integrated project plans covering development, validation, integration, and release milestones.
* Drive milestone tracking, dependency management, and timely escalation of risks and issues.
* Ensure delivery commitments are met in terms of schedule, scope, and quality.


**Execution Tracking \& Reporting**
* Establish and maintain execution dashboards using JIRA, dashboards, EasyBI, SmartSheets, or similar tools. Hands on experience with AI based reporting/dashboard tools will be a plus
* Track sprint execution, feature progress, defect trends, validation readiness, and release health.
* Prepare clear, concise management summaries for senior leadership reviews.
* Ensure action items from reviews and interlocks are tracked to closure.


**Stakeholder \& Cross** 
**‑** 
**Functional Coordination**
* Act as the primary execution interface between ASIC, Firmware Engineering, Validation, Hardware, System, Product, and Operations teams.
* Drive regular interlocks, syncs, and reviews to align on priorities, risks, and mitigation plans.
* Facilitate effective communication across geographically distributed teams.


**Process \& Operational Excellence**
* Support adoption of Agile / Scrum like execution models within firmware teams.
* Help standardize execution practices, reporting formats, and release readiness criteria.
* Identify execution gaps and continuously improve planning, tracking, and reporting mechanisms.


**Budget \& Resource Tracking**
* Support budget consolidation, spend tracking, and forecasting for firmware programs.
* Track contractor/vendor engagement, PO execution, and alignment with financial plans.
* Ensure timely execution of staffing and resource requests


**Qualifications**
**Key Skills**
* Engineering Program Management
* ASIC/Product Development Lifecycle Awareness
* JIRA, Dashboards, EasyBI, SmartSheets, MS Project
* Agile / Scrum Execution
* Risk \& Dependency Management
* Stakeholder Management
* Executive Communication \& Reporting
* Budget \& Spend Tracking


**Required Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field.
* 8\+ years of experience in Engineering Program Management, Project Management, or PMO roles, preferably supporting firmware, embedded, or systems teams.
* Strong hands‑on experience with JIRA, dashboards, and project tracking tools.
* Solid understanding of Agile / Scrum methodologies, sprint planning, and execution tracking.
* Excellent communication, documentation, and presentation skills.
* Proven ability to manage multiple stakeholders and drive alignment in ambiguous environments.
* Experience supporting firmware validation, integration, or release cycles.
* Familiarity with build \& release tools and firmware execution metrics.
* Strong conflict resolution and people skills, with the ability to drive teams toward shared goals without direct authority.


**Additional Information**
 Sandisk thrives on the power and potential of diversity. As a global company, we believe the most effective way to embrace the diversity of our customers and communities is to mirror it from within. We believe the fusion of various perspectives results in the best outcomes for our employees, our company, our customers, and the world around us. We are committed to an inclusive environment where every individual can thrive through a sense of belonging, respect and contribution.
   

  

 Sandisk is committed to offering opportunities to applicants with disabilities and ensuring all candidates can successfully navigate our careers website and our hiring process. Please contact us atjobs.accommodations@sandisk.comto advise us of your accommodation request. In your email, please include a description of the specific accommodation you are requesting as well as the job title and requisition number of the position for which you are applying.

92741d9a.title: Technical Program Manager, AI Garage
92741d9a.description:
**Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor's degree in a technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 8 years of experience in program management.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* 8 years of experience managing cross\-functional or cross\-team projects.
* Experience in leading Agile transformations, with a track record of coaching and upskilling less mature engineering teams in Agile delivery and ceremonies.
* Experience managing the unique complexities and fast\-paced lifecycle of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) software development projects.
* Experience in helping teams measure and improve operational excellence, product excellence, and accessibility.
* Strong problem\-solving, negotiation, and organizational skills.


**About The Job**
 A problem isn’t truly solved until it’s solved for all. That’s why Googlers build products that help create opportunities for everyone, whether down the street or across the globe. As a Technical Program Manager at Google, you’ll use your technical expertise to lead complex, multi\-disciplinary projects from start to finish. You’ll work with stakeholders to plan requirements, identify risks, manage project schedules, and communicate clearly with cross\-functional partners across the company. You're equally comfortable explaining your team's analyses and recommendations to executives as you are discussing the technical tradeoffs in product development with engineers.
   

  

 The Core team builds the technical foundation behind Google’s flagship products. We are owners and advocates for the underlying design elements, developer platforms, product components, and infrastructure at Google. These are the essential building blocks for excellent, safe, and coherent experiences for our users and drive the pace of innovation for every developer. We look across Google’s products to build central solutions, break down technical barriers and strengthen existing systems. As the Core team, we have a mandate and a unique opportunity to impact important technical decisions across the company.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Own and drive centralized planning and execution of complex, cross\-functional, multi\-pillar engineering efforts.
* Establish and run programs in an Agile manner. Demonstrate a deep understanding of Agile ceremonies and a proven ability to lead, mature, and transition developing software teams into highly efficient Agile ways of working.
* Establish governance over prioritization decisions to ensure alignment with key success metrics and structures for execution across multiple organizations.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with senior\-level stakeholders (technical and non\-technical) across teams, ensuring alignment and executive buy\-in.
* Use judgment to build consensus, drive projects, schedule, plans, execution, and communication across organizations.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

11cc13e4.title: Sr. Program Manager
11cc13e4.description:
We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Program Manager to lead and oversee the development of automotive product line (Preferably IVI). The Program Manager will be responsible for coordinating cross\-functional teams, managing timelines, and ensuring the successful delivery of innovative embedded products that meet safety, regulatory, and performance standards. Key Responsibilities:
 



**Project Planning \& Execution:** 




 Lead the planning, execution, and delivery of automotive embedded systems projects from concept to production including Systems and SW process areas/ subsystems, ensuring alignment with customer requirements, timelines, and budgets.·
 



**Team Leadership:** 




 Manage a multidisciplinary team of engineers, designers, and testers to deliver high\-quality embedded system for automotive products (e.g., IVI,).
 



**Stakeholder Management:** 




 Act as the primary point of contact for internal teams and external stakeholders, including customers, suppliers, and regulatory bodies. Ensure clear communication on project status, risks, and opportunities.· Risk Management: Identify, assess, and mitigate risks throughout the project lifecycle, ensuring compliance with automotive industry standards (such as ASPICE, ISO 26262, and cybersecurity).
 



**Resource Allocation:** 
 Allocate and manage resources efficiently to meet project deliverables, adjust strategies as needed to address challenges in the project lifecycle.
 



**Documentation \& Compliance:** 
 Oversee project documentation, ensure adherence to regulatory and safety standards (e.g., functional safety standards, cybersecurity guidelines).·
 




**Quality Assurance:** 
 Work closely with the QA team to ensure that all deliverables meet industry and customer standards, from early development stages to final validation. Generate metrics as needed.· Budget Management: Monitor project budgets, control costs, and ensure the project remains financially viable. 
 



**Required Qualifications:** 
 · Education: Bachelor's degree in Electronics Engineering, Computer Engineering, or a related field.·
 



**Experience** 
 : 15\+ years of experience in embedded product development in automotive industry, with at least 3\+ years in a program management role within the automotive industry.·
 



**Technical Expertise:** 




 o Strong understanding of Systems and Software development including design and environmental aspects.o Strong understanding of IVI systems.
 



 o Strong understanding of HMI display sub systems
 



 o Good experience with Middleware and Application Software
 



 o Strong understanding of any of Linux/Android/QNX
 



 o Experience with Hypervisors is preferable.o Strong Knowledge in technical and commercial Prposal submissions.o Strong understanding of automotive embedded systems, including microcontrollers, real\-time operating systems (RTOS), communication protocols (e.g., CAN, LIN, Ethernet).o Familiarity with automotive safety standards such as ISO 26262, and process such as ASPICE.· Program Management Skills:o Proficiency in program management tools (e.g., Azzure, Microsoft Project, Polarion, Jira, PPT, Excel, Power BI).o Knowledge of Agile and Waterfall methodologies.o Certification in PMP or PRINCE2 is preferred.

bfdf213d.title: Pre-Silicon Technical Program Manager
bfdf213d.description:
**WHAT YOU DO AT AMD CHANGES EVERYTHING**
 At AMD, our mission is to build great products that accelerate next\-generation computing experiences—from AI and data centers, to PCs, gaming and embedded systems. Grounded in a culture of innovation and collaboration, we believe real progress comes from bold ideas, human ingenuity and a shared passion to create something extraordinary. When you join AMD, you’ll discover the real differentiator is our culture. We push the limits of innovation to solve the world’s most important challenges—striving for execution excellence, while being direct, humble, collaborative, and inclusive of diverse perspectives. Join us as we shape the future of AI and beyond.
 **Together, we advance your career.**
**Program Manager 1**
**The Role**
 We are looking for an experienced program manager with strong analytical, problem\-solving and risk management skills in
 **Pre\-Silicon program management** 
 organization. Ability to work efficiently and manage effective relationships in a cross\-functional organization to meet program commitments for successful Si tape outs. Must be self\-directed and able to work in a dynamic environment.
   

  

 This program manager will drive SoC programs through execution to Si tape out. This involves working with IP design, verification, SoC integration and software development teams to ensure that program requirements and scope are achieved. The program manager is required to work with these teams to resolve program roadblocks efficiently and to meet program schedule.
   

  

**The Person**
 The right candidate will have solid knowledge of program management and a strong track record of delivering complex programs. Besides being able to work cross\-functionally, this program manager needs to have good interpersonal skills.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Plan and execute programs focusing on quality and deadlines
* Drives completion of all required deliverables, with a focus on meeting established deadlines
* Creates and maintains project management artifacts such as schedule, resource, risk and issues logs
* Provides unique views of project status updates and facilitates cross development team dependencies and communications
* Identify action or mitigation plans for issues or risks that arise during the project lifecycle
* Collaborates with cross\-functional teams to identify areas that require special attention or escalations to identify corrective actions
* Collect, analyze, organize and publish project status
* Strong self\-motivator, with a sense of urgency when needed and strong crisis management skills


**Preferred Experience**
* Proven Technical Program Management experience in dynamic and competitive industry, particularly within Engineering based organizations
* RTL design, physical implementation or circuit verification experience is desirable
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills
* Ability to build relationships and work effectively as a self\-starter and as part of a team
* Flexible working schedule to manage global program execution team (Asia and North America emphasis)
* Strong knowledge of productivity and project tools including Jira, Confluence, Microsoft Office Suite
* PMP certification is a plus


**Academic Credentials**
* Master’s or Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science or Electrical Engineering is desired


*Benefits offered are described:* 
 AMD benefits at a glance.
   

  

*AMD does not accept unsolicited resumes from headhunters, recruitment agencies, or fee\-based recruitment services. AMD and its subsidiaries are equal opportunity, inclusive employers and will consider all applicants without regard to age, ancestry, color, marital status, medical condition, mental or physical disability, national origin, race, religion, political and/or third\-party affiliation, sex, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity, military or veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We encourage applications from all qualified candidates and will accommodate applicants’ needs under the respective laws throughout all stages of the recruitment and selection process.*
*AMD may use Artificial Intelligence to help screen, assess or select applicants for this position. AMD’s “Responsible AI Policy” is available here.*
*This posting is for an existing vacancy.*

834f4ded.title: Presales Consultant
834f4ded.description:
**Company Description** 




  





 AI CERTs® is a global certification platform committed to bridging the skills gap by offering role\-based and vendor\-aligned certifications in AI and blockchain technologies. Founded in New York City, our mission is to certify one billion professionals worldwide, ensuring they are AI\-ready, job\-ready, and future\-ready. We collaborate with a robust global network of academic and industry leaders to create a cutting\-edge learning ecosystem that meets real\-world demands. At AI CERTs®, we are shaping the future of work by transforming potential into expertise and driving lifelong learning for all.
 



  





**Role Description** 




  





 This contract\-based remote Sales Development Representative (Corporate Sales) role involves generating and qualifying leads, building and maintaining strong client relationships, and communicating the value of AI CERTs® certifications to prospective customers. You will work closely with the sales and marketing teams, conduct outreach activities through various channels, and schedule meetings with potential clients. The role also involves maintaining accurate records of interactions in CRM systems and meeting or exceeding targets to drive business growth.
 



 Salary : 60k
 



**Qualifications** 




  




* Strong prospecting, lead generation, and cold outreach skills
* Proficiency in relationship\-building and client communication
* Familiarity with CRM tools and managing sales pipelines
* Understanding of the AI and blockchain certification landscape is a plus
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills with attention to detail
* Ability to work independently in a remote environment
* Goal\-oriented mindset with a focus on meeting or exceeding sales targets
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent work experience in Sales, Marketing, or related field

7cf68380.title: Lead – Presales & Sales Operations
7cf68380.description:
Job Description: Lead – Presales \& Sales Operations (BFSI \& Cross\-Practice)
 



 Role Overview
 



 We are seeking a high\-caliber, energetic, and highly organized Lead – Presales \& Sales Operations to act as the strategic connective tissue between our Banking, Financial Services, and Insurance (BFSI) vertical, our core technical practices (Data Science, Data Engineering, and Digital Engineering etc), and our delivery teams.
 



 This is a unique, dual\-hatted role designed for an "Operations Czar" who thrives on structural organization and operational rigor, while possessing the strategic acumen to drive high\-impact presales activities. You will lead staffing alignment in coordination with our Resource Management (RM) team, manage inbound lead qualifications, and quarterback the creation of compelling executive meeting decks and Request for Proposal (RFP) responses.
 



 Key Responsibilities
 



 1\. Sales Operations \& Staffing "Czar"
 


* Resource \& Staffing Management: Partner closely with the Resource Management (RM) and Delivery teams to manage resource allocation, utilization metrics, and pipeline staffing forecasting across the DS, DE, and Digital Engineering practices.
* Demand\-to\-Capacity Alignment: Track upcoming project pipelines and proactively align bench/available talent to incoming BFSI projects, preventing bottlenecks and accelerating onboarding times.
* Process Optimization: Establish, streamline, and maintain internal sales operations processes, ensuring CRM hygiene (sales pipeline updates, staffing logs, and win\-loss records) is flawless.
* Cross\-Practice Coordination: Act as the primary operational point of contact facilitating communications between practice technical leaders and the BFSI vertical business unit.



 2\. Presales Enablement \& Bid Management
 


* RFP/RFI Leadership: Quarterback the end\-to\-end response process for RFPs, RFIs, and RFQs. Coordinate with Practice Heads to gather technical estimates, architecture diagrams, and case studies, translating them into cohesive, winning proposals.
* Executive Presentation Design: Design, write, and refine high\-impact, client\-ready pitch decks, capability presentations, and workshop materials for executive clients within the BFSI domain.
* Solution Structuring Support: Help translate complex technical solutions (involving AI/ML, data pipelines, and cloud application engineering) into clear, business\-value\-driven narratives tailored to financial institutions.
* Collateral Asset Library: Build and maintain a reusable repository of capability decks, boilerplate answers, architecture templates, and case studies.



 3\. Inbound Lead \& Pipeline Management (20%)
 


* Triage \& Qualification: Serve as the initial gatekeeper for all inbound leads. Evaluate incoming opportunities against our qualifying criteria (deal size, technical alignment, and strategic value).
* Lead Routing: Rapidly route qualified inbound leads to the appropriate sales executive or practice lead, ensuring extremely fast response times.
* Metrics \& Reporting: Monitor conversion rates of inbound leads, preparing weekly and monthly pipeline health reports for the BFSI and practice leadership teams.



 Required Skills \& Experience
 



 Experience:
 


* 12–16 years of experience in Sales Operations, Presales, Bid Management, or Business Analysis within a technology consulting, professional services, or IT services firm.
* Experience working directly with or within the BFSI vertical is highly preferred.
* Broad understanding of high\-level concepts across Data Science (AI/ML), Data Engineering (Cloud/Data Warehousing), and Digital Engineering (App Dev/API Integration).



 Core Competencies:
 


* Operational Rigor: Strong project management skills; ability to manage complex staffing sheets, project schedules, and cross\-functional teams under tight deadlines.
* Executive Communication: Exceptional written and verbal communication skills. You must be able to write clearly and design presentations that resonate with executive\-level corporate buyers.
* Collaboration: A natural relationship builder who can exert influence without direct authority across busy technical practice leads and highly demanding sales leaders.
* Tool Proficiency: Mastery of presentation tools (PowerPoint/Google Slides), CRM platforms (Salesforce/HubSpot), and project/resource management software (Jira, or similar RM tools).



 What We Offer
 


* A highly visible role with direct exposure to executive and practice leadership.
* The opportunity to shape a critical, evolving cross\-practice operational function.
* A dynamic, collaborative culture at the intersection of cutting\-edge technology and enterprise finance.

7ee8008d.title: Manager - Presales Solution Architect
7ee8008d.description:
Job Title : Manager \- Presales Solution Architect
   

  

 Perform a Presales Solution analysis on large Total Contract Value (TCV) opportunities.
   

  

 Develop Business Cases based on information that is achievable and in line with market benchmarks.
   

  

 Collaborate with clients to build Business Cases customized to their business.
   

  

 Collaborate with Program Managers, Solution Architects and other Client\-centric Leaders on deal shaping activities.
   

  

 Ensure deals are solutioned and priced to be deliverable, profitable, and winnable.
   

  

 Obtain client feedback on price and solution to inform best practices.
   

  

 Improve the Competitive Solutioning capabilities, tools, \& processes.

870b9f53.title: Technical Solutions Consultant, PDM-PLM
870b9f53.description:
Note: By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following:
 **Bengaluru, Karnataka, India; Hyderabad, Telangana, India** 
 .
 **Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 3 years of experience troubleshooting technical issues for internal/external partners or customers.
* Experience in either system design or reading code (e.g., Java, C\+\+, Python).


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Master’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Business, or related field.
* 5 years of Siemens teamcenter experience and 1 year of experience in technical leadership.
* Proficient in ITK, Java, ReactJS, JavaScript, with experience in developing extensions, workflow handlers, and services.
* In\-depth knowledge of PLM servers/APIs, RDBMS, and infrastructure scaling frameworks, and adept at navigating ambiguity, fostering creativity, and driving operational efficiency.
* Strong problem\-solving, leadership, and communication skills for effective global team collaboration.
* Expertise in cloud platforms, preferably Google Cloud Platform (GCP), for deploying and scaling PLM solutions.


**About The Job**
 As a Technical Solutions Consultant, you will be responsible for the technical relationship of our largest advertising clients and/or product partners. You will lead cross\-functional teams in Engineering, Sales and Product Management to leverage emerging technologies for our external clients/partners. From concept design and testing to data analysis and support, you will oversee the technical execution and business operations of Google's online advertising platforms and/or product partnerships.
   

  

 You will be able to balance business and partner needs with technical constraints, develop innovative, cutting edge solutions and act as a partner and consultant to those you are working with. You will also be able to build tools and automate products, oversee the technical execution and business operations of Google's partnerships, as well as develop product strategy and prioritize projects and resources.
   

  

 As a Technical Solution Consultant you will help refine and grow the capabilities of current Product Data Management (PDM) and Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) systems, driving continuous improvement to meet our engineering needs. You will design, develop and sustain Product Lifecycle Management (PLM), New Product Introduction (NPI) and supply chain related application systems.
   

  

 In this role, you will also promote best practices and internal business processes. You will be responsive and able to adapt quickly to succeed within an open collaborative peer environment. You will work in a data driven environment, have a desire to drive change, and are excited by the opportunity to analyze systematic issues and implement solutions to challenging problems.
   

  

 Google's mission is to organize the world's information and make it universally accessible and useful. Our Devices \& Services team combines the best of Google AI, Software, and Hardware to create radically helpful experiences for users. We research, design, and develop new technologies and hardware to make our user's interaction with computing faster, seamless, and more powerful. Whether finding new ways to capture and sense the world around us, advancing form factors, or improving interaction methods, the Devices \& Services team is making people's lives better through technology.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Architect and optimize Siemens team center solutions, managing the configuration, installation, maintenance, and ongoing support of teamcenter PLM application, including integrations with CAD applications.
* Manage, optimize and support cloud infrastructure for teamcenter, leveraging GCP technologies to ensure scalability, high availability, and security compliance.
* Collaborate with global teams to deliver tailored solutions, providing implementation and configuration expertise.
* Design robust application architectures, including microservices and scalable frameworks, while aligning with development best practices.
* Author and review technical documentation, drive design/code reviews, and identify opportunities to enhance functionality with cloud technologies.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .
