50f7a8e9.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
50f7a8e9.description:
**Overview**
 The Windows Enterprise and Security (ENS) team is building a new product and engineering presence in Microsoft's India Development Center (IDC) to deliver the foundational Windows capabilities that enterprises depend on every day. Modern Device Management (MDM) is how commercial customers deploy, configure, secure, and operate Windows at scale, and is a key partner surface for Intune and the broader Microsoft 365 management ecosystem.
   

  

 As the
 **Senior Technical Program Manage** 
 r for Windows Manageability / MDM, you will drive product strategy and execution for the Windows MDM platform and device provisioning stack in partnership with Intune, which owns the first\-party management cloud service. The platform also supports third\-party MDM services and OEM device provisioning via local provisioning packages. You will engage directly with enterprise IT admins and IT leadership, and translate customer needs into roadmap and feature decisions spanning the Windows client, services, and cloud control plane.
   

  

 This is an individual\-contributor role based in Bangalore alongside the broader ENS IDC team.
   

  

 Microsoft's mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more. As employees we come together with a growth mindset, innovate to empower others, and collaborate to realize our shared goals. Each day we build on our values of respect, integrity, and accountability to create a culture of inclusion where everyone can thrive at work and beyond.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Drive the product roadmap and execution for the Windows MDM platform and device provisioning stack, including policy deployment, device lifecycle, configuration / state enforcement, and Intune scenarios \-\- in partnership with the Intune team, which owns the first\-party cloud service.
* Partner with Software Engineering across client, service, and cloud control plane teams to design and ship end\-to\-end enterprise scenarios (onboarding to policy to compliance to remediation).
* Engage directly with enterprise IT admins, IT leadership, and field teams; communicate the Windows manageability value proposition (security, compliance, cost reduction, modern management) and run customer feedback loops into product requirements.
* Drive continuous improvement of platform fundamentals \-\- security, performance, automation, quality, and validation \-\- including investments that improve Intune service scalability.
* Define success criteria, ship plans, and data\-informed metrics (policy success rates, deployment friction, usage) for cross\-functional projects, and ensure alignment across organizations.
* Partner with support, field, and engineering teams on customer issues and feedback, and represent Windows manageability in cross\-team and partner forums.


**Qualifications**
**Required Qualifications:**
* Bachelor's Degree AND 4\+ years experience in engineering, product/technical program management, data analysis, or product development.
+ OR equivalent experience.

* 2\+ years of experience managing cross\-functional and/or cross\-team projects.
* Experience defining and shipping enterprise software, manageability, device management, or platform capabilities.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Bachelor's Degree AND 8\+ years of experience in engineering, product/technical program management, data analysis.
+ OR product development.
+ OR equivalent experience.

* 6\+ years of experience managing cross\-functional and/or cross\-team projects.
* Hands\-on experience with Windows MDM, Group Policy, provisioning, update/compliance flows, Autopilot, or Intune (or an equivalent MDM platform).
* Experience driving enterprise customer feedback loops into product requirements and translating customer pain points into shipped product changes.
* 1\+ year(s) of experience reading and/or writing code (e.g., sample documentation, product demos).


 \#W\+DJOBS
   

  

 \#WDJOBS
   

  

 This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.
   

  

 Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance with religious accommodations and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application process, read more about
 **requesting accommodations.**

27b0fd64.title: Technical Program Manager
27b0fd64.location: Gautam Buddha Nagar, Uttar Pradesh, India
27b0fd64.description:
**About Us**
 CLOUDSUFI, a Google Cloud Premier Partner, is a global leading provider of data\-driven digital transformation across cloud\-based enterprises. With a global presence and focus on Software \& Platforms, Life sciences and Healthcare, Retail, CPG, financial services and supply chain, CLOUDSUFI is positioned to meet customers where they are in their data monetization journey.
   

  

**Our Values**
 We are a passionate and empathetic team that prioritizes human values. Our purpose is to elevate the quality of lives for our family, customers, partners and the community.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Statement**
 CLOUDSUFI is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. All qualified candidates receive consideration for employment without regard to race, colour, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation and national origin status. We provide equal opportunities in employment, advancement, and all other areas of our workplace. Please explore more at https://www.cloudsufi.com/
   

  

**What We Are Looking For**
 CLOUDSUFI is seeking a
 **Technical Program Manager** 
 for client services. The program manager is responsible for all client interfaces within the assigned project scope. He/she will work together with leads in the program/project to create an execution plan in consultation with the customer stakeholders and drive the execution with the team with people, process, and structure. Some of the key KPIs for this role are Gross Margin, Customer Advocacy (NPS), ESAT (Employee Satisfaction), Penetration (Net New), and Target Revenue Realization.
   

  

**Required Experience**
* Minimum 10\+ years of experience in the IT industry with a focus on solutions for Digital Transformations and Industry 4\.0
* Experience in managing digital transformation programs for mid\-large organizations with a focus on data, AI, IoT, robotics, and GenAI, with a proven track record of delivering projects on time, cost and quality.
* Hands\-on experience in open\-source software development and cloud\-native technologies, especially on the GCP tech stack
* Experience of delivery projects in Middle East region, especially in Saudi Arabia
* Excellent stakeholder management, ability to connect and present to senior leadership team of client
* Must have performed program delivery for a large program of size of more than USD 2 million annually and grown the account through delivery excellence
* A customer\-centric approach, which includes an understanding of expectations/prioritization of customer needs.
* Must have experience in setting up large teams and work transitioning from onsite teams/other vendors in a structured and predictable manner
* Hands\-on experience in agile project management. Must be conversant in performing all Agile Ceremonies: daily Scrum calls, Retro and Demo meetings, and Velocity calculation
* Knowledge of the SAFE Agile framework is an added advantage
* Experience in strategic planning risk management and change management
* Proficiency in project management software tools
* Should be well versed with current technology trends in IT solutions, e.g. Cloud Platform development, DevOps, low\-code solutions, and Automation
* Manufacturing or Oil \& Gas domain knowledge will be a definite advantage


**Job Responsibilities**
* Client delivery assurance: collaborate with all delivery stakeholders involved to ensure fulfillment of all commitments to the client
* Bring out technical/operational challenges and risks during execution and develop an action plan for mitigation and aversion of identified risks
* Comply with development processes, documentation templates, and tools prescribed by CLOUDSUFI or its clients
* Work with other teams and Program Managers in the organization and assist them with an estimation of tasks for proposals
* Contribute towards the creation of knowledge repository, reusable templates, reports, and dashboards
* Assign tasks, track deliverables, and remove impediments to team members
* Prepare Progress Reports and Dashboards for monitoring project progress and report to internal and external stakeholders
* Evaluate and assess risks for the project
* Create and maintain delivery best practices and audit the implementation of processes and best practices in the organization
* Provide feedback to team members and be a coach and mentor for them
* Participate in organization development activities from time to time\-Interviews, CSR/employee engagement activities, participation in business events and conferences, and implementation of new policies, systems, and procedures as decided by the Management team


**Non\-technical/behavioral Competencies Required**
* Must have worked with large customers in the Middle East region, particularly Saudi Arabia
* Written communication, technical articulation, listening, and presentation skills (8/10 minimum)
* Should have good conflict management
* Should have superior persuasive and negotiation skills
* Should have demonstrated effective task prioritization, time management, and internal/external stakeholder management skills
* Should be a quick learner, self\-starter, go\-getter and team player
* Should have experience working under stringent deadlines in a Matrix organization structure
* Should have demonstrated appreciable Organizational Citizenship Behavior (OCB) in past organizations

b3dbc5d1.title: Technical Program Manager 3
b3dbc5d1.description:
**The group you’ll be a part of**
 In the Global Products Group, we are dedicated to excellence in the design and engineering of Lam’s etch and deposition products. We drive innovation to ensure our cutting\-edge solutions are helping to solve the biggest challenges in the semiconductor industry.
   

  

**The impact you’ll make**
 As a Technical Program Manager at Lam, you are not just overseeing projects – you’re orchestrating breakthroughs in support of \[insert strategic initiative]. You’ll lead cross\-functional teams through successful project execution blending your technical excellence with strategic planning to deliver new or upgraded products. Your role is vital, owning technical projects from initiation through delivery using your expertise in planning, directing, and monitoring schedules and budget.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Over\-see the optimization or creation of technical product offerings, processes, or programs, developing project plans, aligning teams, managing risk, and driving projects through release.
* Take ownership and accountability for the success of projects and cross\-functional teams to ensure program schedules, performance metrics, and delivery meets business requirements on time and within budget.
* Partner with stakeholders to understand process and system requirements, and deliver enhancements based on a changing technology landscape.
* Participate in Continuous Improvement projects from inception to impactful results.
* Perform data collection and statistical analysis, and report results to inform program schedules and deliverables.
* Influence cross\-functional stakeholders to continuously improve the process and inspire alignment.
* Deliver change management for programs that are sustainable and maintains long\-term success.
* Successfully navigate multiple projects in a dynamic environment.


**Minimum Qualifications**
**Who we’re looking for**
* Bachelor’s degree with 5\+ years of experience; or Master’s degree with 3\+ years’ experience; or a PhD with no previous professional experience; or equivalent experience.
* 3\+ years of continuous improvement or technical program management.
* Experience guiding cross\-functional teams and demonstrating influence skills to deliver results.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills with the ability to present to audiences at all levels in the Company.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience in or knowledge of Semiconductor fabrication, Semiconductor Equipment Operations, or related industries is a plus.
* Knowledge of E\&O processes, Change orders, repair/refurbishment processes.
* Knowledge of Quality Problem solving 8D methodology.
* Knowledge of Program Management methods and experience in Product Development \& Release (PDR) procedures.
* Relevant project management certifications such as PMP, CAPM, Scrum Master, or PRINCE2\.
* Experience in Lean Six Sigma methodology or certification (Green Belt, Black Belt) is a plus.
* Experience with Agile and/or Waterfall project methodologies.
* Familiarity with project management software and tools including MS Project, QuickBase, Office Timeline, or equivalent.
* Knowledge of Change Management methodologies is a plus.


**Our commitment**
 We believe it is important for every person to feel valued, included, and empowered to achieve their full potential. By bringing unique individuals and viewpoints together, we achieve extraordinary results.
   

  

 Lam Research ("Lam" or the "Company") is an equal opportunity employer. Lam is committed to and reaffirms support of equal opportunity in employment and non\-discrimination in employment policies, practices and procedures on the basis of race, religious creed, color, national origin, ancestry, physical disability, mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, marital status, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth and related medical conditions), gender, gender identity, gender expression, age, sexual orientation, or military and veteran status or any other category protected by applicable federal, state, or local laws. It is the Company's intention to comply with all applicable laws and regulations. Company policy prohibits unlawful discrimination against applicants or employees.
   

  

*Lam offers a variety of work location models based on the needs of each role. Our hybrid roles combine the benefits of on\-site collaboration with colleagues and the flexibility to work remotely and fall into two categories – On\-site Flex and Virtual Flex. ‘On\-site Flex’ you’ll work 3\+ days per week on\-site at a Lam or customer/supplier location, with the opportunity to work remotely for the balance of the week. ‘Virtual Flex’ you’ll work 1\-2 days per week on\-site at a Lam or customer/supplier location, and remotely the rest of the time.*

295068bf.title: Sr. Program Manager, RBS Returns Reduction
295068bf.description:
**Description**
 Amazon strives to be Earth’s most customer\-centric company, where customers can find and discover anything they want to buy online. Retail Business Services (RBS) accelerates Amazon's growth by improving customer and Selling Partner (SP) experiences, while optimizing costs across Stores WW. RBS operates at the intersection of retail, operations, technology, and finance, ensuring Amazon’s systems and processes scale reliably while maintaining a high\-quality customer and selling\-partner experience.
   

  

 Returns Reduction as part of Cost to Serve (CtS) BU is a specialized program within RBS focused on driving down overall Return Rate for both Retail and FBA channels. Returns Reduction Program focuses on Upstream defect elimination with focus on defect identification and defect elimination and partners with System Owners, Category Teams, FC ACES, Finance, CS, and abuse\-related programs to uncover true drivers and remove them systematically. The team builds mechanisms that strengthen upstream defect visibility, and enable consistent governance and contributing directly to improved Free Cash Flow and scalable business growth.
   

  

 This role will focus on identification and prioritization of high\-impact defect opportunities and will own and define the roadmap for elimination of the problem space end to end. They will do this by building trusted partnerships with key stakeholders across technology, finance, operations and earning alignment to pursue defect elimination opportunities and influencing senior leaders through compelling, data\-driven business cases. This role requires an individual who is comfortable in diving deep into complex data sets and presenting strategic recommendations to leadership up to three tiers above level. The candidate will bring strong business and supply chain acumen, a bias for action, and the strategic vision by directly contributing to improved cost to serve performance and driving scalable growth across Amazon Stores worldwide.
   

  

 Why You’ll Love This Role
   

  

* Customer Impact: You’ll lead critical projects that remove defects, improves customer experience and directly influence Amazon’s supply chain cost, driving measurable results.
* Strategic Influence: Collaborate across global teams, including technology, finance, operations to shape strategies that focuses on improving customer satisfaction.
* Data\-Driven Innovation: Leverage analytics to uncover insights and optimize supply chain performance.


 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Deliver Results, Dive Deep: You will be accountable for deep research from the ground up and from customer returns data to identify, execute and eliminate top defect opportunities.
* Ability to Influence: Develop business cases and present them to senior leaders, leveraging data to influence roadmaps and make tradeoffs.
* Earn Trust: Develop partnerships with key stakeholder groups and gain their alignment to pursue defect elimination opportunities; present to leaders of all levels to influence roadmap priorities.
* Financial Collaboration: Partner with finance teams to validate impact on returns, forecast savings and ensure alignment with team's financial goals. Make trade\-offs between short\-term cost reductions and long\-term strategic objectives to maximize financial impact.
* Managing stakeholder communication across multiple lines of business on various project milestones, process changes, escalations, etc.
* Provide ad\-hoc support and analysis to senior leaders on strategy documents and research requests.


 A day in the life
   

  

* Roadmap development: Use advanced analytics tools and anecdotes to identify high impact defect opportunities within Returns space; conduct root cause analysis to validate and develop those use cases, applying judgement to prioritize based on customer impact, value, credibility, availability of solutions.
* Cross\-Functional Leadership: Collaborate with cross\-functional teams across System owning orgs, finance, operations and supply chain to gain alignment on implementation of scalable solutions. Unblock teams to increase speed of delivery and ensure alignment on program goals.
* Senior Leadership Engagement: Communicate effectively with senior leaders, presenting data\-driven insights and recommendations to influence decision\-making. Trusted to present decisions to leaders up to three tiers above level, driving alignment across diverse areas.


**About The Team**
 The RBS is an integral part of Amazon online product lifecycle and buying operations. RBS Return reduction team functioning under CX\-Business unit. The primary responsibility of the RBS return reduction team is to reduce returns that result in negative consumer experiences. This includes identifying the causes of returns and collaborating with the appropriate teams to eliminate defects. Launch tech solutions to 'Find' and 'Fix' for non\-eliminated root causes, or Build scalable tech solutions for Selling Partners for self\-remediation, while refining policies in collaboration with relevant teams.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of working cross functionally with tech and non\-tech teams experience
* 5\+ years of program or project management experience
* 5\+ years of delivering cross functional projects experience
* Experience defining program requirements and using data and metrics to determine improvements


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 2\+ years of driving process improvements experience
* Master's degree, or MBA in business, operations, human resources, adult education, organizational development, instructional design or related field


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- ADCI \- BLR 14 SEZ \- F07
   

  

 Job ID: A10409825

4e886e9e.title: Pre-Sales Consultant
4e886e9e.description:
Pre Sales Consultant
   

  

**Pre Sales Consultant**
 Join us as a
 **Pre\-sales Consultant** 
 on our
 **Sales** 
 team in our
 **Gurgaon** 
 office to get the opportunity to do the best work of your career and make a profound impact in our journey of enabling retail in India.
   

  

**What You’ll Achieve**
 A Pre\-sales Consultant is responsible for helping prospects better understand company software that the customer has purchased and how to use it efficiently.
   

  

**You Will**
* Learn ERP, POS, OMS and other applications as per the training provided.
* Train internal members on specific modules of Software as per requirements.
* Take up Proof of Concept projects to win the confidence of prospects
* Create winning demo strategies
* Identify product gaps with respect to projects and document them. Suggest work\-arounds and process improvements.


**Take this first step towards your dream career and an insane learning path.**
 Every Ginesys team member brings something unique to the table. Here’s what we are looking for with this role:
   

  

**Essential Requirements**
* Must be a self\-starter, comfortable working in a structured but dynamic environment.
* ERP Pre\-sales or implementation experience
* Participation in understanding the functional requirements from clients.
* Analytical skill set, strong presentation skills, ability to interact with any level within an organization.
* Knowledge of accounts
* Open to traveling for project\-related work or pre\-sales.
* Strong interpersonal skills and communication


**Desirable Requirements**
* Good knowledge of Retail


**Benefits**
 We like to think that talent grows at Ginesys and stays at Ginesys. To ensure this, we provide our employees with the best working environment, the latest technology and continuous support. We go out of our way to retain the small business feeling with which we started and stimulate innovation and collaboration through teamwork and our non\-hierarchical approach. We offer competitive salary, and other fantastic perks and benefits, such as:
   

  

* Comprehensive health insurance coverage
* Excellent rewards and recognition policy
* Transparent compensation policy with no unnecessary deduction in CTC
* Annual company off\-site and a variety of events, celebrations throughout the year
* Travelling opportunities between our offices across the country.


**Here’s our story; now tell us yours**
 “Ginesys One” is India’s best omniretail suite backed by Ginesys, the first integrated Retail specific ERP software for online retail, offline retail and distribution. It is the largest Indian company in the retail tech industry catering to both online and offline needs. 1200 \+ brands including (Manyavar, V\-Mart, Skechers) are accelerating their businesses with Ginesys. With a team of 400\+ employees, Ginesys One plans to revolutionise retail by being a single\-stop cloud\-based retail suite.
   

  

 We have a pan India presence with offices in major cities including Gurgaon, Kolkata, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Mumbai \& Goa and are expanding rapidly. We love the challenges of retail and are busy solving them to create a great retail tech suite.
   

  

 Ginesys core mission is to continue to build world\-class internal service capabilities, in a bid to deliver outstanding external service value to customers. We are an ISO\-certified and SOC compliant company having won myriad awards for our innovation and support. For further information, please visit our website http://ginesys.in

99978673.title: GSA Solution Architect
99978673.description:
**About Cognizant Corporate**
 Cognizant Corporate is a global community united by a shared purpose: to make a meaningful impact. We are committed to excellence and driven by outcomes that matter. Collaboration is at the heart of how we work, and our forward\-thinking mindset fuels continuous learning, innovation, and growth.
   

  

 At Cognizant, careers transcend titles. We empower our people to think strategically, inspire others, and lead with purpose – always guided by our core values. Join us in shaping the future of business.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a
 **Deal Solution Architect** 
 , you will play a critical role in driving digital transformation for our clients in India. You will be responsible for architecting winning solutions for large and medium sized deals (USD 25 to 50 million) in both the private and public sectors. This role requires a deep understanding of various technologies, strong collaboration skills, and the ability to navigate complex RFP processes.
   

  

 As a key member of the team, you will collaborate closely with technical experts, delivery partners, commercial teams, legal, finance, contract management teams, and customer stakeholders to develop compelling and competitive solutions. You will have the opportunity to influence strategic deal pursuits, optimize technical and commercial outcomes, and contribute to business growth while working in a dynamic and fast\-paced environment.
   

  

**In This Role, You Will**
* Analyze RFPs and lead QandA sessions with customers alongside technical experts.
* Develop compelling and competitive solutions that align with organizational guidelines and leverage best practices.
* Collaborate effectively with multiple technical teams delivery partners commercial legal finance and contract management teams.
* Manage solution versions integrate components from various technical towers and ensure a cohesive final response.
* Optimize estimations technical solutions and project costs.
* Own the final solution response and ensure its completeness.
* Share effort and cost details with finance for commercial solution development.
* Support the commercial team in deal negotiations and auctions.
* Assist legal contract and delivery teams in drafting Statements of Work (SOWs).
* Communicate deal summaries to leadership and present solutions to internal review boards.
* Defend solutions with customers and manage risks associated with the solution development process.
* Model SLA penalties and analyze commercial risks.
* Design RACI matrices across internal teams partners and customers.
* Report deal unit economics and benchmark against organizational guidelines.
* Embrace our vibrant culture by striving for excellence, focusing on meaningful outcomes, and collaborating effectively. Take ownership, build relationships, and focus on personal growth to drive business strategy and foster an inclusive culture, creating unmatched career opportunities and impactful work.


**What You Must Have To Be Considered**
* Proven experience in architecting solutions for large scale digital transformation projects.
* Strong understanding of ERP implementations and other platform\-based solutions (e.g. SAP RISE Salesforce ServiceNow).
* Experience with multi tower multi\-year IT outsourcing engagements.
* Familiarity with hybrid cloud architectures ( VPC Network Connectivity DC DR Compute \& Storage types Security ) modern data architectures and observability concepts.
* Understanding of API management cybersecurity principles and agile methodologies.
* Knowledge of different commercial models (effort\-based task catalog outcome based etc.).
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
* Ability to work calmly under pressure and manage competing priorities.
* Proficiency in Office 365 especially MS Excel.
* Experience with Low\-Code No\-Code platforms.
* Knowledge of bot\-based solutions and automation in software engineering or application support.
* Familiarity with Generative AI and its application in automating daily work.
* TOGAF
* A strong sense of ownership, desire to create meaningful outcomes, and passion for work that serves a greater good for customers, communities, or global challenges.
* The embodiment of Cognizant’s Values of: Work as One, Dare to Innovate, Raise the Bar, Do The Right Thing, \& Own It.


**These Will Help You Succeed**
* Strong stakeholder management and collaboration skills across technical, commercial, and business teams.
* Ability to manage complex deal pursuits with multiple workstreams and dependencies.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving capabilities.
* Experience presenting solutions to leadership teams and governance boards.
* Ability to balance technical, commercial, and contractual considerations while designing solutions.
* Strong negotiation support and risk management capabilities.

ce5cc92c.title: Presales Consultant
ce5cc92c.description:
Job Title: Pre\-Sales Consultant – US Staffing
 



**Location:** 
 Indore, Hyderabad, Noida, Bangalore (Onsite/Hybrid)
 



**Job Type:** 
 Full\-Time
 



**Shift:** 
 US Shift (Night Shift)
 



**Experience:** 
 0\- 3
 



 Job Summary
 



 We are looking for a dynamic
 **Pre\-Sales Consultant** 
 with experience in
 **US IT Staffing** 
 to support business development initiatives. The ideal candidate will work closely with the Sales and Account Management teams to identify client opportunities, prepare staffing proposals, respond to RFPs/RFIs, develop capability presentations, and help acquire new staffing business.
 



 Key Responsibilities
 


* Support the sales team in acquiring new clients for US IT Staffing and Engineering Staffing services.
* Understand client staffing requirements and recommend appropriate staffing solutions.
* Prepare proposals, capability presentations, client decks, and staffing solution documents.
* Respond to RFPs, RFIs, and RFQs from prospective clients.
* Coordinate with recruiters, delivery managers, and account managers to gather hiring capabilities and resource availability.
* Participate in client discovery calls, requirement discussions, and solution presentations.
* Prepare pricing models, rate cards, and staffing estimates for client proposals.
* Create Statements of Work (SOW), Master Service Agreement (MSA) support documents, and staffing engagement models.
* Research prospective clients, vendor programs, and market opportunities.
* Maintain proposal repositories, case studies, and company capability documents.
* Support onboarding discussions and transition from sales to delivery after client acquisition.
* Track proposal submissions and maintain CRM updates.



 Required Skills
 


* 2\+ years of experience in
 **US IT Staffing** 
 ,
 **Business Development Support** 
 , or
 **Pre\-Sales** 
 .
* Good understanding of the US staffing lifecycle and recruitment process.
* Experience preparing RFP/RFI/RFQ responses and staffing proposals.
* Knowledge of staffing engagement models (Contract, Contract\-to\-Hire, Full\-Time, SOW).
* Understanding of MSP, VMS, Direct Clients, and Vendor Management.
* Excellent PowerPoint, Excel, and documentation skills.
* Strong verbal and written communication skills.
* Ability to work with cross\-functional teams in a fast\-paced environment.



 Preferred Skills
 


* Experience with staffing tools such as JobDiva, Bullhorn, Ceipal, Salesforce, or Zoho CRM.
* Knowledge of US work authorizations (USC, GC, H\-1B, EAD, TN, CPT, OPT).
* Understanding of rate negotiation, margin calculations, and staffing pricing models.
* Experience in Engineering, Healthcare, or Professional Staffing is a plus.



 Qualifications
 


* Bachelor's degree in Business, Human Resources, Marketing, Computer Science, or a related field.
* MBA or equivalent is a plus.



 Preferred Candidate Profile
 


* Strong analytical and presentation skills.
* Customer\-focused with excellent interpersonal abilities.
* Self\-motivated and capable of handling multiple proposals simultaneously.
* Willing to work in US business hours.

c643ab15.title: Senior Solutions Architect (OpsRamp)
c643ab15.description:
This role has been designed as ‘Hybrid’ with an expectation that you will work on average 2 days per week from an HPE office.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge\-to\-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.
   

  

**Job Description**
 In the HPE
 **Hybrid Cloud,** 
 we lead the innovation agenda and technology roadmap for all of HPE. This includes managing the design, development, and product portfolio of our next\-generation cloud platform, Green Lake. Working with customers, we help them reimagine their information technology needs to deliver a simple, consumable solution that helps them drive their business results. Join us to redefine what’s next for you.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
 A pre\-sales solutions architect partners with the local sales and pre\-sales technical teams to help deliver in\-depth technical presentations, work through complex proofs of concept, and kickoff initial software implementations. A solutions architect is also the lynchpin between the field (customers) and development. He/she plays a vital role in taking customer and prospect feedback and communicating it back to the product and development teams to help drive the product roadmap.
   

  

* Partner with the local sales and pre\-sales technical teams to drive the technical sales process.
* Have a strong understanding of the IT operations market and the competitive landscape.
* Have a strong understanding of the cloud native market.
* Be able to manage and sell to large, complex technical environments by becoming the trusted advisor for customers (strong technical and interpersonal skills).
* Have strong written and oral communication skills.
* Be able to deliver compelling demonstrations and presentations.
* Think outside of the box, be creative, and always strive to find new ways to solve customer challenges.
* Understand complex customer environments and be able to deliver proofs of concept and initial software implementations.


**What You Need To Bring**
* Understand technologies like Docker, Kubernetes, Mesos, and other container technologies.
* 10\+ years of solution architecture experience.
* Bachelor's or Master's in Engineering, Technology or related field
* Have some level of programming skills (Java, Python, PHP, JSON, NodeJS, JavaScript, etc.).
* Ability to design implementation architectures.
* Ability to build integrations using a REST API.
* IT Operations Management (ITOM) experience is preferred.


**Additional Skills**
 Accountability, Accountability, Active Learning, Active Listening, Assertiveness, Bias, Building Rapport, Buyer Personas, Coaching, Complex Sales, Creativity, Critical Thinking, Cross\-Functional Teamwork, Customer Experience Strategy, Customer Interactions, Design Thinking, Empathy, Financial Acumen, Follow\-Through, Growth Mindset, Identifying Sales Opportunities, Industry Knowledge, Intellectual Curiosity (Inactive), Long Term Planning, Managing Ambiguity {\+ 6 more}
   

  

**What We Can Offer You**
**Health \& Wellbeing**
 We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.
   

  

**Personal \& Professional Development**
 We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.
   

  

**Unconditional Inclusion**
 We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.
   

  

**Let's Stay Connected**
 Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.
   

  

 \#india
   

  

 \#hybridcloud
   

  

**Job**
 Sales
   

  

**Job Level**
 TCP\_04
   

  

 HPE is an Equal Employment Opportunity/ Veterans/Disabled/LGBT employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender, or any other protected category, and all decisions we make are made on the basis of qualifications, merit, and business need. Our goal is to be one global team that is representative of our customers, in an inclusive environment where we can continue to innovate and grow together. Please click here: Equal Employment Opportunity.
   

  

**Hewlett Packard Enterprise is EEO Protected Veteran/ Individual with Disabilities.**
 HPE will comply with all applicable laws related to employer use of arrest and conviction records, including laws requiring employers to consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories.
   

  

**Recruitment Fraud Alert**
 We have become aware of an increase in fraudulent recruitment activities in which individuals impersonate our company or authorized recruitment agencies to offer fake employment opportunities. These scams may occur through false websites, emails, social media, or chat\-based applications and often aim to obtain personal information or money. Please note that Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE), its direct and indirect subsidiaries and affiliated companies, and its authorized recruitment agencies/vendors will never charge a candidate a registration fee, hiring fee, or any other fee in connection with its recruitment and hiring process. We also never request personal information such as back account details, Social Security numbers, or national IDs via social media or chat applications.
   

  

 All legitimate job opportunities will come through official company channels, and candidates are responsible for verifying the credentials of any third party claiming to represent the company. Any reliance on fraudulent communication is at the individual’s own risk, and HPE disclaims legal liability for any resulting damages. If you suspect recruitment fraud, do not share personal information or make any payments and report the incident to your local authorities immediately.

ac530ca9.title: Solutions Architect - India
ac530ca9.description:
**About ClickHouse**
 Recognized on the 2025 Forbes Cloud 100 list, ClickHouse is one of the most innovative and fast\-growing private cloud companies. With more than 3,000 customers and ARR that has grown over 250 percent year over year, ClickHouse leads the market in real\-time analytics, data warehousing, observability, and AI workloads.
   

  

 The company’s sustained, accelerating momentum was recently validated by a $400M Series D financing round. Over the past three months, customers including Capital One, Lovable, Decagon, Polymarket, and Airwallex have adopted the platform or expanded existing deployments. These customers join an established base of AI innovators and global brands such as Meta, Cursor, Sony, and Tesla.
   

  

 We’re on a mission to transform how companies use data. Come be a part of our journey!
   

  

 ClickHouse is on a mission to grow a vibrant user community and establish ourselves as a cloud\-first company. We are seeking an experienced Solutions Architect to help expand our presence in India by empowering customers and users to unlock the full potential of ClickHouse. This is an exciting opportunity to join after the general availability of our serverless Cloud product and play a pivotal role in defining how it is positioned and adopted in the market.
   

  

 Our ideal candidate is a technical thought leader with strong customer facing skills, capable of bridging business objectives with technical solutions. In this role, you’ll serve as a trusted advisor, guiding clients on how to leverage ClickHouse for real time analytics, cloud native applications, and enterprise\-scale workloads.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
* Translate complex business and technical requirements into scalable solution designs, covering architecture, migrations, workflows, and data visualization.
* Work directly with stakeholders across every level; from the C\-suite to data scientists and developers, to enable customer success.
* Evangelize ClickHouse’s vision and capabilities, driving adoption and securing strategic commitments.
* Apply a solution based approach to demonstrate and deliver customer value.
* Lead new initiatives that help customers transform raw data into actionable insights aligned with their business outcomes.


**What You Bring**
* 5\+ of experience with open source software business models; strong proficiency in cloud and infrastructure technologies.
* Hands on experience with scalable, highly available distributed systems.
* Proven ability to create proofs of concept (POCs) and reference implementations that drive customer adoption.


**Bonus Points For**
* Experience deploying applications or selling into environments with major cloud providers (AWS, GCP, Azure).
* Familiarity with database programming and data modeling.


**Compensation**
 For roles based in the
 **United States** 
 , the typical starting salary range for this position is listed above. In certain locations, such as the San Francisco Bay Area and the New York City Metro Area, a premium market range may apply, as listed.
   

  

 These salary ranges reflect what we reasonably and in good faith believe to be the minimum and maximum pay for this role at the time of posting. The actual compensation may be higher or lower than the amounts listed, and the ranges may be subject to future adjustments.
   

  

 An individual’s placement within the range will depend on various factors, including (but not limited to) education, qualifications, certifications, experience, skills, location, performance, and the needs of the business or organization.
   

  

 If you have any questions or comments about compensation as a candidate, please get in touch with us at paytransparency@clickhouse.com.
   

  

**Perks**
* Flexible work environment \- ClickHouse is a globally distributed company and remote\-friendly. We currently operate in over 20 countries.
* Healthcare \- Employer contributions towards your healthcare.
* Equity in the company \- Every new team member who joins our company receives stock options.
* Time off \- Flexible time off in the US, generous entitlement in other countries.
* A $500 Home office setup if you’re a remote employee.
* Global Gatherings – We believe in the power of in\-person connection and offer opportunities to engage with colleagues at company\-wide offsites.


**Culture \- We All Shape It**
 As part of a rapidly scaling start up, you will be instrumental in shaping our culture.
   

  

 Are you interested in finding out more about our culture? Learn more about our values here. Check out our blog posts or follow us on LinkedIn to find out more about what’s happening at ClickHouse.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity \& Privacy**
 ClickHouse provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type based on factors such as race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local laws.
   

  

 Please see here for our Privacy Statement.

33de92da.title: L3 Cloud & Infrastructure Implementation Engineer
33de92da.description:
L3 Cloud \& Infrastructure Implementation Engineer

**Location:** Hyderabad, India

**Location:** Remote, will be in person next year.  
**Department:** Managed Services / Cloud \& Infrastructure  
**Employment Type:** Full\-Time  
**Level:** L3 / Senior Engineer  
**Experience Required:** 7 to 10 years  
**Reports To:** Service Delivery Manager / Technical Leadership

**About the Company**

We are a growing IT services, managed services, cloud, and cybersecurity company supporting clients across the United States and global markets.

We help businesses design, implement, secure, and manage modern technology environments across Microsoft 365, Azure, AWS, GCP, infrastructure, endpoint management, cybersecurity, backup, and compliance.

**Role Summary**

We are hiring an **L3 Cloud \& Infrastructure Implementation Engineer** to serve as a senior escalation and project implementation resource.

This role is ideal for someone with strong hands\-on experience in:

* Windows Server
* Active Directory
* Microsoft 365
* Microsoft Entra ID
* Microsoft Intune
* Microsoft Defender
* Azure
* AWS
* GCP
* Backup and disaster recovery
* Infrastructure operations

The right candidate must be able to review a technical scope, understand the requirements, create an implementation plan, complete the technical work, document the environment, and support the client after deployment.

This is not a basic help desk role. This is a hands\-on L3 role for someone who can handle complex issues, cloud projects, infrastructure migrations, Microsoft 365 security, and client\-facing implementation work.

Key Responsibilities

* Act as an L3 escalation engineer for complex cloud, Microsoft 365, Windows Server, and infrastructure issues
* Implement technical scopes of work for Microsoft 365, Azure, AWS, GCP, Intune, Defender, and infrastructure projects
* Support Windows Server environments, including Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, Group Policy, and file services
* Administer Microsoft Entra ID, including users, groups, roles, MFA, Conditional Access, and identity security
* Manage Microsoft 365 services, including Exchange Online, SharePoint Online, OneDrive, Teams, and tenant administration
* Deploy and manage Microsoft Intune, including MDM, MAM, compliance policies, configuration profiles, app deployment, device enrollment, and remote support
* Configure and support Microsoft Defender for Endpoint, Defender for Office 365, security baselines, alerts, and remediation workflows
* Support Azure environments, including virtual machines, virtual networks, storage, VPNs, backups, identity, and Azure Virtual Desktop
* Support AWS environments, including EC2, S3, IAM, VPCs, security groups, backups, and basic cloud workloads
* Support GCP environments, including Compute Engine, Cloud Storage, IAM, VPC networking, security, and backup support
* Support remote access and virtualization platforms, including RDS and Azure Virtual Desktop
* Perform server upgrades, cloud migrations, tenant migrations, endpoint hardening, and platform improvements
* Support backup and disaster recovery solutions, including backup validation, restore testing, and recovery planning
* Troubleshoot client environments across cloud, server, endpoint, identity, networking, and security layers
* Participate in P1/P2 incidents, root cause analysis, and technical remediation
* Execute technical changes following change management processes
* Create and maintain technical documentation, runbooks, SOPs, build guides, and client handoff documents
* Mentor junior engineers and help improve internal technical standards
* Work with sales, project managers, and leadership during technical discovery and project planning
* Maintain strong ticket updates, time entries, SLA compliance, and client communication

Required Skills

* Strong hands\-on experience with Windows Server administration
* Strong knowledge of Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, GPO, and hybrid identity
* Strong Microsoft 365 administration and implementation experience
* Strong Intune implementation and endpoint management experience
* Strong Microsoft Defender and endpoint security experience
* Strong Entra ID experience, including MFA and Conditional Access
* Working knowledge of Azure IaaS, networking, storage, backup, and AVD
* Working knowledge of AWS infrastructure and security basics
* Working knowledge of GCP infrastructure and security basics
* Experience with backup and disaster recovery platforms
* Experience supporting MSP, NOC, consulting, or multi\-client environments
* Ability to read technical contracts, SOWs, and project requirements
* Strong troubleshooting skills across cloud and infrastructure environments
* Strong documentation and communication skills
* Ability to work directly with clients in a professional manner
* Ability to work independently with limited supervision

Preferred Skills

* Azure Virtual Desktop design and support
* Microsoft Purview, DLP, retention, and compliance policies
* GCC or GCC High experience
* CMMC, NIST 800\-171, CIS, HIPAA, or SOC 2 experience
* PowerShell scripting and automation
* Veeam, Acronis, or cloud backup platform experience
* Cisco, Fortinet, UniFi, or Barracuda troubleshooting experience
* Server hardware knowledge, including iLO, DRAC, storage, and NAS platforms
* Infrastructure or cloud migration project experience
* Experience with RMM, PSA, ITSM, and documentation tools
* AWS or GCP project implementation experience

Experience Requirements

* **7 to 10 years** of hands\-on IT infrastructure, cloud, or systems engineering experience
* **4\+ years** focused on Microsoft 365, Azure, Intune, Defender, Entra ID, and client\-facing implementation work
* Experience with AWS and GCP is strongly preferred
* Experience working in an MSP, consulting, NOC, or Global Support Center environment preferred
* Experience handling client\-facing technical projects preferred

**Certifications Preferred**

* Microsoft Certified: Azure Administrator Associate, AZ\-104
* Microsoft Certified: Windows Server Hybrid Administrator, AZ\-800 / AZ\-801
* Microsoft 365 Certified: Administrator Expert
* Microsoft Certified: Endpoint Administrator
* Microsoft Certified: Identity and Access Administrator
* Microsoft Certified: Security Operations Analyst
* AWS Certified Solutions Architect Associate
* Google Associate Cloud Engineer
* CompTIA Security\+, CISSP, or equivalent security certification

What Success Looks Like

Within the first 90 days, this person should be able to:

* Handle L3 escalations for Microsoft 365, Azure, Windows Server, and endpoint issues
* Complete Microsoft 365, Intune, Defender, Azure, AWS, and GCP implementation tasks
* Review a technical scope and build an execution plan
* Produce clean documentation after every project
* Communicate clearly with clients and internal teams
* Improve technical standards, runbooks, and deployment templates
* Support junior engineers with escalations and knowledge transfer

Ideal Candidate

The ideal candidate is a senior hands\-on engineer who understands both **support operations** and **project implementation**.

They should be comfortable troubleshooting urgent issues, but also capable of building secure client environments from the ground up.

This person should be technical, organized, client\-facing, and able to take ownership of complex work without needing constant direction.

Compensation

Salary will be based on experience, certifications, communication skills, and technical ability.

Pay: From ₹100,000\.00 per month

Benefits:

* Flexible schedule
* Paid sick time
* Paid time off

Work Location: Hybrid remote in Hyderabad, Telangana (Hyderabad District)

cacce35b.title: Technical Program Manager, Payee Management
cacce35b.description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Amazon's Accounts Payables Technology team, part of FinAuto (Finance Automation), is transforming financial operations through next\-generation automation powered by agentic AI. We process trillions in annual transactions across every Amazon business worldwide, including AWS, Stores, and Digital. Our team is building intelligent systems that optimize the entire order\-to\-cash lifecycle, from sales through billing and collections. We're seeking a hands\-on technical leader to drive our automation vision forward.  

  

As Amazon's financial operations grow exponentially with business expansion, traditional approaches to scaling through human operations are no longer sufficient. Our team is at the forefront of solving this challenge through innovative automation solutions that combine artificial intelligence, machine learning, and enterprise\-grade workflows to transform how financial operations work.  

  

As a Technical Program manager,  

* You are responsible for managing the lifecycle of a complex cross\-functional program with considerable impact.
* Your program may focus on a single product in a critical technology area or you may work more broadly, managing larger initiatives that span organizations or geographies in support of a larger business objective.
* You may also be responsible for the delivery of large and complex projects that may or may not be tied to a larger program.
* You may be assigned to manage the roadmap for an organization, which may include contributing to OP1/OP2 narratives, and ownership of one or more organizational goals.
* As a senior technology program owner, you are accountable for the overall strategy as well as driving teams inside and outside your organization to deliver.
* You are able to define the program (mission, vision, tenets), set objectives, analyze data, drive improvements that are quantified with metrics, and influence resource allocation.
* You understand the systems in your product or program space, their limitations, scaling factors, boundary conditions, and reasons behind architectural decisions

  

  

  

  

Key job responsibilities  

* To ensure business and technical stakeholder needs are aligned, you drive mindful discussions that lead to crisp decisions.
* You provide context (past, current, and future) for business/technology choices and a long\-term perspective.
* You partner with customers and engineering teams to determine which projects move forward and in what priority order.
* You use your technical judgment to question proposals and test assumptions (Q. Do we need to build this at all?).
* You enlist Senior/Principal Engineer to ensure architecture(s) scale (or will scale) to match the “think big” business case.
* You make smart trade\-offs (e.g., time vs. effort vs. features).
* You create plans that have clear, measurable success criteria. You clearly communicate progress and outcomes.
* You oversee the gap between teams, processes, and system architectures. You help teams/your organization reduce exposure to classic failure modes (e.g., requirements not sufficiently understood/documented, ineffective cross\-team collaboration, long\-term impact(s) from of the use of third\-party technologies, APIs not protected/hardened, insufficient testing/gaps in QA).
* You solve ambiguous problems and proactively identify and mitigate risks (before they become roadblocks). You demonstrate good judgment in how and when to escalate (without damaging relationships).
* You are data\-driven. You regularly review metrics and proactively seek out new and improved data/mechanisms for visibility. You ensure your program stays aligned with organizational objectives.
* You understand technical program management and engineering best practices. You may be asked to use your knowledge to assess development processes, test plans, and operations/maintenance requirements.
* You work with teams to improve concurrent project delivery. You streamline and/or eliminate excess process.
* You influence teams to decouple from dependencies and eliminate architecture problems that stifle innovation or cause user dissatisfaction, development collisions, and/or outages.

\* You are an excellent communicator. You write effective narratives (Amazon 6\-pager) and present them effectively to Directors and VPs. You routinely deliver the right things with limited guidance. \* When confronted with discordant views, you are able to find the best way forward and influence others to follow that path (build consensus).
**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* 5\+ years of technical product or program management experience
* 7\+ years of working directly with engineering teams experience
* 3\+ years of software development experience
* 5\+ years of technical program management working directly with software engineering teams experience
* Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* 5\+ years of project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management experience
* Experience managing projects across cross functional teams, building sustainable processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience defining KPI's/SLA's used to drive multi\-million dollar businesses and reporting to senior leadership

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

06bb1bdc.title: Business Program Manager, Prime Video Commerce Tech
06bb1bdc.description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Prime Video Commerce is the team that powers how hundreds of millions of customers buy, subscribe, and access content on Prime Video — across every country, every device, every payment method. Our Bengaluru site is home to the engineering and leadership teams that own offer vending, payments expansion, and architectural transformation for PV Commerce globally.  

  

We're looking for a Program Manager to run the operating rhythm of our organization. You'll be in every room that matters — taking notes, tracking actions, following up relentlessly, and ensuring the org's written artifacts (MBRs, newsletters, reviews) are sharp, current, and delivered on time. You'll own the systems that keep a 100\+ person distributed engineering org running: SharePoint structure, wikis, intake mechanisms, OpEx budgets, attrition tracking, and goal management.  

  

This is a high\-agency role. You won't wait to be asked — you'll see what's missing, build it, and drive accountability across leaders. You'll heavily leverage AI tools to automate repetitive work, synthesize information, and operate at a pace that would otherwise require a team. The core of the role is strategic operations: ensuring teams have the information, structure, and mechanisms to make decisions and move fast. You'll also handle logistics and coordination for leadership — but your real value is in the operating system you build around the org, not in any single task.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

\*\*Strategic operations and org rhythm\*\*  

* Be in key meetings — take notes, capture decisions, track actions, and follow up until closed. Nothing falls through.
* Own MBR write\-ups, newsletters, and leadership communications — drafting, editing, and ensuring they ship on schedule
* Follow up on org\-level actions across all leaders — you're the accountability mechanism for commitments made in reviews, 1:1s, and staff meetings
* Own the org's information architecture: SharePoint sites, wikis, intake mechanisms, and knowledge repositories. Build structure where none exists.
* Manage the OpEx budget — track spend, flag anomalies, partner with finance on forecasting
* Maintain the attrition tracker, headcount plan, and hiring pipeline status — always current, always accessible to leadership
* Provide offline goal summaries and pulls — leaders always have a current view of progress without asking
* Manage mechanisms on metrics, artefact reviews, newsletters, OPRs and identify topics that need more attention or documentation that needs work.
* Calendar and logistics coordination for the org leader
* Pre\-read preparation and materials assembly for senior leadership reviews
* Use AI to handle the rote parts so your time goes to the higher\-judgment work above

  

\*\*AI\-first execution\*\*  

* Heavily leverage AI tools (Claude/Kiro, internal agents, automation) to synthesize meeting notes, generate first drafts, track patterns across data sources.
* Build and maintain AI\-assisted workflows for recurring tasks: weekly digests, goal freshness checks, cost trend reports, action item tracking
* Continuously identify manual processes that can be automated and implement solutions

  

\*\*Org level community and culture building\*\*  

* Run the local community program for PV Commerce BLR: townhalls, team gatherings, social events.
* Program manage content for townhall events — sourcing speakers, curating topics, managing logistics, and ensuring each event delivers value

  

A day in the life  

You start the morning by running your AI\-assisted digest: it's scanned last week's action items across three reviews and flagged two that are overdue with no update. You send direct follow\-ups to the owners before the 10am staff meeting. In staff, you're taking notes — not transcribing, but capturing the three decisions made and four actions assigned. By the time the meeting ends, those are already in the tracker and owners have been pinged.  

  

Mid\-morning, you're drafting next week's MBR narrative. You've pulled the data, written the first draft using AI, and are now working with the team to sharpen or explain the narrative.
  

  

After lunch, you're in the metrics review taking notes. A leader asks about attrition in one team — you already have the numbers and share them in the chat before anyone needs to go look. Later, you're planning next month's townhall: you've identified speakers, drafted the invite, and coordinated AV. You close the day by sending the weekly ops newsletter to all of Commerce BLR: what shipped, what's coming, who joined, who's leaving, and one thing to celebrate.  

  

About the team  

We are the Prime Video Commerce team in Bengaluru — engineers, managers, and operators who build and own the commerce experiences that customers across the globe interact with every day. We put offers, subscriptions and payment methods on the shelf for hundreds of millions of Prime Video customers, operating across 59\+ countries with obsessively high reliability. We are a worldwide team, and we operate like one — working across time zones with genuine empathy. Inclusivity isn't a value we list on a slide; it's how we work. We believe the best ideas come from diverse perspectives, and we actively create space for every voice to be heard, regardless of level, background, or tenure.**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* 3\+ years of program or project management experience
* 3\+ years of working cross functionally with tech and non\-tech teams experience
* 3\+ years of defining and implementing process improvement initiatives using data and metrics experience
* Bachelor's degree
* Knowledge of Excel (Pivot Tables, VLookUps) at an advanced level and SQL
* Experience defining program requirements and using data and metrics to determine improvements

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* 3\+ years of driving end to end delivery, and communicating results to senior leadership experience
* 3\+ years of driving process improvements experience
* Experience in stakeholder management, dealing with multiple stakeholders at varied levels of the organization
* Experience building processes, project management, and schedules

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

1e913d23.title: Solution Architect
1e913d23.description:
Condé Nast is a global media company producing the highest quality content with a footprint of more than 1 billion consumers in 32 territories through print, digital, video and social platforms. The company’s portfolio includes many of the world’s most respected and influential media properties including Vogue, Vanity Fair, Glamour, Self, GQ, The New Yorker, Condé Nast Traveler/Traveller, Allure, AD, Bon Appétit and Wired, among others.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Location:
   

  

 Bengaluru, KA
   

  

**About The Role:**
 You are the connective tissue across our Engineering function. Owning the end\-to\-end technical design of a domain, ensuring multiple sub\-domains and systems form a coherent ecosystem. This entails translating business ambition and product vision and combining it with technical execution to create practical and scalable, and AI\-native end\-to\-end solutions that deliver real outcomes.
   

  

**What you’ll do:**
 With a specific focus across domains, you unite expertise with architectural vision, and make the complex simple. You ensure technical solutions \- both the ‘what’ and the ‘how’ are accomplished across the technology ecosystem, with AI\-assisted development embedded as a first\-class practice across the teams you influence.
   

  

 Working collaboratively is second nature \- you guide key decisions, negotiate trade\-offs and oversee execution; ensuring every solution strengthens our product vision. In short, you make ambition buildable and strategy actionable! You bring architecture into product planning early — not as a reviewer at the end, but as a co\-designer from the start.
   

  

**You’ll partner with…**
* Peer Solution Architects and Engineering Directors to align architecture with business strategy and enable teams to move faster with confidence.
* Product leaders, business stakeholders, Staff Engineers, Engineering VPs and Directors, and external thought leaders\\


**About you:**
* Proven track record of delivering large\-scale solutions across multiple geographies
* You bring context, clarity and creativity; shape designs that are both strategically sound and practically executable and that account for the evolving capabilities of AI\-assisted development tooling
* The ultimate problem solver and business partner; you possess excellent business acumen to spot both the solution and the opportunity.
* Ability to see the bigger picture across the whole technology ecosystem.
* First class communication skills to convey complex architectural decisions in a clear and concise manner, so engineering teams, product leaders, and business stakeholders all understand what is to be built and why
* Always one\-step ahead \- you actively shape how AI\-native development practices evolve within the organisation, not just adopt them


**Desired Skills and Experience:**
* 15\+ years of experience in software engineering building software products, at scale with at least 3 years as a Tech Lead, Staff Engineer, or Architect responsible for defining and delivering technology solutions across complex domains
* Expert fluency in at least 2 programing languages including Python, NodeJS; working knowledge of AI code generation tools (Codex/Claude Code/Cursor/GitHub Copilot/ Augment Code) change development workflows and code quality standards
* Good understanding of Agentic AI concepts and hands\-on experience working on on Agentic AI projects in production — including agent orchestration, LLM tool use, evaluation frameworks, guardrail design, and multi\-agent pipeline architecture
* Demonstrable experience defining and governing AI\-assisted development practices within an engineering organisation — including how agentic tooling integrates into CI/CD pipelines, code review, test automation, and production readiness standards
* Experience with cloud native ecosystems(AWS/Azure) with exposure on deployment infrastructure, observability, security and resilience paradigms
* Strong ability to collaborate effectively across cross\-functional teams in Product Management, UX and Analytics teams across different geographies and time zones
* Ability to translate highly complex technical requirements into easily digestible and actionable plans
* Excellent communication skills – both written and verbal, and ability to communicate effectively on technology solutions and their business impact
* Ability to coach, mentor engineers across levels with the ability to build architectural thinking and AI fluency across the organisation — elevating technical capability beyond your immediate team


**Why join us?**
 At Condé Nast, you’ll help build the technology behind Vogue, GQ, Wired, The New Yorker, and more. You’ll work with a global community of creative and technical minds who are redefining what storytelling looks like in the digital age.
   

  

 We value curiosity, collaboration, and bold ideas, and we’re looking for someone who loves turning great plans into even greater results.
   

  

**What happens next?**
 If you are interested in this opportunity, please apply below, and we will review your application as soon as possible. You can update your resume or upload a cover letter at any time by accessing your candidate profile.
   

  

***Condé Nast is an equal opportunity employer. We evaluate qualified applicants without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, veteran status, age, familial status and other legally protected characteristics.***
