0506c888.title: Principal Technical Program Manager, Compliance and Safety Services
0506c888.description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Are you seeking an environment where you can drive innovation? Do you want to apply state\-of\-the\-art computer science to solve real\-world problems? Amazon is looking for a Principal Technical Program Manager who is passionate about solving highly ambiguous and challenging problems at global scale.  

Join a team building the future of automated compliance in the product space. Your work will directly impact Amazon's ability to serve customers and partners safely and efficiently across the globe. We build systems that automatically de\-risk Amazon sellers' product selection and help them easily test and certify their products.  

  

As a Principal Technical Program Manager, you will drive large cross\-group initiatives to build scalable services so that our customers have a trustworthy online shopping experience. You will help build next\-generation Selling Partner compliance systems and reduce friction in listing and selling products globally. You will also help automate product safety controls and regulations so that Amazon can ensure products sold at its store are compliant, safe, and trustworthy.  

This is a strategic leadership role that requires operating across multiple VP organizations with complete independence, driving broad cross\-organizational impact, and solving significantly complex or endemic problems in the compliance and safety domain. You will define and deliver programs with significant technology impact, own technology roadmaps, and align teams toward simple, coherent approaches that scale globally.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

* Strategic Program Leadership: Define and deliver very large, significantly complex programs spanning multiple VP organizations in the compliance and safety space, with broad cross\-organizational and cross\-business impact.
* Architecture \& Technical Strategy: Drive large\-scale engineering efforts to build automated compliance systems, identifying gaps and opportunities within or between architectures and organizations, and influencing system architecture decisions.
* Cross\-Functional Alignment: Build consensus and align multiple teams toward coherent technology strategies for seller compliance automation, product safety controls, and regulatory frameworks.
* Stakeholder Communication: Represent complex decisions, trade\-offs, and solutions clearly to VPs and senior leadership (up to 3 levels above); write effective Amazon 6\-pager narratives that drive alignment.
* Force Multiplication: Dramatically increase the effectiveness of engineering groups by reducing coupling between teams, enabling independent operation, and creating or optimizing cross\-organizational structures and mechanisms.
* Trade\-off Management: Make strategic trade\-offs between business opportunity, resources, and sustainability for compliance systems serving global marketplaces.
* Escalation Management: Serve as an escalation point for critical compliance and safety program issues, remediating critical and endemic problems with lasting solutions.
* Innovation \& Simplification: Decompose complex compliance processes into straightforward solutions, often inventing new approaches; apply technical knowledge to invent, evolve, improve, and simplify technologies.
* Community Development: Actively develop the TPM community through mentoring, recruiting, promotion assessments, and career development of others.
* Process Improvement: Drive adoption of critical mechanisms ensuring long\-term program success; minimize repeated effort year\-over\-year by creating scalable, self\-sustaining processes.

  

About the team  

Compliance and Safety Services (CoSS) vision is to provide best\-in\-class automation of controls for internal compliance and business programs (our primary customers) to lower costs in the Amazon flywheel on behalf of our end customers: buyers and selling partners. We provide easy\-to\-use shared services with data privacy, security and tenant isolation across all stages, while continuously raising industry standards for automation performance and cost efficiency, giving our program customers confidence that they have access to optimal cost\-efficient automation options to better serve their end customers.**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* Bachelor's degree or above in Computer Science, Engineering, or related fields
* Experience leading cross\-functional projects and managing large, complicated programs
* Knowledge of distributed and service\-oriented architectures
* Experience demonstrating strong analytical abilities and confidence in the use of data
* Experience leading engineering discussions around technology decisions and strategy related to a product
* Experience producing executive\-level written materials and presenting to executive audiences
* Experience coordinating between technical teams, peers and business stakeholders
* • 10\+ years of technical program management experience
* • Strong data\-driven business and technical judgment with the ability to make trade\-offs between business opportunity, resources, and sustainability

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* 8\+ years of hands\-on work managing complex technology projects experience
* Experience managing projects across cross functional teams, building sustainable processes and coordinating release schedules

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

c78ebd4c.title: Technical Program Manager II
c78ebd4c.description:
**Job Description**
**Would you enjoy providing support across multiple programs?**
**Do you thrive on managing complexity and uncertainty?**
**Join our Cloud Technology PMO team**
 Program Managers are key contributors to Akamai's success. You will be responsible to lead programs, enhance performance, and increase customer satisfaction.
   

  

**Partner with the best**
 Our Program Managers lead product programs and initiatives across the division from concept to market. We align product, engineering, and business teams to exceed the expectations of our customers. We are relied on by leaders across the organization to execute critical programs with high business impact.
   

  

 As a Technical Program Manager II, you will be responsible for:
   

  

* Leading cross\-functional teams including Engineering, Product Management, Network Operations, Sales, Services, and Support to support the product roadmap.
* Proactively minimizing risks while developing alternative approaches for various scenarios.
* Maintaining and communicating backlog of work with key stakeholders, guiding them on priorities based on business needs
* Communicating program status and expectation changes to senior leaders with appropriate frequency, using standardized methods
* Maintaining and iterating on a roadmap of committed work through the current calendar


**Do What You Love**
 To be successful in this role you will:
   

  

* Possess 5\+ experience in managing projects and programs effectively.
* Demonstrate experience working within a technical team and a good understanding of the software development life cycle
* Have experience working with JIRA and Confluence
* Have experience working with Internet technologies or protocols such as DNS, HTTP, TCP/IP
* Be able to analyze workload and communicate technical issues to senior stakeholders of varying technical ability


**About Us**
 At Akamai, we make life better for billions of people, trillions of times a day.
   

  

 Whether you're streaming live events, scrolling social media, watching your favorite series, or managing your savings, we're the engine behind the scenes. We provide the world's most distributed platform from Cloud to Edge to help the giants of the digital world work faster and stay more secure, making the internet a better experience for everyone.
   

  

**Our Focus Is Simple**
**Cloud and Edge:** 
 Running apps closer to users for instant performance.
   

  

**Security** 
 : Neutralizing threats before they ever reach your data.
   

  

**Content Delivery** 
 : Scaling the world's biggest moments without a glitch.
   

  

**AI** 
 : Enabling our customers to build, secure, and scale AI apps on the world's most distributed cloud platform.
   

  

 At Akamai, we don't just support the internet; we power and protect it, because behind every great digital experience is a massive hidden challenge. And we're the ones who solve it. When millions of people hit play or pay, Akamai ensures it just works.
   

  

**Benefits at Akamai:** 
 We support your health, well\-being, finances, and life beyond work. See our benefits.
   

  

**FlexBase adapts to your job's needs**
 Akamai's FlexBase program is yet another way we show our commitment to providing employees with an exceptional workplace experience. It's not about telling employees where to work; it's about supporting employees to do their best work.
   

  

 We trust our incredible employees to work in ways that suit them best: at home, in an office, or a combination of both.
   

  

 Connect with us on social and see what life at Akamai is like!

09f01a38.title: Intelligent Technology Operations Technical Delivery Lead
09f01a38.description:
Join us as a
 **Intelligent Technology Operations Technical Delivery Lead** 
 at Barclays, where you will drive strategic transformation across Technology Operations and IT Service Management—the backbone of the bank's operations responsible for maintaining service availability, reliability, resilience and operational stability. You will lead complex, cross\-functional initiatives spanning observability, AI\-enabled operations, event intelligence, SRE and automation, translating strategy into execution and ensuring measurable business outcomes through strong stakeholder alignment, delivery leadership and operational adoption.
   

  

 To be successful as
 **Intelligent Technology Operations Technical Delivery Lead,** 
 you should have experience with:
   

  

  

* Enterprise Technology Transformation Delivery – leading complex, cross\-functional technology transformation programmes from strategy through execution and adoption.
* Strategic Delivery Leadership \& Navigating Ambiguity – Demonstrated ability to operate in complex and evolving environments, synthesising inputs from multiple stakeholders, delivery teams and business priorities to identify interdependencies, connect the dots, and translate ambiguity into clear, targeted and executable delivery plans.
* Technology Operations \& Engineering Practices – strong understanding of modern technology operations, including monitoring, observability, SRE, automation, event management, GenAI, with the ability to translate technical capabilities into business outcomes.
* Stakeholder Influence \& Communication: Strong influencing skills with the ability to align multi\-faceted stakeholders across business units and technology teams, drive outcomes without direct authority, and communicate complex multi\-stream delivery, risks, dependencies and benefits to executive audiences.


**Some Other Highly Valued Skills \& Experience Include**
* GenAI, Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) and AIOps transformation delivery.
* Leading organisational change, talent development, and workforce transformation to build the capabilities, behaviours and operating models required to sustain adoption of strategic change in line with long\-term business outcomes.


 You may be assessed on key critical skills relevant for success in role, such as risk and controls, change and transformation, business acumen, strategic thinking and digital and technology, as well as job\-specific technical skills.
   

  

 The role is based out of Pune.
   

  

**Purpose of the role**
 To manage the efficient delivery of large\-scale technical projects and capabilities across the bank and collaborate with internal and external stakeholders to understand their needs and expectations throughout the software product lifecycle, adhering to agreed time, budget and quality requirements.
   

  

**Accountabilities**
* Management of the delivery, resource allocation and improvement of complex technical project capabilities across the bank using Agile/Scrum methodologies for planning, stand\-ups, demos, retrospectives and the execution of sprints.
* Collaboration with customers and business teams to manage and implement customer trails to support the proposal of technically feasible solutions, and effort and timeline expectations.
* Collaboration with software engineers, quality teams, product managers and other engineering teams to deliver high\-quality products and features through the software project lifecycle aligned to the banks objectives, regulation and security policies.
* Identification, assessment, and mitigation of risks associated with technical projects to prepare the bank for potential challenges.
* Management of change requests and communication with stakeholders throughout the project lifecycle.
* Management of vendor relations involved in technical projects to ensure they deliver according to agreed terms.
* Stay abreast of the latest industry technology trends and technologies, to evaluate and adopt new approaches to improving deliver outcomes and to foster a culture of continuous learning, technical excellence and growth.


**Vice President Expectations**
* To contribute or set strategy, drive requirements and make recommendations for change. Plan resources, budgets, and policies; manage and maintain policies/ processes; deliver continuous improvements and escalate breaches of policies/procedures..
* If managing a team, they define jobs and responsibilities, planning for the department’s future needs and operations, counselling employees on performance and contributing to employee pay decisions/changes. They may also lead a number of specialists to influence the operations of a department, in alignment with strategic as well as tactical priorities, while balancing short and long term goals and ensuring that budgets and schedules meet corporate requirements..
* If the position has leadership responsibilities, People Leaders are expected to demonstrate a clear set of leadership behaviours to create an environment for colleagues to thrive and deliver to a consistently excellent standard. The four LEAD behaviours are: L – Listen and be authentic, E – Energise and inspire, A – Align across the enterprise, D – Develop others..
* OR for an individual contributor, they will be a subject matter expert within own discipline and will guide technical direction. They will lead collaborative, multi\-year assignments and guide team members through structured assignments, identify the need for the inclusion of other areas of specialisation to complete assignments. They will train, guide and coach less experienced specialists and provide information affecting long term profits, organisational risks and strategic decisions..
* Advise key stakeholders, including functional leadership teams and senior management on functional and cross functional areas of impact and alignment.
* Manage and mitigate risks through assessment, in support of the control and governance agenda.
* Demonstrate leadership and accountability for managing risk and strengthening controls in relation to the work your team does.
* Demonstrate comprehensive understanding of the organisation functions to contribute to achieving the goals of the business.
* Collaborate with other areas of work, for business aligned support areas to keep up to speed with business activity and the business strategies.
* Create solutions based on sophisticated analytical thought comparing and selecting complex alternatives. In\-depth analysis with interpretative thinking will be required to define problems and develop innovative solutions.
* Adopt and include the outcomes of extensive research in problem solving processes.
* Seek out, build and maintain trusting relationships and partnerships with internal and external stakeholders in order to accomplish key business objectives, using influencing and negotiating skills to achieve outcomes.


 All colleagues will be expected to demonstrate the Barclays Values of Respect, Integrity, Service, Excellence and Stewardship – our moral compass, helping us do what we believe is right. They will also be expected to demonstrate the Barclays Mindset – to Empower, Challenge and Drive – the operating manual for how we behave.

9768e63e.title: Senior Presales Consultant
9768e63e.description:
Overview  

  

Aivar Innovations is looking for a Senior Presales Consultant to lead customer engagements, drive demonstration, and enable successful enterprise sales across Agentic AI, automation, cloud, and digital transformation solutions. You will work closely with Sales, Product, Engineering, Marketing, and Delivery teams to deliver impactful customer demonstrations, shape go\-to\-market strategies, and bring market insights into product development. This role requires strong industry exposure across multiple enterprise verticals and the ability to bridge customer business needs with product capabilities while supporting the growth of Aivar’s AI and cloud offerings.  

  

Key Responsibilities  

  

 Lead customer discovery sessions, demonstrations, workshops, and executive presentations for enterprise prospects.
 Create personalized presentations, demo scenarios, and sales collateral aligned to customer business challenges.
 Partner with Sales throughout the opportunity lifecycle, including RFP/RFI/RFQ responses and proposal support.
 Support go\-to\-market (GTM) initiatives, including product launches, messaging, positioning, and industry\-specific playbooks.
 Identify, evaluate, and prioritize customer use cases based on business value, market demand, and product strategy.
 Own and maintain presales assets, demo environments, knowledge repositories, and sales enablement materials.
 Conduct competitive research and share market insights to strengthen product positioning and sales effectiveness.
 Collaborate with AWS and strategic technology partners during customer engagements and joint GTM initiatives.  

  

Requirements  

  

 6\+ years of enterprise presales experience in AI, SaaS, Cloud, Automation, or Enterprise Software.
 Exposure to at least three industries such as BFSI, Healthcare, Manufacturing, Supply Chain, or Automotive.
 Proven experience delivering high\-value enterprise product demonstrations and engaging CXO\-level stakeholders.
 Experience supporting GTM activities, product launches, and market positioning for new products or platforms.
 Strong ability to bridge business requirements with Product and Engineering teams.
 Basic understanding of AWS Cloud, AI/ML, and Generative AI concepts.  

  

Skills and Competencies  

  

 Excellent communication, presentation, and business storytelling skills.
 Strong stakeholder management and cross\-functional collaboration abilities.
 Expertise in creating executive presentations and customer\-specific demo content.
 Strong understanding of enterprise business processes and industry trends.
High ownership, organizational skills, and the ability to manage multiple strategic initiatives simultaneously.
 Analytical mindset with experience in market research, use case prioritization, and competitive analysis.  

  

Why You’ll Love Working at Aivar  

  

 Learn from Experts: Work directly with former AWS leaders and AI pioneers.
 Drive Innovation: Influence product direction through direct customer and market insights.
 Modern Tech: Work on cutting\-edge AI, Agentic AI, Automation, and Cloud technologies.
 High Visibility: Collaborate with Sales, Product, Engineering, and Leadership on strategic initiatives.
 Accelerated Growth: Build your career in a fast\-growing AI startup with significant ownership and impact.

dfc5aa80.title: Senior Solution Engineer - Presales
dfc5aa80.description:
**About Boomi and What Makes Us Special**





 Are you ready to work at a fast\-growing company where you can make a difference? Boomi, the data activation company for AI, powers the agentic enterprise by bringing data to life across the business. The award\-winning Boomi Enterprise Platform is the active data foundation that delivers essential agentic infrastructure enabling organizations to drive agentic transformation and harness the power of AI with secure, scalable connectivity.  Trusted by over 30,000 customers and supported by a network of 800\+ partners, Boomi helps organisations of all sizes achieve agility, efficiency, and innovation at scale. At Boomi, you’ll work with world\-class people and industry\-leading technology. We hire trailblazers with an entrepreneurial spirit who can solve challenging problems, make a real impact, and want to be part of building something big. If this sounds like a good fit for you, check out boomi.com  or visit our Boomi Careers page to learn more.
 




 Presales Solutions Engineer
 



**Why Boomi?** 




 Boomi empowers organizations to move with agility, connect systems and people, and drive business innovation. As a Leader in Gartner’s Enterprise iPaaS Magic Quadrant for 12 consecutive years, and one of Inc. Magazine’s Best Workplaces, Boomi is a global integration and automation leader with over 30,000 customers.
   

  

 We're now accelerating our platform’s impact by:
 



 \- Launching Boomi AgentStudio to enable AI\-powered automation and governance
   

 \- Enhancing data integration and pipeline orchestration with the Rivery acquisition
   

 \- Expanding our offering to include Managed File Transfer (MFT) via the Thru acquisition
   

  

 At Boomi, we’re bold thinkers who are passionate about solving big challenges. If you’re excited to be part of a company shaping the future of integration, data management, API management and AI, we’d love to hear from you.
 



**Presales Solutions Engineer Overview** 




 Our sales team of Account Executives and Account Managers rely on proactive technical support during the sales process and our expert Presales Solution Engineering team is there to assist. Our Boomi SEs follow a prescriptive technical sales cycle and engagement model, focusing on effectiveness and efficiency. Our SE team is viewed as and treated more than just a technical resource. Rather, our SEs are considered valuable partners throughout the sales journey and help to build trust with our stakeholders and prospects.
 



 As a Presales Solutions Engineer, you will help provide pre\-sales technical support to our field sales teams throughout the sales process.  This includes tasks such as account and prospect research, collaborative discovery and needs analysis, formulating a technical strategy and win\-team, executing on that strategy and ultimately getting the technical win.
 



**Job Roles and Responsibilities** 




 \- Lead technical discovery and consultative pre\-sales engagements with prospective customers.
   

 \- Design solution strategies across Boomi’s portfolio of integration, data management, API management and AI.
   

 \- Deliver tailored product demonstrations and technical presentations to both technical and business audiences.
   

 \- Partner with Account Executives and Solution Architects to craft compelling proposals that highlight business value and ROI.
   

 \- Support RFIs/RFPs and  Proof\-of\-Concept activities.
   

 \- Serve as a trusted advisor throughout the sales cycle as well as supporting trade shows, webinars and workshops.
 



 \- Work with Boomi’s Partners to help them position the Boomi platform to their customers.
   

 \- Stay current on AI trends, LLM\-based tooling, competitive offerings, Boomi platform innovations, as well as general customer and industry trends.
 



**Required Skills and Experience** 




 Essential
   

 \- Strong business acumen, with the ability to relate technical features to business impact and value.
   

 \- Technical aptitude and problem\-solving mindset, ideally with exposure to integration, data management, API management and AI platforms.
   

 \- Exceptional presentation and communication skills; comfortable engaging executives, developers, and non\-technical stakeholders.
   

 \- Self\-starter who thrives in collaborative, cross\-functional teams and dynamic environments.
   

  

 Preferred
   

 \- 5\-10 years in presales, solutions consulting, sales engineering, or technical sales roles—preferably in SaaS or iPaaS organizations.
   

 \- Familiarity with:
   

      \- Integration patterns, messaging queues, and middleware concepts
 



      \- APIs and API Management, including Federated API Management
   

      \- Data pipeline and orchestration tools
   

      \- Managed File Transfer (MFT) protocols and use cases
   

      \- AI and LLM\-based applications: familiarity with prompt engineering, RAG, vector search, or agent\-based automation
   

 \- Experience in value\-based selling methodologies.
   

 \- Exposure to basic scripting or programming languages (e.g., Python, JavaScript or Groovy).
 



**Location** 




 \- Must be located in Bangalore
 



**Why Now?** 




 At Boomi, you won’t just showcase technology, you’ll help customers accelerate AI adoption, unlock data value, and build resilient digital ecosystems. It’s an exciting time to be part of a company driving innovation at scale.
 



  
 







  
 




**Be Bold. Be You. Be Boomi.** 
 We take pride in our culture and core values and are committed to being a place where everyone can be their true, authentic self. Our team members are our most valuable resources, and we look for and encourage diversity in backgrounds, thoughts, life experiences, knowledge, and capabilities.  
 





 All employment decisions are based on business needs, job requirements, and individual qualifications.
 




*Boomi strives to create an inclusive and accessible environment for candidates and employees. If you need accommodation during the application or interview process, please submit a request to talent@boomi.com. This inbox is strictly for accommodations, please do not send resumes or general inquiries.*

cf4b9ad5.title: Pre Sales Engineer
cf4b9ad5.description:
We're enhancing the way we live and work by intelligently connecting energy systems, buildings and industries!!
   

  

 Smart infrastructure from Siemens makes the world a more connected and caring place – where resources are valued, where impact on the world is considered, where sustainable energy is delivered reliably and efficiently. It provides the flexible infrastructure to allow society to evolve and respond to changing conditions. Technology and the ingenuity of people come together to be at one with our environments and to care for our world. We do this from the macro to the micro level, from physical products, components and systems to connected, cloud\-based digital offerings and services. Siemens offers a broad portfolio of grid control and automation; low\- and medium\-voltage power distribution, switching and control; and building automation, fire safety and security, HVAC control and energy solutions.
   

  

 Job Description: Pre\-Sales Engineer Role
   

  

 We are looking for a professional with a minimum of 3 years of experience in BMS (Building Management System) field. The candidate must have an associate degree in Electrical/Electronics/Mechanical.
   

  

 The role of a senior Pre\-Sales Engineer involves the following responsibilities:
   

  

* Conducting both preliminary and detailed pre\-sales engineering to qualify, identify, and quantify Building Automation Tender Documents.
* Examining Tender Documents to identify HVAC equipment and Field devices.
* Reviewing the sequence of operations and identifying any gaps in the specification related to the IO summary.
* Generating RFI, Equipment Summary, Data points schedule, Bill of material. This includes sub\-tasks like sizing/Selection of sensors, Motorized control valves \& dampers Actuators, Meters, Controllers, Interfaces \& License.
* Creating BMS network architecture.
* Producing a Compliance statement.
* Proactively identifying and mitigating risks while capitalizing on opportunities during the estimation and submission phases.
* Generating accurate project estimates and meticulously collating pricing data
* Upholding high standards through thorough quality checks on all deliverables


**The Candidate Should Possess The Following Skills And Knowledge**
* Good knowledge about HVAC, Electrical, Hydraulics, Fire \& Vertical Transport systems.
* Excellent skills in reading, oral and writing communication, problem\-solving, and analytical abilities.
* Understanding of Basic Instrumentation \& Control loops.
* Familiarity with Single line diagrams and floor plans
* Knowledge of open protocols like Modbus, M\-Bus, BACnet, KNX, and associated protocols related to BMS system.
* Proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Visio, and Outlook), Bluebeam \& Ground plan. Knowledge of Revit and BIM will be considered as added advantages.
* Additional system knowledge like IT networking, Metering, Cyber Security \& Associated building controls, Industry codes, and Compliance practices will be an added advantage.
* Experience in Data Centers will be considered as an added advantage.


 This role is based in Chennai, where you’ll get the chance to work with teams impacting entire cities, countries – and the shape of things to come.
   

  

 Make your mark in our exciting world of Siemens
   

  

 We’re Siemens. A collection of over 379,000 minds building the future, one day at a time in over 200 countries. We're dedicated to equality and we welcome applications that reflect the diversity of the communities we work in across Gender, LGBTQ\+, Abilities \& Ethnicity. All employment decisions at Siemens are based on qualifications, merit and business need. Bring your curiosity and imagination, and help us shape tomorrow.
   

  

 Find out more about Smart Infrastructure at: https://new.siemens.com/global/en/company/topic\-areas/smart\-infrastructure.html and about Siemens careers at: www.siemens.com/careers \#SL

b1179780.title: Solution Architect - Advanced Computing
b1179780.description:
As a Solution Engineer – SDI (Software Defined Infrastructure) you will be a key contributor in the pre\-sale process where you will act as the technical lead for our regional sales team, assist in evaluating a potential customer's needs, and develop and finalize a solution from concept to implementation. You will have the opportunity to work with our master architects, engineers, and consultants, to understand our clients’ needs and craft sustainable IT roadmaps to achieve overall customer objective.
 



  





**The technologies would cover the following minimum areas:** 




 • Server Virtualization
 



 • Desktop Virtualization
 



 • Hyperconvergence (HCI) and Software defined Storage
 



 • Backup
 



 • DC – DR Solutions
 



 • Active Directory
 



 • Public Cloud Services (AWS/Azure/GCP etc)
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




 • Provide technical expertise and credibility to an account team on designated focus area(s)
 



 • Conduct customer presentations on Power Bridge’s value proposition and technical solution
 



 set for assigned accounts and focus area(s )
 



 • Assist sales account managers with overall account planning as it relates to technical aspects
 



 of hardware, software, and services opportunity development
 



 • Assist sales account managers with project management for complex presales engagements
 



 • Complete technical sections for RFP/RFI/RFQ responses for assigned accounts
 



 • Assist account teams with collecting customer business and technical requirements and
 



 determining Power Bridge’s recommended solution(s)

 • Function as a liaison to customer technical staff regarding solution and implementation
 



 specifics
 



 • Function as a liaison between the sales team and professional services organization to vet
 



 solution recommendations and to complete technical portions of the SOW, as appropriate
 



 • Function as technical liaison and Power Bridge’s ambassador with field OEM sales and
 



 technical teams
 



 • Assist Power Bridge’s sales teams in dealing with customer satisfaction issues surrounding
 



 technical aspects of a recommended solution or its implementation and deployment
 



 • Assist in developing customer ‘get well’ plans, as needed
 



 • Assist sales and services management in identifying candidate solution areas for Power
 



 Bridge’s development/investment
 



 • Planning and designing solutions for multi\-vendor Data Center Solutions
 



 • Meet with key vendors to stay current on products and technologies
 



 • Maintain multiple advanced manufacturer specific advanced certifications
 



  





**Requirements** 




 • Bachelor's degree in a relevant technical field such as computer science, information
 



 technology or engineering. Additional certifications or advanced degrees are a plus.
 



 • 8\+ years of Proven experience in the skillset mentioned, preferably in a system\-integrated
 



 company or IT services provider.
 



 • Professional certifications like VCP, MCSE, ITIL etc are preferred
 



 • Good communication skills
 



 • The customer\-centric mindset with a focus on delivering exceptional service and exceeding
 



 client expectations.
 



 • Willingness to travel (Domestic)
 



  





**Benefits** 




 • Health insurance coverage for employees and their families.
 



 • Retirement savings plan with employer matching contributions.
 



 • Opportunities for professional development and advancement within the organization.
 



 • Incentive structure will be discussed during the course of the evaluation

df754aac.title: Solutions Architect - Solutions Engineering
df754aac.description:
**Who we are** 




 Founded in 2016, Alef Education (ALEFEDT on the Abu Dhabi Securities Exchange) is an award\-winning AI powered learning solutions provider redefining K to 12 education. Headquartered in Abu Dhabi, the company serves approximately 2\.0 million students and 84,000 educators across 19,000 schools in the UAE, Indonesia, and Morocco.
 



  





 Its flagship Alef Platform delivers personalized learning experiences that enhance student engagement and outcomes, while its supplemental solutions Alef Pathways, Abjadiyat, and Arabits extend learning across subjects and languages.
 



  





 Through its innovative use of artificial intelligence, data insights, and culturally relevant content, Alef Education is transforming teaching and learning to advance equity, access, and excellence for every student.
 



  





**About The Role** 




  





 The Solutions Architect – Solutions Engineering is responsible for the technical design, engineering and delivery of proposals, RFPs and outsourced projects, together with strategic engineering initiatives such as AI Automation projects, across Alef Education’s Digital Office.
 



  





 Reporting to the Solutions Architect Lead, the role translates business and bid requirements into robust, scalable and secure technical solutions, provides technical ownership of outsourced delivery and vendors, and works closely with the Business and Growth teams on pre\-sales engineering.
 



  





 The role where applicable will cover the management and delivery of projects and AI automation initiatives inclusive of management of resources.
 



 The ideal candidate combines strong hands\-on solution engineering and integration skills with experience in proposals and bids, outsourced project delivery and emerging AI and automation technologies.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




*Tolutions Engineering and Technical Design:* 



* Design, build and integrate software solutions and applications across in\-house and outsourced delivery, translating business and bid requirements into technical specifications.
* Ensure all solutions are scalable, secure and aligned with enterprise architecture standards and business requirements.
* Develop proofs of concept, prototypes and technical designs to validate proposed solutions.
* Lead the analysis of system requirements, facilitating discussions with key stakeholders to understand needs and information flows.
* Collaborate with development teams to translate business requirements into technical solutions and ensure a consistent understanding across all stakeholders.
* Maintain broad awareness of technology solutions and platforms to enable rapid response to business needs and opportunities.



  





*Proposals, RFPs and Bid Support:* 



* Provide technical ownership, assessment and analysis of proposals, RFPs and bids for the Business and Growth teams, producing solution designs, effort estimates and technical responses.
* Engage with clients and partners during pre\-sales to clarify requirements and present technical solutions.
* Ensure proposed solutions are technically sound, deliverable and aligned with enterprise standards and cost expectations.
* Assess and determine the technical suitability of existing and prospective vendors, partners and clients to inform bid and delivery decisions.



  





*Outsourced Project Delivery:* 



* Provide technical oversight of outsourced projects, ensuring delivery quality, adherence to design and integration with existing systems.
* Coordinate with cross\-functional teams and outsourced vendors to ensure seamless delivery and integration of solutions.
* Identify and manage technical risks and issues, implementing mitigation strategies as necessary.
* Manage and coordinate resourcing across internal and outsourced technical resources where required to deliver projects, providing project management and delivery oversight.



  





*AI Automation and Strategic Engineering Initiatives:* 



* Lead the technical delivery of strategic engineering initiatives such as AI Automation projects.
* Identify and apply AI and automation technologies to address business and operational requirements.
* Stay up to date with emerging technologies and industry trends to drive innovation in solutions engineering.



  





*Quality Assurance and Documentation:* 



* Ensure all solutions undergo thorough testing and quality assurance prior to release.
* Produce and maintain technical documentation, including designs, integration specifications and handover materials.
* Implement processes for continuous improvement and optimisation of solutions.



  





*Collaboration and Stakeholder Management:* 



* Work closely with other functions in Technology and Security.
* Collaborate with business units and the Growth team to understand their needs and deliver effective technical solutions.
* Manage day\-to\-day relationships with external vendors and partners, ensuring quality and timely delivery of services.



  





*Team and Resource Leadership:* 



* Lead and manage a team where applicable on deliverables inclusive of internal and external resourcing.
* Allocate, supervise and develop team resources to deliver projects, proposals and AI automation initiatives.
* Set objectives, monitor performance and provide guidance, mentoring and feedback to direct and indirect reports.



  





**To Be The Right Fit, You'll Need** 



* Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field; advanced degree preferred.
* Relevant certifications (e.g., AWS, Azure, TOGAF, ITIL) are a plus.
* 5\-7 years of relevant experience across roles such as software development, system architecture and technical consulting, including comprehensive and recent experience designing and delivering complex software systems.
* Proven experience delivering integrations and applications across in\-house and outsourced teams, including contributing to proposals, RFPs and bids.
* Minimum of 2 years as a Solutions Architect, retaining strong hands\-on coding ability and able to create proofs of concept (POCs).
* Experience leading and managing technical teams, including contractors and permanent (EOR) employees such as developers and AI Automation Engineers.
* Hands\-on knowledge of designing, building and integrating applications across in\-house and outsourced delivery, with strong understanding of infrastructure, APIs and application support.
* Strong skills in solution design, systems integration, data flows and API development across complex environments.
* Strong hands\-on software development background, with the ability to architect and deliver technical, application and business solutions for complex system architectures, infrastructure and related services.
* Proven capability managing technology implementation projects and coordinating internal and outsourced resources to deliver successfully.
* Demonstrated ability to lead, manage and develop technical teams of contractors and permanent employees, setting direction and ensuring delivery.
* Excellent communication skills with the ability to articulate technical solutions to clients, partners and stakeholders at every level of seniority, including in pre\-sales settings.
* Strong analytical skills with the ability to resolve complex technical issues and challenges effectively.
* Ability to drive innovation in IT services and adapt to changing technology landscapes.
* Experience with AWS or Azure cloud, APIs, microservices and automation tooling preferred.
* Understanding of IT requirements and challenges within the education sector preferred.
* Experience applying AI and automation technologies (e.g. initiatives such as Miqas al Dhad) and contributing technical content to RFPs, proposals and bids preferred.
* Good understanding of Agile methodologies and ways of working preferred.
* Ability to quickly research and learn new programming tools, platforms and techniques preferred.
* Fluency in English.



  





**What we offer** 




 We believe our people are our greatest advantage. We value curiosity, purpose, and the drive to make a real difference. When you join Alef, you join a mission — and a team that’s just as passionate about transforming education as you are.
 



  





 At Alef, we don’t just imagine a better future for education.
 



 We build it — together.
 




 https://www.alefeducation.com/

09cea756.title: Specialist Solution Engineer
09cea756.description:
*To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.*
 Job Category
   

  

 Sales
   

  

 Job Details
   

  

**About Salesforce**
 Salesforce is the \#1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.
   

  

 Ready to level\-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.
   

  

 As a seasoned Solution Engineer – Data \& Agentic Marketing AI at Salesforce, you will serve as a
   

  

 strategic advisor and deep product expert, partnering with enterprise sales teams to address complex
   

  

 customer challenges across marketing transformation, data unification, and agentic AI\-driven customer
   

  

 intelligence. You bring a strong background in Martech and AdTech ecosystems — understanding how
   

  

 brands plan, activate, measure, and optimise marketing across paid and owned channels. You are a
   

  

 hands\-on technologist and a compelling communicator — equally comfortable architecting a Data Cloud
   

  

 solution, building a live PoC, and presenting to a C\-suite audience. With your extensive experience
   

  

 across Marketing Cloud, Data Cloud, Lakehouse architecture, and Data Management, you will lead high\-
   

  

 impact engagements across Financial Services, Real Estate, Retail \& Consumer Goods, EdTech, FinTech,
   

  

 Telecom, Media, and Technology/GIC sectors.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Lead strategic pre\-sales engagements for enterprise and strategic accounts, partnering with


 Account Executives and Sales Leadership to drive complex, multi\-cloud deals
   

  

* Architect, build, and deliver hands\-on Proof of Concepts (PoCs) — taking full ownership from


 scoping through execution and presentation, tailored to customer\-specific use cases across data
   

  

 ingestion, unification, segmentation, real\-time activation, and AI\-driven personalisation
   

  

* Deliver world\-class, customised product demonstrations — live, unrehearsed, and deeply


 tailored to the customer's industry, data landscape, and business objectives
   

  

* Lead executive\-level discovery and whiteboarding sessions to uncover business requirements


 around marketing strategy, AdTech/Martech stack architecture, customer data management,
   

  

 and data governance
   

  

* Design and present comprehensive solution architectures connecting operational data,


 marketing data, paid media signals, and analytical insights via Salesforce Data Cloud and Zero
   

  

 Copy integrations
   

  

* Champion Data Management and Governance best practices — including data quality, master


 data management, data stewardship, lineage, and compliance
   

  

* Lead complex RFP/RFI responses, solution proposals, and business value assessments for large


 enterprise customers
   

  

* Represent Salesforce as a thought leader — at industry events, executive briefings, customer


 advisory boards, and community conferences
   

  

* Mentor and coach junior SEs, contributing to the broader SE community through enablement,


 playbooks, and reusable demo assets
   

  

* Stay ahead of the curve on Salesforce Data Cloud, Lakehouse, Agentforce, Marketing Cloud


 roadmaps, Martech/AdTech trends, and the competitive landscape
   

  

**Required Qualifications**
* 10–12 years of experience in pre\-sales, solution consulting, or marketing/data technology roles,


 with a strong track record in enterprise engagements
   

  

* Exceptional communication and presentation skills — ability to engage, influence, and inspire


 audiences ranging from developers and data engineers to CMOs and CIOs; able to simplify
   

  

 complex technical concepts into clear business value narratives
   

  

* Strong executive presence — confident, credible, and compelling in front of senior stakeholders,


 with the ability to lead whiteboarding sessions, workshops, and large\-group presentations with
   

  

 ease
   

  

* Highly hands\-on profile — must be able to independently build, configure, and demonstrate


 working solutions; not just present slides but get into the platform and make things work
   

  

* Proven ability to design and execute end\-to\-end PoCs — including data modelling, integration


 setup, segmentation configuration, and activation — with minimal support
   

  

* Strong background in Martech and AdTech technologies, including Marketing automation,


 campaign management, and customer journey orchestration and AdTech concepts — cookie
   

  

 deprecation, identity resolution, clean rooms, contextual targeting, and first\-party data
   

  

 activation
   

  

* Deep expertise with Salesforce Marketing Cloud (Engagement, Intelligence, Personalisation,


 Data Cloud) will be preferred.
   

  

* Strong understanding of Customer Data Platforms (CDP) — identity resolution, profile stitching,


 audience segmentation, and real\-time activation
   

  

* Proven expertise in Data Lakehouse architecture — Delta Lake, zero\-copy data sharing,


 federated data access, and integration with cloud data platforms
   

  

* Strong knowledge of Data Management concepts including data management, ETL, ELT, MDM ,


 Data Governance and Data Quality.
   

  

* Experience designing enterprise\-grade data architectures integrating CRM, CDP, data


 warehouse, and marketing execution layers
   

  

* Strong experience with data ingestion patterns — batch, streaming, API\-based, and event\-driven


 architectures
   

  

* Relevant Salesforce certifications: Marketing Cloud Consultant, Data Cloud Consultant, or


 equivalent
   

  

* Demonstrated vertical expertise in one or more of: Financial Services \| Real Estate \| Retail \&


 Consumer Goods \| EdTech \| FinTech \| Telecom \| Media \& Entertainment \| Technology \& GICs
   

  

* Deep domain expertise in at least three of the following: Data Cloud/CDP, Marketing


 Automation, Agentic AI, Data Management/ETL, Adtech/Martech, or Campaign Orchestration
   

  

* Strong understanding of data architectures including data lakes, lakehouses, warehouses, and


 streaming platforms
   

  

* Hands\-on experience with Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Data Cloud, or equivalent enterprise


 marketing platforms
   

  

* Ability to present complex technical solutions to both C\-level executives and technical


 practitioners
   

  

* Excellent communication, storytelling, and whiteboarding skills
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Marketing Technology, or equivalent


 practical experience
   

  

 Why Salesforce
   

  

* Lead the most strategic, complex data \+ agentic marketing AI transformation deals across India's


 fastest\-growing industries
   

  

* Work at the forefront of Salesforce's Data Cloud, Agentforce, and Lakehouse innovation — at


 the intersection of Martech, AdTech, and AI
   

  

* Be part of a world\-class SE community with access to cutting\-edge technology and continuous


 learning via Trailhead and certifications
   

  

* Competitive compensation, equity, benefits, and a clear path to Principal/Distinguished SE


 Unleash Your Potential
   

  

 When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and
 *be your best* 
 , and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can
 *do your best* 
 . Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.
   

  

 Accommodations
   

  

 If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form.
   

  

 Please note that Salesforce uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to help our recruiters assess and evaluate candidates’ resumes and qualifications throughout the recruiting process. Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options.
   

  

 Posting Statement
   

  

 Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non\-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.

8b37820c.title: RPA Presales
8b37820c.description:
**Job Title** 
 – Presales (RPA and AI solutions)
   

  

**Candidate Specification** 
 – 7\+ years, Notice – Immediate to 30 days, PAN India.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Hands\-on experience in presales for automation and AI solutions.
   

  

 Experience in RFI/RFP handling, proposal writing, bid management, commercial modeling, and ROI analysis.
   

  

 Functional knowledge of RPA, AI/ML, IDP, Gen AI, and Agentic AI (preferred).
   

  

 Familiarity with automation tools such as UiPath, Automation Anywhere, Microsoft Power Platform, Blue Prism (technical expertise not required).
   

  

 Strong communication and presentation skills with the ability to engage senior stakeholders.
   

  

 Proven ability to manage multiple RFI/RFPs simultaneously under tight timelines.
   

  

 Basic domain understanding of BFS or Insurance or HLS or MLEU or CMT (any two preferred). Relevant certifications would be an added advantage.

1c925694.title: Group Technical Architect
1c925694.description:
Bengaluru, Karnataka
  
Job Summary
  
  

**Job Title:** SAP S/4HANA SCM Lead – Kinaxis
  
**Position:** SCM Lead \- Kinaxis \| Program: S/4HANA Digital Transformation \| Duration: 12–24 months \| Level: Lead
  
Role Summary
  
The SCM Lead will drive end\-to\-end supply chain planning and logistics transformation as part of a greenfield/brownfield S/4HANA program. This role will lead the design and deployment of Kinaxis\-based planning capabilities, tightly integrated with SAP S/4 and execution systems, to enable real\-time, synchronized planning and logistics execution in a complex semiconductor supply chain.
  
Key Responsibilities
  
* Lead SCM workstream across supply chain planning, inventory, and logistics integration
* Drive design and implementation of Kinaxis (Demand, Supply, S\&OP, Capacity \& Factory Planning)
* Define end\-to\-end planning\-to\-execution processes aligned with Plan\-to\-Fulfill
* Ensure seamless integration between:


oKinaxis and SAP S/4HANA (MM, SD, PP)
  
oMES and PLM systems for manufacturing and product lifecycle alignment
  
* Enable real\-time planning visibility, scenario modeling, and decision support
* Align planning processes with semiconductor constraints (multi\-stage BOMs, long lead times, fab\-to\-assembly flows)
* Lead cross\-functional teams across planning, logistics, manufacturing, and IT
* Drive process standardization, data integration, and digital transformation outcomes


Must\-Have Skills
  
* 10–15\+ years in SAP SCM / supply chain transformation programs
* Strong expertise in:


oKinaxis RapidResponse / Maestro (Demand, Supply, S\&OP, Inventory Planning)
  
oSAP S/4HANA integration with planning systems
  
* Proven experience in greenfield and/or brownfield S/4 implementations
* Deep understanding of end\-to\-end supply chain planning and logistics processes
* Hands\-on experience integrating:


oKinaxis with SAP ERP (ECC/S/4\) and planning data flows \[linkedin.com]
  
oMES and PLM systems
  
* Experience in semiconductor or high\-tech manufacturing supply chains
* Strong leadership, stakeholder management, and delivery ownership


Nice\-to\-Have Skills
  
* Experience with advanced planning scenarios (capacity planning, constraint\-based planning, S\&OP)
* Exposure to EWM / TM integration for execution alignment
* Familiarity with SAP BTP / Integration Suite / middleware tools
* Knowledge of AI/ML\-driven planning and control tower capabilities
* Experience with data modeling, ETL processes, and integration frameworks for planning systems
* Kinaxis certifications (RapidResponse Author / Solution Consultant)

2e85c836.title: Sr Solution Consultant
2e85c836.description:
**Why UKG**
 At UKG, the work you do matters. The code you ship, the decisions you make, and the care you show a customer all add up to real impact. Today, tens of millions of workers start and end their days with our workforce operating platform. Helping people get paid, grow in their careers, and shape the future of their industries. That’s what we do.
   

  

 We never stop learning. We never stop challenging the norm. We push for better, and we celebrate the wins along the way. Here, you’ll get flexibility that’s real, benefits you can count on, and a team that succeeds together. Because at UKG, your work matters—and so do you.
   

  

**Description**
 UKG Ready (UKGR) is an exciting division of Ultimate Kronos Group which continues to experience incredible growth! If you are interested in taking your career to the next level by utilizing and enhancing your software implementation and consulting skills, then this is the job for you! We are seeking talented software implementation professionals who are interested in being part of our dynamic, fast\-paced environment and are eager to develop their career and make a difference for UKG.
   

  

 You will be joining the Professional Services Consulting (PSC) job family under the workgroup of Global Delivery Services (GDS) for the new customer deployments of UKGR product and work with UKG customers in multiple geographies.
   

  

 The PSC projects’ scope has multiple roles including Solution Consultants, Integration consultants, Business Analysts and Quality analysts interacting with onsite teams and customers on a regular basis.
   

  

 We hire people having knowledge in Human Capital Management domain for projects like ADP, Oracle HCM, PeopleSoft, Ramco, SAP SuccessFactors, Workday
   

  

 As a Senior Solution Consultant within our UKG Ready implementation team, you will do the following:
   

  

* Engage with our clients directly or indirectly to understand their business needs regarding the implementation of various modules of UKG Ready product.
* Leverage your knowledge and experience to consult on best practices and assist clients (directly or through some onsite person) in designing and building a solution that meets their needs
* Utilize your technical aptitude to re\-configure our software solution and solve moderately complex issues
* Use knowledge of a variety of alternatives and their impact on the team to develop an approach to solutions
* Stay up\-to\-date on the latest product features and functionality
* Work independently receiving minimal guidance
* Work cross\-functionally and amongst a team on new client implementation, upgrade, and change order projects
* Drive consistency into UKG Ready delivery practices by leveraging their implementation experience to define processes and best practices for the services organization
* Understand \& explain clearly difficult \&/or sensitive information, and work collaboratively to build consensus
* Contribute to team objectives that may have impact on the area/group
* Be ready to become key point\-of\-contact to UKG customers
* Ability to work in a business required shift (03:00 PM to 12:00 AM)


**Qualifications**
 Individuals looking to be a part of our talented team should possess the following:
   

  

* Bachelor's degree or equivalent in Computer Science or related field.
* 5 to 8 years of industry experience with experience in Global implementations.
* Extensive domain experience in implementing HCM or WFM software.
* Proven knowledge of SDLC \& AGILE methodologies.
* Strong analytical skills and ability to work in a fast\-paced team environment.
* Demonstrated ability to adapt to new technologies and changing environments.
* Excellent communication and consulting skills.


**Company Overview**
 UKG is the Workforce Operating Platform that puts workforce understanding to work. With the world's largest collection of workforce insights, and people\-first AI, our ability to reveal unseen ways to build trust, amplify productivity, and empower talent, is unmatched. It's this expertise that equips our customers with the intelligence to solve any challenge in any industry — because great organizations know their workforce is their competitive edge. Learn more at ukg.com.
   

  

 UKG is proud to be an equal opportunity employer and is committed to promoting diversity and inclusion in the workplace, including the recruitment process.
   

  

 Disability Accommodation in the Application and Interview Process
   

  

 For individuals with disabilities that need additional assistance at any point in the application and interview process, please email UKGCareers@ukg.com

ce6fcc42.title: Cloud Presales / Solution Architect
ce6fcc42.description:
We are looking for Cloud Presales / Solution Architecture professionals with expertise in designing scalable cloud solutions across AWS, Azure, or GCP platforms. The role involves engaging with clients to understand business requirements and translating them into effective cloud solution strategies.
   

  

 Candidates should have experience in solution design, cloud migration, security architecture, automation, and applying Well\-Architected Framework principles. Exposure to preparing solution proposals, SoWs, architecture diagrams, pricing estimations, and conducting technical discussions with clients is highly preferred.
   

  

 Strong understanding of cloud infrastructure, networking, IAM, storage, DevOps, scalability, and performance optimization is required. Hands\-on experience with architecture tools such as Lucidchart, Draw.io, or Visio and cloud pricing calculators will be an added advantage.
   

  

 Skills: presales,cloud,solution architecting

3676b401.title: Outbound Product Manager, Demo Architect - IFS Loops
3676b401.description:
**Company Description**
-----------------------


IFS is a billion\-dollar revenue company with 7000\+ employees on all continents. Our leading AI technology is the backbone of our award\-winning enterprise software solutions, enabling our customers to be their best when it really matters–at the Moment of Service™. Our commitment to internal AI adoption has allowed us to stay at the forefront of technological advancements, ensuring our colleagues can unlock their creativity and productivity, and our solutions are always cutting\-edge.


At IFS, we’re flexible, we’re innovative, and we’re focused not only on how we can engage with our customers but on how we can make a real change and have a worldwide impact. We help solve some of society’s greatest challenges, fostering a better future through our agility, collaboration, and trust.


We celebrate diversity and understand our responsibility to reflect the diverse world we work in. We are committed to promoting an inclusive workforce that fully represents the many different cultures, backgrounds, and viewpoints of our customers, our partners, and our communities. As a truly international company serving people from around the globe, we realize that our success is tantamount to the respect we have for those different points of view.


By joining our team, you will have the opportunity to be part of a **global, diverse environment;** you will be joining a **winning team** with a **commitment to sustainability;** and a company where we get things done so that you can **make a positive impact** on the world.


We’re looking for innovative and original thinkers to work in an environment where you can **\#MakeYourMoment** so that we can help others make theirs. With the power of our AI\-driven solutions, we empower our team to change the status quo and make a real difference.


If you want to change the status quo, we’ll help you make your moment. Join Team Purple. Join IFS.

**Job Description**
-------------------


We are seeking a highly technical Demo Infrastructure Engineer who will own the stability, scalability, and reliability of our demo environments for the Loops Agentic AI platform. This role ensures our field sales engineers have complete confidence that every demo they deliver is predictable, consistent, stable — and always ready to go.This person will think beyond just “setup” — they will engineer demo environments as product\-grade assets: scalable, cost\-optimized, repeatable, integrated, and resilient. The goal is to make our demo ecosystem a strategic differentiator in the sales cycle.

**Key Responsibility**

* Own, manage, and continuously improve the core demo infrastructure for the The Loops platform.
* Work closely with Engineering to ensure demo environments maintain high availability, performance, and resilience.
* Identify and drive automation opportunities for environment creation, reset, teardown, and cloning — following DevOps principles.
* Build a Demo Hub strategy that enables the field team to easily access demo\-ready instances, packaged by use case, Digital worker type, and scenario’s
* Be hands\-on to spin up new demo instances, integrate necessary data \+ APIs, and ensure consistent behavior across environments.
* Think deeply about integrations — ERP, OMS, Service, IoT, and external systems — to reflect realistic end\-to\-end demo flows.
* Proactively QA new features being introduced to the platform to avoid demo disruption and maintain demo trust in the field.
* Drive cost\-optimization strategies for infrastructure overhead while scaling demo capacity globally.
* Partner with GTM and SE teams to evolve demo storylines aligned to top\-use\-case scenarios.
**Qualifications**
------------------


We are an AI company, so you should approach your work with a growth mindset and look for ways to leverage AI to make faster, smarter decisions.

* Experience operating demo environments, pre\-sales infrastructure, or dev/test environment management for SaaS or enterprise platforms.
* Strong hands\-on scripting and automation skills (Python / Bash / PowerShell) with a DevOps mindset.
* Familiarity with cloud compute (Azure/AWS/GCP), containers (Docker/K8s), CI/CD, version control, and infra\-as\-code principles.
* Ability to think in terms of systems \+ integrations — not just screens.
* Ability to balance speed and quality — knowing where to automate, templatize, or optimize cost vs performance.
* Strong troubleshooting instincts, structured problem solving, and proactive ownership mentality.
* Desire to continuously learn how our product works, how Digital Workers function end\-to\-end, and how to best represent their value through demos.
* 5\-8 years’ experience in similar roles
* **Mandatory Requirement:** Excellent communication and articulation skills, with the ability to confidently interact with clients, stakeholders, and cross\-functional teams.
**Additional Information**
--------------------------

*We embrace flexibility and hybrid work opportunities to support diverse needs and lifestyles, while also valuing inclusive workplace experiences. By fostering a sense of community, we drive innovation, strengthen connections, and nurture belonging. Our commitment ensures you can work in a way that suits you best, while also engaging with colleagues to share ideas and build meaningful relationships.*
