08270b8d.title: Cloud Engineer
08270b8d.description:
**IOT Platform Developer** 




  





**Location: Pune (Hybrid)** 




  





**Exp Range:3\-5Years** 




  





 We are looking for an experienced and motivated IoT Engineer with a balance of technical depth, and interpersonal skills responsible for IoT solutions vision, strategy, and end\-to\-end development. This critical individual technical role will work with other engineering and product managers to drive the overall connectivity development \| design and technical roadmap.
 



  





**Responsibilities:** 



* **The IoT engineer understands business needs and translates them into highly scalable, flexible, and resilient cloud design.**
* Collaborate with IoT team leaders, product managers, program/project managers, and business leaders to define IoT technical strategy and roadmap and communicate that vision to key stakeholders.
* Document \& review business functional/non\-functional requirements and propose IoT solution architectures with detailed specifications.
* Define and drive adoption of development frameworks, patterns \& standards.
* Build proficiency with a portfolio of Fluidra Connect systems, technologies, services, and data standards to improve them.
* You will also be able to dive technically to identify opportunities and risks with the technical decisions.
* The IoT engineer must identify and document the IoT target state for the organization and ensure that the target architecture will address current and future business requirements.
* Conduct technical assessments, proofs of concepts development for IoT solutions.
* Developing and standardizing the procedure for making IoT solutions and guiding the evolution and improvement of that process is vital.
* You will create and share best practices, technical content, and new reference architectures for various use cases (i.e, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Serverless and Container based architectures, Security).



  





**Required Skills and Qualifications:** 



* 2\+ years of proven experience AWS cloud backend development with demonstrated ability in developing use cases, Servereless architecture.
* 1\+ years of Professional experience Developing solutions built on AWS cloud platform (IoT Core, Kinesis, Lambda, CloudWatch, CloudFront, CDK, Device Shadow)
* Hands On Experience on creating Serverless AWS APIs for IOT products User \& Device Managment.
* Experience working in large organizations, implementing, and managing complex distributed IT applications and large\-scale IoT solutions.
* Solid experience in IoT\-related security standard processes in both edge and cloud regarding authentication, authorization, data protection and identity/access management.
* Ability to think strategically about business, product, and technical challenges in an enterprise environment.
* Experience with/of horizontally scalable micro services architecture and low latency, consistent, simple to use RESTful APIs with TypeScript, NodeJS. Serverless Deployment.
* AWS CDK with Iaac exposure will be plus
* Experience with a formal software development methodology such as Agile is required. Knowledge of Domain Driven Design (DDD) and Test\-Driven Development (TDD)
* Experience working with geographically distributed teams is required.
* Experience driving architecture initiatives by influencing different organizations.
* Experience in any of these industries: Manufacturing or Industrials customers. Experience in one or more specific IoT / embedded / M2M industries (i.e., home automation, asset tracking, smart utilities, etc.).
* Awareness of software development tools and methodologies
* Presentation skills with high comfort speaking with executives, IT Management, and developers.
* Demonstrated ability to continuously adapt to new technologies and trends and learn new skills quickly
* Ability to communicate at all levels, orchestrate resources and work effectively across internal and external stakeholders at multiple levels.

99c576b4.title: Associate Technical Solution Architect – Retail & AI
99c576b4.description:
India
ID asp\-003\-0726
Full Time
09/07/2026
**Work Mode:** Hybrid

**Role Overview:**


We are seeking a highly motivated Associate Technical Solution Architect with a strong engineering background in the retail domain and hands\-on experience in driving AI\-led initiatives. The candidate will play a critical role in designing scalable, innovative solutions that enhance business outcomes across retail operations and transformation programs.

**Key Responsibilities:**


Solution Architecture \& Design

* Design and develop end\-to\-end scalable solutions aligned with business and technology strategies
* Translate business requirements into technical architecture and implementation plans
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to ensure solution feasibility, performance, and scalability

**Retail Domain Expertise**

* Drive solutioning across key retail processes such as:
* Merchandising \& inventory management
* Order management \& fulfillment
* POS, eCommerce, and omnichannel integrations


Provide domain\-driven insights to improve operational efficiency and customer experience

* AI \& Innovation Initiatives
* Identify and implement AI/ML use cases (e.g., demand forecasting, recommendation engines, chatbots, intelligent automation)
* Work with data science and engineering teams to integrate AI solutions into enterprise platforms
* Drive adoption of GenAI, predictive analytics, and automation frameworks


Engineering \& Delivery


Provide strong technical leadership with hands\-on involvement in:

* Cloud platforms (Azure preferred)
* APIs, microservices, and integration frameworks
* DevOps and CI/CD practices
* Good knowlege in RPA Process


Ensure adherence to architecture standards, security, and best practices

* Stakeholder Management
* Collaborate with business stakeholders, product owners, and delivery teams
* Present architecture solutions and provide technical guidance to leadership
* Support pre\-sales, proposals, and solution estimations when required

**Required Skills:**

* Technical Skills
* Strong engineering background with experience in:
* Cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, or GCP – Azure preferred)
* Microservices architecture \& APIs
* Data platforms \& integration patterns


Experience with AI/ML frameworks, analytics tools, or automation platforms (e.g., Power Platform, Python, ML services)

* Knowledge of DevOps tools and practices
* Domain Experience
* 5\+ years of experience in Retail industry solutions
* Understanding of omnichannel retail, supply chain, and store operations
* AI \& Innovation
* Proven experience in driving AI initiatives or POCs to production
* Exposure to Generative AI, NLP, or predictive analytics use cases
* Soft Skills
* Strong problem\-solving and analytical thinking
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management
* Ability to work in a fast\-paced, collaborative environment
* Proactive mindset with focus on innovation and continuous improvement
* **Education**
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
* **Good to Have**
* Certifications in Cloud (Azure Solutions Architect, AWS Architect)
* Experience with Power Automate / RPA / Intelligent Automation
* Exposure to enterprise retail platforms (SAP, Dynamics, etc.)
* **Key Value Proposition**


This role offers an opportunity to:

* Drive next\-gen retail transformation using AI in the Managed Application support project
* Work with cutting\-edge technologies and global clients
* Influence architecture decisions and innovation roadmap

**About Aspire Systems**


Aspire Systems is a $180\+ million global technology services firm with over 4,900 employees worldwide, partnering with 275\+ active customers. Founded in 1996, Aspire has grown steadily at a 19% CAGR since 2020\.


Headquartered in Singapore, we operate across the US, UK, LATAM, Europe, the Middle East, India, and Asia Pacific regions, with strong nearshore delivery centers in Poland and Mexico. Aspire has been consistently recognized among India’s 100 Best Companies to Work For for 12 consecutive years by the Great Place to Work Institute.

**Who We Are**


Aspire is built on deep expertise in Software Engineering, Digital Services, Testing, and Infrastructure \& Application Support. We serve diverse industries including Independent Software Vendors, Retail, Banking \& Financial Services, and Insurance.


Our proven frameworks and accelerators enable us to create future\-ready, scalable, and business\-focused systems, helping customers across the globe embrace digital transformation at speed and scale.

**Why Join Aspire Systems**


Being an Aspirian means being part of a future\-ready, global workplace where you will work on emerging technologies, collaborate with diverse teams, and contribute to meaningful digital transformation initiatives.


We foster innovation, value diverse perspectives, and enable continuous learning and career growth — guided by our philosophy of “Attention. Always.” Aspire also follows a hybrid work model, promoting flexibility, collaboration, and work\-life balance.

**Learn more about Life at Aspire:** **https://www.aspiresys.com/careers/life\-at\-aspire**

**Our Commitment to Diversity \& Inclusion**


At Aspire Systems, we foster a work culture that appreciates diversity and inclusiveness. We understand that our multigenerational workforce represents different regions, cultures, economic backgrounds, races, genders, ethnicities, education levels, personalities, and religions. We believe these differences make us stronger and are committed to building an inclusive workplace where everyone feels respected and valued.

**Privacy Notice**


Aspire Systems values your privacy. Candidate information collected through this recruitment process will be used solely for hiring purposes, handled securely, and retained only as long as necessary in compliance with applicable privacy laws.

**Disclaimer**


The above statements are not intended to be a complete statement of job content, but rather to serve as a guide to the essential functions performed by the employee in this role. Management retains the discretion to add or change the duties of the position at any time

4e81ea12.title: Solution Manager - Technical Design Architect
4e81ea12.description:
Flex is the diversified manufacturing partner of choice that helps market\-leading brands design, build and deliver innovative products that improve the world.
A career at Flex offers the opportunity to make a difference and invest in your growth in a respectful, inclusive, and collaborative environment. If you are excited about a role but don't meet every bullet point, we encourage you to apply and join us to create the extraordinary.**Job Description**
-------------------


To support our extraordinary teams who build great products and contribute to our growth, we’re looking to add a **Solution Manager \- Technical Design Architect** in **Chennai, India.**


This role will act as a Technical Design Architect for defining ecosystem integrations and solution designs across master data, UNS, MQTT events, and related digital factory integration capabilities. The role will provide technical direction to ensure scalable, reusable, and well\-integrated solutions across the Future Factory landscape.


Reports to **Director** and the role involves,

**What a typical day looks like:**

* Define technical design approaches for ecosystem integrations involving master data, UNS structures, MQTT events, APIs, event\-driven flows, and connected factory systems.
* Partner with solution managers, architects, data engineers, delivery teams, vendors, and business stakeholders to validate technical feasibility and integration patterns.
* Translate business and product needs into scalable technical designs, integration specifications, interface requirements, and solution blueprints.
* Review solution architecture, data flows, event payloads, integration dependencies, and deployment considerations before development and release.
* Provide technical guidance during sprint execution, testing, issue resolution, and production stabilization.
* Promote design standardization, reusable integration patterns, documentation quality, technical governance, and long\-term maintainability.

**The experience we’re looking to add to our team:**

* Education: Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Technology, Manufacturing Systems, or a related discipline.
* Experience: 10\+ years overall experience with at least 6\+ years in technical architecture, solution design, manufacturing integrations, data platforms, event\-driven systems, or similar domains.
* Strong technical expertise in master data integration, API design, event\-driven architecture, MQTT events, UNS concepts, data flows, and enterprise application integration.
* Experience defining technical design documents, integration specifications, data mapping, interface standards, and architecture decisions.
* Ability to evaluate technical options, identify risks, guide teams through design trade\-offs, and support complex troubleshooting.
* Strong communication skills with the ability to explain technical concepts clearly to business, architecture, and delivery stakeholders.

**What you’ll receive for the great work you provide:**

* Health Insurance
* PTO

Flex is the diversified manufacturing partner of choice that helps market\-leading brands design, build and deliver innovative products that improve the world.
A career at Flex offers the opportunity to make a difference and invest in your growth in a respectful, inclusive, and collaborative environment. If you are excited about a role but don't meet every bullet point, we encourage you to apply and join us to create the extraordinary.**Job Description**

* Lead solution reviews, sprint demos, stakeholder checkpoints, and release readiness discussions for warehouse automation initiatives.
* Drive global standardization, solution reuse, documentation, process alignment, and continuous improvement for warehouse automation capabilities.

* Education: Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering, Supply Chain, Information Technology, Industrial Engineering, Manufacturing Systems, or a related discipline.
* Experience: 10\+ years overall experience in warehouse management, logistics process automation, manufacturing IT, solution management, product management, or related roles.
* Strong understanding of warehouse operations, logistics execution, factory material flow, process automation, and application integration concepts.
* Experience translating warehouse and logistics process needs into solution requirements, backlog items, implementation plans, and global standards.
* Ability to work with factory stakeholders, application teams, architects, vendors, and deployment teams to deliver scalable solutions.
* Strong communication, process analysis, documentation, stakeholder management, and delivery governance skills.

**Full ML model lifecycle:** dataset curation, feature engineering, model training, evaluation, optimization, continuous deployment, and monitoring. NLP, computer vision, time series, anomaly detection, recommender systems. End\-to\-end ML pipelines (Kubeflow, SageMaker, Vertex AI). Advanced MLOps with CI/CD/CT. 3\. To continuously upskill with cutting\-edge tech to deliver high\-quality, future\-proof solutions meeting client expectations and industry standards.

fdebfce5.title: Enterprise Solutions Architect
fdebfce5.description:
**Experience \- 15 to 22 years** 




**Location \- Bengaluru/Chennai/Hyderabad/Pune/Noida.** 




  





 We are seeking a highly experienced
 **Enterprise Solutions Architect** 
 to lead end\-to\-end architecture for large\-scale enterprise platforms and digital transformation programs. This role requires a strategic technology leader who can drive architectural decisions, influence senior stakeholders, and deliver secure, scalable, resilient, and future\-ready solutions.
 



  





**Mandatory Skills**



* Enterprise \& Solution Architecture.
* Cloud Architecture (Azure/AWS/GCP).
* Systems Design \& Integration Architecture.
* Infrastructure \& Platform Engineering.
* Security, Risk \& Regulatory Compliance.
* Data Architecture \& Data Modeling.
* Modern Software Engineering \& Agile/Scrum.
* Architectural Governance \& Decision Management.
* Cost Optimization \& Value Engineering.
* Executive Stakeholder Management.
* Technology Modernization \& Digital Transformation.
* Leadership \& Influencing Across Large Teams.
* Strong Communication \& Presentation Skills.



  





**Key Responsibilities**



* Own end\-to\-end solution architecture and critical technology decisions.
* Define scalable, secure, and resilient architecture patterns aligned with business strategy.
* Lead cloud adoption, platform modernization, and technology transformation initiatives.
* Drive integration, data, security, and infrastructure architecture across enterprise systems.
* Partner with CIO, Product, Engineering, Operations, and Risk leadership teams.
* Ensure architecture governance, regulatory compliance, and operational excellence.
* Promote AI adoption, engineering best practices, standardization, and reuse across the organization.
* Mentor architects and engineering teams while influencing enterprise\-wide technology direction.



  





**What We're Looking For**



* Proven experience as a Enterprise Solution Architect in complex enterprise environments.
* Deep expertise in cloud\-native architectures, enterprise integration, and modern engineering practices.
* Strong commercial mindset with the ability to balance business value, cost, risk, and technical excellence.
* Ability to communicate architectural trade\-offs and recommendations to executive leadership.
* Experience leading large\-scale transformation and modernization programs.

802385e2.title: Cloud Platform Architect - AWS
802385e2.description:
We are seeking an experienced
 **Cloud Platform Architect \- AWS with AI** 
 to lead the design and implementation of enterprise\-scale cloud and GenAI solutions. This role combines deep AWS architecture expertise with cutting\-edge AI capabilities to drive cloud transformation initiatives, governance frameworks, and intelligent automation across complex enterprise environments.
 



  
 



**Responsibilities** 



* Lead the design and implementation of GenAI solutions using AWS Bedrock and Bedrock Agent Core aligned to enterprise AI initiatives
* Develop Python\-based automation, integrations, validation frameworks and technical assessment utilities for cloud and AI solutions
* Architect secure, scalable and highly available AWS cloud environments aligned with enterprise governance and compliance standards
* Lead AWS Landing Zone implementation, multi\-account governance setup and cloud platform engineering initiatives
* Drive cloud migration assessments, modernization strategies, execution planning and post\-migration optimization programs
* Automate cloud infrastructure provisioning and operational workflows using Terraform, CloudFormation and Python
* Implement IAM strategies, SCPs, security controls, backup, disaster recovery and monitoring solutions across AWS environments
* Collaborate with customer stakeholders, engineering teams and delivery teams to define architecture roadmaps and cloud transformation strategies







**Requirements** 



* 12–16 years of experience in software engineering
* Hands\-on expertise in AWS Bedrock and Bedrock Agent Core for building enterprise GenAI and agentic AI solutions
* Expert\-level proficiency in Python for automation, cloud engineering and AI\-driven implementations
* Background in designing GenAI architectures on AWS using Bedrock, APIs and orchestration frameworks
* Expertise in architecting enterprise\-scale AWS cloud environments and multi\-account strategies
* Strong knowledge of AWS Landing Zone, AWS Organizations and Control Tower, along with SCPs, IAM and governance frameworks
* Familiarity with AWS services including EC2, Lambda and RDS, as well as ELB, S3, CloudTrail, AWS Config and GuardDuty
* Experience in AWS migration programs including server/application migrations and Migration Factory models
* Skills in Infrastructure as Code using Terraform and CloudFormation
* Competency in Kubernetes/EKS, Docker and CI/CD pipelines, along with monitoring tools and production\-scale AWS environments
* Capability to deliver architecture/design documentation, solution diagrams and technical governance artifacts







**Nice to have** 



* AWS Solutions Architect Professional or Specialty certifications
* Exposure to Agentic AI frameworks, orchestration platforms and enterprise AI modernization initiatives
* Experience with hybrid cloud connectivity, enterprise integrations and cloud modernization programs

95b11fd1.title: AI Solution Architect
95b11fd1.description:
**About The Company**
 Aligned with Saudi Arabia's Vision 2030, we harness the Kingdom's rapidly developing talent and technological advancements to support economic diversification and drive industry transformation through cutting\-edge AI, computer vision, and automation. Our solutions are strategically designed to empower startups and enterprises with a competitive edge by leveraging local talent and infrastructure, advancing the region's human capital development. Through ethical innovation and transparency\-focused partnerships, we actively contribute to the Kingdom's ambitious objectives, championing a high\-tech, sustainable future.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking an
 **AI Solution Architect** 
 to translate complex banking business needs into scalable, secure enterprise AI system blueprints. This role owns end\-to\-end technical delivery — from high\-level design through production deployment — while ensuring every solution aligns with the demands of a highly regulated financial IT landscape.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Design high\-level and low\-level architectures for banking AI applications
* Securely integrate modern AI applications with core banking systems and databases
* Evaluate and select optimal LLMs, vector stores, and machine learning platforms
* Ensure enterprise\-grade high availability, low latency, and system scalability
* Embed financial regulatory compliance, risk mitigation, and data privacy into every design decision
* Partner with engineering, security, and platform teams through the full delivery lifecycle


**Requirements**
* 8\+ years in enterprise IT, including 3\+ years architecting AI solutions specifically within banking/financial services
* Hands\-on experience with AI \& data platforms: DataRobot, SAS Enterprise Guide, and open\-source LLM frameworks
* Strong grounding in architecture patterns: microservices, API gateways, event\-driven architecture, secure banking cloud landing zones
* CI/CD \& MLOps proficiency: GitLab CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, MLflow, automated model testing frameworks
* Advanced Python skills — Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Seaborn, LangChain, LlamaIndex
* Strong communication skills to translate technical architecture into business\-relevant terms for stakeholders


**Why Join Us**
* Architect enterprise\-scale AI solutions inside a live banking transformation program
* Own technical decisions from blueprint to production — real build authority, not just advisory
* Work at the intersection of cutting\-edge AI and strict financial\-sector compliance
* Be part of a forward\-looking organization driving AI\-led transformation in the region


**Disclaimer**
 CodeNinja is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. All aspects of employment including the decision to hire, promote, discipline, or discharge, will be based on merit, competence, and performance. Female and minorities are strongly encouraged and preferred to apply for the role.

8dd4120f.title: Technical Architect
8dd4120f.description:
**Company Description** 
 ShepHertz Technologies provides an enterprise platform for agile and incremental digital transformation, supporting organizations in building and scaling modern applications. Deployed in 9 countries and processing over 110 billion API calls, the platform is trusted by thousands of independent developers, app studios, and enterprises in more than 150 countries. ShepHertz offers a one\-stop solution that enables seamless omni\-channel experiences, rapid development of complex use cases, and secure exposure of protected resources as APIs. The company supports multiple deployment models, including public and dedicated cloud, hybrid, and on\-premise services, complemented by actionable big data analytics to help enterprises adapt to evolving customer expectations.
 



  





**Role: Technical Architect** 




**Location– Bangalore (Basavanagudi)** 




**Experience: 10\+ Years** 




**Work mode: On\-site** 




**Industry: Product / Startup Employment** 




**Type: Full\-Time** 




  





**About the Role:** 




 We’re looking for a Architect with a startup mindset, who thrives in a fast\-paced, high ownership environment. You should be a doer, thinker, and leader—someone who doesn't wait for direction but defines it. If you’ve worked in fast\-scaling product companies, led high performing teams, and solved complex technical problems while keeping the bigger picture in mind, we want to hear from you.
 



  





**Who You Are :** 




 10\+ years of experience in software engineering, with at least 2–3 years in architectural roles.
 



 • Must have extensive experience in Docker, Also, in Node JS or Python,
 



 • AI is a plus
 



 • Proven background in high\-growth startups or product\-led tech companies.
 



 • Strong experience with system design, architecture patterns, scalability, and performance tuning.
 



 • You bring a "can\-do" and "get\-things\-done" attitude with zero tolerance for procrastination.
 



 • A creative problem\-solver with strategic thinking and a bias for action.
 



 • Deep understanding of modern tech stacks (AI, backend, cloud, microservices, APIs, DevOps, etc.).
 



 • Strong leadership experience – have led, mentored, and inspired cross functional engineering teams.
 



 • Hands\-on when needed – you're not afraid to get into code.
 



 • A continuous learner with hunger to stay ahead of the curve in tech, tools, and architecture.
 



  





**What You’ll Do :** 




 • Own end\-to\-end architecture for new and existing products.
 



 • Drive engineering excellence, performance, and scalability across systems.
 



 • Collaborate closely with founders, product, and engineering teams to convert vision into architecture.
 



 • Identify tech debt, eliminate blockers, and instill a culture of ownership and urgency.
 



 • Lead design and code reviews, and define architectural best practices.
 



 • Act as a technical mentor and culture carrier for the engineering team.
 



 • Bring structure, strategy, and speed to an environment that needs it.
 



  





**Why Join Us?** 




 • Work with passionate Tech founder and a high\-ownership team.
 



 • Your role is not just technical—it’s strategic.
 



 • You help shape the company’s direction.
 



 • Freedom to innovate, experiment, and execute.
 



 • Solve challenging problems at scale with cutting\-edge tech. Must\-Haves
 



 • Prior experience in startup or fast\-paced product companies is non negotiable.
 



 • High energy, self\-starter, low\-ego, and thrives on accountability. Nice\-to Haves
 



 • Exposure to SaaS, B2B platforms, or high\-scale B2B tech.
 



 • Experience working with early\-stage or growth\-stage startups.
 



 • Contributions to open\-source, blogs, tech talks, or similar thought leadership.

550feab7.title: Solutions Architect
550feab7.description:
The ideal candidate will be responsible for working cross\-functionally to understand architecture needs by multiple business units. To be effective in this position, you must feel comfortable owning the entire architecture development process from inception to completion.
 



  





  





**Responsibilitie** 




 s• Translate business problems into well\-posed technical specifications and architectures
 



 .• Lead design reviews, prototype quickly, and harden solutions for scale (1M\+ users / high QPS)
 



 .• Build automated pipelines (CI/CD) and model/data governance across environments
 



 .• Define \& track KPIs: accuracy/latency/cost, adoption, and compliance readiness
 



 .• Partner with Product, Security, Compliance, and Ops to land safe\-by\-default systems
 



 .• Must have built an AI platform for AI applications across different domains
 



  





**.** 




**Technical Skills: (Most of the levels mentioned below, but must have agentic AI skill)** 




 • Platform: AWS SageMaker,; Kubernetes \+ Docker for portable inference
 



 • MLOps: MLflow registry, Kubeflow Pipelines, CI/CD (GitHub Actions/Jenkins), canary/champion\-challenger
 



 • Monitoring: SageMaker Model Monitor (data/quality drift), monitoring, CloudWatch/Prometheus
 



 • Serving: TensorFlow Serving, TorchServe, FastAPI/GRPC, autoscaling, low\-latency optimizations
 



 • Feature stores \& data: Feast, Databricks Feature Store; batch vs. streaming pipelines
 



 • Should have a solid practical knowledge of Machine learning and statistics.
 



 • Security: secret management, network isolation, encryption\-at\-rest/in\-transit, compliance logging
 



 • AWS Bedrock \& LLM Integration – Deploy and customize foundation models (GPT, Claude, Titan) using Amazon Bedrock, including prompt engineering and fine\-tuning strategies.
 



 • RAG Architecture with AWS Services – Implement Retrieval\-Augmented Generation using Amazon Kendra for semantic search and OpenSearch for vector embeddings.
 



 • Agentic AI Orchestration – Design multi\-agent workflows leveraging AWS Lambda, Step Functions, and integration with LangChain/CrewAI for event\-driven orchestration.
 



 • MLOps \& Deployment on AWS – Build pipelines with SageMaker Pipelines, manage model registry, and enable CI/CD using CodePipeline and CodeBuild.
 



 • Security \& Compliance on AWS – Apply AWS IAM, KMS, and Secrets Manager for secure access; ensure compliance with GDPR, HIPAA, and SOC using AWS governance frameworks.
 



 • Design agentic systems using AWS Lambda and Step Functions for orchestration and state management.
 



 • Integrate multi\-agent workflows with Amazon EventBridge for event\-driven architectures.
 



 • Secure agent operations using AWS IAM, KMS, and Secrets Manager for identity and encryption.
 



 • Connect agents to Amazon Comprehend, Polly, and Lex for NLP and conversational capabilities.
 



 • Implement observability with CloudWatch, X\-Ray, and distributed tracing for agent workflow
 **s.** 




  





**Qualifications** 




 • Bachelor’s/Master’s in CS/CE/EE/Data Science or equivalent practical experience.
 



 • Strong applied programming in Python; familiarity with modern data/ML ecosystems.
 



 • Proven track record of shipping and operating systems in production.

31b44feb.title: Fullstack Architect (with SDD)
31b44feb.description:
**Job Description (JD) – Full Stack Architect(with SDD)** 




  





**Job Title:** 
 Full Stack Architect
 



**Experience:** 
 10\+ Years
 



**Location:** 
 Bangalore / Hybrid
 



**Employment Type:** 
 Full\-Time
 



  





**Job Summary** 




 We are seeking an experienced
 **Full Stack Architect** 
 to lead the design, development, and implementation of scalable, secure, and high\-performing enterprise applications. The ideal candidate will possess deep expertise across frontend, backend, database, cloud, and DevOps technologies while driving architectural decisions and technical excellence across the development lifecycle.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




**Architecture \& Design** 



* Define end\-to\-end application architecture for enterprise\-grade solutions.
* Design scalable, resilient, and secure cloud\-native applications.
* Establish architecture standards, coding guidelines, and design principles.
* Evaluate and recommend technology stacks, frameworks, and tools.
* Create solution blueprints, architecture diagrams, and technical documentation.



**Frontend Architecture** 



* Design and implement modern web applications using React, Angular, or Vue.js.
* Establish reusable UI components and frontend design patterns.
* Ensure optimal performance, accessibility, and responsive design.



**Backend Architecture** 



* Design RESTful APIs, microservices, and event\-driven architectures.
* Implement scalable backend solutions using .NET, Java, Node.js, or Python.
* Define integration patterns with internal and external systems.



**Database \& Data Management** 



* Design relational and NoSQL database architectures.
* Optimize query performance, indexing, and data models.
* Define data governance, security, and retention strategies.



**Cloud \& Infrastructure** 



* Design cloud\-native solutions on Azure, AWS, or GCP.
* Implement containerization using Docker and orchestration using Kubernetes.
* Define Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform, ARM, or Bicep.



**DevOps \& Security** 



* Establish CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps or GitHub Actions.
* Implement monitoring, logging, and observability solutions.
* Ensure compliance with security best practices, authentication, and authorization standards.



**Leadership \& Stakeholder Management** 



* Provide technical leadership and mentoring to development teams.
* Collaborate with business stakeholders, product owners, and engineering teams.
* Conduct architecture reviews and technical governance meetings.
* Drive innovation and continuous improvement initiatives.



  





**Required Skills \& Qualifications** 




**Technical Skills** 



* Strong experience with
 **React, Angular, or Vue.js**
* Expertise in
 **C\#/.NET Core, Java Spring Boot, Node.js, or Python**
* Hands\-on experience with
 **REST APIs, Microservices, and Event\-Driven Architecture**
* Strong knowledge of
 **SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, or Cosmos DB**
* Experience with
 **Azure, AWS, or GCP**
* Expertise in
 **Docker, Kubernetes, and Containerized Applications**
* Experience implementing
 **CI/CD pipelines**
* Knowledge of
 **OAuth2, OpenID Connect, JWT, SSO, and Identity Management**
* Proficiency in architecture patterns including:
* Microservices
* Domain\-Driven Design (DDD)
* Event\-Driven Architecture
* CQRS
* Clean Architecture



**Soft Skills** 



* Excellent communication and presentation skills
* Strong stakeholder management abilities
* Leadership and mentoring experience
* Analytical and problem\-solving mindset
* Ability to drive architectural decisions across teams



  





**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.
* Microsoft Azure Solutions Architect Expert Certification.
* AWS Solutions Architect Certification.
* TOGAF Certification (preferred).
* Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA) is a plus.



  





**Key Deliverables** 



* Enterprise application architecture designs
* Technical solution documents
* API and integration architecture standards
* Cloud migration and modernization strategies
* Security and governance frameworks
* Performance and scalability roadmaps



  





**Experience Requirements** 



* 10–15\+ years of software development experience.
* 3–5\+ years in an Architect or Lead Architect role.
* Experience delivering large\-scale enterprise and cloud transformation projects.
* Strong exposure to Agile, Scrum, and DevOps practices.

dfa4f217.title: Cloud Presales / Solution Architect
dfa4f217.description:
We are looking for Cloud Presales / Solution Architecture professionals with expertise in designing scalable cloud solutions across AWS, Azure, or GCP platforms. The role involves engaging with clients to understand business requirements and translating them into effective cloud solution strategies.
   

  

 Candidates should have experience in solution design, cloud migration, security architecture, automation, and applying Well\-Architected Framework principles. Exposure to preparing solution proposals, SoWs, architecture diagrams, pricing estimations, and conducting technical discussions with clients is highly preferred.
   

  

 Strong understanding of cloud infrastructure, networking, IAM, storage, DevOps, scalability, and performance optimization is required. Hands\-on experience with architecture tools such as Lucidchart, Draw.io, or Visio and cloud pricing calculators will be an added advantage.

cdc7140f.title: Architect II - Enterprise Solutions-AWS SAAS, Data
cdc7140f.description:
**Role Description**
 Job Descriptions: Solution Architect
   

  

 Skill: Looking for Solution Architect with exp in AWS Cloud, Data Analytics and Financial domain(Added as an advantage).
   

  

* End\-to\-End Architecture Breadth
* Cloud \& SaaS Solution Design (AWS Focus)\-Core hands\-on experience in AWS cloud infra\-architecture, especially as part of Data Platforms. SaaS Adoption, AWS cloud migration
* Domain \& Leadership Fit(Asset/Financial/Banking)\-Experience in Asset Management. Must be knowing various data elements, applications such as Aladdin, MarkitEDM, etc.
* Data Architecture \& Analytics(PBI, ETL, etc)\-Core hands\-on experience in Data Architecture, Data Engineering, Data Governance, Data Management, Data Analytics
* Must have worked as Solution Architect in the banking industry
* Must have core development experience n the past. \- Started as developer to lead to architect.
* Must be able to define solutions, design architecture and drive the project technically. Role Purpose The purpose of the Solution Architect role is to:
* Define end\-to\-end solutions for IT change
* Create designs that are fit for purpose from a functional, non\-functional, service, and security point of view
* Deliver solutions that progress the overall architecture journey and are aligned to Our customer s IT Strategy
* Comply with standards, design approaches and governance Accountabilities Nature of Work
* Solutions and Assurance o Create solutions and design for projects to meet Our customer s standards for technology and ensure they meet our ambitions for availability, security, resilience and performance
* Produce design options with associated costs, benefits and risks to enable investment decisions
* Work with product owners, architects, platform teams and other project colleagues to agree trade\-offs between, long\-term and short term goals
* Responsible for the integrity of the end\-to\-end solution across Platforms, including transition states used to achieve the target state
* Shape and estimate IT initiatives and feature team sprints, ensuring that component parts deliver against business outcomes
* Technical Leadership o Provide leadership on key designs to ensure the long term strategic goals of Our customer IT are met as well as short term project needs
* Ensure design artefacts are produced to support stakeholder group for service, security, architecture and engineering
* Peer review the design artefacts of others
* Provide coaching, mentoring and training to less experienced team members as required
* Design Community membership o Contribute to the Solution Architecture community across Our customer Group leading on or participating in initiatives to improve Our customer s approach to design
* Develop your technical skills to support Our customer s need to understand and exploit emerging technology trends Risk \& Controls
* Identify, own and manage the specific key risks and/or IT controls and BP standards that you are identified as the owner and/or nominee for on iCARE or Archer o Ensure that issues and actions associated to controls / risks are remediated in a timely manner
* Maintain appropriate records on iCARE or Archer
* Ensure that controls are sufficiently well designed and operating effectively to keep the risks that they mitigate within Our customer's tolerance level
* Report and escalate the status of the relevant risks, controls and standards as appropriate Resource Complexity
* Accountable for working within policy and guidelines, applying technical knowledge and expertise and prioritising own use of time Problem Solving
* The essence of the role is project\- based problem solving.
* Accountable for solving problems and dealing with difficulties in line with policy, process and other guidelines applying technical knowledge and expertise
* Depending on the nature of the specific role, problems can range from repetitive daily issues to complex technical problems requiring significant expertise
* Escalate problems according to guidelines Change
* Recommend design solutions or ideas in response to challenges faced by your project or feature team in line with policy, process and other guidelines.
* Accountable for recommending change based on expert know how and analysis
* Take personal initiative in adapting to change Internal collaboration
* Build effective working relationships with: o Project managers and others on projects
* Platform Managers and Specialist
* Platform Architects and Designers


 External interaction
   

  

* Maintain liaison with suppliers and the relevant sources of technology to ensure the specialist knowledge is kept up to date. Timeframe
* Role holder will be assigned to projects and initiatives of varying size and complexity, with typical timeframes ranging from 3\-18 months
* Longest target completion time of tasks likely to be 3 months Values The power of our values comes from their simplicity. They bring to life some simple truths about what it means to work here, both today and in the future. Care: we understand the positive difference we make in our customers lives every day. We truly listen to see beyond the policyholder to a person with plans and dreams. We solve problems for our customers, and for each other we build relationships that no\-one else can. Commitment: we stand up for what we believe in. We act with courage, keep our promises and take ownership of our work. We understand the impact we have on the world and take seriously the responsibility that brings with it. We will play our part in tackling the climate crisis. Community: we recognise the strength that comes from working as one team, collaborating and winning together for Our customer, for each other and for our customers. Our strength comes from our connection \- to each other, to our customers and partners and to the communities around us. Confidence: we believe that the best is still to come \- for our customers, our people, and society. We re not just here for now; we re here to imagine and to innovate for the future. We are brave and passionate, setting new standards for ourselves and the competition. Capabilities
* Excellent design skills
* Strong knowledge of end\-to\-end project lifecycle methodologies (mainly agile).
* Strong technical experience. This maybe broad experience with the ability to apply it across a variety of customer and business scenarios; or strong domain specialisms to maximise the benefit of technology in key areas e.g. Infrastructure, Business Intelligence, Pensions.
* The role holder must care about technology and how to exploit it for the benefit of our customers.
* Financial acumen to support development of business cases and to inform key design decisions.
* Ability to balance long\-term direction and necessary short\-term goals.
* Good communication skills with the ability to provide technical guidance to peers and project colleagues.
* Strong personal impact and influence
* Good stakeholder and relationship management
* Leadership skills


**Skills**
 enterprise application architecture,solution architecture,etl,data architecture,

0dcac467.title: Senior Cloud & Infrastructure Engineer -PL
0dcac467.description:
**POSITION REPORTS TO** 
 : ASSOCIATE DIRECTOR IT
   

  

**DEPARTMENT** 
 : TECHNOLOGY
   

  

**LOCATION** 
 : VADODARA
   

  

**Position Summary**
 Operate as the lead infrastructure engineer in close daily partnership with Omni’s Senior Security Infrastructure Engineer, who provides technical direction, conducts security review, and signs off on significant infrastructure decisions before they reach production.
   

  

 Run and modernize Omni’s Azure environment, including compute, networking, identity, Azure App Services, Azure SQL, Microsoft WAF, Azure Virtual Desktop and Windows 365, and Azure Monitor.
   

  

 Own the Windows Server fleet end\-to\-end: provisioning, patching cadence, Group Policy and Active Directory operations, lifecycle planning, and end\-of\-support migrations.
   

  

 Own Microsoft 365 license allocation and Azure subscription management across Omni’s multi\-tenant environment, including license assignment and recovery, subscription and tenant governance, cost visibility, and ongoing right\-sizing.
   

  

 Modernize the infrastructure\-as\-code practice. Propose tooling and patterns for joint review with the Senior Security Infrastructure Engineer, and incrementally bring infrastructure under code with security guardrails built in from the start.
   

  

 Partner with the senior developer and broader development team to extend modern CI/CD patterns from application code into infrastructure deployment, and to design systems that scale securely as the business grows.
   

  

 Work closely with Omni’s security team and managed SOC on hardening, vulnerability remediation, identity controls, endpoint protection through SentinelOne, and compliance evidence.
   

  

 Cross\-train into the security workstreams the Senior Security Infrastructure Engineer manages day\-to\-day, including endpoint detection and response, SASE and ZTNA networking, SIEM, and the managed SOC’s tooling, so the two roles can back each other up across disciplines.
   

  

 Manage observability across Datadog and Azure Monitor, including alerting, on\-call signal hygiene, and runbook development.
   

  

 Maintain the homegrown line\-of\-business application infrastructure (Azure App Services, Azure SQL, and Microsoft WAF).
   

  

 Run day\-to\-day business continuity and disaster recovery operations within Omni’s defined RPO and RTO targets. Maintain DR runbooks and run periodic failover and tabletop exercises.
   

  

 Build and maintain runbooks, architecture diagrams, and change records so the environment can be supported by anyone on the team.
   

  

 Partner with Omni’s co\-managed MSP as a shared delivery team across day\-to\-day operations and escalations, rather than treating the MSP as an outside vendor.
   

  

 Provide escalation support to internal end users for infrastructure\-impacting tickets routed through the helpdesk and the co\-managed MSP.
   

  

 Participate in an after\-hours rotation covering monthly maintenance windows and incident response, and co\-lead post\-incident reviews. Formalizing the rotation is part of the role, in partnership with the Senior Security Infrastructure Engineer.
   

  

 8\+ years of cloud engineering experience, with significant Azure depth.
   

  

 3\+ years operating Windows Server environments at production scale.
   

  

 Hands\-on experience with hybrid identity, including Active Directory, Group Policy, and Entra ID, in a Windows\-centric environment.
   

  

 Strong cloud and hybrid networking experience, including firewall change management, network segmentation,
   

  

**Job Responsibilities**
**KNOWLEDGE, SKILLS AND ABILITIES**
 cross\-tenant routing, IPsec and SSL VPN, NSGs, and subnet design.
   

  

 Experience operating to defined RPO and RTO targets, including DR runbook maintenance and failover testing.
   

  

 Strong infrastructure\-as\-code experience. Terraform preferred, with openness to Azure\-native equivalents such as Bicep or ARM templates.
   

  

 Demonstrated ability to modernize engineering practices in close collaboration with security counterparts, partnering on the final shape of the practice rather than dictating it.
   

  

 Comfort operating in a role where a security peer reviews and signs off on significant infrastructure decisions, and where outcomes are defined jointly rather than independently.
   

  

 Comfort cross\-training across infrastructure and security disciplines, holding a primary area of focus while providing secondary coverage of the other.
   

  

 Track record of partnering closely with security and development teams to ship and operate software safely and at scale.
   

  

 Familiarity with Microsoft 365 Copilot or other enterprise AI rollouts.
   

  

 Exposure to NIST CSF, CIS Controls, or ISO/IEC 27001, and how these frameworks apply to both cloud and on\-premises or Group Policy deployment.
   

  

 Familiarity with SOC 2 control operation and evidence collection.
   

  

 Working knowledge of California privacy regulation (CCPA / CPRA). HIPAA exposure also a plus.
   

  

 Microsoft partnership program exposure (CSP, Solutions Partner designations).
   

  

 Secondary cloud and SaaS familiarity beyond Azure, including Google Workspace, Google Cloud Storage, and Wasabi object storage.
   

  

 Exposure to thin\-client deployments and cloud browser management.
   

  

 Cloudflare familiarity (edge, DNS, security).
   

  

 Next\-generation firewall platform experience (Palo Alto Networks, Fortinet FortiGate, or comparable).
   

  

 Enterprise backup and DR platform experience (Veeam, Axcient, Azure Backup, or comparable).
   

  

 Experience migrating workloads from traditional VMs to serverless or cloud\-native application platforms.
   

  

 SQL Server DBA exposure for day\-to\-day database operations (not a primary focus of the role).
   

  

 IIS management experience.
   

  

 AWS, Kubernetes, or serverless experience.
   

  

 Experience operating in a small infrastructure team where breadth matters more than depth in any one area.
   

  

**Preferred Qualifications**
 Familiarity with Microsoft 365 Copilot or other enterprise AI rollouts.
   

  

 Exposure to NIST CSF, CIS Controls, or ISO/IEC 27001, and how these frameworks apply to both cloud and on\-premises or Group Policy deployment.
   

  

 Familiarity with SOC 2 control operation and evidence collection.
   

  

 Working knowledge of California privacy regulation (CCPA / CPRA). HIPAA exposure also a plus.
   

  

 Microsoft partnership program exposure (CSP, Solutions Partner designations).
   

  

 Secondary cloud and SaaS familiarity beyond Azure, including Google Workspace, Google Cloud Storage, and Wasabi object storage.
   

  

 Exposure to thin\-client deployments and cloud browser management.
   

  

 Cloudflare familiarity (edge, DNS, security).
   

  

 Next\-generation firewall platform experience (Palo Alto Networks, Fortinet FortiGate, or comparable).
   

  

 Enterprise backup and DR platform experience (Veeam, Axcient, Azure Backup, or comparable).
   

  

 Experience migrating workloads from traditional VMs to serverless or cloud\-native application platforms.
   

  

 SQL Server DBA exposure for day\-to\-day database operations (not a primary focus of the role).
   

  

 IIS management experience.
   

  

 AWS, Kubernetes, or serverless experience.
   

  

 Experience operating in a small infrastructure team where breadth matters more than depth in any one area.
   

  

 Skills: azure,infrastructure,cloud

ed9057b5.title: Tech S and T-Solution Architect -ARCHITECTURE-Senior-GDSF04
ed9057b5.description:
At EY, you’ll have the chance to build a career as unique as you are, with the global scale, support, inclusive culture and technology to become the best version of you. And we’re counting on your unique voice and perspective to help EY become even better, too. Join us and build an exceptional experience for yourself, and a better working world for all.
   

  

**Solution Architect – Technology Strategy \& Transformation (TST) – Senior 3**
**Experience: 8\+ Years**
**Description**
 A solution Architecture role for professionals with 8\+ years of experience (Senior 3\) in designing and delivering scalable, cloud native and digital solutions. The Solution Architect partners with business and technology teams to define target architectures, drive technology strategy, and support complex transformation initiatives across enterprise environments.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Define end to end solution architectures for client engagements, platforms, and enterprise systems.
* Advise on digital, integration, cloud, data, AI, and emerging technologies for business transformation.
* Lead architecture design, feasibility analysis, PoCs, vendor evaluations, and technology selection.
* Collaborate with engineering, platform, data, and security teams to implement target architectures.
* Ensure adherence to enterprise architecture standards, patterns, governance, and best practices.
* Communicate architecture decisions and solution approaches clearly to business and IT stakeholders.


**Qualifications**
**Educational Background**
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent in Engineering, Computer Science, IT, Mathematics, or related fields.


**Technical Expertise**
* 8\+ years of IT experience with 2\-3 years architecting complex digital or cloud\-native solutions.
* Hands on experience across application, data, integration, cloud, and security architectures.
* Expertise in distributed systems, microservices, containerized platforms, and hybrid/multi\-cloud architectures.
* Strong programming background in any one language like Java, .NET, JavaScript, Python, C\+\+, with experience in SQL/NoSQL, big data, analytics, and modern security standards.
* Expertise in integration platforms like Mulesoft and must have API integration experience
* Skilled in DevSecOps, CI/CD, containers, Agile delivery, and event\-driven/streaming architectures.
* Providing Technical guidance to project team triaging production issues for any architecture/design issues
* Proficiency with GCP (preferred), AWS or Azure cloud\-native services across IaaS, PaaS, SaaS.


**Digital \& Cloud Skills**
* Ability to architect modern digital applications, APIs, micro frontends, and cloud\-native platforms.
* Experience with modern UI technologies and lightweight backend frameworks.
* Skilled in cloud\-native deployments and automated delivery pipelines.


**Data, Security \& Integration**
* Experience designing data platforms, analytics solutions, streaming pipelines, and caching architectures.
* Strong grounding in identity, access management, authentication/authorization, and enterprise security patterns.


**AI \& Emerging Technologies**
* Exposure to AI/ML tools and experience applying AI capabilities in transformation initiatives.
* Understanding of modern AI/ML architecture patterns and integration approaches.


**Consulting \& Leadership**
* Ability to translate business needs into technical architectures and guide senior stakeholders.
* Strong communication, collaboration, and leadership skills across global and distributed teams.


**Certifications (Preferred)**
* GCP experience is preferred; however, exposure to Azure or AWS is considered an added advantage.
* Additional certifications such as CISSP, ITIL, SAFe, PMI, CEH, etc.
* Knowledge in US Healthcare domain.


**EY \| Building a better working world**
 EY exists to build a better working world, helping to create long\-term value for clients, people and society and build trust in the capital markets.
   

  

 Enabled by data and technology, diverse EY teams in over 150 countries provide trust through assurance and help clients grow, transform and operate.
   

  

 Working across assurance, consulting, law, strategy, tax and transactions, EY teams ask better questions to find new answers for the complex issues facing our world today.

266d2815.title: Technical Consultant - Snowflake Administrator ,  Cloud DBA, Python, FinOps & SnowPro Advanced
266d2815.description:
**Scope**
* This is a highly strategic, pure operations and infrastructure leadership role. It does not involve building data pipelines, ETL, or data models.
* You will act as the ultimate technical authority for platform reliability, security, and governance, administering the underlying Snowflake infrastructure that supports globally distributed, multi\-tenant SaaS applications operating at petabyte scale.
* The role demands deep expertise in systems administration, securing network perimeters, managing automated identity lifecycles, and engineering massive\-scale cost\-governance frameworks across dozens of federated Snowflake accounts.


**Technical Environment**
* Platform Infrastructure: Multi\-Org/Multi\-Account management, Multi\-tenant Data\-as\-a\-Service (DaaS) sharding topologies, Serverless Compute governance, Snowflake Cortex \& Snowpark Container Services (SPCS) compute administration.
* Identity \& Access Lifecycle: OAuth 2\.0 (External \& Custom Clients), Machine\-to\-Machine (M2M) Authentication, Identity Provider (IdP) integration (Azure AD B2C, Okta, Entra ID), SCIM provisioning, Automated Key\-Pair rotation, Tri\-Secret Secure administration.
* Enterprise Security \& Network Posture: Zero\-Trust Network Rules, AWS PrivateLink / Azure Private Link / Google Cloud Private Service Connect, Attribute\-Based Access Control (ABAC), Hierarchical RBAC, Dynamic Data Masking, Row Access Policies, Audit Logging \& Access History forensics.
* Global Business Continuity (BC/DR): Account\-level Replication, Client Redirect, Cross\-Region/Cross\-Cloud Failover Groups, strict RPO/RTO SLA enforcement, Storage fail\-safe and Time Travel retention management.
* FinOps \& Compute Governance: Enterprise\-wide compute right\-sizing, programmatic Object Tagging for cost attribution, Organization Account Usage analytics, Resource Monitor enforcement, and concurrency scaling parameters.
* Platform Operations (DataOps): Terraform (IaC) for account and object provisioning, system\-level automation scripting (Python/SnowSQL), Notification Integrations, External Storage Integrations (AWS IAM/Azure Managed Identities).


**What You’ll Do**
* Design \& Architect: Define scalable, petabyte\-scale data lakehouse architectures. Establish enterprise coding standards, hierarchical RBAC models, and data security best practices.
* Develop \& Deliver: Architect multi\-cluster compute topologies for high\-concurrency workloads. Build low\-latency integrations with external compute engines and catalogs.
* Guide \& Govern: Provide technical leadership to data engineers. Lead technical whiteboarding sessions and data strategy workshops with business stakeholders.
* Operate \& Optimize: Implement robust FinOps monitoring, compute quotas, and warehouse right\-sizing routines. Perform deep root\-cause analysis on chronic platform contention issues.


**What We Are Looking For**
* Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Systems Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field.
* 9–12 years of core IT/Database Operations experience, with a minimum of 5–7\+ years operating explicitly as a Lead Snowflake Administrator or Cloud DBA in a Fortune 500 or multi\-tenant SaaS environment.
* Strictly Admin Focused: This role requires a background in systems administration, database administration (DBA), or cloud infrastructure. Candidates whose primary background is Data Engineering or ETL development will not be a fit.
* Mastery of Snowflake’s security models, specifically concerning programmatic API access, Oauth 2\.0 configuration, SCIM, and automated credential rotation.
* Deep expertise in resolving complex Snowflake concurrency issues, managing queuing logic, and debugging systemic infrastructure bottlenecks via query profiling.
* Advanced scripting skills (Python, bash, SnowSQL) specifically utilized for systems administration, platform automation, and integrating with CI/CD pipelines (Terraform).
* Certifications: SnowPro Advanced: Administrator is heavily preferred. Active cloud administration certifications (AWS SysOps/Azure Administrator) are a significant plus.


**Our Values**
 If you want to know the heart of a company, take a look at their values. Ours unite us. They are what drive our success – and the success of our customers. Does your heart beat like ours? Find out here: Core Values
   

  

 All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or protected veteran status.

The Solution Architect partners with business and technology teams to define target architectures, drive technology strategy, and support complex transformation initiatives across enterprise environments.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Define end to end solution architectures for client engagements, platforms, and enterprise systems.
* Advise on digital, integration, cloud, data, AI, and emerging technologies for business transformation.
* Lead architecture design, feasibility analysis, PoCs, vendor evaluations, and technology selection.
* Collaborate with engineering, platform, data, and security teams to implement target architectures.
* Ensure adherence to enterprise architecture standards, patterns, governance, and best practices.
* Communicate architecture decisions and solution approaches clearly to business and IT stakeholders.


**Qualifications**
**Educational Background**
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent in Engineering, Computer Science, IT, Mathematics, or related fields.


**Technical Expertise**
* 8\+ years of IT experience with 2\-3 years architecting complex digital or cloud\-native solutions.
* Hands on experience across application, data, integration, cloud, and security architectures.
* Expertise in distributed systems, microservices, containerized platforms, and hybrid/multi\-cloud architectures.
* Strong programming background in any one language like Java, .NET, JavaScript, Python, C\+\+, with experience in SQL/NoSQL, big data, analytics, and modern security standards.
* Expertise in integration platforms like Mulesoft and must have API integration experience
* Skilled in DevSecOps, CI/CD, containers, Agile delivery, and event\-driven/streaming architectures.
* Providing Technical guidance to project team triaging production issues for any architecture/design issues
* Proficiency with GCP (preferred), AWS or Azure cloud\-native services across IaaS, PaaS, SaaS.


**Digital \& Cloud Skills**
* Ability to architect modern digital applications, APIs, micro frontends, and cloud\-native platforms.
* Experience with modern UI technologies and lightweight backend frameworks.
* Skilled in cloud\-native deployments and automated delivery pipelines.


**Data, Security \& Integration**
* Experience designing data platforms, analytics solutions, streaming pipelines, and caching architectures.
* Strong grounding in identity, access management, authentication/authorization, and enterprise security patterns.


**AI \& Emerging Technologies**
* Exposure to AI/ML tools and experience applying AI capabilities in transformation initiatives.
* Understanding of modern AI/ML architecture patterns and integration approaches.


**Consulting \& Leadership**
* Ability to translate business needs into technical architectures and guide senior stakeholders.
* Strong communication, collaboration, and leadership skills across global and distributed teams.


**Certifications (Preferred)**
* GCP experience is preferred; however, exposure to Azure or AWS is considered an added advantage.
* Additional certifications such as CISSP, ITIL, SAFe, PMI, CEH, etc.
* Knowledge in US Healthcare domain.


**EY \| Building a better working world**
 EY exists to build a better working world, helping to create long\-term value for clients, people and society and build trust in the capital markets.
   

  

 Enabled by data and technology, diverse EY teams in over 150 countries provide trust through assurance and help clients grow, transform and operate.
   

  

 Working across assurance, consulting, law, strategy, tax and transactions, EY teams ask better questions to find new answers for the complex issues facing our world today.

5b1786cd.title: Security Consultant – Microsoft Cloud Security
5b1786cd.description:
**Security Consultant (Microsoft Cloud Security)** 




  





 Candidates can work remotely and must be willing to travel based on project and customer requirements.
 



  





**Job Summary** 




 We are seeking an experienced
 **Security Consultant – Microsoft Cloud Security** 
 to join our Cloud and Cybersecurity practice. The ideal candidate will possess strong expertise in Microsoft Security and Compliance technologies and will be responsible for pre\-sales consulting, solution design, technical demonstrations, Proof of Concept (PoC) execution, and delivery support for enterprise customers.
 



  





 The consultant will work closely with sales, business development, architects, and delivery teams to design and implement secure cloud solutions leveraging Microsoft 365 and Azure security technologies.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




**Pre\-Sales \& Solution Consulting** 



* Engage with customers to understand business, security, compliance, and technical requirements.
* Work closely with Sales and Business Development teams to position Microsoft Security solutions and demonstrate their capabilities, value propositions, and business use cases.
* Recommend optimal licensing strategies and solution architectures based on customer requirements.
* Conduct technical presentations, workshops, and solution demonstrations for customers.



  





**Solution Design \& Architecture** 



* Design end\-to\-end Microsoft security solutions incorporating Microsoft 365, Azure Security, and Compliance technologies.
* Prepare technical proposals, Statements of Work (SOW), architecture documents, and implementation plans.
* Develop effort estimations, project scope, assumptions, risks, and deployment strategies.
* Produce high\-quality technical documentation and architecture diagrams.



  





**Proof of Concept (PoC) \& Assessments** 



* Plan, lead, and execute customer Proof of Concepts (PoCs) with defined success criteria, timelines, and deliverables.
* Demonstrate real\-world security and compliance use cases using Microsoft technologies.
* Present PoC outcomes, recommendations, and implementation roadmaps to customers.



  





**Project \& Delivery Support** 



* Support implementation teams during project execution and troubleshooting activities.
* Provide technical guidance and best practices for solution deployment and adoption.
* Assist remote deployment resources and project stakeholders as needed.
* Stay updated on Microsoft's evolving security portfolio, licensing models, and industry best practices.



  





**Required Experience** 



* **Total IT / Cybersecurity Experience:** 
 5–10 years
* **Relevant Microsoft Security Experience:** 
 Minimum 2–3 years
* Experience in customer\-facing consulting, solution design, pre\-sales, or implementation roles.
* Hands\-on experience delivering Microsoft security projects for enterprise customers is preferred.



  





**Technical Skills** 




 Candidates should have strong hands\-on expertise in
 **at least three** 
 of the following Microsoft Security and Compliance domains, with broad knowledge across the remaining areas:
 



  





**Microsoft Security Solutions** 



* Microsoft Defender XDR
* Microsoft Defender for Endpoint
* Microsoft Defender for Identity
* Microsoft Defender for Office 365
* Microsoft Sentinel (SIEM/SOAR)
* Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) and Identity Protection
* Microsoft Intune (MDM/MAM)
* Microsoft Cloud App Security (Defender for Cloud Apps)



  





**Microsoft Compliance \& Data Protection** 



* Microsoft Purview Information Protection
* Data Loss Prevention (DLP)
* Insider Risk Management
* Information Governance \& Records Management
* Compliance and Regulatory Controls



  





**Azure Security** 



* Microsoft Defender for Cloud
* Azure Security Architecture
* Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM)
* Identity and Access Management (IAM)
* Security Monitoring and Threat Detection



  





**Preferred Certifications** 




 One or more of the following certifications are highly desirable:
 


* Microsoft Certified: Cybersecurity Architect Expert (SC\-100\)
* Microsoft Certified: Security Operations Analyst (SC\-200\)
* Microsoft Certified: Information Protection Administrator (SC\-400\)
* Microsoft Certified: Identity and Access Administrator (SC\-300\)
* Microsoft Certified: Security, Compliance, and Identity Fundamentals (SC\-900\)
* Azure Security Engineer Associate (AZ\-500\)
* Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert (AZ\-305\)



  





**General Skills** 



* Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills.
* Ability to communicate technical concepts effectively to both technical and business audiences.
* Strong analytical, troubleshooting, and problem\-solving capabilities.
* Good understanding of cloud platforms including Azure, AWS, and Google Cloud.
* Knowledge of security frameworks, governance, risk, and compliance requirements.
* Understanding of enterprise IT infrastructure, networking, and security architectures.
* Familiarity with data protection, privacy, and DLP technologies.
* Knowledge of application security, infrastructure security, and Zero Trust principles.
* Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast\-paced environment.

8d65e59d.title: Solution Implementation Engineer
8d65e59d.description:
**Overall purpose of the job:** 




 •Implementation of customer WAN, LAN and Network Security solutions, including wide range of CPE devices
 



 •Maintaining close working relationships with customers and Exponential\-e Project Managers in order to reach objectives and ensure a seamless deliveries
 



 •Assisting with lab testing of networking CPEs and solution Proof of Concepts
 



  





**Key responsibilities for this job:** 




 •Provisioning new WAN services onto the Client NGN Network
 



 •Intermediate\-to\-Advanced configuration of any networking CPEs, including Firewalls
 



 •Attending technical customer meetings, and participate in conference calls when necessary
 



 •Regular customer communication and progress reporting during implementation
 



 •Troubleshooting any faults that may arise during solution delivery
 



 •Assisting with solution documentation and planning, including network diagrams, migration plans and any other required documents
 



 •Being available to support and execute customer migrations as required, which may sometimes be outside of office hours
 



 •Generate and distribute handover documents to customers, and peer teams
 



 •Occasional field engineering duties
 



 •Aid in the development of peers through knowledge transfer
 



  





**Knowledge and experience required:** 




 •Experienced in routing \& switching configuration and/or support, ideally Cisco or Juniper/Nokia
 



 •Excellent knowledge of fundamental networking principles, such as switching, routing, subnetting, wireless and PC/Mac network configuration
 



 •Working experience with routing protocols (BGP/OSPF), redundancy protocols (HSRP/VRRP) and switching technologies (STP, VLANs, dot1Q, QinQ)
 



 •Good knowledge of network security, including NAT, UTM and general firewall operations
 



 •Good understanding of access technologies such as Carrier Ethernet, DSL and FTTC
 



 •Must possess good communication skills, work methodically, be detail\-oriented and able to multitask
 



 Knowledge and experience desired:
 



 •Understanding of MPLS/VPLS networks
 



 •Experience with SD\-WAN technologies
 



 •Knowledge of RIPE, SMTP, DNS and domain\-name operations
 



 •Familiar with Alcatel\-Lucent ESS/SR platforms, Fortinet Fortigate, Palo Alto \& Cisco ASA Firewalls, Meraki Wifi, Aruba LAN \& Wifi
 



 •Experience in a similar customer\-facing role

367f8d3b.title: Service Delivery Manager
367f8d3b.description:
**Role Overview** 





 The Service Delivery Manager oversees service delivery performance and client satisfaction. This role ensures service commitments and performance metrics are consistently met.
 







**Key Responsibilities** 








* Lead and manage the end\-to\-end delivery of services to clients in line with agreed service level agreements (SLAs) and performance standards.
* Coordinate with cross\-functional teams, including operational staff, sales, and technical departments, to ensure seamless service execution and continuous improvement.
* Monitor service performance through regular reporting and analysis of key performance indicators (KPIs) to identify areas for enhancement.
* Develop and maintain strong relationships with clients, understanding their needs, addressing concerns promptly, and ensuring high levels of satisfaction.
* Drive process improvements and implement best practices to optimize service delivery efficiency and effectiveness.
* Manage escalations professionally and effectively, working collaboratively to resolve issues and maintain positive client relationships.
* Prepare and present regular status reports to senior management and stakeholders, highlighting service delivery achievements and challenges.
* Ensure compliance with company policies, industry standards, and regulatory requirements throughout all service delivery activities.



**Qualifications And Skills** 








* Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience in business administration, management, or related fields.
* Proven experience in service delivery management within IT Services \& Staffing Sector
* Strong leadership and team management capabilities with a focus on collaboration and development.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills to effectively engage with clients and internal teams.
* Ability to manage multiple priorities and projects in a fast\-paced environment.
* Problem\-solving aptitude and a proactive approach to identifying and addressing challenges.

0cf2d2a6.title: Senior IT Delivery Manager - Life Sciences/Pharmaceuticals
0cf2d2a6.description:
We are seeking a strategic and delivery\-focused
 **Senior IT Delivery Manager** 
 with expertise in managing technology portfolios within regulated pharmaceutical and life sciences environments. The ideal candidate will have strong leadership skills, extensive experience in IT project delivery, and the ability to build and sustain senior stakeholder relationships.
 



  
 



**Responsibilities** 



* Lead end\-to\-end delivery of a diverse portfolio of IT projects, driving timely and quality outcomes within budget
* Establish delivery roadmaps, resource plans, and performance metrics across multiple workstreams
* Coordinate cross\-functional teams, ensuring accountability and resolving issues proactively
* Ensure compliance with project governance frameworks, SDLC/Agile methodologies, and regulatory requirements such as GxP
* Promote adoption of AI capabilities to enhance the software development lifecycle
* Identify and mitigate project risks to ensure continuity and predictable success
* Serve as the main point of contact for client stakeholders, nurturing trust and credibility
* Align solutions with client business needs, industry challenges, and strategic objectives
* Deliver executive presentations and provide clear, business\-oriented insights on complex technical deliverables
* Provide leadership to diverse project teams, fostering collaboration and a culture of high performance
* Support capability development, talent planning, and team motivation across distributed teams
* Manage portfolio budgets, forecasts, and financial controls, ensuring efficient resource utilization
* Oversee vendor and partner performance, ensuring adherence to contracts, service levels, and quality standards







**Requirements** 



* 15 to 18 years of experience in Information Technology
* 10\+ years of experience managing IT projects or programs, including complex, multi\-project portfolios
* 7\+ years of experience in Life Sciences or Pharmaceuticals
* Qualifications in enterprise technologies including digital transformation, cloud migration, and data platforms
* Strong competency in SDLC, Agile/Hybrid methodologies, and IT governance frameworks
* Advanced capability in client stakeholder management and executive communication
* Background in working with cross\-functional global delivery teams
