38361c1f.title: Manager - Solution Engineering
38361c1f.description:
**Company Description**  

Organizations everywhere struggle under the crushing costs and complexities of “solutions” that promise to simplify their lives. To create a better experience for their customers and employees. To help them grow. Software is a choice that can make or break a business. Create better or worse experiences. Propel or throttle growth. Business software has become a blocker instead of ways to get work done.  

  

**There’s another option. Freshworks. With a fresh vision for how the world works.**  

  

At Freshworks, we build uncomplicated service software that delivers exceptional customer and employee experiences. Our enterprise\-grade solutions are powerful, yet easy to use, and quick to deliver results. Our people\-first approach to AI eliminates friction, making employees more effective and organizations more productive. Over 72,000 companies, including Bridgestone, New Balance, Nucor, S\&P Global, and Sony Music, trust Freshworks’ customer experience (CX) and employee experience (EX) software to fuel customer loyalty and service efficiency. And, over 4,500 Freshworks employees make this possible, all around the world.  

  

**Fresh vision. Real impact. Come build it with us.**

 **Job Description**  

At Freshworks, we agree with you! We pride ourselves on building powerful, sophisticated software that’s fun and easy to use. And makes it easy for businesses to delight their customers and employees.


This is a highly strategic leadership role responsible for developing and scaling a team of Solutions Engineers who partner with customers to modernize service operations, improve employee experiences, and accelerate digital transformation initiatives. You will play a critical role in driving revenue growth, increasing win rates, expanding industry expertise, and helping customers realize the value of AI\-powered service management.


We're looking for a leader who thrives at the intersection of technology, business strategy, industry expertise, and people development. Someone who can coach teams to excellence, influence executive stakeholders, and build go\-to\-market motions that help Freshworks win in key growth markets.

**What will your impact be?**


As a leader in our Solution Engineering org, you will be responsible for overseeing one of our high performing, Solution Engineering team. Your day to day responsibilities will include hiring to plan, building a thoughtful GTM strategy for our expanding team, helping design cross\-sell/up\-sell playbooks, allocating resources to territories, evaluating performance on an ongoing basis, providing meaningful feedback to the team and growing the business. You will be a player coach and play a key role in developing the team and helping Solution Engineers on your team solve complex business problems for our prospective and existing customers.


You will partner with Sales Leaders across SMB, Expansion and Customer Success and provide strategic insights into pipeline health, team performance and win rates. Partnering with our product managers is another key area of focus and you will be responsible for evangelizing product requirements on behalf of our customers.

**About you:**

* You have experience in CRM, Customer Service, ITSM or other related domains in a pre\-sales leadership role.
* You can lead and inspire a team every day. You are not merely tracking dashboards and reporting on deals. You are rolling up your sleeves and working side by side with Solution Engineers on your team. You lead by example, not by authority.
* As an experienced leader you understand what it takes to run a dynamic team and build scalable and repeatable frameworks \& programs.
* You are a technologist at heart and love playing a role in shaping product roadmap. You are the biggest champion that our customers have within Freshworks.
* You are a keen strategist who can build competitive playbooks and work closely with product marketing to evangelize these playbooks within our global SE org.
* You are a practitioner of what you preach and believe in the art of selling value, telling stories in demonstrations and painting a vision for the future.
* You have experience in partnerships business, have worked in alliances and channels space before and have actively contributed to growth of partner ecosystem from a technical standpoint
* You have been exposed to partner technical enablement activities before and have worked in joint solutioning and GTM strategies with partners
* Finally, you are an experienced manager who values excellence over outcomes and knows how to nurture and build. You trust by default and use transparency to foster trust.

 **Qualifications*** Minimum 7 years of Solution Engineering management experience in CRM/Customer Service/ITSM or related technologies.
* 9 \-12 years relevant/industry experience.
* Exceptional soft skills and ability to influence within the organization.
* Ability to work with cross\-functional teams and drive meaningful outcomes.
* Work regularly with C level executives inside and outside the organization and be a credible source of insights.
* A Bachelors or a Masters degree is nice to have, but not required

 **Additional Information**  

At Freshworks, we have fostered an environment that enables everyone to find their true potential, purpose, and passion, welcoming colleagues of all backgrounds, genders, sexual orientations, religions, and ethnicities. We are committed to providing equal opportunity and believe that diversity in the workplace creates a more vibrant, richer environment that boosts the goals of our employees, communities, and business. **Fresh vision. Real impact. Come build it with us.**

e4f7ba9f.title: Technical Program Manager
e4f7ba9f.description:
**Note : Apply only if you have US Healthcare experience and open to work on\-site in Bangalore.** **About Autonomize AI**
Autonomize AI is revolutionizing healthcare by streamlining knowledge workflows with AI. We reduce administrative burdens and elevate outcomes, empowering professionals to focus on what truly matters — improving lives. We're growing fast and looking for bold, driven teammates to join us. **The Opportunity**
We’re looking for a Customer\-Facing Technical Program Manager to be the driving force behind our most strategic, large\-scale AI/ML transformations. In this role, you will be the face of Autonomize AI to our executive\-level customers, leading complex projects from kickoff to successful launch and expansion. Your ability to combine executive presence with deep technical knowledge will be key to your success, as you navigate large, matrixed enterprises to deliver solutions that drive real business value and ROI.### **Key Responsibilities**

#### **1\. Drive Strategic Delivery and Execution**


Lead and own the end\-to\-end program roadmap for AI/ML implementations, from discovery to deployment.
Act as the day\-to\-day technical partner to engineering teams—breaking down tasks, clarifying requirements, and ensuring smooth sprint execution.
Run agile ceremonies including daily standups, sprint planning, backlog grooming, and retrospectives.
Collaborate with cross\-functional teams (engineering, product, and delivery) to meet aggressive go\-live timelines (typically 6–8 weeks).
Proactively manage and mitigate risks, dependencies, and budgets in complex, matrixed environments.
Identify opportunities for renewal and expansion by deeply understanding customer needs and business objectives.#### **2\. Lead Customer and Executive Engagement**


Serve as the primary technical and strategic liaison for C\-suite and senior IT stakeholders.
Deliver executive\-level updates, including program health, risks, and ROI analysis.
Build strong customer relationships through transparent communication, dashboards, and business reviews.
Act as the voice of the customer internally, translating feedback into actionable insights for product and strategy teams.#### **3\. Ensure Technical Excellence and Quality**


Conduct technical deep dives with engineering teams to validate feasibility, unblock challenges, and drive informed decision\-making.
Analyze logs, data flows, and architecture diagrams to support system\-level understanding and troubleshooting.
Translate technical capabilities (APIs, data pipelines, AI agents) into clear and actionable implementation plans.
Partner with stakeholders to validate solution architecture and integrations (e.g., FHIR, HL7, cloud\-native ML services).
Ensure compliance with industry standards such as HIPAA and SOC2 through robust, metrics\-driven QA processes.#### **4\. Optimize and Scale Delivery Processes**


Continuously refine delivery frameworks and playbooks to accelerate time\-to\-value and improve execution efficiency.
Develop internal documentation, best practices, and training materials to scale program management methodologies across teams.
Drive process improvements that enhance collaboration, visibility, and handoffs across engineering, product, and customer teams. **Required Qualifications:*** Experience: 5\+ years of experience in program or project management, with at least 3 years focused on complex, customer\-facing SaaS or AI deployments.
* Domain Expertise: Proven experience working in a highly matrixed enterprise environment, preferably within the healthcare or other regulated industries.
* Technical Acumen: Strong, hands\-on understanding of enterprise software concepts, including APIs, data exchange standards (FHIR, HL7\), cloud platforms (AWS, Azure), and core ML/AI concepts.
* Leadership \& Communication: Exceptional executive presence and a track record of simplifying complex technical topics for both technical and non\-technical audiences. You are skilled at driving cross\-functional teams to deliver high\-quality results under tight deadlines.
* Tools \& Methodologies: Proficiency with project management tools like Jira, Asana, or Microsoft Project. Strong working knowledge of Agile, Scrum, or other iterative development methodologies.

 **Must Have*** 5–8 years of TPM or technical product role experience.
* Proven experience with developing concepts and prototypes. Vibe coding experience is preferred.
* Proven success shipping B2B enterprise SaaS products.
* Strong analytical and communication skills.

 **Nice to Have:*** Experience in AI governance, LLM orchestration, or compliance.
* Experience in Healthcare, HealthTech domains
* Engineering or CS background.
* Startup experience with dynamic and fast paced environments.
* Certifications: Project Management Professional (PMP) or a similar certification is a plus.
* **Clinical Experience: Direct experience in a clinical setting or a background working closely with healthcare professionals is a significant advantage.**

 **What we offer:*** Influence \& Impact: Lead and shape the future of healthcare AI implementations
* Autonomy, ownership, and the ability to chart your own growth path
* Competitive compensation and benefits
* Collaborate with a highly skilled team of engineers, data scientists, and healthcare experts.
* A dynamic and innovative work environment where your contributions drive meaningful change.
* If you're passionate about transforming healthcare with technology and have the skills to bridge business and AI\-driven solutions, we’d love to hear from you!

 **Apply now or reach out to learn more!**

e5957dcf.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
e5957dcf.description:
Sphera is a leading global provider of enterprise software and services that enables companies to manage and optimize their environmental, health, safety and sustainability. Our mission is to create a safer, more sustainable and productive world.
 



  





 Sphera is a portfolio company of Blackstone, a U.S.\-based alternative asset investment company that focuses on private equity, technology and innovation, and more. Blackstone businesses succeed through strong partnerships, a personalized approach and a commitment to exceptional performance with uncompromising integrity. Sphera and Blackstone are leaders in the Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) space.
 



  





 We are guided by our core values which are Customer\-Centric, Accountable, Innovative, Collaborative, and Action\-Oriented. These values help us recruit the right talent to join our rapidly expanding team of around 1400 Spherions around the globe. It is important to us that each and every Spherion is not only eager to challenge themselves and knows how to get work done but is an awesome addition to our company culture.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 This is an exciting time to join Sphera as we scale our product and technology organization, strengthen our operating model, and lead the next phase of engineering productivity and AI\-enabled delivery. This role will help shape how Sphera grows: by improving execution clarity, enabling cross\-functional leadership, and driving measurable outcomes across a complex and high\-impact product portfolio.
 



 The Senior Program Manager, Strategic TPMO / PMO will lead high\-impact, cross\-functional programs across Product, Engineering, Architecture, QA, DevOps, Security, IT, Customer Success, and Go\-To\-Market teams. This role will provide strategic program governance, executive visibility, risk management, and dependency coordination for complex initiatives that require enterprise\-level alignment.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




**Strategic Program Leadership** 



* Lead complex, cross\-functional programs across multiple teams, product lines, or business functions.
* Build integrated program plans with clear milestones, owners, dependencies, risks, and decision points.
* Drive alignment across Product, Engineering, Architecture, QA, DevOps, Security, IT, Customer Success, and GTM.
* Keep programs focused on business outcomes, delivery commitments, and measurable impact.



**Executive Visibility and Governance** 



* Create executive\-ready program updates, risk summaries, decision logs, and milestone confidence views.
* Support leadership operating rhythms, portfolio reviews, and strategic initiative tracking.
* Translate complex program details into clear insights, risks, options, and recommended actions.



**Risk, Dependency, and Decision Management** 



* Identify and manage program risks, blockers, dependencies, and tradeoffs.
* Escalate issues early with facts, impact, and recommended paths forward.
* Ensure decisions are documented, owned, and resolved in a timely manner.



**Operating Model and Process Improvement** 



* Support the evolution of Sphera’s TPMO operating model.
* Clarify when work requires oversight versus routine Product and Engineering delivery.
* Create practical templates, reporting standards, governance models, and playbooks without adding unnecessary bureaucracy.



**Metrics and Delivery Insights** 



* Partner with Engineering Operations and leadership to improve visibility into program health and execution outcomes.
* Support reporting around milestone confidence, dependency aging, risk trends, delivery readiness, and portfolio status.
* Use data to support prioritization, staffing, and investment decisions.



**Required Experience** 



* 7\+ years of experience in program management, technical program management, product operations, or engineering operations.
* Experience leading complex cross\-functional software, SaaS, or technology programs.
* Strong understanding of product development, SDLC, release readiness, dependency management, and executive governance.
* Ability to operate across senior stakeholders and drive alignment in a matrixed organization.
* Strong executive communication skills, including concise written updates, dashboards, risks, and decision summaries.
* Experience with tools such as Azure DevOps, Jira, GitHub, Power BI, SharePoint, Confluence, Jellyfish, LinearB, or similar platforms.
* Comfortable working in ambiguity and creating structure across complex initiatives.



  





**Preferred Experience** 



* Experience in PE\-backed, acquisition\-heavy, or transformation\-oriented environments.
* Experience supporting product portfolio governance, integration programs, AI adoption, engineering productivity, or operating model transformation.
* Familiarity with engineering delivery metrics, portfolio reporting, and program health dashboards.
* PMP, PgMP, PMI\-ACP, SAFe, or similar certification preferred but not required.

96b6687b.title: Senior Staff Technical Program Manager
96b6687b.description:
**Job Summary:** 




 As a Senior Staff Technical Program Manager, you will lead media programs, influencing the teams' roadmap priorities and technical direction. This role combines strong technical understanding, program leadership, and agile delivery excellence. You will own end\-to\-end execution of critical programs, influence roadmap direction, manage cross\-team dependencies and senior stakeholders, and mentor teams to raise execution maturity across the organization.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Foster a culture of accountability, ownership, and collaboration
* Lead large, complex technical programs from planning through delivery independently
* Influence roadmap priorities by aligning stakeholders on objectives and outcomes
* Coordinate across engineering, product, and business teams to manage dependencies and ensure timely execution
* Facilitate cross\-pod collaboration and alignment to maintain delivery momentum
* Proactively plan for and mitigate risks, evaluating alternatives, quantifying trade\-offs, and structuring communication plans
* Apply Agile methodologies for iterative delivery, adaptive planning, and continuous improvement
* Coach teams on Agile best practices and foster high Scrum maturity
* Maintain sprint cadence and rigor through reviews, retrospectives, and OKR alignment
* Drive pod\-level accountability for JIRA hygiene, analytics reporting, and milestone tracking
* Ensure data\-driven decision\-making using clear metrics, dashboards, and visual progress reporting
* Regularly communicate program updates, decisions, and risks to leadership concisely and visually
* Continuously improve internal processes to enhance team efficiency and delivery velocity
* Act as a mentor for junior TPMs and team members to scale program management maturity



  





**Skills \& Attributes For Success:** 



* Deep technical understanding of scalable systems, with the ability to dive into architecture reviews, ask second\-order questions, and push for scalable, resilient solutions
* Highly structured thinker with the ability to break down ambiguous goals into executable plans, identify blind spots, and push for clarity in both direction and detail
* Strong grasp of risk/reward tradeoffs, and comfort operating in fast\-moving, high\-stakes environments with shifting priorities and evolving context
* Exceptional communicator, skilled in managing stakeholder expectations and aligning diverse teams on shared timelines, goals, and impact
* Strong program management experience managing cross functional initiatives end to end and driving influence without authority
* Strong experience leading complex cross\-functional programs involving AI/ML and GenAI systems at scale.
* Should have deep technical understanding of AI platforms, execution rigor, stakeholder management, and the ability to drive AI initiatives from strategy to production.
* Experience with LLMs, AI infrastructure, model lifecycle management, and scalable delivery processes is highly preferred.
* Expertise in Agile frameworks (Scrum, SAFe) and tools like JIRA, Confluence



  





**Preferred Education \& Experience:** 



* A Bachelor's/Master’s degree with a minimum of 12 years of experience, including 3 to 4 years in a Program Management role within the consumer technology sector



  





**About Us** 




 Perched firmly at the nucleus of spellbinding content and innovative technology, JioStar is a leading global media \& entertainment company that is reimagining the way audiences consume entertainment and sports. Its television network and streaming service together reach more than 750 million viewers every week, igniting the dreams and aspirations of hundreds of million people across geographies.
 



  





*JioStar is an equal opportunity employer. The company values diversity and its mission is to create a workplace where everyone can bring their authentic selves to work. The company ensures that the work environment is free from any discrimination against persons with disabilities, gender, gender identity and any other characteristics or status that is legally protected.*

7f424444.title: Technical Program Manager
7f424444.description:
**Overview of 66degrees** 




 66degrees is an end\-to\-end AI transformation partner that guides enterprises from complex business challenges to clear, quantifiable outcomes. Our company is the culmination of several successful firms, each a leader in its own right in cloud, artificial intelligence, and data. This convergence of talent and expertise is how we help businesses reach their own "inflection point," where chaotic data becomes a strategic asset, complexity becomes clarity, and AI becomes an engine for growth.
 



 Our ultimate vision is to be the catalyst for a future where every business operates as an intelligent enterprise, with autonomous systems unlocking human potential.
 



 At 66degrees, we believe in
 **Thriving Through Challenges** 
 and
 **Winning Together** 
 . These values not only guide us in achieving our goals as a company but also for our people. We are dedicated to creating a significant impact for our employees by fostering a culture that sparks innovation and supports professional and personal growth along the way.
 



**Overview of Role** 




 We are seeking an experienced
 **Technical Program Manager (TPM)** 
 to drive the execution and delivery of complex technology initiatives within our Product Engineering and Innovation organization.
 



 This role is ideal for professionals who have evolved from strong technical backgrounds in software engineering, architecture, or engineering leadership into program management roles. The successful candidate will act as the bridge between business stakeholders, product teams, architects, and engineering organizations to ensure successful execution of strategic initiatives.
 



 The role requires strong technical depth, architectural understanding, systems thinking, prioritization, risk management, and stakeholder management capabilities. While a strong technical foundation is essential, the focus of this role is on driving execution, managing multiple concurrent initiatives, and ensuring delivery predictability rather than hands\-on development.
 



**Responsibilities** 




**Technical Program Leadership \& Execution** 



* Lead multiple concurrent engineering and product initiatives across cross\-functional teams.
* Drive prioritization decisions and align execution with strategic business objectives.
* Develop and manage program roadmaps, execution plans, milestones, and delivery timelines.
* Identify critical paths, dependencies, risks, and mitigation strategies across programs.
* Establish program governance, status reporting, and delivery tracking mechanisms.
* Manage competing priorities while ensuring predictable delivery outcomes.
* Drive execution in ambiguous and fast\-paced environments.
* Proactively identify blockers and coordinate resolution across teams.
* Facilitate program reviews, escalation management, and executive\-level reporting.



**Technical Leadership \& Architectural Oversight** 



* Participate in architecture reviews, system design discussions, and technical planning sessions.
* Collaborate with architects and engineering leaders to align business objectives with technical execution.
* Review technical approaches, trade\-offs, and implementation strategies.
* Provide technical oversight across multiple initiatives and ensure scalable solution design.
* Identify technical risks early and drive mitigation strategies.
* Support engineering teams by facilitating technical clarity and decision\-making.



**Stakeholder Management \& Collaboration** 



* Act as the primary liaison between business stakeholders, product teams, architects, engineering teams, and leadership.
* Build strong relationships across cross\-functional teams to drive alignment and execution.
* Communicate program status, priorities, risks, dependencies, and recommendations to senior leadership.
* Facilitate decision\-making discussions and influence stakeholders across multiple organizational levels.
* Drive consensus and alignment in complex and rapidly evolving environments.



**Qualifications** 



* 8–15 years of experience across software engineering, architecture, technical leadership, and program delivery.
* Strong foundation as a Software Engineer, Technical Lead, Architect, Engineering Manager, or Technical Program Manager.
* Minimum of 3\+ years of experience in Technical Program Management, Technical Delivery, Engineering Leadership, or Product Engineering leadership roles.
* Proven experience leading complex technical programs and enterprise\-scale initiatives.
* Demonstrated experience managing multiple concurrent programs and stakeholders.
* Strong experience with prioritization, dependency management, critical path analysis, and risk management.
* Experience driving delivery execution across engineering, product, and business teams.
* Demonstrated ability to operate successfully in ambiguous and rapidly changing environments.
* Excellent communication, stakeholder management, and leadership skills.



**Technical Expertise** 



* Strong technical foundation in software engineering, architecture, or distributed systems.
* Strong understanding of system design principles and solution architecture.
* Experience with APIs, microservices, cloud\-native applications, and enterprise platforms.
* Experience with cloud platforms such as GCP, AWS, or Azure.
* Experience working with Data Engineering, Analytics Platforms, Data Pipelines, or enterprise data ecosystems.
* Understanding of modern AI ecosystems, Generative AI, LLM platforms, AI agents, and emerging technologies is desirable.
* Familiarity with Agile methodologies, DevOps principles, CI/CD pipelines, and modern software engineering practices.
* Ability to understand, review, and challenge technical and architectural decisions.
* Hands\-on coding experience is beneficial but not required in the current role.



**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Experience working in product engineering, consulting, innovation teams, or technology\-led organizations.
* Experience managing programs involving Cloud, Data, AI, or Digital Transformation initiatives.
* Experience working closely with Product Owners, Architects, AI Engineers, Data Engineers, and Business Stakeholders.
* Experience in Agile, Scrum, or modern product delivery methodologies.
* Exposure to Generative AI, AI\-enabled enterprise solutions, or emerging technology platforms is preferred.



  





*66degrees is an Equal Opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to actual or perceived race, color, religion, sex, gender, gender identity, national origin, age, weight, height, marital status, sexual orientation, veteran status, disability status or other legally protected class.*

dbf829d2.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
dbf829d2.description:
**Join our Team**
 Ericsson Enterprise Wireless Solutions is at the forefront of wireless WAN infrastructure innovation. As part of our WWAN Engineering organization, we are seeking an experienced Technical Program Manager to drive programs that contribute directly to the organization's growth and competitive advantage. You will work with a small, growing team of talented and experienced engineers developing state\-of\-the\-art Enterprise Router products that include Cellular, Wi\-Fi, GNSS, and Bluetooth radios requiring multiple antennas coexistent in single housing.
   

  

 Our organization thrives on collaboration, and you'll work closely with other technical leaders and teams to ensure alignment and co\-development of pioneering “cellular first” solutions. Ericsson Enterprise Wireless Solutions, a division within Ericsson, is the global leader in cloud\-delivered and cellular\-enabled network solutions.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Own and drive end\-to\-end delivery of complex hardware programs from requirements through launch, ensuring schedule, cost, and quality targets are met.
* Lead weekly program reviews with global design and manufacturing partners, providing clear status, risk assessment, and mitigation plans across 2–4 concurrent programs.
* Support end\-to\-end hardware (Electrical Engineering and Mechanical Engineering), firmware, and software development of products, coordinating across a broad range of technical issues.
* Work closely with cross functional teams across Electrical, Mechanical, RF, Thermal, FW, SW, Manufacturing, Quality, and Supply Chain to deliver robust, scalable, and cost\-effective product solutions.
* Proactively identify, manage, and escalate cross‑functional risks and issues, driving timely resolution.
* Interact confidently with senior management, highlighting risks across functional teams and providing recommendations to support product\-level decisions.
* Contribute to new product ideation, process improvement, design innovation, and road mapping.


**What You Will Bring**
* Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering (BSEE), Computer Engineering (BSCE), or a related engineering field; advanced degrees or equivalent education are also considered.
* 15\+ years of experience in hardware or firmware product development (R\&D).
* Strong organizational, project management, negotiation, and problem\-solving skills.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills, including the ability to interact effectively with worldwide partners and internal product groups.
* Outstanding teamwork and collaboration skills.
* Demonstrated ownership, accountability, and ability to lead cross‑functional teams without direct authority.
* Ability to thrive in a fast\-paced environment with high energy and an optimistic perspective.
* Experience with routers, switches, and modems.
* Experience collaborating closely with electrical, mechanical, RF, thermal, test, FW, SW, quality, and manufacturing teams.
* Demonstrated ability to meet performance, schedule, and cost goals.
* Proven experience working with global manufacturing partners, suppliers, and ODM/JDMs.
* Strong working knowledge of hardware development documentation and change control processes.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office 365, including MS Project.
* Strategic thinker with a long\-term vision for creating leading products.
* Interest in tracking industry technology trends.
* Willingness and ability to travel internationally at least quarterly.

ab892323.title: Lead Technical Program Manager
ab892323.description:
**Job Description**
 Job Description
   

  

**Experience: 10\+ years**
**Job Summary**
 We are seeking a Lead Technical Program Manager with strong functional understanding, technical depth, and excellent technical writing skills. The ideal candidate will bridge business, ERP, SCM, and engineering teams, driving complex programs involving web development, AI agents, and enterprise integrations. This role emphasizes functional clarity, execution discipline, and communication over pure hands\-on coding.

* Act as a bridge between business stakeholders, ERP teams, and engineering teams

 At Nextpower, we are driving the global energy transition with an integrated clean energy technology platform that combines intelligent structural, electrical, and digital solutions for utility\-scale power plants. Our comprehensive portfolio enables faster project delivery, higher performance, and greater reliability, helping our customers capture the full value of solar power. Our talented worldwide teams are redefining how solar power plants are designed, built, and operated every day with smart technology, data\-driven insights, and advanced automation. Together, we’re building the foundation for the world’s next generation of clean energy infrastructure.
   

  

**We are Nextpower**

a4b16e27.title: Security Risk & Compliance Program Manager
a4b16e27.description:
**Introduction**
 At IBM Software, we transform client challenges into solutions. Building the world’s leading AI\-powered, cloud\-native products that shape the future of business and society. Our legacy of innovation creates endless opportunities for IBMers to learn, grow, and make an impact on a global scale. Working in Software means joining a team fueled by curiosity and collaboration. You’ll work with diverse technologies, partners, and industries to design, develop, and deliver solutions that power digital transformation. With a culture that values innovation, growth, and continuous learning, IBM Software places you at the heart of IBM’s product and technology landscape. Here, you’ll have the tools and opportunities to advance your career while creating software that changes the world.
   

  

**Your Role And Responsibilities**
 As the Security Technical Program Manager in the Trust \& Security organization, you will play a critical role in fulfilling the vision to secure Confluent’s platform and cloud offerings through a combination of technical expertise, security experience, and excellent program management skills. You should be comfortable and experienced in driving and delivering highly complex projects on time, running significant security programs that span the entire company, and participating in operational security exercises, such as incident response and vulnerability management.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Manage and scale security programs by defining milestones and success criteria, resource allocation, and successful on\-time delivery with minimal supervision
* Proactively identify and resolve roadblocks/challenges affecting projects
* Drive automation and process improvements for security programs
* Explain technical architecture, decisions, and tradeoffs to both engineering and other functions
* Work with Engineering, Product, and Security leadership to streamline and drive our projects on a predictable schedule
* Work with stakeholders to drive cross\-cutting and/or critical security initiatives for the company
* Participate in operational security work, including incident response and vulnerability management


**Preferred Education**
 Master's Degree
   

  

**Required Technical And Professional Expertise**
* 3\-5 years of relevant industry experience
* Security experience is essential for this role
* Experience in running long\-term security programs that deliver iterative improvements and risk reduction over time
* Experience in operational security work, such as incident response and vulnerability management, M\&A
* Experience driving complex and massive projects across the organizations
* Experience in areas such as release management, cost modeling, and capacity planning is a plus
* Strong communication, interpersonal and leadership skills to work with both engineering and other non\-technical stakeholders
* Experience managing end\-to\-end lifecycle of technical projects
* Strong technical skills
* Experience in actual design and development of software projects is a plus
* Experience in standing up or scaling an incident response and detection engineering program is a plus
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, a related field, or equivalent practical experience

3d3f079d.title: Network Architect
3d3f079d.description:
**This role is for one of our clients**

Seniority level: Mid\-Senior level  



Min Experience: 8\+ years



Location: Noida



JobType: full\-time



We are seeking an experienced and customer\-focused Presales \&Implementation resource with valid OEM certifications (CCIE preferred) to support Enterprise Networking business. The ideal candidate will possess strong expertise in enterprise networking technologies, solution design, customer engagement, and hands\-on implementation \& troubleshooting of enterprise network infrastructure solutions.



**Requirements**
----------------



**Key Responsibilities**



Presales \& Solution Consulting  

* Engage with enterprise customers to understand business and technical requirements.
* Design scalable, secure, and high\-performance network solutions across switching, routing, wireless, and SD\-WAN environments.
* Prepare technical proposals, solution architectures, BOMs, SOWs, and RFP/RFI responses.
* Conduct customer presentations, workshops, solution demonstrations, and proof\-of\- concepts (POCs).
* Collaborate with OEMs, distributors, and internal sales teams to develop winning solutions.
  


**Implementation \& Delivery**  

* Lead deployment, migration, and implementation of enterprise networking solutions.
* Configure and troubleshoot enterprise switching, routing, wireless, SD\-WAN, and security technologies.
* Perform network assessments, health checks, optimization, and upgrade activities.
* Develop implementation plans, migration strategies, and rollback procedures.
* Support managed services and provide technical guidance to operations teams.
  


**Technical Skills**


* Valid certification from OEMs like HPe, Juniper, Cisco to name a few in switching, routing, security is a must.
* Strong hands\-on experience with switching, routing, Wireless, and SD\-WAN technologies.
* Expertise in BGP, OSPF, EIGRP, MPLS, VLAN, STP, HSRP/VRRP, QoS, and Multicast.
* Experience in enterprise networking architecture and solution design.
* Knowledge of network security, SASE, and Zero Trust architectures is desirable.

  


**Experience and Qualifications**  

* Bachelor;s degree in Engineering or related field.
* 8\-15 years of experience in enterprise networking presales and implementation.
* Strong customer\-facing, presentation, and stakeholder management skills.
* Experience working with system integrators, OEMs, consultants, and enterprise customers in pre\-sales \& post\-sales environments preferred.
  


### **Must\-have skills**



Presales, Enterprise Networking


### **Good\-to\-have skills**



SD\-WAN, BGP, SASE

d25b7a32.title: Presales Consultant
d25b7a32.description:
Pre Sales Consultant
 
**Company:** 
 Versalence AI
 



**Legal Entity:** 
 Versalence Infocomm Private Limited
 



**Website:** 
 versalence.ai
 



**Location:** 
 Remote
 



**Department:** 
 Sales and Solutions
 



**Reports to:** 
 Founder / Head of Sales
 



**Type:** 
 Full Time
 



**Experience:** 
 2 to 4 years in pre sales, solution consulting, technical sales, or B2B software sales
 



**Compensation:** 
 Up to ₹5,00,000 per annum fixed, plus uncapped incentives based on closed deal value
 


 About Versalence AI
 
 Versalence AI builds practical AI automation systems for businesses that want to reduce manual work, improve customer experience, and scale operations without adding unnecessary complexity.
 



 We work with businesses across construction, real estate, healthcare, consulting, hospitality, customer support, sales, and operations. Our work includes custom software platforms, AI automation, conversational AI, workflow automation, customer engagement systems, integrations, and business process automation.
 



 Our flagship platform, vCX, is an omni channel Social CRM that brings customer conversations, campaigns, human support, bots, workflow automation, and business integrations into one operating layer. It helps businesses manage customer interactions across channels such as WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook Messenger, webchat, voice, and other connected systems.
 



 We do not sell AI as a buzzword. We solve business problems. Our focus is simple: save time, reduce operational leakage, improve response quality, increase customer engagement, and make business easier.
 


 Role Overview
 
 We are looking for a Pre Sales Consultant who can sit between sales, clients, and delivery.
 



 This is not a passive demo role. You will be expected to understand a prospect’s business, identify workflow gaps, translate problems into solution possibilities, and help convert conversations into well scoped projects.
 



 You should be comfortable speaking to founders, CXOs, operations heads, sales teams, customer support leaders, and non technical business owners. Your job is to help them see what is broken, what can be improved, and how Versalence can build a practical solution.
 



 You will work closely with the Founder, sales team, and delivery team to run discovery calls, shape demos, prepare proposals, answer solution questions, and support deal closure.
 



  




 What You Will Do1\. Run Discovery Calls
 
 • Speak with prospects to understand their business model, current workflow, pain points, and decision process
 



 • Identify where they are losing time, money, leads, customers, visibility, or operational control
 



 • Ask structured questions around process, volume, current tools, manual effort, team roles, bottlenecks, and expected outcomes
 



 • Convert vague requirements into clear business problems
 



 • Document discovery notes clearly for internal solutioning and proposal preparation
 


 2\. Translate Business Problems Into Solutions
 
 • Map client pain points to practical automation, software, CRM, chatbot, workflow, or integration solutions
 



 • Explain solutions in business language, not technical jargon
 



 • Help prospects understand what will change in their day to day operations after implementation
 



 • Define realistic solution boundaries, dependencies, timelines, and expected outcomes
 



 • Avoid overpromising and ensure that the proposed solution can actually be delivered
 


 3\. Deliver Product and Solution Demos
 
 • Conduct live demos of vCX, bots, workflow automations, dashboards, and client relevant use cases
 



 • Customize demos to match the prospect’s industry and problem statement
 



 • Show how customer conversations, automation, human handoff, reporting, integrations, and follow ups can work together
 



 • Build confidence with non technical buyers by showing practical workflows rather than abstract technology
 



 • Collect demo feedback and identify buying signals, objections, and next steps
 


 4\. Support Proposal Creation
 
 • Work with the Founder and delivery team to prepare solution proposals, project scopes, timelines, and commercials
 



 • Help define deliverables, assumptions, exclusions, dependencies, and client responsibilities
 



 • Prepare proposal content, demo notes, solution summaries, and RFP responses
 



 • Create simple workflow diagrams, process notes, and solution explanations where needed
 



 • Ensure proposals are clear, credible, and aligned with client expectations
 


 5\. Handle Technical and Business Objections
 
 • Answer questions related to integrations, implementation effort, data flow, security, scalability, and support
 



 • Explain how systems can connect with CRMs, ERPs, websites, forms, APIs, email, WhatsApp, voice systems, and internal databases
 



 • Clarify what is possible now, what may need custom work, and what should be deferred to a later phase
 



 • Support pricing discussions by linking cost to business value and operational impact
 



 • Know when to bring in a technical team member for deeper architecture questions
 


 6\. Support Deal Movement
 
 • Help move prospects from first conversation to scoped opportunity
 



 • Prepare follow up notes after discovery and demo calls
 



 • Track client requirements, open questions, blockers, and next actions
 



 • Work with sales to improve conversion from lead to qualified opportunity to proposal to closure
 



 • Provide founder level visibility into deal quality, urgency, and solution fit
 


 7\. Feed Market Insights Back Into the Business
 
 • Share recurring client problems, requested integrations, objections, and market trends
 



 • Help improve demo flows, proposal templates, website messaging, and sales collateral
 



 • Identify use cases that can become repeatable offerings
 



 • Work with product and delivery teams to improve vCX, bot solutions, automation offerings, and vertical specific positioning
 



  




 What We Are Looking ForMust Have
 
 • 2 to 4 years of experience in pre sales, solutions consulting, technical sales, SaaS sales, B2B software sales, or automation consulting
 



 • Strong ability to run discovery calls and understand business processes
 



 • Ability to explain technology in simple business terms
 



 • Experience preparing proposals, solution notes, demos, or client facing documents
 



 • Good understanding of CRMs, workflow automation, chatbots, APIs, integrations, dashboards, or SaaS platforms
 



 • Ability to speak confidently with founders, operations heads, CXOs, sales leaders, and business owners
 



 • Excellent written and spoken English
 



 • Strong remote work discipline and ownership
 



 • Ability to switch between client calls, internal discussions, proposal work, and demo preparation
 



 • Practical mindset with the ability to distinguish between what is needed, what is possible, and what is unnecessary
 


 Nice To Have
 
 • Experience with tools such as n8n, Make, Zapier, Botpress, HubSpot, Zoho, Salesforce, Freshdesk, Zendesk, or WhatsApp Business API
 



 • Exposure to AI chatbots, AI agents, RAG systems, LLM based workflows, voice agents, or customer support automation
 



 • Experience selling or solutioning for industries such as construction, real estate, healthcare, hospitality, consulting, customer service, or IT services
 



 • Ability to create simple workflow diagrams, process maps, or solution architecture visuals
 



 • Prior experience supporting RFPs, vendor evaluations, enterprise demos, or pilot proposals
 



 • Basic understanding of data privacy, access control, user roles, and system security
 


 What Success Looks Like
 
 In this role, success is not just about giving demos. Success means helping Versalence win better deals.
 



 You will be measured on:
 



 • Quality of discovery notes and requirement understanding
 



 • Number of qualified opportunities supported
 



 • Demo quality and prospect engagement
 



 • Proposal quality and turnaround time
 



 • Contribution to deal closure
 



 • Ability to reduce confusion between client expectations and delivery scope
 



 • Quality of internal handover to project and delivery teams
 



 • Ability to identify repeatable solution patterns from client conversations
 


 Ideal Candidate Profile
 
 The ideal candidate is someone who enjoys understanding how businesses work.
 



 You should be curious enough to ask good questions, structured enough to document requirements, confident enough to lead a demo, and practical enough to know when not to overcomplicate a solution.
 



 You do not need to be a developer. But you should understand how business systems connect, how workflows move from one step to another, and how automation creates measurable value.
 



 You should be able to hear a business owner say, “My team wastes 3 hours every day following up with leads,” and convert that into a clear solution discussion around lead capture, assignment, follow up automation, CRM updates, reminders, reporting, and human escalation.
 


 Compensation
 
**Fixed Compensation:** 
 Up to ₹5,00,000 per annum
 



**Incentives:** 
 Uncapped incentives based on closed deal value
 



**Work Mode:** 
 Remote
 



**Employment Type:** 
 Full Time
 



 Final compensation will depend on experience, communication ability, solutioning capability, and demonstrated ownership.
 



  




 Why Join Versalence
 
 • Work directly with the Founder on live deals, product positioning, and client solutioning
 



 • Be part of an early stage company building real AI automation systems for real businesses
 



 • Work across multiple industries instead of being limited to one product script
 



 • Learn how AI, automation, CRM, bots, voice, workflows, and custom software come together in business environments
 



 • Play a visible role in revenue growth, proposal quality, and client conversion
 



 • Grow into a Solutions Lead, Head of Solutions, Product Consultant, or Enterprise Pre Sales role as the company scales
 



  




 How To Apply
 
 Send your resume and a short note of up to 200 words on the most complex deal, demo, or solution conversation you have handled.
 



 In your note, include:
 



 • What was the client problem?
 



 • What made it complex?
 



 • How did you approach the solution?
 



 • What was the outcome?
 



 Email: careers@versalence.ai
 



 Subject: Pre Sales Consultant \| Your Name
 


* Versalence AI is an equal opportunity employer.

19d65226.title: Senior Presales Consultant
19d65226.description:
**Job Description**
 MTX Group Inc. (MTX) is currently hiring for the position of
 **Senior Presales Consultant** 
 with strong multi\-cloud expertise and hands\-on Salesforce knowledge. The ideal candidate will design and propose scalable, secure, and cost\-efficient technical solutions across diverse technology ecosystems—including Salesforce, AWS, Azure, and integration/middleware platforms—without vendor bias.
   

  

 This role bridges sales, delivery, and engineering, bringing deep technical insight, excellent communication skills, and strong solution\-design capabilities to the RFx process.
   

  

 MTX is a global technology consulting firm that enables organisations to modernise through digital transformation. With data as the new currency, MTX helps transform long\-term strategy with outcomes in mind around happiness, health and the economy. MTX improves decision\-making with speed and quality by partnering with leading cloud technologies. MTX provides expertise across various platforms and technologies, including Microsoft, Google Cloud, Salesforce, artificial intelligence/machine learning, data integration, data governance, data quality, analytics, visualization, and mobile technology.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
 The Senior Pre\-Sales Consultant is expected to lead large\-scale/complex project(s), executing the following responsibilities:
   

  

 Client, Sales \& RFx Engagement:
   

  

* Lead the analysis of RFI/RFP/Tender documents to understand customer pain points, objectives, technical landscape, and constraints.
* Summarize bid details: agency background, contract duration, contract value, scope of work, user journeys, and design\-critical considerations.
* Participate in internal stakeholder/client meetings, discovery/business domain understanding workshops, requirement\-gathering sessions and existing client portal research..
* Collaborate with internal sales (including Salesforce PSS) and delivery teams to align solution direction and ensure feasibility.
* Support creation of Functional \& Technical Requirement Traceability Matrices.


 Solution Design \& Architecture (Platform\-Agnostic):
   

  

* Architect multi\-cloud, hybrid, and on\-premise solutions that meet functional, technical, security, and compliance requirements.
* Recommend best\-fit technology stacks—Salesforce or otherwise—based purely on customer needs and evaluation criteria.
* Create high\-level and detailed technical architecture diagrams, data flow models, and integration patterns.
* Translate requirements into epics, modules, feature lists, and high\-level solution blueprints.
* Apply modern architectural principles: microservices, API\-led integration, event\-driven frameworks, serverless, containerization, and cloud\-native patterns.


 Technical Expertise \& Ecosystem Knowledge:
   

  

 The ideal candidate brings broad technical versatility, including:
   

  

 Salesforce Ecosystem:
   

  

* Core technologies: Apex, Visualforce, Lightning (Aura/LWC), SOQL/SOSL, Salesforce APIs.
* Clouds: Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Experience Cloud, CPQ, Marketing Cloud, Data Cloud, Einstein.
* Integration: MuleSoft (API\-led connectivity), Dell Boomi, Informatica, Jitterbit, and other middleware platforms.
* DevOps \& CI/CD: Copado, Gearset, Bitbucket/Jenkins/GitHub Actions.
* Security \& governance: OAuth, SSO, profiles/permissions, event monitoring.
* Salesforce PSS engagement for deep technical validation \& alignment with product roadmap.


 Third Party Integrations:
   

  

* Document generation: Adobe DocGen, Conga, DocuSign Gen, Nintex.
* E\-signature: DocuSign, Adobe Sign, Zoho Sign.
* Storage/Content: SharePoint, Google Drive, AWS S3, OneDrive, Box.
* SMS/Communication: AWS End User Messaging, Twilio, Whatsapp APIs, Netcore.
* Monitoring/Logging: Splunk, Datadog, ELK.
* Analytics/BI: Tableau, Power BI, CRM Analytics.


 Cloud \& Application Stack:
   

  

* AWS, Azure, GCP (optional) cloud services.
* Databases: SQL, NoSQL.
* Programming: Java, Python, Node.js (advantage).
* Containerization: Docker, Kubernetes.
* AI/ML model usage \& LLM\-based solutioning.


 Estimation, Planning \& Financial Modelling
   

  

* Prepare accurate estimates for functional work, integrations, data migration, and system complexity.
* Develop implementation timelines, resource/staffing plans, and project roadmaps.
* Create margin analysis, cost breakdowns, and pricing models.
* Collaborate with sales and delivery leadership for approvals and validation.


 Technical Proposal \& Documentation
   

  

* Draft and refine technical sections for RFIs, RFPs, proposals, and solution decks.
* Convert customer requirements into compelling technical narratives and business value propositions.
* Document design assumptions, architectural decisions, and solution trade\-offs.
* Ensure solutions meet scalability, security, compliance, and performance standards.


**What you will bring:**
* 5–8 years of experience in Pre\-Sales, Solution Design, or Architecture roles.
* Strong multi\-cloud and Salesforce experience, including deep hands\-on understanding of integrations and ecosystem tools.
* Ability to convert requirements into modular solution components and architectural blueprints.
* Excellent communication skills to simplify complex concepts for business stakeholders.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills.
* Experience with technical writing, prompt engineering, and AI\-assisted solutioning.
* Proven experience participating in large\-scale RFx processes and cross\-functional collaboration.


**What we offer:**
* Group Medical Insurance (Family Floater Plan \- Self \+ Spouse \+ 4 Dependent Children)
+ Sum Insured: INR 5,00,000/\-
+ Maternity cover upto two children
+ Cashless \& Reimbursement facility
+ Access to free online doctor consultation

* Personal Accident Policy (Disability Insurance) \-
+ Sum Insured: INR. 25,00,000/\- Per Employee
+ Accidental Death and Permanent Total Disability is covered up to 100% of Sum Insured
+ Permanent Partial Disability is covered as per the scale of benefits decided by the Insurer
+ Temporary Total Disability is covered

* Optional Food Wallet (up to Rs. 2500 per month)
+ Offered as a tax saver component
+ Part of the special allowance component in the CTC

* Monthly Internet Reimbursement of upto Rs. 1,000
* Professional Development opportunities through various MTX\-sponsored certifications on multiple technology stacks, including Salesforce, Microsoft, Google Cloud, AWS \& other

a25616be.title: Presales Specialist
a25616be.description:
Urgent hiring for Presales Manager
 



  





 Profile \- Presales Manager
 



 Location \- Hyderabad
 



 Experience \- 8\-10 Years
 



 Salary upto 12 LPA ( Depends on Interview )
 



  





 Role \& Responsibilities
 



 • Client Discovery \& Solutioning: Engage with client’s post\-initial outreach to extract business challenges, shape conversations, and craft tailored digital and AI\-led solutions.
 



 • Hands on understanding and profiling of Client requirement documented in RFP, RFQ, DPR and EOI’s.
 



 • To align with bid team and draft the detailed solution stack and required architecture of client requirement.
 



 • Efforts Estimation and to understand the required compliance from infra and solution requirement aspects.
 



 • Presentation: Build compelling, insight\-driven client decks that align internal strengths with external needs independently and in collaboration with cross\-functional teams.
 



 • Cross\-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with design, tech, and content teams to create cohesive proposals and solution narratives.
 



 • Strategic Account Support: Act as a trusted advisor, helping grow existing accounts by identifying white spaces, use cases, and transformation levers.
 



 • Industry Analysis: Understand client industries via annual reports, investor presentations, and trend analysis to frame relevant recommendations.
 



 • Client Relationship Management: Build rapport, offer fresh perspectives, and support decision\-making without a hard\-sell approach.
 



 • Internal External Mapping: Balance a strong outside\-in understanding of client environments with an inside\-out knowledge of our solution toolkit.
 



  





 Preferred Candidate Profile
 



 • 8 to 10 years of experience in IT Product \& IT Services preferably with AI, Cloud technology and security stack exposure.
 



 • Proven track record in solutioning, pre\-sales, or client consultancy.
 



 • Strong understanding of AI\-led transformation, digital engineering, and emerging tech.
 



 • Demonstrated ability to convert abstract client pain points into actionable solution narratives.
 



 • Excellent presentation, communication, and storytelling skills.
 



 • Comfortable working in an impact\-driven role focused on account growth

0149226c.title: GM - Presales Solution Architect
0149226c.description:
**Who We Are**
 VOIS (Vodafone Intelligent Solutions) is a strategic arm of Vodafone Group Plc, creating value for customers by delivering intelligent solutions through Talent, Technology \& Transformation.
   

  

 As the largest shared services organisation in the global telco industry with 30,000 FTE, our portfolio of next\-generation solutions and services are designed in partnership with customers across Vodafone Group, local markets, and partner markets to simplify and drive growth. With our strategic partner Accenture, we work alongside our Vodafone customers, other Telco and tech companies to drive transformation, meet the challenges of our industry and ensure we stay relevant and resilient. This partnership is a unique, industry\-first model which brings together the best of in\-house and 3rd party capability.
   

  

 We work with customers across 28 countries from 10 VOIS locations: Albania, Egypt, Hungary, India, Romania, Spain, Turkey, UK, Germany, Ireland, and with a network of teams in Czech Republic, Italy, Greece, and Portugal.
   

  

 \#VOIS \#BeUnrivalled \#CreateTheFuture
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking an experienced End\-to\-End Solution Architect to lead the design of complex, high\-value customer solutions across the VOIS organisation. This role focuses on large, multi\-tower opportunities, bringing together technology, business, care and corporate services into compelling, commercially sound propositions. The individual will work closely with customers up to CxO level, sales teams, service towers and delivery leaders to ensure solutions are differentiated, deliverable, and profitable.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Lead end\-to\-end solution definition for large, complex opportunities (typically exceeding €5m contract value) across multiple service towers and service units
* Engage directly with customers, including senior executives, to understand strategic objectives and translate these into value\-led solution propositions
* Orchestrate integrated solutions across technology, business services, customer care and corporate functions, collaborating with domain and technology solution architects
* Define platform, system and integration architectures aligned to customer requirements and VOIS capabilities
* Develop end\-to\-end delivery, staffing and location models in close collaboration with service tower delivery owners
* Drive make\-or\-buy and partner decisions to optimise use of VOIS assets and the wider partner ecosystem
* Consolidate effort, cost and location estimates, ensuring inputs to pricing and commercial teams are accurate, realistic and margin\-protective
* Quantify delivery risks and certainty, supporting informed commercial and leadership decision\-making
* Present solutions to customers during bids and orals, acting as solution owner and incorporating customer feedback into iterative proposals
* Provide independent quality assurance and solution reviews for both large and smaller service tower\-led opportunities


**Who You Are**
* An experienced pre\-sales Solution Architect with extensive exposure to complex, multi\-tower opportunities within a large professional services environment
* Highly skilled in solution design across one or more domains such as technology, customer care, business services, HR, supply chain or finance
* Confident in effort estimation, staffing pyramids, productivity modelling and commercial optimisation for large\-scale solutions
* Comfortable influencing and collaborating with senior stakeholders, including C\-level leaders, in a global and matrixed organisation
* Knowledgeable about the telecommunications industry, with the ability to align solutions to sector trends and customer expectations
* Educated to degree level from a leading university


**Not a perfect fit?**
 Concerned you may not meet every requirement? Vodafone is committed to creating an inclusive workplace where everyone can thrive. If you are excited about this role but your experience does not align exactly with every aspect of the job description, you are encouraged to apply. You may be the right candidate for this or another opportunity, and the recruitment team will support you in exploring where your skills fit best.
   

  

**What's In It For You**
* Exposure to some of the most complex and strategically significant customer opportunities across VOIS
* The opportunity to work closely with global customers, senior leaders and diverse specialist teams
* A role with clear influence on commercial outcomes, solution quality and customer success
* A collaborative, international environment that values expertise, knowledge sharing and continuous improvement


**What Skills You Will Learn**
* Advanced multi\-tower solution orchestration and commercial solution shaping
* Risk\-based solution modelling and delivery certainty assessment
* Reuse\-driven solution architecture through knowledge harvesting and estimator calibration
* Enhanced executive\-level communication and bid leadership capabilities


**VOIS Equal Opportunity Employer Commitment**
 Vodafone recognises and celebrates the value of diversity in building a workforce that reflects the customers and communities it serves. No form of discrimination is tolerated. This includes, but is not limited to, discrimination based on race, colour, age, veteran status, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, pregnancy, maternity or parental status, ethnicity, disability, religion or belief, political affiliation, trade union membership, nationality, citizenship, indigenous status, medical condition, HIV status, neurodiversity, social origin, cultural background, marital or civil partnership status, or socio\-economic background.
   

  

**Join Us**
 At Vodafone, we’re working hard to build a better future. A more connected, inclusive and sustainable world. As a dynamic global community, it's our human spirit, together with technology, that empowers us to achieve this.
   

  

 We challenge and innovate in order to connect people, businesses, and communities across the world. Delighting our customers and earning their loyalty drive us, and we experiment, learn fast and get it done, together.
   

  

 With us, you can be truly be yourself and belong, share inspiration, embrace new opportunities, thrive, and make a real difference.

5351f94d.title: Product Solutions Engineer, Gtech
5351f94d.description:
Note: By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following:
 **Gurugram, Haryana, India; Hyderabad, Telangana, India** 
 .
 **Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 3 years of experience troubleshooting technical issues for internal/external partners or customers.
* Experience in either system design or reading code (e.g., Java, C\+\+, Python).


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Master’s degree in Business, Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, Engineering or Applied Science, or a related field.
* 5 years of experience managing projects and working with analytics, software coding, or customer\-side web technologies.
* 5 years of experience with data analysis and SQL/MySQL.
* Demonstrated ability to work well in a broad environment with people from all backgrounds, solve problems and think critically.
* Problem solving experience to develop strategic perspectives on customer\-focused solutions.
* Customer first and empathetic mindset, and ability to own end to end experience and solutions.


**About The Job**
 As a Technical Solutions Consultant, you will be responsible for the technical relationship of our largest advertising clients and/or product partners. You will lead cross\-functional teams in Engineering, Sales and Product Management to leverage emerging technologies for our external clients/partners. From concept design and testing to data analysis and support, you will oversee the technical execution and business operations of Google's online advertising platforms and/or product partnerships.
   

  

 You will be able to balance business and partner needs with technical constraints, develop innovative, cutting edge solutions and act as a partner and consultant to those you are working with. You will also be able to build tools and automate products, oversee the technical execution and business operations of Google's partnerships, as well as develop product strategy and prioritize projects and resources.
   

  

 Google creates products and services that make the world a better place, and gTech’s role is to help bring them to life. Our teams of trusted advisors support customers globally. Our solutions are rooted in our technical skill, product expertise, and a thorough understanding of our customers’ complex needs. Whether the answer is a bespoke solution to solve a unique problem, or a new tool that can scale across Google, everything we do aims to ensure our customers benefit from the full potential of Google products.
   

  

 To learn more about gTech, check out our video .
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Prioritize and deliver outstanding customer service throughout the customer journey, troubleshooting and resolving issues with Google's advertisers and Sales teams, agencies and partners.
* Learn about our AI powered Ads products like PMax, our Ads Platforms. Troubleshoot complex technical product issues. Apply deep product expertise solving complex technical customer issues and escalations.
* Improve product feature offerings by providing partner feedback to internal cross\-functional teams, including Product Management, Engineering and Business Solutions teams.
* Analyze data and insights to create action plans to solve issues at the root cause for our top customers focusing on knowledge management, operational improvements, account reviews and product adoption.
* Partner with our Sales and other cross\-functional partner teams (as applicable) to own and continuously improve the journey of all clients across, resolve complex issues and understand customer pain points.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .
