a9ca6f2e.title: AES - Application Modernization - Advanced Skills - Cloud
a9ca6f2e.description:
We are seeking an experienced **Senior Software Engineer / Technical Lead – Spring Boot, GCP, PostgreSQL, Retail Commerce \& Oracle ATG** with 8\+ years of hands\-on development experience and a minimum of 3\+ years in team leadership. The ideal candidate will possess strong expertise in designing and developing scalable eCommerce solutions using Spring Boot Microservices, Oracle ATG Commerce, Google Cloud Platform (GCP), and PostgreSQL. This role requires strong technical leadership, solution design capabilities, stakeholder management, and end\-to\-end ownership of software delivery  

  

  



* 8\+ years of experience in software development.
* 3\+ years of proven experience leading development teams.
* Strong coding skills in Java and hands\-on experience with Spring Boot Microservices Framework.
* Extensive experience with Oracle ATG Commerce (ATG) development, customization, and integration.
* Strong understanding of Retail Commerce and eCommerce business processes.
* Experience designing and developing scalable, resilient, and secure enterprise applications.
* Hands\-on experience with Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and cloud\-native architectures.
* Strong experience with PostgreSQL database design, optimization, and performance tuning.
* Proven experience with RESTful APIs, Microservices, and distributed systems.
* Strong code reviewing skills, debugging expertise, and technical problem\-solving abilities.
* Hands\-on experience with JUnit, Mockito, and Cucumber testing frameworks.
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines, Git, Bitbucket, and DevOps practices.
* Hands\-on experience with Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, and Infrastructure Automation.
* Ability to work independently and take ownership through production deployment and support.
* Strong communication, client coordination, and stakeholder management skills.
* Experience working in high\-availability and high\-performance environments.
* Mandatory experience in Retail /eCommerce domain.
* Strong experience in Catalog Management, Pricing, Promotions, Shopping Cart, Checkout, and Order Management.
* Experience integrating commerce platforms with Loyalty, Rewards, Martech, Payment, OMS, and SaaS\-based applications.

9c6a441d.title: Solutions Architect - ITSM [T500-27477]
9c6a441d.description:
**About McDonald’s:** 




 One of the world’s largest employers with locations in more than 100 countries, McDonald’s Corporation has corporate opportunities in Hyderabad. Our global offices serve as dynamic innovation and operations hubs, designed to expand McDonald's global talent base and in\-house expertise. Our new office in Hyderabad will bring together knowledge across business, technology, analytics, and AI, accelerating our ability to deliver impactful solutions for the business and our customers across the globe.
 



  





 This opportunity is part of the Global Technology Enterprise Products \& Platforms, focused on enabling enterprise\-wide services through McDonald’s global ServiceNow platform, where our vision is to “Always be a people led, product centric, future focused \& trusted technology partner of choice.”
 



  





**Responsibilities \& Accountabilities:** 




**Solution Design and Architecture:** 



* Work closely with stakeholders to understand business objectives, challenges, user needs, and functional requirements across products and workflows.
* Develop end\-to\-end solution designs for ServiceNow\-enabled products and workflow capabilities that meet business requirements and integrate effectively with existing McDonald’s systems and platforms.
* Define solution architecture across relevant ServiceNow capabilities, with deep expertise in ITSM, ITOM, HAM, and SAM, and preferred experience across additional modules such as HRSD, CSM, SPM, App Engine, portal experiences, workflow automation, and enterprise integrations based on product and business priorities.
* Ensure solutions are scalable, secure, usable, maintainable, and aligned with enterprise and platform standards, balancing business value, speed, user experience, and operational supportability.
* Create and maintain architectural documentation for assigned products and initiatives, including solution designs, process flows, architecture diagrams, integration patterns, data flows, and technical specifications.
* Define reusable solution patterns and design approaches across products and workflows, and ensure consistent implementation in partnership with product and engineering teams.
* Communicate solution architecture direction effectively to stakeholders, ensuring shared understanding of design decisions, tradeoffs, dependencies, and impacts.
* Provide solution architecture expertise across design and delivery phases for assigned products and initiatives, partnering with implementation teams to ensure solutions are delivered in alignment with intended business outcomes and approved architecture.
* Define architecture for boundary systems and integrations related to assigned products and workflows, including APIs, identity flows, data exchange, and orchestration patterns; partner with adjacent teams to resolve issues, mitigate risks, and escalate broader cross\-platform design decisions as needed.
* Own solution architecture for assigned products and initiatives, ensuring alignment of workflow design, business process enablement, data requirements, security controls, user experience, reporting needs, and support models.



  





**Technology Strategy and Roadmap:** 



* Contribute to roadmap planning for ServiceNow\-enabled products and workflows by identifying architecture needs, dependencies, technical options, and sequencing considerations in alignment with business priorities and platform direction.
* Identify opportunities to improve product capabilities, workflow effectiveness, automation, and end\-user experience by leveraging ServiceNow features and adjacent enterprise technologies.
* Contribute architectural evaluations and recommendations for new ServiceNow capabilities, module enhancements, integrations, and vendor solutions, including business value, technical fit, delivery implications, and long\-term maintainability.



  





**Collaborate with Cross\-Functional Teams:** 



* Foster collaboration with product managers, engineering teams, operations, cybersecurity, enterprise architecture, data teams, and business units to ensure alignment between architectural vision, delivery plans, and measurable business outcomes.
* Partner effectively with other architects, product managers, engineering teams, operations, and business stakeholders to promote consistent patterns, architectural rigor, and scalable solution outcomes across assigned products and initiatives.
* Participate in architecture reviews, alignment sessions, and decision forums to support consistency, resolve tradeoffs within assigned scope, and raise broader portfolio issues to the appropriate architecture and product leaders.



  





**Implementation and Support:** 



* Partner with engineering and delivery teams to implement approved solution designs and provide architecture guidance on complex product, workflow, and integration challenges within assigned scope.
* Provide architectural support across assigned initiatives, ensuring timely engagement on complex design topics, effective issue escalation, and practical resolution of architecture\-related delivery risks.
* Support solution delivery through design reviews, issue resolution, dependency management, and transition planning to ensure solutions are supportable and aligned with business intent.



  





**Governance and Compliance:** 



* Ensure solution designs comply with enterprise architecture principles, security requirements, regulatory expectations, and McDonald’s policies.
* Identify solution\-level risks, design gaps, and technical dependencies, and define mitigation strategies that improve delivery quality, maintainability, and business continuity.
* Partner with platform architecture, cybersecurity, and risk teams to ensure product and workflow solutions align with approved standards, controls, and architectural guardrails.
* Support adherence to approved architecture standards, governance processes, and design guardrails across assigned initiatives, and raise exceptions or risks requiring broader review.



  





**Qualifications:** 




**Basic Qualifications:** 



* 8\+ years of experience in solution architecture, enterprise applications, platform engineering, or related technology roles within large\-scale, global environments
* 5\+ years of experience architecting and delivering ServiceNow\-based solutions, including deep hands\-on expertise in ITSM, ITOM, HAM, and SAM
* Experience providing technical leadership, architectural guidance, and design review support across cross\-functional teams and implementation partners
* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field
* Strong understanding of ServiceNow solution architecture, workflow design, CMDB and asset data concepts, security considerations, integration patterns, and enterprise application architecture principles, especially across ITSM, ITOM, HAM, and SAM.
* Demonstrated knowledge of business solution design and workflow orchestration in a QSR, retail, enterprise applications, or back\-office systems environment
* Knowledge of software engineering and delivery practices across the full software development life cycle, including requirements, design, testing, release management, and operational support
* Strong knowledge of APIs, integration frameworks, identity and access patterns, data architecture principles, and enterprise application interoperability
* Experience applying product and agile ways of working, including best practices and lessons learned to standardize and refine delivery approaches
* Highly experienced in working collaboratively with business partners, product teams, architects, and engineering teams to drive outcomes and solve complex business and technical challenges across a global matrixed organization
* Demonstrated ability to influence solution design decisions and provide technical leadership across internal teams, suppliers, and implementation partners
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to articulate complex technical concepts, solution tradeoffs, and business impacts to non\-technical and executive stakeholders
* Strong problem\-solving and innovation skills to identify, develop, and improve techniques, procedures, services, or products
* Demonstrated ability to contribute to a collaborative environment that encourages learning, constructive challenge, thoughtful risk\-taking, and continuous improvement
* Relevant ServiceNow and industry certifications are a plus.
* Experience partnering with platform architects, cybersecurity experts, and delivery teams to ensure solutions align with broader technical strategy and standards is desirable



  





**Preferred Qualifications:** 



* ServiceNow Expertise: Strong experience architecting enterprise solutions across ITSM, ITOM, HAM, and SAM, with exposure to HRSD, CSM, SPM, IRM/SecOps, and App Engine.
* Enterprise Integrations: Hands\-on experience integrating ServiceNow with HR, ERP, Finance, Identity, and collaboration platforms using REST, SOAP, Integration Hub, and middleware.
* Architecture \& Governance: Expertise in solution architecture, platform standards, security, compliance, governance, and SaaS architecture best practices.
* ServiceNow Certifications: Relevant certifications such as CSA, CAD, CIS (ITSM/HAM/SAM/Discovery/Service Mapping), or CTA preferred.
* Delivery \& Process Excellence: Strong knowledge of ITIL, Agile, Jira, Confluence, solution documentation, workflow design, and product\-centric delivery.
* Technical Leadership: Ability to drive architecture decisions, evaluate risks and trade\-offs, recommend scalable solutions, and lead business process transformation and solution adoption.

ca140e14.title: Software Development Engineer, Sidewalk Cloud, Sidewalk Cloud
ca140e14.description:
**Description**
 Ring is looking for Software development Engineer to join our growing Sidewalk Cloud services team and help build a nationwide community network that will enable connectivity for millions of IOT devices. You will be responsible for building core cloud services that will provide a scalable backbone to the network and support functionalities like authentication, encryption, message routing, and device life\-cycle management. You will develop real\-time monitoring and analytics solutions to continuously learn, and help keep customer trust by preventing security incidents and improving network availability.
   

  

 As a Software Development Engineer, you will have the opportunity to influence the product roadmap, drive key components of overall system architecture and lead the adoption of best practices within the org. You will work closely with and influence AWS IOT service teams, as well as cross functional teams across Ring, Echo, and Alexa, to bring a unified connectivity solution for our customers.
   

  

 Sidewalk cloud team owns all the core services and infrastructure that is backbone of the Sidewalk network. Sidewalk is already enabled on more than 80 million Amazon and Ring devices, with more devices added every day. The team is responsible for scaling the core connectivity and messaging platform for the network. Services follow event driven system architecture that blends various server\-less computer technologies. The team believes in choosing the right tool and technology for the job, and has created services in various programming languages like Java, Kotlin, Go, Rust, and Python.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Manage key components of the core Sidewalk network services and messaging platform that processes millions of messages daily.
* Think big; bring fresh ideas and approaches to simplify onboarding new devices on the Sidewalk network and improve customer value.
* Evaluate different design choices, prototype new technology, and implement technical solutions that address business requirements.
* Contribute to defining product roadmap, understand business impact of system choices, and make technical trade\-offs using sound judgment.
* Work closely with ML scientists, understand the requirements, design and deliver innovative monitoring solutions to help preserve customer trust.
* Develop and integrate generative AI solutions to enhance operational efficiency, including automated debugging tools, intelligent testing frameworks, and AI\-powered documentation generation.
* Build and maintain AI\-powered support systems that can analyze device behavior, perform automated triage, and provide intelligent recommendations for issue resolution.
* Create intelligent automation tools that streamline development workflows, including AI\-assisted code generation, automated testing environments, and smart deployment processes.
* Design and implement AI\-driven analytics solutions for monitoring service health, detecting anomalies, and providing proactive insights across multiple dashboards and metrics.
* Drive engineering best practices around operational excellence, security, test automation coverage and set standards in the team.
* Deal with ambiguity, make data\-driven decisions and juggle cross\-organization complexity.
* Drive consensus when confronted with discordant views by identifying the best path forward and influencing others to follow it.


**About The Team**
 Since its founding in 2013, Ring has been on a mission to make neighborhoods safer, together for everyone. From the first\-ever Video Doorbell, to the award\-winning DIY Ring Alarm system, Ring’s smart home security product line, as well as the Neighbors app, offer users affordable whole\-home and neighborhood security. At Ring, we are committed to making security accessible and convenient for everyone—while working hard to bring communities together. Ring is an Amazon company. For more information, visit www.ring.com. With Ring, you’re always home.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 3\+ years of non\-internship professional software development experience
* 2\+ years of non\-internship design or architecture (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems experience
* Experience programming with at least one software programming language


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 3\+ years of full software development life cycle, including coding standards, code reviews, source control management, build processes, testing, and operations experience
* Bachelor's degree in computer science or equivalent


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- ADCI \- BOM \- Non STPI
   

  

 Job ID: A10375342

71a32cb8.title: Web Solutions Engineer, Google Technical Services
71a32cb8.description:
**Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Math or related quantitative field, or equivalent practical experience in software development.
* 2 years of experience in full\-stack software development.
* Experience working with database technologies (e.g., SQL, NoSQL).
* Experience with back\-end languages (e.g., Java, Python, or C\+\+).
* Experience with front\-end languages (e.g., JavaScript or TypeScript).


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Ability to adapt in a dynamic environment, and prioritize/manage tasks efficiently.
* Ability to provide effective technical solutions to business challenges.
* Passion for engineering, with experience with unit testing, agile project development, and bug and change management systems.


**About The Job**
 gTech Ads is responsible for all support and media and technical services for customers big and small across our entire Ad products stack. We help our customers get the most out of our Ad and Publisher products and guide them when they need help. We provide a range of services from enabling better self help and in\-product support, to providing better support through interactions, setting up accounts and implementing ad campaigns, and providing media solutions for customers business and marketing needs and providing complex technical and measurement solutions along with consultative support for our large customers. These solutions range from bespoke and customized ones for our customers to scalable support for millions of customers worldwide. Based on the evolving needs of our ads customers, we partner with Sales, Product and Engineering teams within Google to develop better solutions, tools, and services to improve our products and enhance our client experience. As a cross\-functional and global team, we ensure our customers get the best return on investment with Google and we remain a trusted partner.
   

  

 Google Ads is helping power the open internet with the best technology that connects and creates value for people, publishers, advertisers, and Google. We’re made up of multiple teams, building Google’s Advertising products including search, display, shopping, travel and video advertising, as well as analytics. Our teams create trusted experiences between people and businesses with useful ads. We help grow businesses of all sizes from small businesses, to large brands, to YouTube creators, with effective advertiser tools that deliver measurable results. We also enable Google to engage with customers at scale.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Design, build, deploy, and improve scalable, and modern full\-stack web applications using standard and Google\-specific software development tools.
* Analyze problems and develop solutions, while identifying dependencies and resolving issues to drive implementation.
* Make technical contributions, including writing and reviewing design documents, tests, and code (e.g., JavaScript, Python, TypeScript, SQL).
* Provide subject\-matter expertise and utilize comprehensive knowledge of Google's relevant technologies, principles, practices, and coding standards.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional users and stakeholders to identify pain points and devise innovative technical solutions.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

91efcc78.title: Partner Solutions Engineer
91efcc78.description:
**Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
* Experience in technical project management, stakeholder management, professional services, solution engineering, or technical consulting.
* Experience in either system design or reading code (e.g., Java, C\+\+, Python).


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Master’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Business, or a related field.
* Familiarity with the ad serving industry and internet technologies.
* Familiarity with the video industry landscape (tech, ecosystem, etc).
* Ability to absorb complex technical concepts and convey them to a non\-technical audience effectively.
* Excellent problem\-solving and data\-driven decision\-making skills.


**About the job** 
 As a Technical Solutions Consultant, you will be responsible for the technical relationship of our largest advertising clients and/or product partners. You will lead cross\-functional teams in Engineering, Sales and Product Management to leverage emerging technologies for our external clients/partners. From concept design and testing to data analysis and support, you will oversee the technical execution and business operations of Google's online advertising platforms and/or product partnerships.
   

  

 You will be able to balance business and partner needs with technical constraints, develop innovative, cutting edge solutions and act as a partner and consultant to those you are working with. You will also be able to build tools and automate products, oversee the technical execution and business operations of Google's partnerships, as well as develop product strategy and prioritize projects and resources.
   

  

 Google creates products and services that make the world a better place, and gTech’s role is to help bring them to life. Our teams of trusted advisors support customers globally. Our solutions are rooted in our technical skill, product expertise, and a thorough understanding of our customers’ complex needs. Whether the answer is a bespoke solution to solve a unique problem, or a new tool that can scale across Google, everything we do aims to ensure our customers benefit from the full potential of Google products.
   

  

 To learn more about gTech, check out our video .
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Serve as the technical expert during conversations with executive leadership from Google’s video advertising partners.
* Help partners in their day\-to\-day issues by delivering innovative and scalable solutions to their problems, troubleshooting their issues and performing implementation reviews.
* Provide high touch technical consultation, including: custom sample applications, demos and proofs of concept, integration support and difficult issue troubleshooting.
* Advocate Google Ad Manager’s video capabilities via pre\-sales engagements, implementations, conference presentations, white papers and industry consortiums.
* Provide partner feedback and industry knowledge to Product Management, to help them make better informed decisions about the product roadmaps.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

cd019d73.title: Solutions Architect
cd019d73.description:
**Role: Associate Solutions Architect** 




**Location: Bangalore (Hybrid)** 




**Experience: 4–6 Years Cloud Experience** 




**Work Hours: 12 PM \- 10 PM (Some Overlap with US Hours)** 




  





**About Us** 




  





 Lucidity is a rapidly growing company with a first of its kind and impactful product in the cloud storage. Joining Lucidity offers the opportunity to work on cutting\-edge technology, solve real\-world problems for major enterprises, and be part of a company that is reshaping the future of cloud storage.
 


* We were also awarded
 **Best Infra and Dev Tools SaaS Startup** 
 by
 **SaaSBoomi** 
 –
 
 Link
* Listed among
 **India’s Top Startups by LinkedIn** 

 Link
* We are backed by $32 M in funding from investors like Alpha Wave Global, WestBridge Capital, and Beenext \-
 
 Link
* We are the category leader in cloud storage optimization.
* Trusted by major enterprises, including Fortune 500 companies spanning across the US and the UK, being the major Markets.
* Opportunity to work with experienced co\-founders
 
 Vatsal
 
 \&
 
 Nitin
 
 \- serial entrepreneurs who bring with them more than a decade of experience working with companies like Microsoft, Swiggy, and Tracxn and building and selling large tech products.
* Work in deep tech company and be part of an accelerated growth journey
* We have a presence across India, Abu Dhabi, the US, and the UK.



**What we do** 




 Lucidity is a company that provides an automated NoOps disk auto\-scaler for cloud storage across AWS, Azure, and GCP. It addresses over\-provisioned block storage by dynamically scaling capacity, increasing disk utilization to around 80% from 25\-35%. This results in cost reductions of up to 70% for businesses.
 **Here's a
 
 video
 
 of what Lucidity does.** 




  





**Key benefits include:** 



* **Significant Cost Savings** 
 on storage (especially EBS costs).
* **Elimination of Downtime** 
 by preventing disk space issues.
* **Reduced DevOps Effort** 
 through automation.
* **Application Agnostic** 
 solution works with various systems.



**Few additional useful links:
 
 website**
 ,
 **blogs**


 :
 **Youtube**


 :
 **LinkedIn**




 We are growing aggressively and plan to expand our revenue by 5x in the next 1 year. We are passionate about creating something unique, innovative, and big from India for global customers.
 



**Role Overview** 




 Lucidity is hiring a
 **Solution Architect** 
 to work from the
 **Founders Office** 
 and own high\-impact, ambiguous, cross\-functional technical initiatives end\-to\-end.
 



 While the external title aligns closest to a
 **Solutions Architect** 
 , this is
 **not** 
 a traditional pre\-sales, sales engineering, or partnerships role. This is a
 **high\-leverage, deeply technical IC position** 
 for someone who thrives at the intersection of
 **engineering, product, customers, and cloud providers** 
 and can independently drive clarity, execution, and outcomes where bandwidth or ownership is missing.
 



 You will act as a
 **technical buffer and force\-multiplier** 
 for the founders and core engineering team picking up hard, undefined problems and pushing them to concrete, usable outputs: PoCs, benchmarks, research, documentation, architectural insights, and validated recommendations.
 



 This role is built for someone who enjoys
 **extreme ownership, fast context switching, and solving real technical problems without waiting for perfect specs or process** 
 .
 



  





**Core Responsibilities** 




**1\. PoCs, Benchmarking \& Experimentation (≈30%)** 



* Design and execute performance benchmarks (IOPS, throughput, latency, cost\-performance)
* Run storage and infrastructure compatibility testing across AWS, Azure, GCP, and Tier\-2 CSPs
* Independently design experiments, identify variables, interpret results, and document findings
* **Deliver fast, pragmatic insights that engineering and product can immediately act on**



**2\. Technical Research \& Writing (≈20%)** 



* Produce
 **technical documentation** 
 (architecture articulation, technical claims input; not legal filing)
* Write deep technical research on infrastructure trends, edge cases, and emerging stacks (AI/ML, backup, storage, compute)
* Translate complex technical findings into clear narratives for engineering, founders, or GTM teams
* **Use writing as a thinking tool—iterate as you investigate**



**3\. Engineering Overflow \& Deep Problem Solving (≈20%)** 



* Step in when Product or Delivery teams can’t extract the right technical signal
* Debug complex, multi\-component issues across cloud, storage, OS, and application layers
* Investigate backup/restore behaviors, performance anomalies, or architectural edge cases
* **Synthesize truth from noisy data and incomplete information**



**4\. Cloud, CSP \& Partner Technical Engagement (≈15%)** 



* Define what “technical compatibility” means for new CSPs and ecosystem partners
* Run PoCs to validate integration assumptions with Tier\-2 CSPs and platforms
* Engage in exploratory technical conversations with cloud providers and partners (not pure sales)
* **Represent Lucidity in strategic technical discussions, architecture reviews, and evaluations**



**5\. Product \& Architecture Input (≈15%)** 



* Identify architectural gaps, anti\-patterns, or improvement opportunities from a systems viewpoint
* Validate ideas with PoCs before recommending changes
* **Evaluate Lucidity’s role in emerging infrastructure and AI stacks**



**Required Skills \& Experience (Must\-Haves)** 




**Experience** 



* **4–6 years** 
 of hands\-on experience in cloud infrastructure, systems engineering, or solutions architecture, core development.
* Proven ability to independently ship PoCs, benchmarks, or technical investigations
* Experience working with AWS, Azure, and/or GCP (cross\-cloud exposure strongly preferred)
* Exposure to deep\-tech, cloud infrastructure, or B2B SaaS environments



**Nice\-to\-Have** 



* Prior experience influencing product or architecture decisions through technical insights
* Background in cloud optimization, storage, backup, or performance engineering
* Experience in a CTO’s office, founders office, or strategic technical role
* Open\-source contributions or public technical writing
* Certifications (AWS SA, Azure, CKA)



  





**What We Offer** 



* Ownership of a critical function at one of the fastest\-growing infra SaaS startups.
* High\-growth, high\-autonomy environment with a direct impact on outcomes.
* Transparent, founder\-led culture with flat hierarchies and quick decision\-making.
* Flexible hours \| Uncapped leaves.

2581666f.title: Cloud Solutions Architect
2581666f.description:
**Job Title:** 
 Cloud Solutions Architect – AWS \& Azure (Multi\-Cloud)
 



**Location:** 
 India (Remote) \|
 



**Experience:** 
 5–10 Years
 



**Employment Type:** 
 Full\-Time
 



  





**About the Opportunity** 




 We are hiring for a US\-based technology consulting firm, for a Cloud Solutions Architect with strong hands\-on expertise in
 **AWS as the primary cloud platform** 
 and working knowledge of
 **Microsoft Azure** 
 . This is a client\-facing role supporting enterprise\-grade cloud environments across multiple industries. You will work closely with US\-based engineering and business teams to design, deploy, and operate scalable, secure, and highly available cloud infrastructure.
 



  





**Cloud Architecture \& Design** 



* Design and implement scalable, secure, and highly available AWS cloud architectures following the AWS Well\-Architected Framework
* Build and manage multi\-account AWS environments including landing zones, AWS Organizations, and Service Control Policies (SCPs)
* Architect multi\-region and hybrid cloud solutions with defined RTO/RPO targets for disaster recovery



**Infrastructure \& Automation** 



* Own Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform and/or CloudFormation — building reusable modules and blueprints, not just running scripts
* Build and maintain multi\-environment setups (Dev / UAT / Prod) with full automation
* Implement and manage CI/CD pipelines using tools like Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, ArgoCD, or Azure DevOps



**Cloud Operations \& Reliability** 



* Take end\-to\-end ownership of production cloud environments — incident management, RCA, on\-call support
* Define and track SLOs, SLIs, and error budgets for critical workloads
* Implement observability stacks using CloudWatch, Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, or equivalent tools
* Design and execute backup, DR, and business continuity strategies



**Containers \& Kubernetes** 



* Deploy and manage containerized workloads using Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS EKS
* Implement GitOps workflows with ArgoCD or Flux for Kubernetes deployments
* Support blue\-green and canary deployment strategies for zero\-downtime releases



**Security \& Compliance** 



* Implement IAM roles, policies, SCPs, and least\-privilege access controls at enterprise scale
* Enforce cloud security best practices — KMS encryption, WAF, GuardDuty, Security Hub, CloudTrail
* Support compliance requirements such as HIPAA, SOC 2, or equivalent frameworks



**Multi\-Cloud \& Azure** 



* Support workloads on Microsoft Azure — Azure VMs, VNets, Azure AD, AKS, Azure DevOps
* Assist in hybrid or multi\-cloud connectivity and migrations between AWS and Azure
* Work on cloud\-to\-cloud or on\-premises\-to\-cloud migration projects



**FinOps \& Cost Optimization** 



* Drive cloud cost optimization initiatives — rightsizing, Savings Plans, storage lifecycle policies
* Conduct Well\-Architected Framework Reviews (WAFRs) to identify performance, reliability, and cost improvement opportunities
* Establish tagging standards and governance frameworks for cost allocation



  





**What We Are Looking For** 




**Must Have:** 



* 5–10 years of total IT experience with minimum
 **5 years of dedicated hands\-on AWS experience**
* Proven experience designing and owning cloud architecture — not just deployments or support
* Strong Terraform skills — module development, remote state, CI/CD integration
* Production\-level Kubernetes/EKS experience
* Experience with AWS core services — EC2, VPC, IAM, RDS, EKS, Lambda, S3, Route53, CloudWatch, CloudTrail
* Hands\-on experience with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps toolchains
* Strong networking knowledge — VPC design, VPN, Direct Connect, Transit Gateway, DNS
* Experience with cloud migration projects (on\-prem to cloud or cloud\-to\-cloud)
* Incident management and production support ownership — not just business\-hours work
* At least
 **AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate** 
 or higher



  





**Good to Have:** 



* Microsoft Azure hands\-on experience (VMs, VNets, AKS, Azure AD, Azure DevOps)
* GCP exposure
* AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional or AWS DevOps Professional
* HashiCorp Terraform Associate certification
* CKA or CKAD certification
* Experience with Datadog, New Relic, or enterprise observability platforms
* HIPAA, SOC 2, or other compliance framework experience
* FinOps experience with quantified cost savings



  





**Education** 



* B.E. / B.Tech / MCA or equivalent in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field

99240877.title: AWS DevOps/Solution Architect
99240877.description:
***hackajob** 
 is collaborating with
 **Barclays** 
 to connect them with exceptional professionals for this role.*
 Join us as an
 **AWS DevOps/Solution Architect** 
 in Barclays, responsible for supporting the successful delivery of Location Strategy projects to plan, budget, agreed quality and governance standards. You'll spearhead the evolution of our digital landscape, driving innovation and excellence. You will harness cutting\-edge technology to revolutionise our digital offerings, ensuring unparalleled customer experiences.
   

  

 To be successful as an
 **AWS DevOps/Solution Architect** 
 you should have experience with –
   

  

* AWS DevOps / Solutions Architect plays a critical role in designing secure, scalable, and cost‑optimized cloud architectures while automating end\-to\-end application delivery on AWS.
* You will work closely with engineering, platform, and automation teams to build cloud\-native systems, streamline deployments, enforce governance best practices, and accelerate application delivery using modern DevOps toolchains.
* This role requires a strong blend of architecture design, DevOps engineering, automation, and AWS platform expertise.
* Architect and optimize solutions using core services:
* EC2, Lambda, ECS, EKS, S3, VPC, IAM, CloudWatch, CloudTrail, RDS, DynamoDB, ALB/NLB, KMS, Secrets Manager.
* Implement containerization and orchestration patterns using Docker, ECS/Fargate, or EKS.
* Set up system monitoring, alerting, logging, tracing, and distributed diagnostics (CloudWatch, X\-Ray).
* Implement secure IAM roles/policies, boundary policies, encryption, and secret rotation.
* Scripting/Programming: Python for data engineering (unit tests, packaging, logging).


 Some other highly valued skills may include: \-
   

  

* Design end\-to\-end AWS architectures for applications, automation platforms, APIs, and containerized workloads.
* Ensure architectures adhere to AWS Well‑Architected Framework pillars:
* Security, Reliability, Performance Efficiency, Cost Optimization, Operational Excellence.
* Define networking topologies (VPCs, subnets, routing, NAT, VPN, Direct Connect, Transit Gateway) for secure and scalable connectivity.


 You may be assessed on the key critical skills relevant for success in role, such as risk and controls, change and transformation, business acumen strategic thinking and digital and technology, as well as job\-specific technical skills.
   

  

 This role is based in Pune.
   

  

**Purpose of the role**
 To design, develop and improve software, utilising various engineering methodologies, that provides business, platform, and technology capabilities for our customers and colleagues.
   

  

**Accountabilities**
* Development and delivery of high\-quality software solutions by using industry aligned programming languages, frameworks, and tools. Ensuring that code is scalable, maintainable, and optimized for performance.
* Cross\-functional collaboration with product managers, designers, and other engineers to define software requirements, devise solution strategies, and ensure seamless integration and alignment with business objectives.
* Collaboration with peers, participate in code reviews, and promote a culture of code quality and knowledge sharing.
* Stay informed of industry technology trends and innovations and actively contribute to the organization’s technology communities to foster a culture of technical excellence and growth.
* Adherence to secure coding practices to mitigate vulnerabilities, protect sensitive data, and ensure secure software solutions.
* Implementation of effective unit testing practices to ensure proper code design, readability, and reliability.


**Assistant Vice President Expectations**
* To advise and influence decision making, contribute to policy development and take responsibility for operational effectiveness. Collaborate closely with other functions/ business divisions.
* Lead a team performing complex tasks, using well developed professional knowledge and skills to deliver on work that impacts the whole business function. Set objectives and coach employees in pursuit of those objectives, appraisal of performance relative to objectives and determination of reward outcomes
* If the position has leadership responsibilities, People Leaders are expected to demonstrate a clear set of leadership behaviours to create an environment for colleagues to thrive and deliver to a consistently excellent standard. The four LEAD behaviours are: L – Listen and be authentic, E – Energise and inspire, A – Align across the enterprise, D – Develop others.
* OR for an individual contributor, they will lead collaborative assignments and guide team members through structured assignments, identify the need for the inclusion of other areas of specialisation to complete assignments. They will identify new directions for assignments and/ or projects, identifying a combination of cross functional methodologies or practices to meet required outcomes.
* Consult on complex issues; providing advice to People Leaders to support the resolution of escalated issues.
* Identify ways to mitigate risk and developing new policies/procedures in support of the control and governance agenda.
* Take ownership for managing risk and strengthening controls in relation to the work done.
* Perform work that is closely related to that of other areas, which requires understanding of how areas coordinate and contribute to the achievement of the objectives of the organisation sub\-function.
* Collaborate with other areas of work, for business aligned support areas to keep up to speed with business activity and the business strategy.
* Engage in complex analysis of data from multiple sources of information, internal and external sources such as procedures and practises (in other areas, teams, companies, etc).to solve problems creatively and effectively.
* Communicate complex information. 'Complex' information could include sensitive information or information that is difficult to communicate because of its content or its audience.
* Influence or convince stakeholders to achieve outcomes.


 All colleagues will be expected to demonstrate the Barclays Values of Respect, Integrity, Service, Excellence and Stewardship – our moral compass, helping us do what we believe is right. They will also be expected to demonstrate the Barclays Mindset – to Empower, Challenge and Drive – the operating manual for how we behave.

be05279b.title: Cloud - Architect-Architecture-Cloud Architecture
be05279b.description:
Job Title: Fabric Architect
   

  

 EXL is looking for a Fabric Architect who is responsible for designing, implementing, and governing an enterprise\-wide data fabric architecture leveraging Microsoft Fabric (or equivalent cloud data fabric solutions).This role focuses on building a unified, scalable, and secure data platform that integrates data ingestion, transformation, governance, analytics, and AI workloads across multiple business domains.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Define and implement end\-to\-end data fabric architecture using Microsoft Fabric components (Data Factory, Synapse, Power BI, OneLake, Lakehouse).
   

  

 Design data ingestion, transformation, and orchestration frameworks supporting both batch and real\-time data integration.
   

  

 Develop metadata\-driven ingestion, audit, balance, and control frameworks to ensure data consistency and traceability.
   

  

 Architect semantic data models and analytical layers for enterprise\-wide KPIs, reporting, and AI enablement.
   

  

 Create data modeling standards and blueprints for dimensional, logical, and physical models (Star/Snowflake schemas).
   

  

 Lead design and implementation of data pipelines and integration patterns using Python, SQL, Spark, and Fabric Data Factory.
   

  

 Oversee data ingestion from structured, semi\-structured, and unstructured sources into the Fabric Lakehouse or Warehouse.
   

  

 Ensure data quality, lineage, and metadata management across all data domains.
   

  

 Integrate Fabric platform with Azure and other cloud ecosystems for unified data access
   

  

 Define and implement data governance policies, metadata management, and cataloging using Microsoft Purview or Fabric\-native capabilities.
   

  

 Ensure compliance with enterprise and regulatory standards (GDPR, HIPAA, SOC2, etc.).
   

  

 Implement row\-level and column\-level security, encryption, and access control frameworks.
   

  

 Establish data lifecycle management and retention strategies
   

  

 Collaborate with business and analytics teams to define KPIs, semantic models, and reporting frameworks.
   

  

 Enable self\-service analytics through well\-structured Power BI datasets and data marts.
   

  

 Optimize query performance, data partitioning, and model efficiency for large\-scale analytics
   

  

 Lead and mentor technical teams on Fabric best practices, design patterns, and reusable components.
   

  

**Required Qualifications**
 10\-12 years of overall experience in data architecting, design, and development of data warehouse systems (Cloud/on premises and Analytics) at enterprise scale.
   

  

* Must have implemented end to end platform modernization projects.
* Strong experience with Microsoft Fabric, Azure Synapse, Databricks or similar modern data platforms.
* Proven expertise in data modeling (ER/Studio, ERWin, dbt, Power BI Semantic Models), data integration, and data governance frameworks.
* Good knowledge of Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, CI/CD Pipelines
* Strong collaboration, communication, and leadership skills in cross\-functional environments.
* Must be hands on, deeply technical and exposure to latest features within data platform development, able to do both coding and guide group of junior/mid\-level database engineers.
* Must have at least 5\+ experience in managing technical team and leading them to deliver large scale solutions.
* Must have excellent communication skills (English) to interface with US clients directly and verify in proficient in all types of communication modes Listening, Reading, Writing and Speaking
* Must have strong experience in Performance Tuning / Optimization Initiatives using DB Profiler tools
* Must have strong experience in taking ownership in delivering other activities apart from Project deliverables like SoW writing, performance management, initiatives, offshore team management, recruitment etc.
* Experience in a variety of business verticals with preference to Insurance and banking.
* Ability to act independently to resolve issues, excellent communication (English) and interpersonal skills, strong critical analytic thinking.
* Ability to manage team a through the entire development life cycle and to manage time effectively.

494a4daf.title: Architect - AI/ML
494a4daf.description:
Area(s) of responsibility
   

  

**Architect – AI \& ML / Architect GenAI – 6A**

 Total Experience:
 **10–13 years** 
 , AI\-ML,GenAI Experience:
 **6–8 years**
 Technology architect responsible for designing scalable, secure, and reusable AI/GenAI architectures across multiple projects or accounts. Owns solution design decisions, defines standards, and ensures enterprise‑grade quality.

* Work closely with:
+ Business stakeholders
+ Cloud architects
+ Data platform teams

* Mentor engineers and act as technical escalation point

* Deep expertise in Azure AI / OpenAI ecosystem
* Strong understanding of:


- 

* Agent frameworks
* MCP standardization

* Experience integrating structured data, graphs, and unstructured sources

**Leadership Skills**
* Technical leadership across teams

* Strong communication with both technical and non‑technical stakeholders

a6b4d658.title: Cloud Solution Architecture Manager
a6b4d658.description:
**Overview**
 With more than 45,000 employees and partners worldwide, the Customer Experience and Success (CE\&S) organization is on a mission to empower customers to accelerate business value through differentiated customer experiences that leverage Microsoft’s products and services, ignited by our people and culture. We drive cross\-company alignment and execution, ensuring that we consistently exceed customers’ expectations in every interaction, whether in\-product, digital, or human\-centered. CE\&S is responsible for all up services across the company, including consulting, customer success, and support across Microsoft’s portfolio of solutions and products. Join CE\&S and help us accelerate AI transformation for our customers and the world.
   

  

 The Global Customer Success (GCS) organization, an organization within CE\&S, is leading the effort to enable customer success on the Microsoft Cloud by harnessing leading, AI\-powered capabilities and human expertise to deliver innovation solutions that accelerate business value, drive operational excellence and nurture long term loyalty.
   

  

 We are looking for a Global Solution Architect (GSA) manager, specializing in AI Business Solutions, who is passionate about driving our customers’ AI transformation on the Microsoft platform. This role will be part of the Customer Success AI Business Solutions team and is designed to engage in the execution of consumption within key accounts.
   

  

 The ABS GSA Manager is a senior people and business leader responsible for driving AI innovation, incubation, and scale across strategic customers. This role leads a team of GSAs (incl Early in Career GSAs) and works in close partnership with Sales, CSAMs, and global peers to validate AI scenarios, shape repeatable offerings, and accelerate platform wins across Microsoft’s AI stack.
   

  

 This is a high impact leadership role requiring strong execution, cross group influence, and the ability to operate effectively across multiple countries, cultures, and time zones.
   

  

 Microsoft’s mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more. As employees we come together with a growth mindset, innovate to empower others and collaborate to realize our shared goals. Each day we build on our values of respect, integrity, and accountability to create a culture of inclusion where everyone can thrive at work and beyond.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 People Leadership
   

  

* Lead, coach, and develop a team of GSAs across multiple countries
* Build a high performing, inclusive team with strong technical depth and customer empathy
* Drive clarity on priorities, capacity, and role expectations across geographies
* Partner with Global and Regional leaders on talent planning, hiring, and succession


 Business \& Delivery Leadership
   

  

* Own ABS GSA execution across strategic accounts and priority initiatives \- lead the Digital Copilot and Agents Accelerator initiative for your geo
* Ensure customer engagements align to ABS objectives: Win the Platform, Agents for All, and scale innovation
* Balance hands on customer engagement with effective delegation and team empowerment
* Act as a senior escalation and decision point for complex customer scenarios


 Innovation \& Incubation
   

  

* Lead the incubation and validation of AI and agent based scenarios
* Partner with global IP, Product, and Engineering teams to shape scalable offerings
* Ensure learnings are captured and fed back into global solutions and playbooks
* Drive reuse, standardization, and repeatability across customer engagements


 Cross Group Collaboration
   

  

* Work closely with Sales, CSAMs, and Business Value teams to align execution
* Partner with other GSA leaders globally to ensure consistency and leverage global best practices


**Qualifications**
 Required Qualifications:
   

  

 Bachelors Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, Business, Liberal Arts, or related field AND 10\+ years experience in cloud/infrastructure technologies, information technology (IT) consulting/support, systems administration, network operations, software development/support, technology solutions, practice development, architecture, and/or consulting OR equivalent experience. 7\+ years people management experience, including managing consultant practice managers, technical sales managers, and/or technical architect managers.
   

  

**Additional Preferred Qualifications**
* Proven experience leading senior technical or solution architecture teams in a matrixed environment
* Strong background in enterprise technology, cloud, or AI led transformation
* Demonstrated ability to lead across multiple countries and cultures
* Strong executive communication and stakeholder management skills
* Track record of driving clarity, focus, and results in complex environments


 Leadership Expectations
   

  

* Models Microsoft culture, values, and leadership principles
* Creates clarity and focus in ambiguous, fast moving environments
* Builds trust with customers and internal partners
* Develops future leaders and invests in long term capability building
* Balances short term execution with long term strategic impact
* Experience with Microsoft platform technologies (Azure, Copilot, agents, data, M365\)
* Prior experience in customer facing roles (architecture, consulting, delivery, or technical sales)
* Experience building or scaling innovation programs or technical incubation models


 This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.
   

  

 Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance with religious accommodations and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application process, read more about
 **requesting accommodations.**

53ff6a15.title: Solutions Architect
53ff6a15.description:
Responsible for leading the development of comprehensive solution architecture strategies, ensuring seamless integration of application solutions across teams and domains while maintaining robust technical foundations. The role involves collaboration with other architects to validate feasibility, oversee compliance with quality attributes, manage technical risks, and guide IT architects to enhance their solution architecture leadership skills, all while aligning with FedEx best practices and technological standards.
   

  

* Lead and define solution architecture strategies, encompassing technology and architecture for seamless integration of application solutions across various teams and domains.
* Establish and maintain the architectural runway at a solution level, ensuring a robust technical foundation for the rapid and reliable creation of new functionalities and features across teams and ARTs.
* Collaborate with other architects to validate the feasibility and sustainability of solution architectures and application portfolio lifecycle planning, ensuring alignment with FedEx best practices and design standards.
* Oversee the management of non\-functional requirements and compliance to ensure that solution architectures meet essential quality attributes such as performance, scalability, security, and maintainability, meeting stakeholder acceptance criteria.
* Collaborate with other architects to define the appropriate delivery approach for solution services, encompassing processes, methodologies, tooling, and partnerships for agreement on service design and delivery.
* Identify and manage technical risks and continuous improvement opportunities for solution architectures, leveraging expert business knowledge to mitigate risks and capitalize on opportunities.
* Continuously monitor and evaluate new or emerging technologies utilized by internal teams, ensuring alignment with FedEx technological standards and potential integration into solution architectures.
* Provide guidance and mentorship to other IT architects to develop their skills and expertise in solution architecture leadership and execution.


 Education: Bachelor's degree in computer science, engineering, information systems and/or equivalent formal training or work experience. Relevant Master’s degree, TOGAF certification and SAFe Agile certification strongly preferred.
   

  

 Experience: Eight (8\) years equivalent work experience in information technology or engineering environment with a direct responsibility for strategy formulation and solution/technical architecture, as well as designing, architecting, developing, implementing and monitoring efficient and effective solutions to diverse and complex business problems.
   

  

**Knowledge, Skills And Abilities**
* Fluency in English
* Accuracy \& Attention to Detail
* Influencing \& Persuasion
* Planning \& Organizing
* Problem Solving
* Project Management


**Preferred Qualifications**
**Pay Transparency:**
**Pay**
**Additional Details:**
 FedEx was built on a philosophy that puts people first, one we take seriously. We are an equal opportunity/affirmative action employer and we are committed to a diverse, equitable, and inclusive workforce in which we enforce fair treatment, and provide growth opportunities for everyone.
   

  

 All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment regardless of age, race, color, national origin, genetics, religion, gender, marital status, pregnancy (including childbirth or a related medical condition), physical or mental disability, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws, regulations, and ordinances.
   

  

 Our Company
   

  

 FedEx is one of the world's largest express transportation companies and has consistently been selected as one of the top 10 World’s Most Admired Companies by "Fortune" magazine. Every day FedEx delivers for its customers with transportation and business solutions, serving more than 220 countries and territories around the globe. We can serve this global network due to our outstanding team of FedEx team members, who are tasked with making every FedEx experience outstanding.
   

  

 Our Philosophy
   

  

 The People\-Service\-Profit philosophy (P\-S\-P) describes the principles that govern every FedEx decision, policy, or activity. FedEx takes care of our people; they, in turn, deliver the impeccable service demanded by our customers, who reward us with the profitability necessary to secure our future. The essential element in making the People\-Service\-Profit philosophy such a positive force for the company is where we close the circle, and return these profits back into the business, and invest back in our people. Our success in the industry is attributed to our people. Through our P\-S\-P philosophy, we have a work environment that encourages team members to be innovative in delivering the highest possible quality of service to our customers. We care for their well\-being, and value their contributions to the company.
   

  

 Our Culture
   

  

 Our culture is important for many reasons, and we intentionally bring it to life through our behaviors, actions, and activities in every part of the world. The FedEx culture and values have been a cornerstone of our success and growth since we began in the early 1970’s. While other companies can copy our systems, infrastructure, and processes, our culture makes us unique and is often a differentiating factor as we compete and grow in today’s global marketplace.

fd057931.title: System Architect
fd057931.description:
As a trusted advisor, technical solution architect, and technical consultant, the TECHNICAL ARCHITECT role provides technical architect consulting services, including:
 


* Holistic technical design reviews
* Performance and scalability
* Optimization of integrations and NetSuite customizations
* Data management consultation and guidance
* Consultative guidance on ERP leading practices



 Leveraging deep technical experience, TECHNICAL ARCHITECTs analyze customers' business \& technical requirements to ensure appropriate and long\-term scalable use of NetSuite and work with partners to implement recommendations.
 



 TECHNICAL ARCHITECTs work with their customers and partners to review technical feature gaps that may arise and devise appropriate solutions across the NetSuite ecosystem.
 



 TECHNICAL ARCHITECTs lead customers and partners through the appropriate use of NetSuite environments, design and optimizing considerations for integrations and customizations, and practices for successful data migrations.
 



 TECHNICAL ARCHITECTs form the core of the ACS Technical Team subject\-matter expertise and are leveraged across accounts when required. TECHNICAL ARCHITECTs are the thought leaders within their area of expertise and work with the Product organization to ensure new product technical changes and capabilities are understood and adopted by customers and partners.
 



**Preferred Qualifications include:** 



* Ability to be self\-directed, multi\-task, and lead others with minimal supervision
* Minimum of 5 years of technical consulting experience
* Strong written and verbal communication
* Adept at getting hands\-on with technology and presenting concepts effectively at various levels within a customer's and/or partner's organization
* Strong analytical skills
* Demonstrated expertise in one or more of the following: performance, integrations, technical architecture or software development
* Demonstrated experience in end\-to\-end business process flows



**Hands on Experience in the following areas are required:** 



* Performance and scalability of ERP systems (Oracle EBS, Oracle Fusion, PeopleSoft, JD Edwards, NetSuite)
* Orchestrating and executing load and performance testing
* Tuning of SQL statements
* ODBC / JDBC data extraction strategy, design and tuning
* Data Modeling
* SaaS/Cloud architectures
* Oracle database architecture
* Architecting and tuning integrations (with products like Oracle Data Integrator, Boomi, Mulesoft, Celigo, Workato or Snaplogic)
* ETL tools and techniques
* Software development life\-cycles (SDLC)
* Release management and/or Agile scrum master experience
* Developing and optimizing NetSuite SuiteScript, JavaScript. NetSuite SuiteCloud Developer
* Developing and optimizing NetSuite SuiteTalk, SOAP integrations, or REST integrations

bd40b2bf.title: DomainTechnical Architect
bd40b2bf.description:
Hyderabad, Telangana
  
Job Summary
  
  

Overview Seeking a proactive Automation and AI Consultant to join our Infrastructure Support team. This role focuses on optimizing IT infrastructure through automation and leveraging AI for enhanced efficiency and reliability. You\\'ll contribute to improving system performance, reducing manual efforts, and accelerating issue resolution. Responsibilities • Design, develop, and maintain Infrastructure as Code (IaC) solutions (Terraform, Ansible, etc.) for automated provisioning and configuration. • Develop automation scripts (Python, Bash, PowerShell) for routine tasks (updates, patching, backups). • Integrate and leverage cloud AI/ML services (AWS, Azure, GCP) for infrastructure monitoring, anomaly detection, and predictive maintenance. • Collaborate with AI teams on infrastructure and networking solutions optimized for AI/ML workloads. • Design and implement CI/CD pipelines for infrastructure deployments. • Design and implement AI\-optimized networking solutions for high\-speed, low\-latency data transfers • AI\-driven solutions, for anomaly detection, threat prediction, and automated response systems • Troubleshoot and resolve infrastructure issues, leveraging automation and AI insights. • Experience in building and deploying Generative AI and Agentic AI solutions/platforms. • Experience in LLM’s like GPT, Gemini, Mistral, Llama and small language models like Gemini flash, Ollama, Gemma, Phi • Experience in Agentic frameworks lime Lang chain, Lang graph , Langsmit, Crew AI, Autogen etc • Experience in designing automation solutions for both Cloud and On\-Prem. • Qualifications • Bachelor\\'s degree in Computer Science or related field. • Experience in infrastructure automation, cloud platforms (AWS) scripting (Python, Bash, PowerShell), and IaC/CI/CD tools (Terraform, Ansible, Jenkins). • Understanding of AI, Machine Learning, and monitoring tools (Dynatrace). • Strong problem\-solving and communication skills. Good to Have • Experience in multi\-cloud environments. • Relevant certifications (AWS, Azure DevOps). • Knowledge of network architecture, database programming, and data modeling.
