5320f1f5.title: Infrastructure Solutions Advisor
5320f1f5.description:
Infrastructure Solutions Advisor – Advisory \& Customer Success
   

  

**Location** 
 : Chennai, India
   

  

 ASSA ABLOY Group is a global leader in access solutions, powering secure identities for millions worldwide. We foster a collaborative, inclusive, and dynamic work environment where creativity, learning, and career growth are encouraged.
   

  

 Are you ready for a new challenge in IT? Join our Group IT Infrastructure Advisory team as an Infrastructure Solutions Advisor in Chennai and play a pivotal role in guiding customers through the adoption, migration, and management of IT infrastructure services. You will act as the bridge between business needs and technology solutions, ensuring our products and services align with organizational objectives and deliver real business outcomes.
   

  

**What Would You Do As Our Infrastructure Solutions Advisor**
* Advise and support our customers in how to use our products in the best way
* Lead our journey of Continuous Product improvements: collect and refine customer ideas, conduct signoffs with divisions.
* Gather stakeholder requirements, translate into actionable features, and define key product metrics.
* Advise teams on designing, building, and deploying secure, scalable IT infrastructure (cloud, networking, storage, security).
* Collaborating with all internal Group IT Teams to provide customer success using all products


**The Skills And Experience You Need**
 We are looking for someone who:
   

  

* Can sell our solutions, guide customers to the best decisions, and collaborate with solution architects to create optimal solutions.
* Has a strong IT infrastructure background, probably Infrastructure Solutions Advisor or equal (cloud, virtualization, networking, databases).
* Communicates complex technical concepts clearly to both technical and non\-technical audiences and understands Agile principles.
* Can influence without formal authority, advising and guiding teams, working proactively and independently.
* International Travel might be needed, experience in a global organization, and speaks English at a professional level.


**Required Skills \& Experience**
* Hands\-on experience designing and operating enterprise infrastructure across cloud and on\-prem environments (compute, storage, network, identity, security).
* Proven customer\-facing advisory experience: discovery, solutioning, migration planning, adoption, and success measurement.
* Strong understanding of security\-by\-design, compliance, and risk management for infrastructure services.
* Experience with service management and operational readiness (incident/problem/change, monitoring, SLOs/SLAs).
* Ability to translate business goals into technical requirements, roadmaps, and measurable outcomes.
* Experience working in Agile/DevOps ways of working and collaborating with product, engineering, and operations teams.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, Engineering, or equivalent practical experience.
* 5\+ years of experience in infrastructure architecture, infrastructure consulting, or a similar role supporting complex enterprise environments.
* Relevant certifications are a plus (e.g., Azure/AWS/GCP, ITIL, TOGAF, Security certifications such as AZ\-500/SC\-200/SC\-300 or equivalent).
* Demonstrated ability to engage stakeholders at multiple levels, including technical teams and business leadership.
* Professional fluency in English; additional languages are a plus.
* Willingness to travel internationally as required.


**We are the ASSA ABLOY Group**
 Our people have made us the global leader in access solutions. In return, we open doors for them wherever they go. With nearly 63,000 colleagues in more than 70 different countries, we help billions of people experience a more open world. Our innovations make all sorts of spaces – physical and virtual – safer, more secure, and easier to access.
   

  

 As an employer, we value results – not titles, or backgrounds. We empower our people to build their career around their aspirations and our ambitions – supporting them with regular feedback, training, and development opportunities. Our colleagues think broadly about where they can make the most impact, and we encourage them to grow their role locally, regionally, or even internationally.
   

  

 As we welcome new people on board, it’s important to us to have diverse, inclusive teams, and we value different perspectives and experiences.

00299185.title: Senior AI Solution Engineer
00299185.description:
**Interested in a career that matters?**

\&\#xa;
\*\*Senior AI Solution Engineer: Empowering AI Citizen Developers at Novonesis\*\*
 

Join Novonesis as a Senior AI Solution Engineer and help accelerate the development and adoption of AI solutions across our global organisation. You will train and support citizen developers, advise business teams, and help ensure solutions are scalable, secure, and aligned with enterprise standards. The role combines enablement, consulting, and hands\-on problem solving in a collaborative, highly adaptive, and cross\-functional environment.


\*\*Welcome to the Data \& AI Enablement team.\*\*
  

The Data \& AI Enablement team is part of the Data Office within Global IT, serving as a Centre of Excellence for enterprise\-wide data and AI adoption. You will join a highly collaborative team of specialists in Denmark and India, working closely with business stakeholders in an agile and supportive environment. Together, we help citizen developers and business teams create value from platforms such as Microsoft Fabric, Power BI, Copilot, and Copilot Studio through enablement, governance, and community building. The role offers broad exposure across Novonesis, connecting you with stakeholders and initiatives spanning the entire value chain.


\*\*In this role you will make an impact…\*\*
  

You will focus on execution and scaling enablement activities, strengthening the team’s capability within generative AI and the technology stack, including Copilot Studio. By working closely with principal roles and senior stakeholders, you will deliver hands\-on support and guidance, helping citizen developers build effective solutions. Your contribution will drive adoption, foster community engagement, and support business teams in refining and implementing Copilot Studio solutions, ensuring successful self\-service AI development across Novonesis.


In addition, some of your key tasks will include:
  

* Delivering training sessions, onboarding, and workshops for Copilot Studio
* Creating learning materials and supporting documentation
* Guiding users in building solutions and troubleshooting use cases
* Driving adoption through AI cafés, demos, and community forums
* Ensuring solutions follow defined standards and contributing to knowledge sharing
Collaboration will be central to your role, as you work daily with colleagues in India and Denmark, engaging with stakeholders across business\- and platform teams to deliver impactful AI solutions.


\*\*We expect you to bring…\*\*
  

* 2–4 years of experience in AI, automation, or digital enablement roles
* Experience with Copilot Studio, Power Platform, or similar citizen developer platform
* Experience with project management
* Experience working with generative AI or conversational agents
* Interest in AI adoption and enabling others
Additionally, we expect you to be familiar with Microsoft Ecosystem including Copilot/Cowork, Power BI and Fabric, experience supporting training and user enablement, and a basic understanding of AI/ML concepts. Your ability to support complex solution design and align technical solutions with business requirements will be highly valued.
  

  

You will be expected to demonstrate strong communication and collaboration skills, a solution\-oriented approach, eagerness to learn and work with emerging technologies, and the ability to structure and handle multiple tasks. A focus on service and helping others succeed is essential to this role.


**Our purpose guides the way**

In Novonesis, we know that solutions rooted in biology can help solve humanity’s biggest challenges. Since we began more than a century ago, this has been our guide. It’s how we've gotten so far. And it’s how we'll impact the future. Now, more than ever, the world needs change. And with biosolutions, the possibilities for transformation are endless. If our purpose resonates with you, we encourage you to apply.


**Opportunities for everyone**

We are committed to an inclusive recruitment process and equal opportunity for all applicants. Therefore we ask you to apply without a cover letter or photo and instead include a few sentences in your CV explaining your motivation for applying.


We make all employment decisions based on business needs and welcome candidates with a wide range of backgrounds, including ethnicity, religion, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability, or veteran status.


**Explore other openings**

If this position isn’t the right fit, you may still find other opportunities with us. You’re welcome to explore open roles or create a job agent to stay connected with future opportunities at novonesis.com/Career

You will drive enterprise\-wide enablement, support the development of AI use cases, and help translate business opportunities into solutions. You will provide strategic guidance and help build the capabilities needed to accelerate AI adoption at scale in a highly adaptive, and cross\-functional environment. \*


\*\*Welcome to the Data \& AI Enablement team. \*\*  



  

The Data \& AI Enablement team is part of the Data Office within Global IT, serving as a Centre of Excellence for enterprise\-wide data and AI adoption. You will join a highly collaborative team of specialists in Denmark and India, working closely with business stakeholders in an agile and supportive environment. Together, we help citizen developers and business teams create value from platforms such as Microsoft Fabric, Power BI, Copilot, and Copilot Studio through enablement, governance, and community building. The role offers broad exposure across Novonesis, connecting you with stakeholders and initiatives spanning the entire value chain.

Your work will focus on innovation and enablement at scale, balancing strategic platform governance with hands\-on solutioning. You will help mature our enablement model for Copilot Studio, establish best practices for citizen developers, and guide business teams from ideation to implementation. Through our AI Centre of Excellence approach, you will support complex use cases and act as a senior advisor, identifying AI use cases and opportunities for AI to transform business processes.

Collaboration will be central to your role, as you work daily with colleagues in India and Denmark, engaging with stakeholders across business\- and platform teams to deliver impactful AI solutions.


\*\*We expect you to bring…\*\*

* Strong experience with Copilot Studio, Power Platform, or similar citizen developer platform

* Proven track record for project management

Additionally, we expect you to demonstrate familiarity with Microsoft Ecosystem including Copilot/Cowork, analytics platforms such as Power BI and Fabric, and a background in consulting or internal advisory roles. Your ability to support complex solution design and align technical solutions with business requirements will be highly valued.


You will excel in this role if you have strong stakeholder engagement and facilitation skills, enjoy structured and scalable thinking, and are comfortable navigating an evolving space. An interest in AI adoption and its organisational impact, as well as the ability to bridge business needs and technical solutions, will help you succeed.


**Our purpose guides the way**

In Novonesis, we know that solutions rooted in biology can help solve humanity’s biggest challenges. Since we began more than a century ago, this has been our guide. It’s how we've gotten so far. And it’s how we'll impact the future. Now, more than ever, the world needs change. And with biosolutions, the possibilities for transformation are endless. If our purpose resonates with you, we encourage you to apply.


**Opportunities for everyone**

We are committed to an inclusive recruitment process and equal opportunity for all applicants. Therefore we ask you to apply without a cover letter or photo and instead include a few sentences in your CV explaining your motivation for applying.


We make all employment decisions based on business needs and welcome candidates with a wide range of backgrounds, including ethnicity, religion, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability, or veteran status.


**Explore other openings**

If this position isn’t the right fit, you may still find other opportunities with us. You’re welcome to explore open roles or create a job agent to stay connected with future opportunities at novonesis.com/Career

 Skill Experience

* OpenStack (CEE)

To build solutions never seen before to some of the world’s toughest problems. You´ll be challenged, but you won’t be alone. da5df3e3.title: Associate /Principal Partner Solution Architect
da5df3e3.description:
Saviynt's AI\-powered identity platform manages and governs human and non\-human access
 


  


 to all of an organization's applications, data, and business processes. Customers trust
 


  


 Saviynt to safeguard their digital assets, drive operational efficiency, and reduce compliance
 


  


 costs. Built for the AI age, Saviynt is today helping organizations safely accelerate their
 


  


 deployment and usage of AI. Saviynt is recognized as the leader in identity security, with
 


  


 solutions that protect and empower the world’s leading brands, Fortune 500 companies, and
 


  


 government institutions. For more information, please visit www.saviynt.com.
 


  


  
 


  


 This individual will be responsible for enabling partners on saviynt products,
 


  


 working on development of joint solution offerings, conducting workshops to
 


  


 create sales plays and solutions. This individual will also be responsible for
 


  


 providing best practices and addressing feasibility related questions on
 


  


 integration architecture. In addition, this individual will be a contributor to partner\-led Product Marketing, webinars, and blogs. The Partner Solutions Engineer will work proactively with
 


  


 the product management teams to understand the roadmap and influence the
 


  


 roadmap based on partner requirements.
 


  


 Work Location: Bangalore
 


  


 Territory: South India, Western India, and Sri Lanka
 




  




**WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING** 
  
* Acquire Saviynt product knowledge through training, applying methodology, and procedures relevant to the Partner\-facing role
  
* Develop and deliver technical presentations to demonstrate enterprise solutions, ease\-of configuration, simplicity of architecture and intelligence of workflows providing the opportunity for partner interaction and demonstrating excellent presentation skills
  
* Effectively communicate solution value to the business and technical audiences that is clear and satisfies prospective Partner/customer requirements and/or inquiries
  
* Develop technical solutions with Partners to accelerate sales of saviynt products and services
  
* Effectively communicate with business development and partner directors, working proactively and independently to prioritize and manage top regional opportunities
  
* Regularly provide solution feedback and competitive intel from the field to Saviynt product management, solutions strategy, and marketing teams
  
* Ability to travel as and when required within your territory
  

  



  




**WHAT YOU BRING** 
  
* Bachelor degree in information systems or related areas, or demonstration of equivalent knowledge such as technical certifications from ISACA, (ISC)\², AWS Cloud Practitioner, Microsoft Azure Fundamentals, Google Cloud Security Engineer etc
  
* Minimum of 12 years of previous Solutions Engineering or Implementation experience
  
* Proven track record in enabling new and existing partners/ distributors
  
* Ability to work well both independently and collaboratively
  
* Effective communication skills, both verbal and written
  
* Domain expertise \- Privileged Access Management, Identity Governance and Administration, Application GRC, and/or, Cloud Security preferred
  
* Experience in the Identity Governance and Administration domain with a firm grasp of its concepts such as Identity Life Cycle Management, Entitlements Management, Access Request, Workflow,
  
* Policy and Role Management, Access Certification, Audit, Reporting/Analytics, and Deployment Scenarios is preferable
  
* Superior communication, relationship, and partner/customer service skills that result in the ability to rapidly assess needs and sell solutions with/through sophisticated Partners Ownership and management of technical team relationships within existing and prospective partners
  

  






  




  


 Saviynt is an equal opportunity employer and we welcome everyone
 


  


 to our team. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for
 


  


 employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual
 


  


 orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or veteran
 


  


 status.
 


  


 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

be9dae5c.title: AI Architect / AI Engineer
be9dae5c.description:
Role: AI Architect.

Type: Contract to hire.

Duration: 3 \-6 months.

Location: Chennai.

Work mode: Onsite

**Role Summary**

We are looking for a highly skilled AI Engineer / AI Architect to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI solutions. The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and Generative AI, along with the ability to architect end\-to\-end AI systems aligned with business objectives.

**Key Responsibilities**

Design and implement end\-to\-end AI/ML solutions from data ingestion to deployment.

Build and optimize machine learning and deep learning models for real\-world applications.

Architect scalable and secure AI systems using cloud platforms.

Work on Generative AI use cases including LLMs, prompt engineering, and fine\-tuning.

Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to translate business requirements into AI solutions.

Develop and manage data pipelines and model lifecycle (MLOps).

Ensure model performance, scalability, reliability, and monitoring in production.

Stay updated with emerging AI trends and evaluate new tools/technologies.

Mentor junior engineers and guide best practices in AI development.

**Required Skills**

Strong proficiency in Python and AI/ML libraries (TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit\-learn).

Experience with Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and NLP.

Hands\-on experience with Generative AI (LLMs, embeddings, prompt engineering).

Knowledge of MLOps tools (MLflow, Kubeflow, Azure ML, etc.).

Knowledge of cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, or GCP).

Understanding of data engineering concepts and working with large datasets.

Familiarity with APIs, microservices, and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).

Strong problem\-solving and analytical skills.

**Nice to Have**

Certifications in AI/ML or cloud platforms.

Experience working on production\-grade AI systems.

Contributions to open\-source AI projects.

Azure Foundry, Databricks Agent bricks

Pay: ₹2,500,000\.00 \- ₹2,800,000\.00 per year

Work Location: In person

82e36d43.title: RIS Workplace Solution Architect Associate Director
82e36d43.description:
**POSITION OVERVIEW:**  

We are seeking a talented Workplace Solution Architect to join our pre\-sales and solutioning team. This role focuses on designing innovative Digital Workplace solutions that enhance employee experience and productivity for prospective and existing clients.
  
  

**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:**  

Design end\-to\-end Digital Workplace solutions tailored to client business needs and employee experience goals
  
Develop technical proposals, RFP/RFI responses, and solution blueprints for modern workplace services
  
Collaborate with sales teams to translate complex client requirements into comprehensive workplace architectures
  
Create compelling proof\-of\-concepts demonstrating endpoint management, collaboration tools, and productivity solutions
  
Provide thought leadership on emerging Digital Workplace technologies and trends
  
Design endpoint lifecycle management strategies and device refresh programs
  
Develop Digital Employee Experience (DEX) measurement frameworks and improvement roadmaps
  
Architect Virtual Desktop Infrastructure (VDI) and Desktop\-as\-a\-Service (DaaS) solutions
  
Ensure proposed solutions align with security best practices and compliance requirements
  
Partner with delivery teams to ensure solution feasibility and smooth handover
  
  

**REQUIRED SKILLS \& QUALIFICATIONS:**  

15\+ years of experience in Digital Workplace technologies and end\-user computing
  
Deep expertise in Microsoft 365 ecosystem (Exchange, SharePoint, Teams, OneDrive, Intune)
  
**Strong knowledge of endpoint management solutions:** Microsoft Intune, SCCM/MECM, VMware Workspace ONE
  
**Hands\-on experience with VDI technologies:** Citrix Virtual Apps \& Desktops, Azure Virtual Desktop (AVD), VMware Horizon
  
**Expertise in collaboration platforms:** Microsoft Teams, Zoom, Webex
  
**Experience with Digital Employee Experience (DEX) tools:** Nexthink, Lakeside, 1E
  
Knowledge of Windows 10/11 deployment, imaging, and autopilot
  
Understanding of endpoint security solutions and Zero\-Trust principles
  
Excellent client\-facing and consultative selling skills
  
Strong presentation and communication abilities
  
  

**EDUCATION:**  

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field
  
Microsoft certifications (M365, Azure) highly preferred
  
Citrix/VMware certifications a plus
  
  

TBD

f923cc15.title: Cloud Platform Engineer
f923cc15.description:
**Project Role :** Cloud Platform Engineer  

**Project Role Description :** Designs, builds, tests, and deploys cloud application solutions that integrate cloud and non\-cloud infrastructure. Can deploy infrastructure and platform environments, creates a proof of architecture to test architecture viability, security and performance.
  

**Must have skills :** Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (Amazon EC2\)  

**Good to have skills :** AWS Administration, Elastic Stack (ELK)  

Minimum **3** year(s) of experience is required  

**Educational Qualification :** 15 years full time education  

  

Summary:
  

As a Cloud Platform Engineer, your day involves designing, building, testing, and deploying cloud application solutions that seamlessly integrate both cloud\-based and traditional infrastructure. You will work on deploying infrastructure and platform environments, developing proofs of architecture to evaluate the feasibility, security, and performance of proposed solutions. Your role requires continuous collaboration with various teams to ensure that cloud solutions meet organizational needs and operate efficiently within the broader technology ecosystem.  

  

Roles \& Responsibilities:
  

Architect, deploy, and manage Elasticsearch, Logstash, and Kibana (ELK) clusters on AWS.  

Design Kibana dashboards, visualisations, alerting rules, and index lifecycle policies.  

Integrate application, infrastructure, and security log sources into the centralised observability platform.  

Implement APM, distributed tracing, and synthetic monitoring using Elastic APM or equivalent tools.  

Administer and configure Dynatrace, Datadog, or Grafana for infrastructure and application performance monitoring.  

Define alerting, SLOs, and observability standards across the organisation.  

Evaluate and onboard new monitoring and logging tools based on organisational needs.  

Collaborate with DevOps, security, and application teams to ensure end\-to\-end observability coverage.  

Perform capacity planning, tuning, and optimisation of observability infrastructure.  

Produce runbooks, dashboards, and documentation for the observability platform.  

Lead and mentor a team of observability engineers, set technical direction, and manage stakeholder relationships.  

  

Professional \& Technical Skills:
  

Expert\-level hands\-on experience with the ELK stack: Elasticsearch (cluster management, index tuning, ILM), Logstash (pipeline configuration), Kibana (dashboards, alerting).  

Experience with Beats agents (Filebeat, Metricbeat, Packetbeat) for log and metric collection.  

Hands\-on experience with at least one additional observability platform: Dynatrace, Datadog, Grafana/Prometheus, or New Relic.  

Proficiency in deploying ELK on AWS (EC2, EKS, or Elastic Cloud on AWS).  

Knowledge of log ingestion patterns, data normalisation, and SIEM\-adjacent use cases.  

Strong scripting skills in Python, Bash, or similar for automation and custom integrations.  

Excellent troubleshooting and performance tuning skills across distributed systems  

  

Additional Information:
  

* The candidate should have minimum 3 years of experience in Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (Amazon EC2\).
* This position is based at our Bengaluru office.
* A 15 years full time education is required.

  

15 years full time education

8aec124b.description:
**POSITION OVERVIEW:**  

We are seeking an innovative Automation Solution Architect to join our pre\-sales and solutioning team. This role focuses on designing intelligent automation solutions that drive operational efficiency and business transformation for prospective and existing clients.
  
  

**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:**  

Design end\-to\-end Automation solutions tailored to client business needs and operational efficiency goals
  
Develop technical proposals, RFP/RFI responses, and solution blueprints for RPA, Intelligent Automation, and Hyperautomation initiatives
  
Collaborate with sales teams to translate complex client requirements into scalable, enterprise\-grade automation architectures
  
Create compelling proof\-of\-concepts demonstrating process automation, AI/ML integration, and workflow orchestration capabilities
  
Provide thought leadership on emerging automation technologies and industry trends
  
Conduct process discovery and assessment workshops to identify automation opportunities
  
Design automation CoE (Center of Excellence) operating models and governance frameworks
  
Develop ROI models and business case justifications for automation investments
  
Architect integrated automation solutions combining RPA, AI/ML, and low\-code platforms

1cc758c8.title: Solutions Architect Sr. Manager
1cc758c8.description:
**Key Responsibilities**
**JOB DESCRIPTION**
* Solution Design \& Technical Architecture:
* Develop end\-to\-end data center infrastructure solutions, focusing on power, cooling, and monitoring systems in alignment with Vertiv’s product portfolio.
* Create comprehensive design documentation, including site layout, equipment specifications, and system integration plans.
* Lead the selection and integration of Vertiv solutions such as Liebert cooling systems, NetSure power systems, and Avocent monitoring platforms.
* Responsible for Architecture \& Solution for the customer requirements with optimized design and dimensioning in the areas of Data Centre (Non IT) and field level infrastructure.
* Client Engagement \& Technical Consulting:
* Serve as the primary technical advisor for clients, translating business requirements into data center infrastructure designs.
* Conduct feasibility studies, site assessments, and risk analyses to recommend optimal design and build strategies.
* Oversee system integration, commissioning, and testing to ensure alignment with Vertiv standards and client expectations.
* Spearheading as a Solutions Architect and handling the Smart city Non\-IT infrastructure, DC/DR Physical Infrastructure (Non IT) designing, BOQ preparation, costing of the end to end solution.
* Compliance \& Best Practices:
* Ensure that all designs comply with industry standards (e.g., TIA\-942, Uptime Institute, ASHRAE), as well as Vertiv’s internal guidelines.
* Develop and enforce design best practices to optimize uptime, energy efficiency, and cost\-effectiveness.
* Technology Roadmapping \& Innovation:
* Stay updated on emerging data center technologies and Vertiv product developments to incorporate advanced solutions into infrastructure designs.
* Identify opportunities for system optimization, including modular scalability, renewable energy integration, and edge computing infrastructure.
* Documentation \& Reporting:
* Maintain comprehensive documentation, including technical drawings, data center design schematics, and commissioning reports.
* Provide strategic insights and recommendations to senior management on infrastructure optimization and risk mitigation.
* Training \& Knowledge Transfer:
* Conduct training sessions for engineering teams on Vertiv solutions and best practices in data center design and build.
* Mentor junior architects, promoting technical excellence and innovative design approaches.


**Qualifications And Requirements**
* Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or a related field; Master’s preferred.
* 14\+ years of experience in data center infrastructure design and build, with a focus on mission\-critical facilities.
* Extensive knowledge of Vertiv products (e.g., Liebert, NetSure, Avocent) and their integration in data center environments.
* Proficiency in design software (e.g., AutoCAD, Revit, ETAP) and project management tools.
* Certifications such as CDCP, CDCS, or Vertiv\-specific product certifications are highly desirable.
* Strong analytical skills, with expertise in power distribution, cooling systems, and network infrastructure design.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills, with the ability to articulate complex solutions to both technical and non\-technical stakeholders.

deb988e9.title: Delivery Executive and Architect, Google Cloud
deb988e9.description:
Note: By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following:
 **Bengaluru, Karnataka, India; Pune, Maharashtra, India** 
 .
 **Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 7 years of experience in program management, client services or management consulting.
* Experience delivering enterprise digital transformation projects to customers. (e.g., cloud migrations or multi\-cloud transformations across AI, data warehousing and analytics, application development, or cyber security).
* Ability to travel up to 50% of the time as required.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Experience leading cloud\-based transformation programs and software development solutions.
* Experience working with new and emerging technologies, methodologies, and solutions in the cloud and broader enterprise technology transformation space.
* Experience collaborating with channel partners, systems integrators, and third\-party developers to deliver high\-impact solutions.
* Experience with programs pertaining to data and analytics systems and implementations.


**About The Job**
 As a Technical Solutions Consultant, you will be responsible for the technical relationship of our largest advertising clients and/or product partners. You will lead cross\-functional teams in Engineering, Sales and Product Management to leverage emerging technologies for our external clients/partners. From concept design and testing to data analysis and support, you will oversee the technical execution and business operations of Google's online advertising platforms and/or product partnerships.
   

  

 You will be able to balance business and partner needs with technical constraints, develop innovative, cutting edge solutions and act as a partner and consultant to those you are working with. You will also be able to build tools and automate products, oversee the technical execution and business operations of Google's partnerships, as well as develop product strategy and prioritize projects and resources.
   

  

 The Strategic Partnerships, Delivery and Innovation team in Google Cloud have two priorities \- Engineering Incubation and Customer Incubation. We are involved in engineering experimentation and customer innovation using the latest AI products to help customers solve problems with Generative AI. In this role, you will work very closely with our product and engineering teams.
   

  

 Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise\-grade solutions that leverage Google’s cutting\-edge technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Lead enterprise\-wide Google Cloud adoption, workload prioritization, and cultural readiness while holding accountability at the board and executive level to ensure the program realizes financial benefits and business objectives.
* Define the overall governance model and service delivery plan, establishing a steady cadence to manage the ongoing execution of multi\-functional, large\-scale cloud transformation projects.
* Oversee the entire presales scoping life\-cycle and customer requirements, tracking timelines, managing stakeholder communication, and building risk mitigation plans.
* Deliver technical leadership for enterprise cloud architecture, documenting migration paths, integration strategies, and complete solution designs using Google Cloud best practices.
* Serve as the single point of technical contact for stakeholders into the consulting delivery team while capturing and sharing best practices to scale expertise.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

f639c7f0.title: Solutions Architect
f639c7f0.description:
Responsible for leading the development of comprehensive solution architecture strategies, ensuring seamless integration of application solutions across teams and domains while maintaining robust technical foundations. The role involves collaboration with other architects to validate feasibility, oversee compliance with quality attributes, manage technical risks, and guide IT architects to enhance their solution architecture leadership skills, all while aligning with FedEx best practices and technological standards.
   

  

* Lead and define solution architecture strategies, encompassing technology and architecture for seamless integration of application solutions across various teams and domains.
* Establish and maintain the architectural runway at a solution level, ensuring a robust technical foundation for the rapid and reliable creation of new functionalities and features across teams and ARTs.
* Collaborate with other architects to validate the feasibility and sustainability of solution architectures and application portfolio lifecycle planning, ensuring alignment with FedEx best practices and design standards.
* Oversee the management of non\-functional requirements and compliance to ensure that solution architectures meet essential quality attributes such as performance, scalability, security, and maintainability, meeting stakeholder acceptance criteria.
* Collaborate with other architects to define the appropriate delivery approach for solution services, encompassing processes, methodologies, tooling, and partnerships for agreement on service design and delivery.
* Identify and manage technical risks and continuous improvement opportunities for solution architectures, leveraging expert business knowledge to mitigate risks and capitalize on opportunities.
* Continuously monitor and evaluate new or emerging technologies utilized by internal teams, ensuring alignment with FedEx technological standards and potential integration into solution architectures.
* Provide guidance and mentorship to other IT architects to develop their skills and expertise in solution architecture leadership and execution.


 Education: Bachelor's degree in computer science, engineering, information systems and/or equivalent formal training or work experience. Relevant Master’s degree, TOGAF certification and SAFe Agile certification strongly preferred.
   

  

 Experience: Eight (8\) years equivalent work experience in information technology or engineering environment with a direct responsibility for strategy formulation and solution/technical architecture, as well as designing, architecting, developing, implementing and monitoring efficient and effective solutions to diverse and complex business problems.
   

  

**Knowledge, Skills And Abilities**
* Fluency in English
* Accuracy \& Attention to Detail
* Influencing \& Persuasion
* Planning \& Organizing
* Problem Solving
* Project Management


**Preferred Qualifications**
**Pay Transparency:**
**Pay**
**Additional Details:**
 FedEx was built on a philosophy that puts people first, one we take seriously. We are an equal opportunity/affirmative action employer and we are committed to a diverse, equitable, and inclusive workforce in which we enforce fair treatment, and provide growth opportunities for everyone.
   

  

 All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment regardless of age, race, color, national origin, genetics, religion, gender, marital status, pregnancy (including childbirth or a related medical condition), physical or mental disability, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws, regulations, and ordinances.
   

  

 Our Company
   

  

 FedEx is one of the world's largest express transportation companies and has consistently been selected as one of the top 10 World’s Most Admired Companies by "Fortune" magazine. Every day FedEx delivers for its customers with transportation and business solutions, serving more than 220 countries and territories around the globe. We can serve this global network due to our outstanding team of FedEx team members, who are tasked with making every FedEx experience outstanding.
   

  

 Our Philosophy
   

  

 The People\-Service\-Profit philosophy (P\-S\-P) describes the principles that govern every FedEx decision, policy, or activity. FedEx takes care of our people; they, in turn, deliver the impeccable service demanded by our customers, who reward us with the profitability necessary to secure our future. The essential element in making the People\-Service\-Profit philosophy such a positive force for the company is where we close the circle, and return these profits back into the business, and invest back in our people. Our success in the industry is attributed to our people. Through our P\-S\-P philosophy, we have a work environment that encourages team members to be innovative in delivering the highest possible quality of service to our customers. We care for their well\-being, and value their contributions to the company.
   

  

 Our Culture
   

  

 Our culture is important for many reasons, and we intentionally bring it to life through our behaviors, actions, and activities in every part of the world. The FedEx culture and values have been a cornerstone of our success and growth since we began in the early 1970’s. While other companies can copy our systems, infrastructure, and processes, our culture makes us unique and is often a differentiating factor as we compete and grow in today’s global marketplace.

75b76705.title: Senior Associate Vice President - Senior Solution Architect [T500-27508]
75b76705.description:
**About Deutsche Börse Group:** 




 Headquartered in Frankfurt, Germany, Deutsche Börse Group is a leading international exchange organization and market infrastructure provider. They empower investors, financial institutions, and companies by facilitating access to global capital markets.
 



 Their India centre is located in Hyderabad, serves as a key strategic hub and comprises India’s top\-tier tech talent. They focus on crafting advanced IT solutions that elevate market infrastructure and services. Deutsche Börse Group in India is composed of a team of capital market engineers forming the backbone of financial markets worldwide.
 



  





**DBI \- Data as a Service (DaaS)** 




**As of now** 
 Deutsche Börse Group is seeking a Senior Software Engineer/ Architect
 



**Your area of work:** 




 As part of Deutsche Börse Group’s expanding technology footprint in Hyderabad, you will take a key role in shaping the architecture and technical direction of the portfolio of Data\-as\-a\-Service (DaaS) applications operated by the DaaS operations unit. You will design robust, scalable, and secure architectures, ensure integration into the enterprise landscape, and support the engineering teams in implementing high quality, cloud native solutions.
 



 In addition, you will contribute hands on to development and operational readiness, ensuring that applications meet the performance, resilience, and compliance requirements of a regulated financial environment.
 



  





**Your responsibilities:** 



* **Architecture Ownership:** 
 Define end\-to\-end architecture for applications within the team’s responsibility, ensuring scalability, reliability, and alignment with DBG’s enterprise architecture and security frameworks.
* **Cloud \& Platform Architecture:** 
 Design cloud\-native architectures (primarily GCP), including infrastructure, networking, security controls, CI/CD, container orchestration, and observability patterns.
* **Solution Design \& Technical Leadership:** 
 Translate business and functional requirements into technical solution designs; guide engineers through implementation, integration, testing, and deployment.
* **Technical Governance:** 
 Review and validate system designs, architectural decisions, and technical documentation; ensure adherence to standards and regulatory expectations.
* **Engineering Contribution:** 
 Contribute to prototyping, automation, and components requiring architectural expertise; support development of backend services and integration pipelines.
* **Operational Readiness:** 
 Ensure solutions are production\-ready with proper monitoring, alerting, resilience concepts, and incident\-response alignment.
* **Collaboration \& Stakeholder Management:** 
 Work closely with Product Owners, Enterprise Architects, Security Officers, and Engineering teams across locations to deliver high\-quality solutions.
* **Continuous Improvement:** 
 Evaluate new technologies, foster architectural best practices, and drive modernization initiatives.



  





**Your profile:** 



* University degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or related technical field.
* 10\+ years of professional experience in software engineering, solution architecture, or cloud platform engineering, ideally in a regulated or financial environment.
* Strong architectural expertise in cloud native systems, microservices, event driven and streaming architectures, and distributed systems.
* Hands on experience with GCP, Terraform/Terraform Enterprise, Kubernetes, Helm, GKE, and service mesh technologies (e.g., Istio).
* Proficiency in CI/CD (GitHub Actions, Jenkins), scripting (Python, Bash), and modern DevOps practices.
* Experience with monitoring/logging stacks (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK, Dynatrace, Gray log).
* Good understanding of security architecture, IAM, network design, and compliance requirements.
* Strong analytical skills, conceptual thinking, and ability to explain complex technical topics clearly.
* Service and quality oriented mindset with strong communication skills; fluent in English.

4cb879c2.title: Solutions Architect
4cb879c2.description:
Responsible for leading the development of comprehensive solution architecture strategies, ensuring seamless integration of application solutions across teams and domains while maintaining robust technical foundations. The role involves collaboration with other architects to validate feasibility, oversee compliance with quality attributes, manage technical risks, and guide IT architects to enhance their solution architecture leadership skills, all while aligning with FedEx best practices and technological standards.
   

  

* Lead and define solution architecture strategies, encompassing technology and architecture for seamless integration of application solutions across various teams and domains.
* Establish and maintain the architectural runway at a solution level, ensuring a robust technical foundation for the rapid and reliable creation of new functionalities and features across teams and ARTs.
* Collaborate with other architects to validate the feasibility and sustainability of solution architectures and application portfolio lifecycle planning, ensuring alignment with FedEx best practices and design standards.
* Oversee the management of non\-functional requirements and compliance to ensure that solution architectures meet essential quality attributes such as performance, scalability, security, and maintainability, meeting stakeholder acceptance criteria.
* Collaborate with other architects to define the appropriate delivery approach for solution services, encompassing processes, methodologies, tooling, and partnerships for agreement on service design and delivery.
* Identify and manage technical risks and continuous improvement opportunities for solution architectures, leveraging expert business knowledge to mitigate risks and capitalize on opportunities.
* Continuously monitor and evaluate new or emerging technologies utilized by internal teams, ensuring alignment with FedEx technological standards and potential integration into solution architectures.
* Provide guidance and mentorship to other IT architects to develop their skills and expertise in solution architecture leadership and execution.


 Education: Bachelor's degree in computer science, engineering, information systems and/or equivalent formal training or work experience. Relevant Master’s degree, TOGAF certification and SAFe Agile certification strongly preferred.
   

  

 Experience: Eight (8\) years equivalent work experience in information technology or engineering environment with a direct responsibility for strategy formulation and solution/technical architecture, as well as designing, architecting, developing, implementing and monitoring efficient and effective solutions to diverse and complex business problems.
   

  

**Knowledge, Skills And Abilities**
* Fluency in English
* Accuracy \& Attention to Detail
* Influencing \& Persuasion
* Planning \& Organizing
* Problem Solving
* Project Management


**Preferred Qualifications**
**Pay Transparency:**
**Pay**
**Additional Details:**
 FedEx was built on a philosophy that puts people first, one we take seriously. We are an equal opportunity/affirmative action employer and we are committed to a diverse, equitable, and inclusive workforce in which we enforce fair treatment, and provide growth opportunities for everyone.
   

  

 All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment regardless of age, race, color, national origin, genetics, religion, gender, marital status, pregnancy (including childbirth or a related medical condition), physical or mental disability, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws, regulations, and ordinances.
   

  

 Our Company
   

  

 FedEx is one of the world's largest express transportation companies and has consistently been selected as one of the top 10 World’s Most Admired Companies by "Fortune" magazine. Every day FedEx delivers for its customers with transportation and business solutions, serving more than 220 countries and territories around the globe. We can serve this global network due to our outstanding team of FedEx team members, who are tasked with making every FedEx experience outstanding.
   

  

 Our Philosophy
   

  

 The People\-Service\-Profit philosophy (P\-S\-P) describes the principles that govern every FedEx decision, policy, or activity. FedEx takes care of our people; they, in turn, deliver the impeccable service demanded by our customers, who reward us with the profitability necessary to secure our future. The essential element in making the People\-Service\-Profit philosophy such a positive force for the company is where we close the circle, and return these profits back into the business, and invest back in our people. Our success in the industry is attributed to our people. Through our P\-S\-P philosophy, we have a work environment that encourages team members to be innovative in delivering the highest possible quality of service to our customers. We care for their well\-being, and value their contributions to the company.
   

  

 Our Culture
   

  

 Our culture is important for many reasons, and we intentionally bring it to life through our behaviors, actions, and activities in every part of the world. The FedEx culture and values have been a cornerstone of our success and growth since we began in the early 1970’s. While other companies can copy our systems, infrastructure, and processes, our culture makes us unique and is often a differentiating factor as we compete and grow in today’s global marketplace.

158803c6.title: Principal Solution Architect - ERP Ecosystem
158803c6.description:
Egis is a leading global consulting, construction engineering and operating firm. We work together with our clients, across every aspect of transport, energy, and the built environment to build a more balanced, sustainable, and resilient world. The Egis Group has more than 50 years of experience and a team of 22,000 employees in over 120 countries around the world. Joining our Group means, above all, sharing our values as a people\-first company, strongly committed to sustainability and innovation.
   

  

  

  

 In the UK we're proud to be delivering some of the most iconic projects which help connect people, protect our environment, and meet emission reduction targets. From motorways to tramways, and nuclear power plants to smart cities, clients choose us to help them solve their most complex challenges \- delivering climate\-responsible growth that meets the needs of communities, industry and the planet.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

 The Solution Architect is responsible for defining, ensuring consistency, and strengthening the robustness of IS architectures within the EARTH ecosystem scope (ERP, HCM, CRM, E\-PROD “Project and Portfolio Management” and complementary SaaS solutions).
   

  





 This is a high\-visibility role for a transformational leader, offering the opportunity to work extensively with international IT and business high\-level stakeholders. Working closely with the ERP Ecosystem Run (L2\-L3\) Delivery Manager and the Middleware integration leader, the Solution Architect will contribute directly to the stability, performance, and evolution of the EARTH solutions ecosystem, reducing structural incidents, and strengthening end\-to\-end business process fluidity \& data quality.
   

  

  

  




**Qualifications**

**Solution \& Technical Architecture**




 • Own the target and existing architecture for the EARTH ecosystem, covering applications, interfaces, data flows and key dependencies across Oracle Fusion ERP, HCM, PPM and satellite solutions.
   

  





 • Define, document and enforce architecture standards, integration patterns, API principles, data\-flow models and technical design guardrails.
   

  





 • Ensure end\-to\-end solution consistency, scalability, security, maintainability and alignment with enterprise architecture principles. Business–IT Alignment
   

  





 • Translate business needs into sustainable technical solutions, working closely with Business Analysts, BPOs, IT leadership and delivery teams.
   

  





 • Support prioritization of technical choices based on business value, risk reduction, operational efficiency and long\-term reusability.
   

  





 • Reduce the gap between business expectations and delivery by clarifying solution options, impacts, constraints and arbitration points. Project Framing, Design and Build\-to\-Run
   

  





 • Contribute to project framing and design phases, validating integration within the existing ecosystem and anticipating impacts on Run, supportability and performance.
   

  





 • Embed operability, monitoring, documentation and support requirements from the design stage to secure smooth Build\-to\-Run transition. Challenge customization, duplication and technical complexity to limit technical debt and promote reusable core model capabilities.
   

  





**Contribution to Run and Continuous Improvement**




 • Provide L3 expertise on major incidents and recurring structural issues, identifying root causes related to interfaces, data, dependencies or solution design.
   

  





 • Drive actions to improve IS stability, performance, data quality and end\-to\-end business process fluidity.
   

  





 • Promote automation, monitoring, knowledge capitalization and AI\-assisted practices to increase efficiency and reduce manual effort. Governance and Capitalization
   

  





 • Contribute to sustainable architecture governance across a multi\-application, multi\-country and multi\-stakeholder environment.
   

  





 • Participate in architecture reviews, technical decision\-making forums and solution arbitration with Enterprise Architecture and IT leadership.
   

  





 • Establish reliable documentation for architectures, interfaces, data flows, decision records and operational knowledge base content.
   

  





 Essential Experience
   

  





 • Significant experience as a Solution Architect, Lead Architect or Senior Functional/Technical Architect in complex enterprise application environments.
   

  





 • Strong exposure to Oracle Fusion ERP and Oracle HCM; experience with Oracle Integration Cloud, OCI and integration architecture is highly expected.
   

  





 • Experience working across Build and Run contexts, including project framing, solution design, support transition, incident analysis and continuous improvement.
   

  





 • Proven ability to operate in international, matrixed and multicultural organizations with both IT and business stakeholders. Technical \& Functional Expertise
   

  





 • Deep understanding of ERP, HCM, CRM, PPM and complementary SaaS ecosystems, with the ability to assess dependencies, data flows and integration impacts.
   

  





 • Knowledge of Dynamics 365 CRM B2B is a plus; experience with Planview or comparable PPM solutions is appreciated.
   

  





 • High ownership, curiosity, resilience and capacity to work in a changing environment where documentation and governance are still being strengthened.
   

  





 • Strong command of architecture documentation, interface mapping, data\-flow modelling, technical debt management and architecture governance practices.
   

  





 • Good understanding of ITIL\-oriented Run processes, especially incident, problem, change, release and knowledge management. Leadership \& Soft Skills
   

  





 • Strong analytical mindset with the ability to structure complex topics, identify root causes and propose pragmatic architecture options.
   

  





 • Excellent communication and influencing skills, able to align diverse stakeholders and explain technical matters to senior business and IT audiences.
   

  





 • Balanced strategic and operational posture, combining long\-term architecture vision with hands\-on pragmatism in Run and delivery contexts.
   

  





**Sucess Metrics**




 Architecture for the EARTH ecosystem is progressively documented, controlled and shared with Run, Build and Enterprise Architecture stakeholders.
   

  





 • Reusable solution patterns, integration standards and data\-flow principles are defined and applied across new initiatives.
   

  





 • Structural incidents and recurring root causes linked to solution design, interfaces or data quality are reduced through corrective architecture actions.
   

  





 • Business–IT alignment improves through clearer arbitration, stronger architectural governance and better readability of solution impacts. WORKING CONDITION
   

  





 • Build\-to\-Run handovers become more reliable, with clear documentation, supportability requirements and operational readiness checks.
   

  





 • Location: Bangalore, India. This is an office\-first role; remote work is permitted only on an occasional and exceptional basis.
   

  





 • International Exposure: This role involves frequent collaboration with European time zones and global teams, requiring flexibility and strong cross\-cultural communication skills.
   

  

  

  




**Additional Information**

 • Education: Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Information Systems, Engineering, Business Administration or a related field.
   

  





 • Experience: Typically, 10\+ years of experience in enterprise applications, including at least 5 years in solution architecture, integration architecture or senior ERP/HCM architecture roles.
   

  





 • Preferred background: consulting, system integration, large international IT organization, global ERP transformation program or complex SaaS ecosystem management.
   

  





 • Preferred certifications: Oracle Cloud certifications, TOGAF or equivalent architecture certification, ITIL Foundation or higher.

3b58785e.title: Cloud Transformation - CIS
3b58785e.description:
Hyderabad, Telangana \| Full Time
   

  

 Apply Now
   

  

**About Neudesic**
 Passion for technology drives us, but it’s innovation that defines us. From design to development
   

  

 and support to management, Neudesic offers decades of experience, proven frameworks, and a
   

  

 disciplined approach to quickly deliver reliable, quality solutions that help our customers go to
   

  

 market faster.
   

  

 What sets us apart from the rest is an amazing collection of people who live and lead with our core
   

  

 values. We believe that everyone should be Passionate about what they do, Disciplined to the core,
   

  

 Innovative by nature, committed to a Team and conduct themselves with Integrity. If these
   

  

 attributes mean something to you \- we'd like to hear from you.
   

  

**Role Profile**
 We are currently looking for Azure Cloud Engineers to become a member of Neudesic’ s Cloud
   

  

 Transformation \- CIS team.
   

  

**Minimum Experience:** 
 5\+ Years
   

  

**Azure Infrastructure Consultant**
* Expertise in Azure services, including Virtual Machines, Storage, Networking, and Security.
* Proficiency with Azure migration tools such as Azure Migrate, Azure Site Recovery, and Azure
* Proficiency with IaC (Terraform/Bicep)
* Proficiency in scripting and automation using PowerShell, Azure CLI, or similar tools.
* Database Migration Service.
* Proficiency in Migration methods like Rehost, Rebuild, Re\-platform and Rearchitect.
* Strong understanding of networking concepts (UDRs, Private DNS resolvers and DNS
* forwarding's), VPNs(S2S and P2S), ExpressRoute, and load balancers.
* Proficiency in Azure Monitor, Application insights, Azure KQL and Network Insights.
* Experience with scripting and automation using PowerShell, Azure CLI, or similar tools.
* Strong understanding of networking concepts, VPNs, ExpressRoute, and load balancers.
* Familiarity with containerization technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes.
* Familiarity with database migration tools and methodologies.


**Azure DevOps Engineer**
* Expertise in Docker, Docker Compose, Kubernetes, and AKS.
* Experience with Prometheus, ElasticSearch, Grafana, Loki, and Dynatrace.
* Knowledge of Istio, Linkerd, Kong Mesh, NGINX, Traefik, and Kong ingress controllers.
* Understanding of networking concepts related to container orchestration and microservices.
* Proficiency in Azure infrastructure components (VMs, Storage Accounts, Networking, etc.).
* Experience with Azure DevOps, CI/CD pipelines, and artifact repositories.
* Knowledge of build and test systems (CMake, Makefile, cmocka, Maven, MS Build, NPM,SCA).
* Understanding of Azure Policy, RBAC, cost management, monitoring, and alerting.
* Strong knowledge of DevSecOps practices and WAF/CAF application.
* Proficiency in Python, Golang, Shell, and Bash scripting.
* Be aware of phishing scams involving fraudulent career recruiting and fictitious job postings; visit our Phishing Scams page to learn more.
